translations.source: Schistosomiasis (Bilharzia) Overview: Schistosomiasis is a disease of poverty that leads to chronic ill-health. Infection is acquired when people come into contact with fresh water infested with the larval forms (cercariae) of parasitic blood flukes, known as schistosomes. The microscopic adult worms live in the veins draining the urinary tract and intestines. Most of the eggs they lay are trapped in the tissues and the bodyвҖҷs reaction to them can cause massive damage.
translations.reference: Masassako. Masassako wata cuta ce da ke dangana ga matsananciyar kamuwa da rashin lafiya wanda ke samuwa ta dalilin ta'amali da tantagaryar ruwan da ke Й—auke da wata halitta mai suna schistosome a turance da ke rayuwa cikin jini. Ana iya kamuwa da cutar ne a yayin da mutane su ka yi ta'ammuli da tantagaryar ruwan da ke ya gurЙ“ata da Жҷananan tsutsotsin da ke tsotse jini wanda aka ke kira schistosome a turance. Manyan tsutsotsin da akan iya ganin shi a na'urar Жҷara Жҷarfin gani na rayuwa ne a cikin jijiya wanda totse mafitar fitsari da Жҙan hanji. Mafi yawan Жҷwoyayen da su ke yi yana Жҷargamuwa ne a tsoka sannan yanayin da jiki zai amsa na sanyawa su zama gagarumin matsala .

translations.source: Schistosomiasis affects almost 240 million people worldwide, and more than 700 million people live in endemic areas. The infection is prevalent in tropical and sub-tropical areas, in poor communities without potable water and adequate sanitation. Urogenital schistosomiasis is caused by Schistosoma haematobium and intestinal schistosomiasis by any of the organisms S. guineensis, S. intercalatum, S. mansoni, S. japonicum, and S. mekongi. Several million people all over the world suffer from severe morbidity as a consequence of schistosomiasis. The WHO strategy on use of anthelminthic drugs now makes it possible to control schistosomiasis in poor and marginalized communities, in conjunction with interventions against lymphatic filariasis, onchocerciasis and soil transmitted helminthiasis.
translations.reference: Kusan mutane miliyan 240 ne su ka kamu da wannan cuta ta masassako a duniya, kuma sama da mutane miliyan 700 ke rayuwa a inda wannan cuta ta yi Жҷamari. Kamuwa da cutar na da nasaba ne a wajajen da su ke da raЙ“a da maka-mantan su, a unguwanni ko guraren da ba su da wadatacce kuma ingantaccen ruwan sha da kuma tsabtar muhalli. Masassakon al'aura na samuwa ne ta dalilin masassakon cikin jini da kuma na cikin hanji, wanda ke Й—aya daga cikin jinsin halittun S. guineensis, S intercalatum, S. mansoni, S. japonicum da kuma S. mekongi. Miliyoyin mutane dayawa a duniya na fama da matsanancin rashin lafiya ta dalilin illar masassako. Hanyar da kungiyar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) ta kawo wajen amfani da magungunan da su ke da tasiri akan tsutsan jiki ya zama na za'a iya magance masassako a guraren da ke gama-garin guri ne, tare da kawo tallafi ko agaji game da Жҷwayoyin cutar da ke haifar da rashin jin zafi ko wani alamun gane akwai cuta a jiki, cutar makanta da ake kira river blindness a turance, da kuma cututtukan da su kan iya yaЙ—uwa ta rairayi (Жҷasa) wato helminthiasis.
translations.hypothesis: Malariya ta shaf karfin mutane 240 million a duniya, kuma karin 700 million mutane na Й—aura a wuraren da cutar ta kasance. Cutar na daЙ—a a wuraren tropikal da sub-tropikal, a wuraren da ba da amfani, kuma ba da yanayin da ya dace. Malariya na urogenital ta kasance ne saboda Schistosoma haematobium, kuma malariya na Жҷasa ta kasance ne saboda wani daga masu cutar S. guineensis, S. intercalatum, S. mansoni, S. japonicum, da S. mekongi. Kakin mutane da yawa a duniya, kamar yadda ke faruwa, ne saboda malariya. Hakan ya sa Wasa ya wadata, kuma ya iya taimakawa da kuma dawo da malariya a wuraren da ba da amfani, tare da matakan da ya taimakawa da kuma dawo da malariya, onchocerciasis, da kuma malariya da ta shafar Жҷasa.

translations.source: In highly endemic areas, severe morbidity due to schistosomiasis can be prevented by regular treatment of at risk groups targeted based on community diagnosis based on sentinel groups. Praziquantel has been safely co-administered with albendazole and ivermectin, in areas where these drugs have been used separately for preventive chemotherapy. Symptoms: Symptoms of schistosomiasis are caused by the bodyвҖҷs reaction to the worms' eggs. Intestinal schistosomiasis can result in abdominal pain, diarrhoea, and blood in the stool. Liver enlargement is common in advanced cases, and is frequently associated with an accumulation of fluid in the peritoneal cavity and hypertension of the abdominal blood vessels.
translations.reference: A guraren da su ka yi Жҷamari, za'a iya samun kariya daga tsananin cutar masassako ta hanyar bada magani ga waЙ—anda su ke cikin barazanar kamuwa da ita idan aka yi duba da guraren da aka yi bincike wajen gane Жҷarfin cutar ta hanyar mutanen wajen. Magungunan praziquentel da albendazole su aka fi bayarwa da kuma ibermectin, a wajen da ake amfani da waЙ—annan magunguna a mabanbanta lokuta don bada cikakken kariya ta hanyar amfani da magunguna. Alamomi: alamomin masassako na faruwa ne ta hanyar yadda yanayin jiki ke komawa ta dalilin waЙ—annan Жҷwoyayen tsutsotsin.. Masassakon hanji na kawo ciwon mara, gudawa, da kuma jini a cikin bahaya. Girman hanta na daga cikin abubuwan da ke nuni da tasirin cutar , kuma yana da alaЖҷa da tara ruwa a fatar ciki da kuma yawan jinin da ke gudana a jijiyoyin mara.
translations.hypothesis: ЩҒЩҗЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…Ш§ЩғЩҶ Ш°ЩҠ Щ…Ш№ШҜЩ„ Щ„Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ШҢ ШЁЩҠЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩғШіШӘЩҲЩ…ШҢ ЩҠгҒ»гҒҶ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ЩҲЩ…ЩҶШ№ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ„Ш¬Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШӘШёЩ…Ш© Щ„Щ„Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШұШ¶Ш© Щ„Щ„Ш®Ш·ШұШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩҸШӯШҜШҜ ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎЩӢ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘШҙШ®ЩҠШө Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№ЩҠШҢ ШЁШ§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш§ШӘ Щ…ШұШ§ЩӮШЁШ©. ШҜЩҲШ§ШЎ "ШЁШұШ§ШІЩҠЩғЩҲШ§ЩҶШӘЩ„" ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ШЁШЈЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Щ…Ш№ "ШЈЩ„ШЁЩҠЩҶШҜШ§ШІЩҲЩ„" ЩҲ "Ш§ЩҠЩҒШұЩ…ЩҠЩғЩҠЩҶ"ШҢ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…Ш§ЩғЩҶ ШӯЩҠШ« ЩҮШӨЩ„Ш§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…ЩҲЩҶ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ Щ…ЩҶЩҒШөЩ„ Щ„ШәШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩӮШ§ШҰЩҠ. Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶: Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩғШіШӘЩҲЩ…ШҢ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ ЩҶШ§ШӘШ¬Ш© Ш№ЩҶ ШұШҜ ЩҒШ№Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШіЩ… Ш№Щ„Щү ШЁЩҠШ¶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠШҜШ§ЩҶ. Щ…ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩғШіШӘЩҲЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…Ш№Ш§ШЎШҢ ЩҠЩҸЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠЩҸШіШЁШЁ ШўЩ„Ш§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·ЩҶШҢ ШҘШіЩҮШ§Щ„ШҢ ЩҲ ШҜЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁШұШ§ШІ. ШӘШ¶Ш®Щ… Ш§Щ„ЩғШЁШҜШҢ ЩҮЩҲ ШЈЩ…Шұ ШҙШ§ШҰШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘЩӮШҜЩ…Ш©ШҢ ЩҲШәШ§Щ„ШЁЩӢШ§ Щ…Ш§ ЩҠШұШӘШЁШ· ШЁЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ ШіЩҲШ§ШҰЩ„ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШ¬ЩҲЩҠЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·ЩҶ ЩҲШ§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ Ш¶ШәШ· Ш§Щ„ШҜЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШ№ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШҜЩ…ЩҲЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·ЩҶ.

translations.source: In such cases there may also be enlargement of the spleen. The classic sign of urogenital schistosomiasis is haematuria (blood in urine). Fibrosis of the bladder and ureter, and kidney damage are sometimes diagnosed in advanced cases. Bladder cancer is another possible complication in the later stages. In women, urogenital schistosomiasis may present with genital lesions, vaginal bleeding, pain during sexual intercourse, and nodules in the vulva.
translations.reference: A irin waЙ—annan matsaloli akwai yiyuwar Жҷarin girman sefa. Mafi gamsuwar alamar wannan cuta ta masassakon al'aura shi ne alamun jini a cikin fitsari wanda ake kira da haematuria a turance. Жҳaban mafitsara da na mahaifa, gami da lalacewar Жҷoda na daga cikin abubuwan da za'a iya ganowa idan cutar ta shahara. Wani abun da za'a iya ganewa da ke da tsarkakiya shi ne Жҷarin mafitsara a matakin gaba. Cutar masassakon al'aura ga mata na iya zuwa da buЙ—uwar matantaka, zuban jini a matantaka, jin zafi a lokutan mu'amalar aure, da kuma fitowar Жҷurji akan al'aura.
translations.hypothesis: "A cikin wannan, ЩҠЩҲШ§ЩғЩҠШІ (spleen) ЩҠШәШҜЩҲ. "Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠ ЩҠШ§ЩҲ Щ„ЩҖ (urogenital schistosomiasis) ЩҮЩҲ "Ш§Щ„ШҜЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҲЩ„" (haematuria). "Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҮШ§ШЁ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҲЩ„" ЩҲ "Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҮШ§ШЁ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶШЁЩҲШЁ"ШҢ ЩҲ "ШӘЩ„ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩ„Щү" ЩҠЩҲШ§ЩғЩҠШІ ЩҠЩҲШ§ЩғЩҠШІ ЩҠЩҲШ§ЩғЩҠШІ. "ШіШұШ·Ш§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҲЩ„" ЩҮЩҲ ЩҠШ§ЩҲ ЩҠЩҲШ§ЩғЩҠШІ ЩҠЩҲШ§ЩғЩҠШІ. translations.source: In men, urogenital schistosomiasis can induce pathology of the seminal vesicles, prostate, and other organs. This disease may also have other long-term irreversible consequences, including infertility. The economic and health effects of schistosomiasis are considerable and the disease disables more than it kills. In children, schistosomiasis can cause anaemia, stunting and a reduced ability to learn, although the effects are usually reversible with treatment. Treatment: Praziquantel is the recommended treatment against all forms of schistosomiasis.
translations.reference: Cutar masassakon al'aura ga maza kan iya samar da Жҷurajen mazakuta, Жҷarin mazakuta da wasu sauran sassan jiki. Wannan cuta na iya jawo matsalolin da ba za'a iya magance su ba wanda ya haЙ—a da rashin haihuwa. Akan duba tasirin masaassaku ta fuskar tattalin arziki da lafiya kuma cutar na illatarwa fiye da yanda ya ke kisa. Cutar masassako na iya jawo cutar Жҷarancin jini ga yara Жҷanana, disashewa da kuma rashin koyon abu da wuri duk da akan iya shawo kan waЙ—annan ta hanyar magani. Magani: Praziquentel ne maganin da ake bayarwa wajen magance duk wani irin nau'i na masassako.

Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬: "Praziquantel" ЩҮЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШөЩү ШЁЩҮ Щ„Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ШЈШҙЩғШ§Щ„ "Schistosomiasis".

translations.source: It is effective, safe, and low-cost. Even though re-infection may occur after treatment, the risk of developing severe disease is diminished and even reversed when treatment is initiated and repeated in childhood. Schistosomiasis control has been successfully implemented over the past 40 years in several countries, including Brazil, Cambodia, China, Egypt, Mauritius, Islamic Republic of Iran, Oman, Jordan, Saudi Arabia, Morocco, Tunisia, etc. In Burundi, Burkina Faso, Ghana, Niger, Rwanda, Sierra Leone, the United Republic of Tanzania, and Yemen, it has been possible to scale-up schistosomiasis treatment to the national level and have an impact on the disease in a few years. An assessment of the status of transmission is required in several countries.
translations.reference: Yana da matuЖҷar tasiri, ingantacce ne sannan kuma yana da sauЖҷi. Duk da ya kan iya dawowa bayan an yi magani, amma an disashar da barazanar matsananciyar kamuwa da cutar kuma ma an gusar da ita idan an fara magance ta kuma aka ci gaba da magance a lokacin yarinta. An sarrafa cutar masassako fiye da shekaru arba'in a mafiya yawan kasashe da su ka haЙ—a da Brazil, Cambodia, Chaina,Masar, Mauritius, Kasar IraЖҷi, Oman, Jordan, Saudiya, Maroko, Tunisiya da sauransu. A Burundi, Burkina faso, Ghana, Nijar, Ruwanda, Saliyo, Жҷasar Tanzania da Yaman, suna fafatutukar magance cutar masassako a matakin tarayya sannan kuma za su iya cimma wannan cutar a wasu shekaru kaЙ—an. Ana buЖҷatar lura da duba ga yanda cutar ke yaЙ—uwa a Жҷasashe dayawa.

translations.source: Over the past 10 years, there has been scale-up of treatment campaigns in a number of sub-Saharan countries, where most of those at risk live.

translations.source: Self-care interventions for health Overview: Self-care is the ability of individuals, families and communities to promote health, prevent disease, maintain health, and cope with illness and disability with or without the support of a health worker.Currently 3.6 billion people вҖ“ half of the world вҖ“ lack access to essential health services. WHO recommends self-care interventions for every country and economic setting, as a critical path to reach universal health coverage, promote health, keep the world safe, and serve the vulnerable. Self-care recognises individuals as active agents in managing their own health care, in areas including health promotion; disease prevention and control; self-medication; providing care to dependent persons, and rehabilitation, including palliative care. Self-care interventions are evidence-based, quality tools that support self-care.
translations.reference: Tallafawa kai wajen tsaron lafiya Kula da kai wani abu ne da kowane mutune ke yi a matsayin Й—aiЙ—aiku, iyalai da kuma unguwanni don inganta lafiya , bada kariya daga cututtuka, ririta lafiya, da kuma juriya daga cuta ko wata nakasa da tallafin ma'aikatan lafiya ko ba taimakon su. A yanzu haka mutane biliyan 3.6 - rabin duniya - su na Жҷarancin samun kula a matakin farko na ayyukan lafiya. Hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) ta bada shawaran tallafawa kai da kuma tsarin tattalin arziki ga kowace Жҷasa, a matsayin hanya mafi tsauri don cimma wata gamammiyar matakin samar da lafiya a duniya gabaЙ—aya, inganta lafiya, kuma a samar da tsaro ga duniya, sannan a tseratar da masu rauni. Kula da kai na wayar da mutane da su wakilai ma su himma wajen kula da lafiyar su, a wasu wajajen da su ka haЙ—a da inganta lafiya; samar da kariya daga cututtuka da kuma hanyoyin daЖҷile su; bawa kai magani; samar da kula ga waЙ—anda ba za su iya yiwa kan su ba, da kuma gyara ; da su ka haЙ—a da bada tallafin kula. Kula da kai abu ne da ke a zahiri, ingantattun kayan ayyuka don kula da kai.
translations.hypothesis: ШЈШҜШ§ШЁ ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш°Ш§ШӘ: Щ„Щ…ШӯШ© Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш©: ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш°Ш§ШӘ ЩҮЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШҜШұШ© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜШҢ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШұ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№Ш§ШӘ Щ„ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ©ШҢ Щ…ЩҶШ№ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҒШ§Шё Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ©ШҢ ЩҲЩғЩҠЩҒЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№Ш§Щ…Щ„ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҘШ№Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘШҢ ШіЩҲШ§ШЎ Щ…Ш№ ШЈЩҲ ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ ШҜШ№Щ… Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ШӘШ®ШөШө ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©. translations.source: They include medicines, counselling, diagnostics and/or digital technologies which can be accessed fully or partially outside of formal health services. Depending on the intervention, they can be used with or without the direct supervision of health workers. Self-care interventions can: empower individuals and communities to manage their health and well-being strengthen national institutions with efficient use of domestic resources for health
translations.reference: Sun haЙ—a da magunguna, rarrashi, binciken cutuka da kuma ilimin fasaha da za'a iya samu duka ko wani bangare a fannin ayyukan lafiya. Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШ®Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш°Ш§ШӘЩҠШ© ШҜШ§ЩҠЩҲШ§: ЩҠЩ…ЩҶШӯ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҲШ© Щ„ШҘШҜШ§ШұШ© ШөШӯШӘЩҮЩ… ЩҲШұЩҒШ§ЩҮЩҠШӘЩҮЩ…ШҢ ЩҲЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӨШіШіШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ·ЩҶЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ШұШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯЩ„ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠ

translations.source: improve primary healthcare (PHC) and contribute to achieving UHC Approach: A people-centred approach Self-care interventions support the needs and rights of individuals through a people-centred approach that is grounded in human rights and gender equality. This is a holistic approach to the health and well-being of each person, taking account of their circumstances, needs and desires across a lifetime, as well as the environment in which they live. Self-care is the power of individuals to prevent and treat diseases themselves, in the context of a safe and supportive enabling environment. It does not replace the health care system, but instead provides additional choices and options for health care.
translations.reference: yana inganta kula da lafiya a matakin farko sannan kuma yana taimakawa wajen cimma wajen samar da gamammiyar lafiya duka Tunkara: Tallafin da ya ke nufin mutane kai tsaye na bada gudunmuwa wajen samar da buЖҷatu da kuma hakkokin mutane ta hanyar tunkarar mutane da ya ta'allaЖҷa da hakkokin Й—an adam da kuma daidaiton jinsi. Wannan wata fuska ce da za'a samar da gamayyar lafiya da zaman lafiyan kowane mutum, dauЖҷar nauyin yanayin da su ke ciki, buЖҷatu da manufofin da ke kewaye da rayuwa, da kuma muhallin da su ke rayuwa a ciki. Kula da kai wani nauyi ne na kowane mutum da zai yi amfani da shi wajen kariya da kuma magance cututtuka da kan shi, cikin tsaro da kuma iya bada gudunmuwa ga al'umma. bai maye gurbin tsarin kula da lafiya ba amma maimakon haka yana samar da wasu Жҷarin zaЙ“i ne da kuma nau'ikan tsarin kula da lafiya.
translations.hypothesis: ЩҠШӯШіЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© (PHC) ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§ЩҮЩ…Ш© ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ ЩҶЩҮШ¬ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„Ш© (UHC): ЩҶЩҮШ¬ ЩҠШұЩғШІ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШ®Щ„Ш§ШӘ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш°Ш§ШӘЩҠШ© ШӘШҜШ№Щ… Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӯШӘЩҠШ§Ш¬Ш§ШӘ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӯЩӮЩҲЩӮ Ч©Чң Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ЩҶЩҮШ¬ ЩҠШұЩғШІ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ Щ…ШЁЩҶЩҠ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӯЩӮЩҲЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҶШіШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§ЩҲШ§Ш© ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠЩҶ. wannan yana da ЩҶЩҮШ¬ ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„ Щ„ШөШӯШӘЩҮ ЩҲШұЩҒШ§ЩҮЩҠШӘЩҮШҢ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®Ш° ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§Шұ ШёШұЩҲЩҒЩҮЩ…ШҢ Ш§ШӯШӘЩҠШ§Ш¬Ш§ШӘЩҮЩ…ШҢ ЩҲШұШәШЁШ§ШӘЩҮЩ… Ш·ЩҲШ§Щ„ ШӯЩҠШ§ШӘЩҮЩ…ШҢ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШҰШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҠШ№ЩҠШҙЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠЩҮШ§. Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш°Ш§ШӘЩҠШ© ЩҮЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШҜШұШ© Ч©Чң Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜ Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ№ ЩҲШ№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ ШЁШЈЩҶЩҒШіЩҮЩ…ШҢ ЩҒЩҠ ШЁЩҠШҰШ© ШўЩ…ЩҶШ© ЩҲШҜШ§Ш№Щ…Ш©. wannan Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШӯЩ„ Щ…ШӯЩ„ ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩғЩҶЩҮ ЩҠЩҲЩҒШұ Ш®ЩҠШ§ШұШ§ШӘ ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒЩҠШ© Щ„Ш®ШҜЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©.

translations.source: Available, accessible, affordable, acceptable and good quality self-care interventions are core components of promoting and protecting peopleвҖҷs right to health. Self-care interventions can improve the efficiency of health service delivery, access and coverage. This requires supportive laws and policies, health financing, regulated quality products and interventions, and education which promotes the participation of individuals, as well as privacy and confidentiality. Human rights considerations help to reduce violence, coercion, stigma and discrimination by improving each personвҖҷs exercise of their right to health, information, and independent decision-making. Emergency context
translations.reference: Tallafin kula da ke a wadace, wanda kowa zai iya samu, wanda kuma ke da rangwamen farashi, aka yarda da shi da kuma inganci na daga cikin abubuwa mafi muhimmanci da Жҷololuwa wajen inganta lafiya da kuma kare hakkokin mutane. Kula da kai zai Жҷara inganta tsarin samar da ayyukan lafiya , samu da kuma gamayya. Wannan yana buЖҷatar dokoki da tsarin za su bada gudunmuwa, samar da kuЙ—in shiga sashin lafiya, kula da lura da ingantattun kayayyaki da kuma tallafi, sannan kuma ilimi wanda zai inganta cuЙ—anyar mutane, keЙ“ancewa da kuma sirri. Lura da hakkokin Й—an adam na bada taimako wajen rage tashin-tashina, rigima, Жҷyara, da tsangwama ta hanyar inganta gwazon kowane mutum wajen samar masa da Жҙan lafiya, sanarwa da kuma yanke hukunci na tare da dogaro da kowa ba. Yanayin gaggawa

ШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎШ§ШӘ ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш°Ш§ШӘЩҠШ©, ЩҠЩҸЩ…ЩғЩ‘ЩҗЩҶЩҲЩҶ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ ЩғЩҒШ§ШЎШ© ШӘЩӮШҜЩҠЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш®ШҜЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„ЩҠЩҮШ§ШҢ ЩҲ ШӘШәШ·ЩҠШӘЩҮШ§. wannan ЩҠЩҺШӘЩҺШ№Щ’Ш¬ЩҺШЁ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩӮЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠЩҶ ЩҲ ШіЩҠШ§ШіШ§ШӘ ШҜШ§Ш№Щ…Ш©ШҢ ШӘЩ…ЩҲЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©ШҢ Щ…ЩҶШӘШ¬Ш§ШӘ ЩҲШ№Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш°Ш§ШӘ Ш¬ЩҲШҜШ© Щ…ЩҸЩҶШёЩ…Ш©ШҢ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү ШӘШ№Щ„ЩҠЩ…, Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ ЩҠЩҸЩ…ЩғЩ‘ЩҗЩҶЩҲЩҶ Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜШҢ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш®ШөЩҲШөЩҠШ© ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШіШұЩҠШ©. Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§ШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ№Щ„ЩӮШ© ШЁШӯЩӮЩҲЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҶШіШ§ЩҶ, ЩҠЩҸЩ…ЩғЩ‘ЩҗЩҶЩҲЩҶ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶЩҒШҢ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩғШұШ§ЩҮШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩ…ШҢ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩ…ЩҠЩҠШІ, Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ ЩӮШҜШұШ© ЩғЩ„ ЩҒШұШҜ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…Щ…Ш§ШұШіШ© ШӯЩӮЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩ…Ш§ШӘШҢ ЩҲШ§ШӘШ®Ш§Ш° ЩӮШұШ§ШұШ§ШӘ Щ…ШіШӘЩӮЩ„Ш©. translations.source: Pandemics and humanitarian crisesIn situations where existing health systems are stretched, there is often an unprecedented demand on individuals and communities to manage their health. Innovative strategies that go beyond the conventional health sector response is urgently needed given that: a record 274 million people are currently in need of humanitarian assistance and protection and disease outbreaks are a constant global threat at least 400 million people worldwide lack access to the most essential health services. 1 in 5 of the worldвҖҷs population are now living in humanitarian crises, in which health systems are challenged to deliver essential services.
translations.reference: Annobar da ta game duniya da annobar da ta shafi wani bangare a yanayin da tsarin kiwon lafiya yake halin kaka-nikayi , akwai waЙ—ansu buЖҷatu da su ke zuwa bagatatan ga Й—aiЙ—aikun mutane da ma al'umma don ingantawa da kuka da lafiyar su. Ana buЖҷatar ЖҷirЖҷirarrun hanyoyin da su ka shallake tsarin kiwon lafiya da gaggawa da za su ba da: Жҷiyasin mutane miliyan 274 na buЖҷatar agajin gaggawa da tsaro a yanzu haka , sannan kuma Й“arkewan annobar ma daga cikin abinda ya zama barazana ga duniya. a Жҷalla mutane miliyan 400 ne a duniya da su ka rasa mafi buЖҷatuwar tsarin kiwon lafiya. 1 daya cikin 5 na mutanen duniya su na rayuwa ne a inda akwai annoba, in da ake samun Жҷalubale a tsarin kiwon lafiya ta wajen bada muhimman ayyuka.
translations.hypothesis:
cuta da zaman sama.

A lokutan da ana amfani da na'uwan lafiyay, ana bukaci mutane da jama'a su yi aikin lafiyay su. Ana bukaci hanyar da ta wadata, wanda ta wuce hanyar da na'uwan lafiyay ke amfani da ita, saboda: 274 million mutane na bukaci gobe da kiyaye, kuma cuta da zaman sama na kasance suna da bashi a duniya. Ko da mutane 400 million a duniya, ba su da aikin lafiyay da farko. 1 cikin 5 na mutane a duniya, na kasance a cikin zaman sama, inda na'uwan lafiyay ke bukaci su samar da aikin da farko.

translations.source: Self-care interventions can provide valuable, additional options to the usual health facility- or health worker-based services, as part of a supportive health system. This is particularly relevant during a pandemic like COVID-19, when self-isolation and physical distancing measures make it more difficult for people to access their normal health care services and medications and national health systems can be disrupted. WHO includes self-care interventions as priority actions in operational guidance on maintaining essential health services for the COVID-19 context.
translations.reference: Taimakawa kai zai samar da wasu Жҷarin hanyoyi mafi cancanta ga Жҷananan asibitoci ko kuma wajajen da ma'aikatan lafiya ke bada gudunmawa, a matsayin wani Й“angare na tallafawa tsarin kiwon lafiya. Wannan musamman yana nuni da abinda faru misali a lokacin annobar cutar mashaЖҷo, a lokacin da keЙ“e kai da kuma bada tazara ya yiwa mutane wahala wajen samun kula da lafiyar su kamar yadda su ka saba da kuma magunguna su, kuma ma'aikatar tsarin kiwon lafiya ta Жҷasa ta damu. Kungiyar kiwon lafiya ta duniya WHO ta sanya tsarin kula da kai a matsayin mafi muhimmancin aiki a wajajen da ake horarwa kan kula da matakin farko na kiwon lafiya a abin da ya shafi binciken cutar mashaЖҷo.

translations.source: Sepsis Overview: Sepsis is a life-threatening condition that arises when the bodyвҖҷs response to infection causes injury to its own tissues and organs. It is frequently a final common pathway to death for many infectious diseases worldwide. It involves organ dysfunction caused by a dysregulated host response to infection and if not recognized early and managed promptly, it can lead to septic shock, multiple organ failure and death. Although a precise estimate of the global epidemiological burden of sepsis is difficult to ascertain, a recent scientific publication reported that sepsis affects an estimated 49 million people and causes 11 million deaths globally every year.
translations.reference: Yanayin Sepsis Sepsis wani yanayi ne da ke barazana ga rayuwar mutum da ke tashi a lokacin da jiki ke amsa kuwwar shigar kamuwa da cuta , ya kan yi sanadiyyar sanya rauni ga ita kanta jiki da saura gaЙ“oЙ“in jiki. Mafi akasari hakan wani mataki ne na Жҷarshe zuwa ga mutawa ga mafi yawan cututtuka a duniya. Ya haЙ—a da tsaikon aikin gaЙ“Й“ai, wanda ya ke haifar da rashin daidaiton jikin wanda ke Й—auke da cutar kuma idan ba'a gane shi da wuri ba kuma an magance shi ba ya kan iya haifar da shanyewan jiki, tsayar da ayyukan sassan gaЙ“oЙ“i da kuma mutuwa. Duk da dai babu wani Жҷiyasi a duniya da za'a iya tabbatar da wahalar annobar sepsis, a wata wallafa ta kimiyya da aka yi kwanannan ta kawo rahoton cewa an samu mutane miliyan 49 da sepsis ta kama sannan kuma ta na sanadin ajalin mutane miliyan 11 a duniya kowace shekara.

translations.source: In the community setting, sepsis often presents as the clinical deterioration of common and preventable infections. Sepsis also frequently results from infections acquired in health care settings, which are one of the most frequent adverse events during care delivery and affect hundreds of millions of patients worldwide every year. If sepsis develops during pregnancy, while or after giving birth, or after an abortion, it is called maternal sepsis. Sepsis in newborn babies is called neonatal sepsis. Despite being highly preventable, maternal and neonatal sepsis continues to be a major cause of death for pregnant women and newborn babies.
translations.reference: a tsarin zamantakewa na gurare, ana gabatar da sepsis a matsayin taЙ“arЙ“arewar magance cutar da aka sani ne wanda kuma za'a iya samun kariya daga gare ta. Hakan mafi yawanci akan samun sepsis ne a sanadiyyar cutar da aka kamu da ita a tsarin kula da lafiya, wanda yana Й—aya daga cikin mafi yawan abubuwan da aka na samu cigaba wajen isar da tsarin kula da kiwon lafiya sannan kuma ya shafi Й—aruruwan miliyoyi na majinyata a duniya kowace shekara. Idan sepsis ya auku a lokacin ciki, a yayin ko kuma bayan haihuwa, ko bayan zubar da ciki na kiran sa da sepsis da ya shafi iyaye mata. Sepsis da ya shafi jarirai sabbin haihuwa ana kiran sa da sepsis na jarirai. Duk da kasancewar yana za'a iya matuЖҷar kiyaye shi, sepsis na iyaye mata da na jarirai yana ci gaba da zama babban ajali ga mata masu ciki da kuma jarirai.

translations.source: Symptoms: Sepsis is a medical emergency and requires immediate attention to prevent further complications or death. It may present different warning signs and symptoms at times, some of which may cause misidentification with other conditions. A septic infection may cause a fever, but may also cause low body temperature, cold extremities and shivering. There may be difficulty breathing or rapid breathing, as well as an increased heart rate, or conversely a weak pulse and low blood pressure. It may cause low urine output, as well as blue-tinted, mottled or abnormally pale skin, and an altered mental state.
translations.reference: Alamomi: Sepsis yanayi ne na gaggawa da ya ke buЖҷatar maida hankali nan take don kiyaye rikice-rikece na gaba ko kuma mutuwa. zai iya gabatar da wasu alamomin gargaЙ—i a wasu lokutan , wanЙ—anda wasu kan iya Й“ad da kama wajen ganewa ga wasu yanayin. Kamuwa da septic kan sanya masassara, amma kuma zai iya sanya sanyin jiki , matsanancin sanyi da kuma karkara. Ta iya kasancewa akwai alamar sarЖҷewar numfashi ko numfashi da sauri-sauri, da kuma Жҷaruwar bugun zuciya ko kuma raunin jijiya da kuma sauЖҷan jini. ya na iya jawo Жҷarancin fitsari da kuma Й—igon shuЙ—i a jikin fata da kuma canjuwar lafiyar hankali.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶: ШіЩҠШЁШі ЩҮЩҠ ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© Ш·ШЁЩҠШ© Ш№Ш§Ш¬Щ„Ш©ШҢ ЩҲШӘШӘШ·Щ„ШЁ Ш§ЩҮШӘЩ…Ш§Щ… ЩҒЩҲШұЩҠ Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ№ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШІЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ЩғЩ„ ШЈЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩҒШ§Ш©. ЩҒЩҠ ШЁШ№Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯЩҠШ§ЩҶШҢ ЩӮШҜ ШӘШёЩҮШұ Ш№Щ„Ш§Щ…Ш§ШӘ ЩҲШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„ЩҒШ©ШҢ ШЁШ№Ш¶ЩҮШ§ ЩӮШҜ ЩҠШӨШҜЩҠ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш®Щ„Ш· Щ…Ш№ ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ ШЈШ®ШұЩү. Ш№ШҜЩҲЩү ШіЩҠШЁШі ЩӮШҜ ШӘШіШЁШЁ ШӯЩ…ЩүШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩғЩҶ ЩӮШҜ ШӘШіШЁШЁ ШЈЩҠШ¶ЩӢШ§ Ш§ЩҶШ®ЩҒШ§Ш¶ ШҜШұШ¬Ш© ШӯШұШ§ШұШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШіЩ…ШҢ ШЈШөШ§ШЁШ№ ШЁШ§ШұШҜШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§ШұШӘШ№Ш§Шҙ. ЩӮШҜ ЩҠЩғЩҲЩҶ ЩҮЩҶШ§Щғ ШөШ№ЩҲШЁШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩҒШі ШЈЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩҒШі Ш§Щ„ШіШұЩҠШ№ШҢ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү ШІЩҠШ§ШҜШ© Щ…Ш№ШҜЩ„ Ш¶ШұШЁШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩ„ШЁШҢ ШЈЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩғШіШҢ Ш¶Ш№ЩҒ ЩҶШЁШ¶ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҶШ®ЩҒШ§Ш¶ Ш¶ШәШ· Ш§Щ„ШҜЩ…. ЩӮШҜ ШӘШіШЁШЁ Ш§ЩҶШ®ЩҒШ§Ш¶ ЩғЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҲЩ„ШҢ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү Ш¬Щ„ШҜ Щ…Щ„ЩҲЩҶШҢ Щ…ШӘЩҶШ§Ш«ШұШҢ ШЈЩҲ ШҙШ§ШӯШЁ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ШәЩҠШұ Ш·ШЁЩҠШ№ЩҠШҢ ЩҲЩғШ°Щ„Щғ ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© Ш°ЩҮЩҶЩҠШ© ШәЩҠШұ Ш·ШЁЩҠШ№ЩҠШ©.

translations.source: Finally, it may cause extreme body pain or discomfort, which makes it easy to confuse for influenza or food poisoning. In children, sepsis may present through very fast breathing, convulsions, pale skin, lethargy or difficulty waking up or feeling abnormally cold to the touch. For children under 5 years, it may cause difficulty feeding, repeated vomiting or a lack of urination. Suspecting sepsis and acting quickly is crucial for early recognition and diagnosis. Treatment: Early identification of symptoms and timely establishment of appropriate clinical management are critical elements to reducing the risk and impact of sepsis.
translations.reference: A Жҷarshe ya na jawo matsanancin ciwon jiki ko rashin jin daЙ—i, wanda za'a iya ruЙ—uwa da shi da mura ko kuma gubar abinci. ga yara Жҷanana, ana iya samun sepsis ta hanyar nunfashi da sauri , jijjiga, fata ta zama fayau, rashin kuzari da karsashi ko wahalar tashi ko jikin matsanancin sanyin da ba dalili. Ga yara Жҙan Жҷasa da shekara 5, ya kan iya jawo wahalar cin abinci, amai akai-akai ko rashin fitsari. Tsammanin sepsis da kuma gaggawan tare shi na da matuЖҷar muhimmanci ga gane shi da kuma binciken sa. Magancewa: Fahimtar alamomin da wuri da kuma tsara lokutan da ya kamata a magance shi na daga cikin mafi muhimman abubuwa don rage haЙ—ari da tasirin sepsis.
translations.hypothesis: ЩҲШЈШ®ЩҠШұЩӢШ§ШҢ ЩҠШіШЁШЁ ШЈЩ„Щ… ШҙШҜЩҠШҜ ЩҒЩҠ ШЁШҜЩҶ ШЈЩҲ Ш№ШҜЩ… Ш§Щ„ШұШ§ШӯШ©ШҢ ЩҲЩҮШ°Ш§ ЩҠШіЩҮЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш®Щ„Ш· ШЁЩҠЩҶЩҮ ЩҲШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶЩҒЩ„ЩҲЩҶШІШ§ ШЈЩҲ ШӘШіЩ…Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈШәШ°ЩҠШ©. Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ·ЩҒШ§Щ„ШҢ ШҜШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩғШӘЩҠШұЩҠШ§ (sepsis) ЩҠШёЩҮШұ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩҒШі Ш§Щ„ШіШұЩҠШ№ШҢ ЩҶЩҲШЁШ§ШӘШҢ Ш¬Щ„ШҜ ШЁШ§ЩҮШӘШҢ ЩӮЩ„Ш© ЩҶШҙШ§Ш·ШҢ ШЈЩҲ ШөШ№ЩҲШЁШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘЩҠЩӮШ§Шё ШЈЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШҙШ№ЩҲШұ ШЁШЁШұЩҲШҜШ© ШҙШҜЩҠШҜШ©. ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҶШіШЁШ© Щ„Щ„ШЈШ·ЩҒШ§Щ„ ШҙШ§ШЁШ© 5ШҢ ЩҠШіШЁШЁ ШөШ№ЩҲШЁШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШәШ°ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩӮЩҠШЎ Щ…ШӘЩғШұШұШҢ ШЈЩҲ Ш№ШҜЩ… Ш§Щ„ШӘШЁЩҲЩ„. ШӘШҙШ®ЩҠШө ШҜШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩғШӘЩҠШұЩҠШ§ Щ…ШЁЩғШұЩӢШ§ ЩҲ Ш§ШӘШ®Ш§Ш° ШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎШ§ШӘ ШЁШіШұШ№Ш© ШЈЩ…Шұ ШЁШ§Щ„Шә Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҮЩ…ЩҠШ©. Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬: ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ Щ…ШЁЩғШұЩӢШ§ ЩҲ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш®Ш·Ш© Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩӮШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ ШӯШ§ШіЩ…Ш© Щ„ШӘЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ„ Ш®Ш·Шұ ЩҲ ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ ШҜШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩғШӘЩҠШұЩҠШ§.

translations.source: The detection of some biomarkers, such as C reactive protein and procalcitonin, can be effective in diagnosing the condition. After early recognition, diagnostics to help identify a causal pathogen of infection leading to sepsis are important to guide targeted antimicrobial treatment. The appropriate antimicrobial therapy (for example, antibiotics and antifungals) should be given within one hour of sepsis identification. Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) can jeopardize clinical management of sepsis because empirical antibiotic treatment is often required. Early fluid resuscitation is important in the initial phase and vasopressors may be required to improve and maintain tissue perfusion.
translations.reference: Gano wasu sinadaran halittu kamar su furotin na C reactive, da procalcitonin kam iya yin tasiri wajen gano yanayin cutar. Bayan gano cutar da wuri, bincike zai taimaka wajen sanin Жҷwayar cutar da ta zama sila kamuwa da sepsis kuma yana da amfani don tsara hari ga sinadaran da zai magance su. Za'a ba da mafi cancantar sinadaran waraka(misali, antibayotik da antifungal) a awa Й—ayan da aka gano sepsis. Jurewar magani na iya tarwatsa hanyar magance sepsis saboda an fi buЖҷatar zahirin magungunan antibayotik ne akai akai. Tare muran da wuri na da muhimmanci a matakin farko kuma ana buЖҷatar maganin vesoppressor don kiyayewa da kuma inganta gudanar jini a cikin nama.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§ЩғШӘШҙШ§ЩҒ ШЁЩҺШ№Щ’Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӨШҙШұШ§ШӘШҢ kamar C reactive protein da procalcitonin, ЩҶШ§ЩҠ ШіЩҲ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠЩғЩҲЩҶ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШҙШ®ЩҠШө Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш©. ШЁШ№ШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩғШӘШҙШ§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„ЩҠШҢ ШӘШҙШ®ЩҠШө Щ„ШәШұШ¶ ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜ Щ…ШіШЁШЁ Ш№ШҜЩҲЩү, Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШіШЁШЁ sepsis, Щ…ЩҮЩ… Щ„ШәШұШ¶ ШӘЩҲШ¬ЩҠЩҮ Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Щ…Ш¶Ш§ШҜ Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩғШұЩҲШЁШ§ШӘ. Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¶Ш§ШҜ Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩғШұЩҲШЁШ§ШӘ (Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¶Ш§ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҠЩҲЩҠШ© ЩҲ Щ…Ш¶Ш§ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ·ШұЩҠШ§ШӘ) ЩҠШ¬ШЁ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠЩҸШ№Ш·Щү ЩҒЩҠ ШәШ¶ЩҲЩҶ ШіШ§Ш№Ш© ШЁШ№ШҜ ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜ sepsis. Щ…ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¶Ш§ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҠЩҲЩҠШ© (AMR) ЩҶШ§Ш§ЩҠ ШӘШ§ ЩҲЩҠШ§ЩғЩ„ ШҘШҜШ§ШұШ© Ш§Щ„Шіepsis, Щ„Ш§ЩҶЩҠ ШәШ§Щ„ШЁЩӢШ§ Щ…Ш§ ЩҠШӘШ·Щ„ШЁ Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Щ…Ш¶Ш§ШҜ Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩғШұЩҲШЁШ§ШӘ. ШҘШ№Ш§ШҜШ© ШӘШ№ЩҲЩҠШ¶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҲШ§ШҰЩ„ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁШҜШ§ЩҠШ© ЩҶШ§Ш§ЩҠ Щ…ЩҮЩ…Ш©, ЩҲ ЩӮШҜ ЩҠШӘШ·Щ„ШЁ Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… vasopressors Щ„ШәШұШ¶ ШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҒШ§Шё Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘШҜЩҒЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩ….

translations.source: There are two main steps to preventing sepsis: Prevention of microbial transmission and infection Prevention of an infection evolving into sepsis Within the community, sepsis prevention is assisted through the use of effective hygiene practices, improving sanitation and water quality and availability, providing access to vaccines, particularly for those at high risk, as well as appropriate nutrition, including breastfeeding for newborns. Prevention in health care facilities relies on infection prevention and control (IPC) programmes, effective hygiene practices, and clean, well-functioning equipment.
translations.reference: Akwai manyan matakai biyu da za'a iya samun kariya daga sepsis.: kariya daga yaЙ—uwar Жҷananan halittu da kuma kamuwa da su. kariya daga kamuwa da cutar da zai iya rikiЙ—ewa ya zama sepsis. A cikin unguwanni da garuruwa, ana iya samun taimakon kariya daga sepsis ta hanyar amfani da ayyukan tsabtace gida da karan mai, inganta tsabtar muhalli da ruwan sha da samar da shi a wadace, samar da damar zuwa ko isa ga riga-kafi, musamman ga waЙ—anda su ke cikin mafi haЙ—arin kamuwa da cutar, da kuma abincin da ya dace wanЙ—anda su ka haЙ—a da shayar da ruwan nono ga sabbin jarirai. Kariya a ma'aikatun lafiya ya ta'allaЖҷa ne ga tsarin kariya daga kamuwa da shi da kuma sarrafawa, ingantaccen ayyukan tsabtace gida da kai, da lafiyayyun kayan aiki da su ke yi.
translations.hypothesis: ЩҮЩҶШ§Щғ ШҙШ·ШұЩҠЩҶ ЧўЧҷЧ§ЧЁЧҷЩҠЩҶ Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ№ ШҜШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠШЁШӘЩҠЩғ: Щ…ЩҶШ№ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҶШӘШҙШ§Шұ ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШіШ§ШӘШҢ ЩҲ Щ…ЩҶШ№ ШҜШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠШЁШӘЩҠЩғ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ЩҲШұ. ШӨЩҶШҢ Щ…ЩҶШ№ ШҜШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠШЁШӘЩҠЩғ ЩҠЩҸШ№Ш§ЩҲЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӨШ«Щ‘Шұ Щ„ШӘШҜШ§ШЁЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШёШ§ЩҒШ©ШҢ ШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШёШ§ЩҒШ© ЩҲ Ш¬ЩҲШҜШ© ЩҲ ШӘЩҲЩҒШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ§ЩҮШҢ ШӘЩҲЩҒЩҠШұ ШҘЩ…ЩғШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘШҢ ЩҲШ®Ш§ШөШ©ЩӢ Щ„Щ„Ш§ШҙШ®Ш§Шө Ш°ЩҲЩҠ Ш®Ш·Шұ Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠШҢ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШӘШәШ°ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁШ©ШҢ ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ Ш§Щ„ШұШ¶Ш§Ш№Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш·ШЁЩҠШ№ЩҠШ© Щ„ШӯШҜЩҠШ«ЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜШ©. Щ…ЩҶШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ШұШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© ЩҠШ№ШӘЩ…ШҜ Ш№Щ„Щү ШЁШұШ§Щ…Ш¬ Щ…ЩҶШ№ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩғЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШҜЩҲЩү (IPC)ШҢ ШӘШҜШ§ШЁЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШёШ§ЩҒШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӨШ«Щ‘ШұШ©ШҢ ЩҲ Щ…Ш№ШҜШ§ШӘ ЩҶШёЩҠЩҒШ© ЩҲ ШӘШ№Щ…Щ„ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ШөШӯЩҠШӯ.

translations.source: Sexual health Overview: Sexual health is fundamental to the overall health and well-being of individuals, couples and families, and to the social and economic development of communities and countries. Sexual health, when viewed affirmatively, requires a positive and respectful approach to sexuality and sexual relationships, as well as the possibility of having pleasurable and safe sexual experiences, free of coercion, discrimination and violence. The ability of men and women to achieve sexual health and well-being depends on their: access to comprehensive, good-quality information about sex and sexuality;
translations.reference: Lafiyar jima'i. Lafiyar jima'i ginshiЖҷi ne da dukkan Й—aukacin lafiyar jiki da kwanciyar hankalin kowane mutum, ma'aurata da Iyalai.ga zamantakewa da ma cigaban tattalin arziki ga garuruwa da Жҷasashe. Idan aka yi duba na tsanaki ga lafiyar jima'i, yana buЖҷatar kyakkyawan fahimta da girmamawa na jima'i da kuma dangantar da ta shafe ta, hakan da kyakkyawan manufa wajen samun jin daЙ—i da nutsuwa, da kuma samun jima'i cikin natsuwa, ba tare da tursasawa ba, tsangwama ko kuma tashin-tashina. Abinda kan iya sanyawa maza da mata su samu lafiyan jima'i da kuma nutsuwa ya danganta da: yanayin fahimtar su, ЖҷwaЖҷЖҷwara da kuma kyakkyawan sanarwa game da jima'i da abinda da ya Жҷunsa,;
translations.hypothesis: ЩҶШёШұШ© Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ©: Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© ЩҮЩҠ ШЈЩ…Шұ ШЁШ§Щ„Шә Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҮЩ…ЩҠШ© Щ„ШөШӯШ© ЩҲШұЩҒШ§ЩҮЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜШҢ Ш§Щ„ШЈШІЩҲШ§Ш¬ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№Ш§ШҰЩ„Ш§ШӘШҢ ЩҲЩғШ°Щ„Щғ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ЩӮШӘШөШ§ШҜЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№Ш§ШӘ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ. Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§ ЩҶЩҶШёШұ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ШҘЩҠШ¬Ш§ШЁЩҠШҢ ЩҒШҘЩҶЩҮ ЩҠШӘШ·Щ„ШЁ ЩҶЩҮШ¬ ШҘЩҠШ¬Ш§ШЁЩҠ ЩҲЩ…ШӯШӘШұЩ… ШӘШ¬Ш§ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШі ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіШҢ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү ШҘЩ…ЩғШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘШ¬Ш§ШұШЁ Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© Щ…Щ…ШӘШ№Ш© ЩҲШўЩ…ЩҶШ©ШҢ Ш®Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩғШұШ§ЩҮШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩ…ЩҠЩҠШІШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№ЩҶЩҒ. Ш§Щ„ЩӮШҜШұШ© Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© ЩҲШұЩҒШ§ЩҮЩҠШ© ШӘШ№ШӘЩ…ШҜ Ш№Щ„Щү: ШҘЩ…ЩғШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Щ…Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩ…Ш§ШӘ ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„Ш©ШҢ Ш°Ш§ШӘ Ш¬ЩҲШҜШ© Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш№ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШі ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШі.

translations.source: knowledge about the risks they may face and their vulnerability to adverse consequences of unprotected sexual activity; ability to access sexual health care; living in an environment that affirms and promotes sexual health. Sexual health-related issues are wide-ranging, and encompass sexual orientation and gender identity, sexual expression, relationships, and pleasure. They also include negative consequences or conditions such as:
translations.reference: ilimi akan haЙ—arurrukan da za su iya fuskanta da kuma yanayin tasirin raunin su sakamakon yin jima'i ba tare da kariya ba.; yanayin isar su ga tsarin lafiyan jima'i a asibitoci.; Zama cikin guraren da suke karfafa kuma su ka cigaba da yaЙ—a ilimin lafiyan jima'i. Abubuwan da suka shafi lafiyar jima'i su na da faЙ—i, kuma yana kewaye da yanda ake yin jima'in da kuma fahimtar jinsi, nuna jin daЙ—i ko rashin jin daЙ—i, dangantaka/mu'amala, da kuma gamsuwa. Kuma sun haЙ—a da sakamako maras kyau ko kuma wasu yanayi kamar su:
translations.hypothesis: Щ…Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш№ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®Ш·Ш§Шұ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ ЩӮШҜ ЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҶШҢ ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҲЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ ЩӮШҜ ЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҶ ШЁШіШЁШЁ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШҙШ§Ш· Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠ ШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯЩ…ЩҠШӣ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШҜШұШ© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ Ш№Щ„Щү ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ©Шӣ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҠШҙ ЩҒЩҠ ШЁЩҠШҰШ© Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӨЩғШҜ ЩҲШӘШҜШ№Щ… Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ©. Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ЩғЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӘШ№Щ„ЩӮ ШЁШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© ЩҮЩү ШҙШ§ШҰШ№Ш§ШӘШҢ ЩҲШӘШҙЩ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲШ¬ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШҢ ЩҲЩҮЩҲЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШ№ШЁЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ№Ш©. ЩғЩ…Ш§ ШӘШҙЩ…Щ„ Ш№ЩҲШ§ЩӮШЁ ШіЩ„ШЁЩҠШ© ШЈЩҲ ШёШұЩҲЩҒШҢ Щ…Ш«Щ„:

translations.source: infections with human immunodeficiency virus (HIV), sexually transmitted infections (STIs) and reproductive tract infections (RTIs) and their adverse outcomes (such as cancer and infertility); unintended pregnancy and abortion; sexual dysfunction; sexual violence; and harmful practices (such as female genital mutilation, FGM).
translations.reference: kamuwa da cuta mai karya garkuwar jiki (HIV), cututtukan da su ke yaЙ—uwa ta hanyar jima'i (STIs), da kuma cututtukan da su ke kama mahaifa(RTIs). da ma waЙ—anda su ka Й—ara waЙ—annan(kamar su cutar daji/sankara da kuma rashin haihuwa):; samun cikin da ba'a shirya masa ba da kuma zubar da ciki; rashin gamsuwa yayin jima'i; cin zarafin jima'i; da kuma ayyukan cutarwa (kamar su kaciyan mata FGM).
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҮШ§ШЁШ§ШӘ ЩҲШұШ§Ш«ЩҠ (HIV)ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҮШ§ШЁШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ…Ш§ШұШіШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© (STIs) ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҮШ§ШЁШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҮШ§ШІ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶШ§ШіЩ„ЩҠ (RTIs) ЩҲ Ш№ЩҲШ§ЩӮШЁ ШіЩ„ШЁЩҠШ© (ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ Ш§Щ„ШіШұШ·Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩӮЩ…); Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ…Щ„ ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ЩӮШөЩҲШҜ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ¬ЩҮШ§Ш¶; Ш§Ш¶Ш·ШұШ§ШЁШ§ШӘ Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ©; Ш№ЩҶЩҒ Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠ; ЩҲ Щ…Щ…Ш§ШұШіШ§ШӘ Ш¶Ш§ШұШ© (ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ ЩӮШ·Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Ш¶Ш§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶШ§ШіЩ„ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„ШҘЩҶШ§Ш«, FGM).

translations.source: Definitions: WHO has been working in the area of sexual health since at least 1974, when the deliberations of an expert committee resulted in the publication of a technical report entitled вҖңEducation and treatment in human sexualityвҖқ (WHO, 1975). Starting in 2000, the Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) and WHO convened a number of expert consultations to review terminology and identify programme options. The culmination of these meetings was a Technical Consultation in 2002, where the working definitions of the key sexual health-related terms below were developed. Sex: Sex refers to the biological characteristics that define humans as female or male. While these sets of biological characteristics are not mutually exclusive, as there are individuals who possess both, they tend to differentiate humans as males and females.
translations.reference: Ma'anoni: Kungiyar lafiya ta duniya ta jima tana aiki akan lafiyar jima'i tun kusan 1974, a lokacin da fafatawan masana ya bada sakamakon wallafa wani rahoto mai taken" Ilimi da magani a tsarin jima'in Й—an Adam"(WHO, 1975). a farkon 2000, kungiyar Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) da WHO sun samar da wasu hamshaЖҷan masana don bada shawara wajen duba wasu kalmomi da kuma fahimtar zaЙ“in tsarin. A Жҷarshen wannan ganawa shi ne ya samar da ganawar fasaha a 2002, a yayin da aka yi aiki kan samar da wasu ma'anonin kalmomi da su ka danganci lafiyar jima'i da su ke Жҷasa. Tsarin halitta: tsarin halitta na nufin abubuwan da su ke nuni ga mutum a matsayin mace ko namiji. A yayin da wasu tsarin halittar ba'a iya keЙ“ance su, don akwai waЙ—anda su ke da duka tsarin halittun biyu, su kan banbance mutune a matsayin mace ko namiji.
translations.hypothesis:
**РўР°С„СҖРё:** "ШіЩ…Ш§Шӯ" ШӘШҜШ§ШұЩғ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶШҙШ·Ш© ШӘЩү ШҜШ§Шұ ШөШӯШӘЩғ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© ШӘЩү Ш§Щ„ШЈЩӮЩ„ Ш№Ш§Щ… 1974ШҢ ШӯЩҠЩҶ ЩҶШӘШ§ШҰШ¬ Щ…ШұШ§Ш¬Ш№Ш© Щ„Ш¬Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ШЁЩҠШұШ§ШӘ ШӘЩү ШЈШҜЩү ШҘЩ„Щү ЩҶШҙШұ ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұ ШӘЩӮЩҶЩҠ ШЁЩҖ "Ш№Щ„Щ… ЩҲШӘШҜШЁЩҠШұ ШӘЩү ШөШӯШӘЩғ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ©" (ШіЩ…Ш§ШӯШҢ 1975). ШӘЩү Ш№Ш§Щ… 2000ШҢ "ШіЩ…Ш§Шӯ" ЩҲ "Щ…ШӨШіШіШ© ШөШӯШӘЩғ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©" (PAHO) ШұШӘШЁШ§ Ш№ШҜШҜ Щ…ШұШ§Ш¬Ш№Ш§ШӘ Ш®ШЁЩҠШұЩҠЩҶ Щ„ШәШұШ¶ Щ…ШұШ§Ш¬Ш№Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөШ·Щ„ШӯШ§ШӘ ЩҲШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜ Ш®ЩҠШ§ШұШ§ШӘ ШЁШұШ§Щ…Ш¬. Ш§Щ„ЩҶШӘЩҠШ¬Ш© Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҮШ§ШҰЩҠШ© Щ„ЩҖ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ ЩҮЩҲ Щ…ШұШ§Ш¬Ш№Ш© ШӘЩӮЩҶЩҠШ© Ш№Ш§Щ… 2002ШҢ ШӯЩҠШ« ШӘЩ… ШӘШ·ЩҲЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© Щ„ШЁШ№Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөШ·Щ„ШӯШ§ШӘ Ш°Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөЩ„Ш© Щ…Ш№ ШөШӯШӘЩғ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ©.

Ш¬ЩҶШі: "Ш¬ЩҶШі" ЩҠШҙЩҠШұ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш®ШөШ§ШҰШө Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҖ ШӘЩү ШӘШӯШҜШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ші ЩғЩҖ "Щ…ШӨЩҶШ«" ШЈЩҲ "Ш°ЩғЩҲШұЩҠ". ШЁЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш®ШөШ§ШҰШө Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҠШ© Щ„ЩҠШіШӘ ШӯШөШұЩҠШ©ШҢ Щ„ШЈЩҶ ЩҮЩҶШ§Щғ ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Ш§Щ„ЩҖ ЩҠЩ…ШӘЩ„ЩғЩҲЩҶ ЩғЩ„ЩҠЩҮЩ…Ш§ШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ ШӘЩү ШӘЩ…ЩҠЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү ШӘЩ…ЩҠЩҠШІ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ші ЩғЩҖ "Щ…ШӨЩҶШ«" ЩҲ "Ш°ЩғЩҲШұЩҠ".

translations.source: In general use in many languages, the term sex is often used to mean вҖңsexual activityвҖқ, but for technical purposes in the context of sexuality and sexual health discussions, the above definition is preferred. Sexual health According to the current working definition, sexual health is:вҖңвҖҰa state of physical, emotional, mental and social well-being in relation to sexuality; it is not merely the absence of disease, dysfunction or infirmity. Sexual health requires a positive and respectful approach to sexuality and sexual relationships, as well as the possibility of having pleasurable and safe sexual experiences, free of coercion, discrimination and violence. For sexual health to be attained and maintained, the sexual rights of all persons must be respected, protected and fulfilled.вҖқ (WHO, 2006a)
translations.reference: A yarukan da aka fi amfani da shi, kalmar tsarin halitta na nufin "ayyukan da su ka danganci jima'i " amma ga manufa ta fasaha da ya Жҷunshi tsarin jinsi da jima'i da kuma tattaunawa game da lafiyan jima'i, an fi amfani da ma'anar da ke sama. Lafiyan jima'i A yanda ma'anar lafiyan jima'i ya ke a fannin aiki,shi ne wani yanayi ne da ya shafi zahiri, motsin rai,lafiyar hankali da ma na mu'amala ta fannin jinsi , ba wai kawai rashin cututtuka ba ne , ko rashin kuzari ko rashin tabbaci. Lafiyan jima'i na buЖҷatar kyakkyawan fahimta da girmamawa ta musamman ga jima'i da kuma mu'amalar jima'i. da kuma samun jin daЙ—i da lafiyayyen mu'amalar jima'i, ba tare da matsala ba , tsangwama ko kuma jin ciwo ba. Cimma lafiyan jima'i zai samu ne idan an kiyaye hakkokin jima'i, aka girmama shi, sannan aka fansar da shi ga kowane mutum. " (WHO,2006)
translations.hypothesis:
ШәШ§Щ„ШЁЩӢШ§ШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩ„Щ…Ш© "Ш¬ЩҶШі" ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩҒЩҠ ШҙШӘЩү Щ„ШәШ§ШӘШҢ ЩҲШ№Ш§ШҜШ©ЩӢ Щ…Ш§ ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„ШӘШ№ЩҶЩҠ "ЩҶШҙШ§Ш· Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠ"ШҢ Щ„ЩғЩҶШҢ Щ„ШәШұШ¶ ШӘЩӮЩҶЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ ШіЩҠШ§ЩӮ Щ…ЩҶШ§ЩӮШҙШ§ШӘ ШӯЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШі ЩҲШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш°ЩғЩҲШұ ЩҮЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШ¶Щ„.

Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ©: "ШӯШіШЁ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„ЩҠШҢ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© ЩҮЩҠ: "...ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШіШҜЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Ш·ЩҒЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩӮЩ„ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ЩҠШ©ШҢ ШЁШ®ШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіШӣ ШҘЩҶЩҮШ§ Щ„ЩҠШіШӘ Щ…Ш¬ШұШҜ ШәЩҠШ§ШЁ Щ…ШұШ¶ШҢ Ш®Щ„Щ„ШҢ ШЈЩҲ Ш¶Ш№ЩҒ. Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© ШӘШӘШ·Щ„ШЁ ЩҶЩҮШ¬ ШҘЩҠШ¬Ш§ШЁЩҠ ЩҲЩ…ШӯШӘШұЩ… ШӘШ¬Ш§ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШі ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ©ШҢ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү ШҘЩ…ЩғШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘШ¬Ш§ШұШЁ Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© Щ…Щ…ШӘШ№Ш© ЩҲШўЩ…ЩҶШ©ШҢ Ш®Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩғШұШ§ЩҮШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩ…ЩҠЩҠШІШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№ЩҶЩҒ. Щ„ЩғЩҠ ЩҠШӘЩ… ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ ЩҲШөЩҠШ§ЩҶШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҠШ¬ШЁ Ш§ШӯШӘШұШ§Щ…ШҢ ШӯЩ…Ш§ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШҘЩҶШ¬Ш§ШІ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩӮЩҲЩӮ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© Щ„Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜ." (Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ 2006a)

translations.source: Sexuality: Sexual health cannot be defined, understood or made operational without a broad consideration of sexuality, which underlies important behaviours and outcomes related to sexual health. The working definition of sexuality is:вҖңвҖҰa central aspect of being human throughout life encompasses sex, gender identities and roles, sexual orientation, eroticism, pleasure, intimacy and reproduction. Sexuality is experienced and expressed in thoughts, fantasies, desires, beliefs, attitudes, values, behaviours, practices, roles and relationships. While sexuality can include all of these dimensions, not all of them are always experienced or expressed. Sexuality is influenced by the interaction of biological, psychological, social, economic, political, cultural, legal, historical, religious and spiritual factors.вҖқ (WHO, 2006a)
translations.reference: Jima'i: Ba za'a iya bada ma'anar lafiyan jima'i ba, ko fahimtar sa ba tare da faЙ—aЙ—a duba ga jinsi ba, wanda ya Жҷunshi muhimman Й—abi'u da kuma sakamakon da ya shafi lafiyan jima'i. Ma'anar jima'i a fagen masana shi ne" abu ne da ya keЙ“anci Й—an Adam tsawon rayuwar sa da ta ke kewaye da jima'i, fahimtar jinsi da kuma rawar da ya ke takawa, mu'amalartar jima'i, jin sha'awa , jin daЙ—i, kusanci da kuma hayayyafa. Ana samun kwarewa da kuma bayyana jima'i a cikin tunani, Жҷawatawa, sha'awa , aminta, Й—abi'u, Жҷimantawa, halayya, hidindimu, rawar gani da kuma mu'amala. a yayin da jima'i kan iya Й—auka duk waЙ—annan sigogin, na kowane daga ciki bane ake samun Жҷwarewa ko kuma a bayyana shi ba. Jima'i na tasirantuwa ne da ta dalilin waЙ—annan abubuwa da su ka haЙ—a da cuЙ—anya ta halitta, Й—abi'u, mu'amala , tattali, siyasa, al'adun gargajiya, Shari'a, tarihi, addini da kuma ruhi" (WHO,2006)

Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠ Ш№ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШі ЩҮЩҲ: "вҖҰШ¬ШІШЎ ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ Щ…ЩҶ ЩғЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҶШіШ§ЩҶ Ш·ЩҲШ§Щ„ ШӯЩҠШ§ШӘЩҮШҢ ЩҲЩҠШҙЩ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіШҢ ЩҮЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲЩҮШұШҢ ШӘЩҲШ¬ЩҮ Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШҢ ШҘШ«Ш§ШұШ©ШҢ Щ…ШӘШ№Ш©ШҢ ЩӮШұШЁШҢ ЩҲШӘЩғШ§Ш«Шұ. (Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ 2006a)

translations.source: Sexual rights: There is a growing consensus that sexual health cannot be achieved and maintained without respect for, and protection of, certain human rights. The working definition of sexual rights given below is a contribution to the continuing dialogue on human rights related to sexual health. The application of existing human rights to sexuality and sexual health constitute sexual rights. Sexual rights protect all people's rights to fulfil and express their sexuality and enjoy sexual health, with due regard for the rights of others and within a framework of protection against discrimination." (WHO, 2006a, updated 2010)вҖңThe fulfilment of sexual health is tied to the extent to which human rights are respected, protected and fulfilled.
translations.reference: Hakkokin Jima'i: Akwai yarjejeniyar da ke yaЙ—uwa na cewa ba za'a cimma matsaya a lafiyan jima'i ba ko killace shi ba ba tare da girmamawa, samun tsaro da kariya na wasu hakkokin Й—an Adam. Ma'anar hakkokin Jima'i a fagen masana da aka bayyana shi Жҷasa gudunmuwa ne ga cigaba da tattaunawa game da Hakkokin Й—an Adam da ya danganci lafiyan jima'i. Sanya wanzajjen hakkokin Й—an adam ga jima'i da lafiyan jima'i shi ya bada hakkokin Jima'i. Hakkokin Jima'i na bada kariya ga hakkokin mutane don su bayyana kuma su cimma mu'amalarsu su kuma ji daЙ—in lafiyan jima'in su, tare da duba i zuwa hakkokin wasu da kuma cikin tsarin kariya game da Жҷyamata." Жҳungiyar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO, 2006, ta sabunta a 2010)" cewa cikar lafiyan jima'i ya ta'allaЖҷa ne ga yanda aka girmama hakkokin Й—an adam da bashi kariya da kuma yadda ake cika shi.

translations.source: the rights to information, as well as education the rights to freedom of opinion and expression, and the right to an effective remedy for violations of fundamental rights. The responsible exercise of human rights requires that all persons respect the rights of others. Issues: вҖңHuman rights provide an international legal framework within which the sexual and reproductive health needs and aspirations of all people can be considered.вҖқ (GRUSKIN, 2005)

(GRUSKIN, 2005)

translations.source: In recent years, international human rights instruments have been increasingly used to support and advance legal claims by individuals and whole communities so that national governments will guarantee the respect, protection and fulfilment of their sexual and reproductive health rights (Cook et al., 2003). The working definitions and framework for programming presented here are grounded in internationally recognized human rights and offer a rights-based approach to programming in sexual health. The key conceptual elements of sexual health are listed below. Key conceptual elements of sexual health When viewed holistically and positively:
translations.reference: A Жҙan shekarun nan, ana cigaba da amfani da kayan aikin hakkokin Й—an adam na Жҷasa da Жҷasa don bada gudunmuwa da kum cigaba da Й—aiЙ—aikun mutane ke riyawa da ma sauran gurare don gwamnatin Жҷasa ta bada tabbacin na girmamawa, kariya da kuma cimma manufa ga hakkokin da su ka shafi lafiyar iyali da na haihuwa (Cook, et al, 2003). Ma'anoni da kuma tsarin aikace-aikacen da aka gabatar an Й—ora su ne bisa tsarin hakkokin kare Й—an adam na Жҷasa da Жҷasa wanda aka sanya shi cikin kundi, sannan kuma ya bada damar fuskantar hakkokin da su ka zama wajibi ga tsara lafiyan jima'i. translations.source: Sexual health is about well-being, not merely the absence of disease. Sexual health involves respect, safety and freedom from discrimination and violence. Sexual health depends on the fulfilment of certain human rights. Sexual health is relevant throughout the individualвҖҷs lifespan, not only to those in the reproductive years, but also to both the young and the elderly. Sexual health is expressed through diverse sexualities and forms of sexual expression.
translations.reference: Lafiyan jima'i ya kasance ne akan lafiyan jiki ba wai kawai rashin samuwar cuta ba. Lafiyan jima'i ya shafi girmamawa, tsaro, da kuma samun Жҙanci daga tsangwama da cin zarafi. Lafiyan jima'i ya ta'allaЖҷa ne bisa cikar wasu daga cikin hakkokin Й—an adam. Lafiyan jima'i dace da dukkan rayuwar kowa, ba wai kawai ga waЙ—anda su ke cikin shekarun hayayyafa ba, ga masu Жҷuruciya da ma manya gabaЙ—aya. Ana nuna lafiyan jima'i ta hanyoyi mabanbanta da ta shafi jima'i da kuma nau'ikan nuna jima'i.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© ШӘЩҺЩ„ШІЩ… Ш§Щ„ШіШ№Ш§ШҜШ©ШҢ ШЁЩ„Ш§Щ…Шұ ШөШұЩҒ ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶. translations.source: Sexual health is critically influenced by gender norms, roles, expectations and power dynamics. Sexual health needs to be understood within specific social, economic and political contexts.
translations.reference: Lafiyan jima'i na tasirantuwa ne ta tsantar al'adun jinsi, matsayi, tsammani da canje-canjen iko. Ana buЖҷatar fahimtar lafiyan jima'i a cikin yanayin tsarin zamantakewa, tattali da kuma a siyasance.

translations.source: Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) Overview: Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) are spread predominantly by unprotected sexual contact. Some STIs can also be transmitted during pregnancy, childbirth and breastfeeding and through infected blood or blood products. STIs have a profound impact on health. If untreated, they can lead to serious consequences including neurological and cardiovascular disease, infertility, ectopic pregnancy, stillbirths, and increased risk of Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV).
translations.reference: Cututtukan da ake kamuwa da su ta hanyar jima'i (STIs) Cututtukan da ake kamuwa da su ta hanyar jima'i suna Жҷara yaЙ—uwa ta hanyar jin jima'i ba tare da kariya ba. Wasu cututtukan ma su kan samuwa ne a lokacin Й—aukan ciki, haihuwa, da kuma sayarwa kuma ta hanyar jinin da ke Й—auke da cutar ko kuma abinda jinin ya haifar. Cututtukan su ma da matuЖҷar tasiri ga lafiya. Idan ba'a magance ba, ya kan iya kaiwa ga matsaloli masu girma wanda ya yaЙ—a da cututtukan da su ka shafi ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa da na zuciya, rashin haihuwa, cikin da ke zama a bayan mahaifa, Й“ari, da kuma Жҷaruwar barazana ga kamuwa da Жҷwayoyin da ke hadda cutar Жҷanjamau (HIV).
translations.hypothesis: "Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШіШ¬Щ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© (STIs): Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШіШ¬Щ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© (STIs) ЩҠЩҸЩҶШӘШҙШұ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШөШ§Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠ ШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯЩ…ЩҠ. ШҘШ°Ш§ Щ„Щ… ШӘЩҸШ№Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШҢ ШІШ§ЩҠ ШӘЩҸШӨШҜЩҠ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш№ЩҲШ§ЩӮШЁ Ш®Ш·ЩҠШұШ©ШҢ ШЁШ¶Щ…ЩҶ Ш°Щ„Щғ ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш№ШөШЁЩҠШ© ЩҲ ЩӮЩ„ШЁЩҠШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩӮЩ…ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ…Щ„ ШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш·ШЁЩҠШ№ЩҠШҢ ЩҲЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘШҢ ЩҲШІЩҠШ§ШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш®Ш·Шұ ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі ЩҶЩӮШө Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш№Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЁШҙШұЩҠШ© (HIV).

translations.source: They are also associated with stigma, domestic violence, and affects quality of life. The majority of STIs have no symptoms. When they are present common symptoms of STIs are vaginal or urethral discharge, genital ulcer and lower abdominal pain. The most common and curable STIs are trichomonas, chlamydia, gonorrhoea and syphilis. Rapidly increasing antimicrobial resistance is a growing threat for untreatable gonorrhoea.
translations.reference: Su na haЙ—e da Жҷyama, cin zarafin cikin gida, kuma yana haifar da lalacewar ingantaccen lafiya. Mafi yawan waЙ—annan cututtuka ba su da alamun da za'a iya ganewa. Idan an kamu da su, gama-garin alamun STIs su ne zubar zuwa daga mafitsara ko mahaifa, gyanbon al'aura, da kuma ciwon Жҷasan mara. Cututtukan da aka fi magancewa na STIs su ne trichomonas (zubar ruwa a mafitsaran mace), Chlamydia, gonoriya da sifilis. Samun Жҷaruwar magungunan da ke tasiri akan Жҷwayoyin cututtuka na yin barazana ga cututtukan da ba za'a gonoriya wanda ba za'a iya magance ta ba.

Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§ ШӘШёЩҮШұШҢ Щ„ЩҲЩ… ШҙШ§ШҰШ№Ш§ШӘ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ Ш®ШұЩҲШ¬ ШіШ§ШҰЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҮШЁЩ„ ШЈЩҲ Щ…Ш¬ШұЩү Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҲЩ„ШҢ Ш¬ШұШӯ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Ш¶Ш§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶШ§ШіЩ„ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲ ШўЩ„Ш§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·ЩҶ. Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ ШҙШ§ШҰШ№Ш© ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҠШіЩҮЩ„ Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ЩҮШ§ ЩҮЩ…Ш§: ШӘШұЩҠШ®ЩҲЩ…ЩҲЩҶШ§ШіШҢ ЩғЩ„Ш§Щ…ЩҠЩҠШҜЩҠШ§ШҢ ШәЩҲЩҶЩҲШұЩҠШ§ШҢ ЩҲ ШіЩҠЩҲЩҒЩҠЩ„ЩҠШ§. Ш§Щ„ШІЩҠШ§ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШіШұЩҠШ№Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¶Ш§ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҠЩҲЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҮЩҠ ШіЩҠШ§ШіШӘШ© ЩғШЁЩҠШұШ© Щ„ШәЩҲЩҶЩҲШұЩҠШ§ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ЩҮШ§.

translations.source: Viral STIs including HIV, genital herpes simplex virus (HSV), viral hepatitis B, human papillomavirus (HPV) and human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) lack or have limited treatment options. Vaccines are available for hepatitis B to prevent infection that can lead to liver cancer and for HPV to prevent cervical cancer. HIV, HSV and HTLV-1 are lifelong infections: for HIV and HSV there are treatments that can suppress the virus, but currently there are no cures for any of these viral STIs. Condoms used correctly and consistently are effective methods to protect against STIs and HIV. Screening with early diagnosis of people with STIs and their sexual partners offers the best opportunity for effective treatment and for preventing complications and further transmission.
translations.reference: Жҳwayoyin cutar virus da ake kamuwa da su ta hanyar jima'i sun haЙ—a da Жҷwayar cutar mai karya garkuwar jiki wato HIV, Жҷwayar cutar da ke zama a matantaka mace wato HSV, Hepatitis B, HPV, da kuma Human T-lymphotropic virus type 1(HTLV-1). rashin ko samun Жҷarancin magani. Ana samun riga-kafin Hepatitis B a ko ina don bada kariya ga cutar sankarar hanta, da kuma HPV don bada kariya ga sankarar mahaifa. HIV, HSV da HTLV-1 cututtuka ne da kan iya zama na tsawon rayuwa, HIV da HSV na da magungunan da za su iya disashe Жҷarfin Жҷwayoyin cutar, amma a yanzu haka dai babu maganin da zai iya kawar da waЙ—annan cututtuka. Amfani da kororon roba akan kari kuma bisa Жҷa'ida kan iya bada cikekken kariya daga kamuwa da cututtukan jima'i. Yin gwaji da wuri da kuma binciken mutanen da su ke Й—auke da wannan cututtuka tare da abokan hulЙ—ar su kan iya samar da kyakkyawan dama don samun ingantaccen magani da kuma kariya daga rikitarwa da kuma ci gaba da yaЙ—awa.

translations.source: Symptoms: A person can have an STI without having obvious symptoms of disease. When present, common symptoms of STIs include: abnormal vaginal discharge, urethral discharge, genital ulcers and lumps, and lower abdominal pain. Symptoms of specific STIs are: Gonorrhoea and chlamydial infection These STIs cause cervicitis in women, urethritis in men and extra-genital infections, including rectal and oropharyngeal manifestations.
translations.reference: Alamomi: Mutum zai iya kamuwa da cututtukan ba tare da ЖҷwaЖҷЖҷwaran wasu alamun cutar ba. Idan ya kasance akwai, gama-garin alamu cutukan sun haЙ—a da: zubar ruwa na ba gaira ba dalili daga matantaka, zubar ruwa daga mahaifa, gyanbon al'aura da Жҷuraje da kuma ciwon Жҷasan mara. Alamun cututtukan na musamman su ne: Cutar Gonoriya da Chlamydia WaЙ—annan cututtuka su na kama mahaifa a mata, mafitsara ga maza da kuma wasu cututtukan da su ke kama al'aura, wanda ya haЙ—a da cutar da ke zazzago da dubura waje.

translations.source: Common symptoms include vaginal or penile discharge and burning with urination. Infants of infected mothers can contract neonatal conjunctivitis (red eyes) due to exposure to the STIs during vaginal delivery. Rectal and pharyngeal infections can be asymptomatic. Syphilis: Syphilis is often asymptomatic, when symptoms occur, primary syphilis presents as a solitary, painless ulcer. Secondary syphilis may manifest as generalized lesions affecting skin, mucous membranes and lymph-node including a classic rash on the palms of the hands and soles of the feet.
translations.reference: Alamomin da aka saba gani sun haЙ—a da zubar ruwa daga al'auran mata da na maza, jin zafi yayin yin fitsari. Jariran iyayen da su ke Й—auke da cutar za su iya kamuwa da cutar ciwon ido dalilin gamuwa da cutar yayin haihuwan da ba na tiyata ba. cutar da ke zazzago da dubura kan iya rasa alamun kamuwa da cututtuka. Sifilis: Sifilis ma yawanci baya bayyana alamu , a lokacin da alamu ya bayyana a farkon matakin sifilis zai nuna wani gyanbo ne maras zafi da ciwo. sifilis a mataki na biyu na iya bayyana a matsayin ciwo kawai wanda ke samun fata, jiki da kuma Жҷulkutu ko Жҷari wanda ya yaЙ—a da Жҷuraje a tafin hannu da kuma tafin Жҷafa.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ШҰШ№Ш© ШӘШҙЩ…Щ„ ШӘШіШұШЁ ШЈЩҲ ШҘЩҒШұШ§ШІ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҮШЁЩ„ ШЈЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ¶ЩҠШЁШҢ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү ШӯШұЩӮ ШЈШ«ЩҶШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШӘШЁЩҲЩ„.  Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҒЩ„Ш§ЩҶ Ш°ЩҲЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ЩҮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұЩҠШ¶Ш§ШӘ,  ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШөШ§ШЁЩҲШ§ ШЁЩҖ "Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҮШ§ШЁ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„ШӘШӯЩ…Ш© Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜШ©" (Ш№ЩҠЩҲЩҶ ШӯЩ…ШұШ§ШЎ) ШЁШіШЁШЁ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№ШұШ¶ Щ„Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶЩӮЩҲЩ„Ш© Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ§ЩӢ ШЈШ«ЩҶШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜШ©.  Ш§Щ„Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҮШ§ШЁШ§ШӘ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩӮЩҠЩ… ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩ… ЩӮШҜ Щ„Ш§ ШӘШёЩҮШұ ШЈЩҠ ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶. Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩҶ: Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩҶ ШәШ§Щ„ШЁЩӢШ§ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШёЩҮШұ ШЈЩҠ ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩғЩҶ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§ ШӘШёЩҮШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„ЩҠ ЩҠШёЩҮШұ ЩғЩӮШұШӯШ© ЩҲШӯЩҠШҜШ©ШҢ Ш®Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„Щ…. Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҲЩҠ ЩӮШҜ ЩҠШёЩҮШұ ЩғШ·ЩҒШӯ Ш¬Щ„ШҜЩҠШҢ ЩҠШӨШ«Шұ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш¬Щ„ШҜШҢ Ш§Щ„ШЈШәШҙЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®Ш§Ш·ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩӮШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҠЩ…ЩҒШ§ЩҲЩҠШ©ШҢ ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ Ш·ЩҒШӯ Ш¬Щ„ШҜЩҠ ЩғЩ„Ш§ШіЩҠЩғЩҠ Ш№Щ„Щү ШұШ§ШӯШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҠШҜЩҠЩҶ ЩҲ ШЈШөШ§ШЁШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШҜЩ….

translations.source: Latent syphilis is asymptomatic and characterized by positive syphilis serology. Trichomoniasis: The predominant symptoms include abnormal vaginal discharge with redness of the vulva, itching and painful intercourse. Genital herpes simplex virus (HSV) HSV most commonly presents as painful sores, vesicles or ulcerations on the external genitalia and mouth. Symptomatic genital HSV is a lifelong condition that can be characterized by frequent symptomatic recurrences.
translations.reference: Sifilis a matakin Жҷarshe kuma ba ya nuna ko bayyana wasu alamu amma ya na nuni da cewa sifilis ne ta hanyan gwajin jini. Cutar Trichomoniasis: babban alamomin wannan cuta sun haЙ—a da zuban ruwan da babu dalili tare da jan kan fatar al'aura, ЖҷaiЖҷayi da kuma jin zafi yayin saduwa. Жҳurajen cikin matantaka (Genital Herpes Simplex Virus, HSV) Mafi yawanci wannan cuta na bayyana ne a Жҷuraje masu matuЖҷar zafi da ciwo, masu ruwa, ko kuma mai kamar gyanbo a kan fatar al'aura da kuma cikin baki. Alamomin wannan cuta na tsawon rayuwa ne, wanda ke faruwa akai akai(idan wasu sun mutu wasu su Жҷara fitowa).
translations.hypothesis: "Syphilis wanda ba ya bayyana alamu ba, kuma ana bayanta ta hanyar hasil na syphilis. Trichomoniasis: Жҳungiyar alamai wanda ke kasancewa, kamar Жҷofa da Жҷasa, Жҷara, kuma Жҷaura. Virus na herpes simplex na hanyar (HSV): Virus na herpes simplex yawansu ana bayanta kamar Жҷasa, Жҷasa, ko Жҷasa a cikin hanyar da kuma fuka. Syphilis wanda ke bayyana alamu, shi ne shiri mai daidai wanda za a iya bayanta ta hanyar Жҷara bayyana alamu.

translations.source: Human T-lymphotropic virus type 1 (HTLV-1) Generally asymptomatic, the chronic form of HTLV-1 can cause severe disease, including adult T-cell leukaemia/lymphoma (ATL) and a progressive nervous system condition known as HTLV-1-associated myelopathy or tropical spastic paraparesis (HAM/TSP). Treatment: Effective treatment is currently available for several STIs. Three bacterial STIs (chlamydia, gonorrhoea and syphilis) and one parasitic STI (trichomoniasis) are usually curable with existing, effective single-dose or multiple-dose regimens of antibiotics. For viral STIs (HIV, HSV and HTLV-1), the most effective medications available are antivirals or anti-cancer drugs (in the case of HTLV-1), that can modulate the course of the diseases, though they cannot cure these three diseases.
translations.reference: Cutar sankarar jini (HTLV-1) GabaЙ—aya ba shi da wasu alamu, matsanancin matakin cutar kan iya jawo matsanancin ciwon wanda ya haЙ—a da sankarar jini ga manya (ATL) da cigaban matsalar ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa. Magani: yanzu haka akwai ingantattun magunguna da su ke nan don magance waЙ—annan cututtuka dayawa. Жҳwayoyin bacteria guda uku na STIs( Chlamydia, gonoriya da kuma sifilis) da kuma Жҷwayar cutar Trichomoniasis, yawanci akan samu waraka ta hanyar amfani da ingantattun Жҷwayoyin magunguna na antibiotics wanda ake bayarwa sau Й—aya ko fiye da Й—aya. Game da Жҷwayoyin cutar Virus( HIV, HSV, da HTLV-1) maganungunan da su ka fi tasiri a wadace su ne antiviral ko kuma magungunan da su ke daЖҷusar da cutar daji wato anti-cancer ( idan aka duba abinda ya shafi HTLV-1) da zai iya canza tsarin cututtukan, duk da basa warkar da waЙ—annan cututtuka uku.
translations.hypothesis: ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі T-lymphotropic, babban kamba 1 (HTLV-1) - Generally Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШёЩҮШұ ШЈЩҠ Щ„ЩҲЩ…ШҢ ШЁЩҠЩ…Ш§Шұ chronic na HTLV-1, yana iya sabada kasala, kamar da T-cell leukaemia/lymphoma (ATL) da kuma kasala ta hanyar na, wadda ana ke ta HTLV-1-associated myelopathy ko tropical spastic paraparesis (HAM/TSP). Da'awa: Akwai hanyoyin da'awa da za a samu don manyan kasala. Hakanan, kasala ta bakteriya (chlamydia, gonorrhoea da syphilis) da kuma kasala ta parasite (trichomoniasis) za a iya cire su da hanyoyin da'awa da za a samu, kamar da hanyoyin da'awa na yabo ko manyan hanyoyin da'awa. Don kasala ta virus (HIV, HSV da HTLV-1), manyan hanyoyin da'awa da za a samu sun haЙ—a da antiviral ko hanyoyin da'awa na cancera (a matsayin HTLV-1), wanda za a iya canzawa hanyar kasala, duk da haka, za a iya cire kasala hira.

translations.source: Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) to antibiotics used to treat STIs, in particular gonorrhoea, has increased rapidly in recent years and has reduced successful treatment outcomes. Results from the current Gonococcal AMR Surveillance Programme (GASP) show trends of high rates of quinolone resistance, increasing azithromycin resistance and emerging resistance of extended-spectrum cephalosporins. The emergence of decreased susceptibility of gonorrhoea to extended-spectrum cephalosporins, together with established high-levels of resistance to penicillins, sulphonamides, tetracyclines, quinolones and macrolides make gonorrhoea a multidrug-resistant organism. AMR for other STIs, though less common, also exists, making prevention and prompt treatment critical. To adequately treat STIs it is important to take the appropriate antimicrobials, with the correct dose and duration for the specific STI to ensure adequate treatment or cure, and to prevent the development of antimicrobial resistance.
translations.reference: Ana amfani da magungunan da su ke jure antibiotics wajen warkar da STIs, musamman gonoriya, da ya Жҷaru a Жҙan shekarun nan an samu nasarar raguwarsa sosai ta dalilin magance shi. A sakamakon wani bincike da aka yi na sa ido akan cutar gonoriya wato Gonococcal AMR Surveillance Programme a turance (GASP) ya nuna jerin gwanon juriya ga Жҷwayar quinone, Жҷarin juran azithromycin, da kuma bayyanar juran Жҷarin rukunonin cephalosporins. Bayyanar raguwar sauЖҷin kamuwa gonoriya ga Жҷarin rukunonin cephalosporins tare da gina tsantsan juriya ga penicillin, sulphonamides, ja da yalo, quinolones, da kuma macrolides ya sanya Жҷwayoyin gonoriya jure magunguna dayawa. Juriyar magunguna ga sauran STIs, duk da bai cika yawa ba, amma kuma yana faruwa, wanda ya ke sanya kariya da waraka da ya kamata cikin halin ЖҷaЖҷanikayi. Don samun cikekken magance STIs, yana da matuЖҷar amfani a samu Жҷwayoyin da su ka dace , tare da samun adadin da ya kamata a Й—auka da lokaci , musamman na STIs don tabbatar da samun cikekken magancewa da warkarwa da kuma bada kariya ga samuwar cigaba da jure Жҷwayoyin magani.
translations.hypothesis: Щ…ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ…Ш© ШҜШ§ШЁШӘШі (AMR) Щ„ЩҖ ШҜШ§ШЁШӘШі Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§ШіШӘШ№Щ…Щ„ Щ„ЩҖ Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ®Ш§ШөШ© Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩҶШҢ ЩӮШҜ ШІШ§ШҜШӘ ШЁШіШұШ№Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҶЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ЩҠШұШҢ Щ…Щ…Ш§ ЩҠЩӮЩ„Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШӘЩҠШ¬ЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ш¬ШӯШ©. Ш§Щ„ЩҶШӘЩҠШ¬ЩҮвҖҢЩҮШ§ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„ЩҠ Щ„ЩҖ Щ…ШұШ§ЩӮШЁШ© Щ…ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩҶ (GASP) ШӘШёЩҮШұ Ш§ШӘШ¬Ш§ЩҮШ§ШӘ Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш№ШҜЩ„Ш§ШӘ Щ…ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲЩҠЩҶЩҲЩ„ЩҲЩҶШҢ ШІЩҠШ§ШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш§ШІЩҠШ«ШұШ§Щ…ЩҠШіЩҠЩҶШҢ ЩҲ ШёЩҮЩҲШұ Щ…ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ…Ш© ШҜШ§ШЁШӘШі Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„ЩҲШЁЩҲШіЩҲШұЩҠЩҶ Ш°Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҠЩҒ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ§ШіШ№. ШёЩҮЩҲШұ Ш§ЩҶШ®ЩҒШ§Ш¶ ЩҒЩҠ ШӯШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩҶ Щ„ЩҖ ШҜШ§ШЁШӘШі Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„ЩҲШЁЩҲШіЩҲШұЩҠЩҶ Ш°Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҠЩҒ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ§ШіШ№ШҢ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ Щ…ШұШӘЩҒШ№Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ…Ш© Щ„ЩҖ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶШіЩҠЩ„ЩҠЩҶШҢ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„ЩҒЩҲЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠШҜШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӘШұШ§ШіЩҠЩғЩ„ЩҠЩҶШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲЩҠЩҶЩҲЩ„ЩҲЩҶШҢ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§ЩғШұЩҲЩ„ЩҠШҜШҢ ЩҠШ¬Ш№Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩҶ ЩғШ§ШҰЩҶ Щ…ШӘШ№ШҜШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ…Ш©. Щ…ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ…Ш© ШҜШ§ШЁШӘШі Щ„ЩҖ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ШұЩүШҢ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШұШәЩ… Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҶЩҮШ§ ШЈЩӮЩ„ ШҙЩҠЩҲШ№ШҢ Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜШ© ШЈЩҠШ¶ЩӢШ§ШҢ Щ…Щ…Ш§ ЩҠШ¬Ш№Щ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩӮШ§ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ ШіШұЩҠШ№ ШЈЩ…Шұ ШЁШ§Щ„Шә Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҮЩ…ЩҠШ©. Щ„ЩҖ Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ШөШӯЩҠШӯШҢ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҮЩ… Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ШҜШ§ШЁШӘШі Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁШ©ШҢ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШұШ№Ш© ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШӯШ© Щ„ЩҖ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШҜШҜШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ°Щ„Щғ Щ„Ш¶Щ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШЈЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШҙЩҒШ§ШЎШҢ ЩҲЩ…ЩҶШ№ ШӘШ·ЩҲШұ Щ…ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ…Ш© ШҜШ§ШЁШӘШі.

translations.source: Smallpox Overview: Smallpox is an acute contagious disease caused by the variola virus, a member of the orthopoxvirus family. It was one of the most devastating diseases known to humanity and caused millions of deaths before it was eradicated. It is believed to have existed for at least 3000 years. The smallpox vaccine, created by Edward Jenner in 1796, was the first successful vaccine to be developed.
translations.reference: Cutar Agana (Smallpox) Bayani: Agana cuta ce mai saurin yaЙ—uwa ta hanyar Жҷwayar cuta ta variola, Й—aya daga cikin dangin cututtukan orthopoxvirus. Tana Й—aya daga cikin cututtuka mafi muni da dan'adam ya taЙ“a fama da su kuma ta yi sanadiyyar mutuwar miliyoyin mutane kafin a samu nasarar kawar da ita. Ana ganin cutar ta ci zamani a duniyar nan na kusan shekara 3000. Allurar riga-kafin agana, wadda Edward Jenner ya ЖҷirЖҷira a shekara ta 1796, ita ce riga-kafin farko da aka samu nasara.

translations.source: He observed that milkmaids who previously had caught cowpox did not catch smallpox and showed that a similar inoculation could be used to prevent smallpox in other people. The World Health Organization launched an intensified plan to eradicate smallpox in 1967. Widespread immunization and surveillance were conducted around the world for several years. The last known natural case was in Somalia in 1977. In 1980 WHO declared smallpox eradicated вҖ“ the only infectious disease to achieve this distinction.
translations.reference: Ya nuna cewa masu sanaвҖҷar tatsar nonon da a da suka kamu da cutar aganar shanu ba sa kamuwa da cutar agana (smallpox) kuma ya nuna cewa za a iya yin amfani da irin wannan rigakafin cutar a kan wasu mutane. Жҳungiyar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) ta Жҷaddamar da wani gagarumin shiri na kawar da cutar agana a shekara ta 1967. An gudanar riga-kafi sosai tare da sa ido a duk duniya tsawon shekaru da dama. Mutum na Жҷarshe da aka sani ya kamu da cutar haka kawai a Somalia ne a 1977. A shekarar 1980, WHO ta ayyana ceyan kawar da Жҷwayar cutar - watau ita ce kawai cuta mai yaЙ—uwa da aka samu wannan nasara a kanta.

translations.source: This remains among the most notable and profound public health successes in history. Symptoms: Early symptoms of smallpox include high fever, fatigue and severe back pain, and less often, abdominal pain and vomiting. Two to 3 days later the virus produces a characteristic rash with bumps full of a clear liquid, which later fill with pus and finally develop a crust that dries and falls off. The rash begins on the face and hands, then spreads to the rest of the body. Lesions develop in the mucous membranes of the nose and mouth and ulcerate soon after formation.
translations.reference: Wannan ya kasance daga cikin fitattun nasarorin da aka samu a fannin kiwon lafiyar jama'a a tarihi. Alamomi: Alamomin farko na cutar agana sun haЙ—a da zazzabi mai zafi, gajiya da ciwon baya mai tsanani, sai kuna akan samu ciwon ciki da amai. Bayan kwana biyu zuwa 3 Жҷwayar cutar tana haifar da wani nau'i na kurji mai cike da ruwa, wanda daga baya yake cika da Й—iwa sannan a Жҷarshe ya fitar da Й“awo mai bushewa, sannan sai ya faЙ—i. Жҳurajen suna farawa ne ta fuska da hannaye, sannan daga baya su bazu zuwa sauran sassan jiki. Za a fara samun raunuka a cikin baki da hanci da sauran wurare, sannan sai su fara raЙ—aЙ—i.

translations.source: Smallpox is transmitted from person to person via infective droplets during close contact with infected people who have symptoms of the disease, or in some cases through contaminated clothing and bedding. It has an incubation period of 7вҖ“17 days after exposure and only becomes infectious once a fever develops. People remain infectious until the last scabs fall off. Smallpox was fatal in up to 30% of cases.WHO smallpox recognition card WHO response: The period since eradication has been defined by a lengthy and complex debate focussed on the destruction of the last remaining stocks of live variola virus.
translations.reference: Ana kamuwa da cutar agana (Smallpox) daga mutum zuwa mutum ta hanyar Й—igo-Й—igon cutar a lokacin kusanci da masu Й—auke da alamomin cutar, ko kuma a wasu lokuta ta hanyar tufafi da wajen kwanciyar mai cutar. Bayan kamuwa da cutar, alamominta suna fara bayyana ne tsakanin kwanaki 7- zuwa 17. Bayan bayyanarsa kuma, da zarar zarar an ga zazzabi, shi ke nan abu ya tabbata. Cutar za ta zauna a jikin mutum har sai Й“awo na Жҷarshe ya faЙ—i. Cutar agana ta kashe mutane kusan kaso 30 na masu Й—auke da ita. Katin gane cutar ta WHO Matakin WHO: Tun bayan kawar da cutar agana, an ta samun muhawarorin da suka mayar da hankali kan yadda za a kawar da Й“irЙ“ishin Жҷwayoyin cutar variola.
translations.hypothesis: Pox (ЩҠЩ…ШұШ¶) ЩҠЩҶШӘЩӮЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҒШұШҜ ШҘЩ„Щү ЩҒШұШҜ Ш№ЩҶ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮ ЩӮШ·ШұШ§ШӘ Щ…Щ„ЩҲШ«Ш©, Щ„Ш§ШЎ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ШЁЩҮЩҠЩҶ, Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҮЩ… ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶, ШЈЩҲ ЩҒЩҠ ШЁШ№Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ, Ш№ЩҶ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„Ш§ШЁШі ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…Щ„Ш§ШЎШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„ЩҲШ«Ш©. Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҮ ЩҒШӘШұШ© ШӘШ·ЩҲШұ 7-17 ЩҠЩҲЩ… ШЁШ№ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№ШұШ¶, ЩҲЩ„ЩғЩҶЩҮ ЩҠШөШЁШӯ Щ…Ш№ШҜЩҠЩӢШ§ ЩҒЩӮШ· Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§ ЩҠШЁШҜШЈ Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ ШҜШұШ¬Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӯШұШ§ШұШ©. Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ші ЩҠШёЩ„ЩҲШ§ Щ…Ш№ШҜЩҠЩҠЩҶ ШӯШӘЩү ШўШ®Шұ Ш·ШЁЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш¬Щ„ШҜ ШӘШӘШіШ§ЩӮШ·. Pox ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩӮШ§ШӘЩ„ЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ 30% Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ. ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№ШұЩҒ Ш№Щ„Щү Pox Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШЁЩ„ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©: Ш§Щ„ЩҒШӘШұШ© ШЁШ№ШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ¶Ш§ШЎ Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮШ§ ЩӮШҜ ШӘЩ… ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜЩҮШ§ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш¬ШҜШ§Щ„ Ш·ЩҲЩҠЩ„ ЩҲЩ…Ш№ЩӮШҜ, Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШұЩғШІ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘШҜЩ…ЩҠШұ Щ…Ш®ШІЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ЩҠШұ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі Variola Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҠ.

translations.source: In 1996, at the 49th World Health Assembly, Member States decided to have this stock destroyed in June 1999, and only to allow small samples to be kept for research purposes at two designated secure laboratories вҖ“ one in the United States and one in the Russian Federation. Temporary retention of the existing stocks of variola virus are used for further essential research, which is overseen by the Advisory Committee for Variola Virus Research. This group meets on an annual basis. The WHO Smallpox Secretariat based in WHO Headquarters coordinates all smallpox eradication-related and post-eradication activities. These include overseeing permitted research with live variola virus for the development of countermeasures such as vaccine and antivirals.
translations.reference: A cikin 1996, a Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya ta 49, Жҷasashe mambobi sun yanke shawarar lalata wannan cuta a watan Yunin 1999, sai dai kawai za a ba da damar adana samfurinta don dalilai na bincike a Й—akunan gwaje-gwaje guda biyu da aka keЙ“e - Й—aya a ciki a Amurka da wani kuma a Rasha. Ana amfani da waЙ—annan samfuran Жҷwayoyin cuta na variola da aka ajiye na Й—an lokaci ne don Жҷarin bincike mai muhimmanci, wanda Kwamitin Ba da Shawarwari don Binciken Cutar Variola ke kulawa. Wannan rukunin kwamitin suna haЙ—uwa ne duk shekara. Sakatariyar cutar agana ta WHO da ke hedikwatar WHO tana tsara duk ayyukan da suka shafi kawar da cutar da kuma abubuwan da kan zo bayan kawar da cutar. WaЙ—annan sun haЙ—a da sa ido kan binciken da aka ba da izinin yi tare da Жҷwayar cutar variola mai rai don haЙ“aka matakan riga-kafin kamar sinadaran hana yaЙ—uwar Жҷwayoyin cuta.
translations.hypothesis: A cikin 1996, Ч‘Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ 49th na MajlГӯs na Lafiya na Duniya, Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Ш¶Ш§ШЎ ЩӮШҜЩҲШ§ ШҘЩ„Щү ШӘШҜЩ…ЩҠШұ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШІЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҺЩҠЩ’ ЩҠ 1999ШҢ ЩҲ ЩҒЩӮШ· Щ„Щ„ШіЩ…Ш§Шӯ ШЁЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ Ш№ЩҠЩҶШ§ШӘ ШөШәЩҠШұШ© Щ„ЩҠШӘЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӯШӘЩҒШ§Шё ШЁЩҮШ§ Щ„ШЈШәШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШЁШӯШ« ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҶ Щ…Ш®ШөШөЩҠЩҶ ЩҲШўЩ…ЩҶЩҠЩҶ - ЩҲШ§ШӯШҜ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩ„Ш§ЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШӯШҜШ© ЩҲЩҲШ§ШӯШҜ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШӯШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШұЩҲШіЩҠ. Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӯШӘЩҒШ§Шё Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӨЩӮШӘ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШІЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„ЩҠ Щ„ЩҖ ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі РІР°СҖРёЩҲЩ„Ш§ ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„ШЁШӯШ« Щ…ЩҮЩ… ШўШ®ШұШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШӘЩ… Ш§Щ„ШҘШҙШұШ§ЩҒ Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШЁЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШ© Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШҙШ§ШұЩҠШ© Щ„ЩҖ ШЁШӯШ« ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі РІР°СҖРёЩҲЩ„Ш§. wannan Жҷungiyar ta zauna a matakai na Й—aya. ШіЩғШұШӘШ§ШұЩҠШ© WHO ta Varicella, wanda ke aikin WHO, ta Жҷayyashi duk harkokin da ke da alaЖҷa da Й“atar da varicella, da kuma harkokin bayan Й“atar da shi. Hakan ya haЙ—a da Й“atar da Жҷungiyar da ke amfani da varicella na halitta don ЖҷirЖҷirar hanyoyin ganowa kamar vaksin da kuma Жҷungiyar antiviral.

translations.source: Since the eradication era, safer vaccines and specific treatments have been developed for smallpox and related diseases such as monkeypox. The Secretariat is also responsible for emergency preparedness and manages a smallpox vaccine emergency stockpile in the unlikely event that the disease re-emerges. The Secretariat manages the biosafety and biosecurity inspections of the authorized variola virus repositories as mandated by the World Health Assembly, and ensures annual reporting to WHO Governing Bodies. The Smallpox Secretariat supports WHO Archives in preserving the global history of smallpox and documenting the lessons learned from successful eradication of smallpox. The WHO Smallpox Secretariat's current roles and responsibilities include:
translations.reference: Tun lokacin da aka kawar da ita wannan cuta, an samar da rigakafi da takamaimun magunguna don cutar agana da cututtukan da ke da alaЖҷa, kamar cutar Жҷyandar biri. Sakatariyar kuma ita ce ke da alhakin shirye-shiryen gaggawa da sarrafa lamurran gaggawa na riga-kafin cutar agana a lokacin da ta Й“ulla, wanda ba a yi tsammanina cutar za ta sake Й“ulla ba. Sakatariyar tana kula da binciken lafiyar halittu da nazarin halittu na ma'ajiyar Жҷwayoyin cuta ta variola da aka ba da izinin yin hakan, kamar yadda Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya ta umarta; kuma tana tabbatar da an ba da rahoton shekara-shekara ga hukumomin gudanarwa na WHO. translations.source: Preserving global smallpox history overseeing the Smallpox Eradication Programme archives in collaboration with WHO Archives and the WHO Library leading on policy discussions and commemorative events regarding smallpox eradication reporting annually to the WHO Executive Board and the World Health Assembly The Secretariat also mobilizes and manages funding for these activities and for ad hoc events as required such as technical consultations and training.

translations.source: Snakebite envenoming Overview: Snakebite envenoming is a potentially life-threatening disease caused by toxins in the bite of a venomous snake. Envenoming can also be caused by having venom sprayed into the eyes by certain species of snakes that have the ability to spit venom as a defence measure. Inadequate past efforts to control snakebite envenoming has produced fragmented, inaccurate epidemiological data. Many victims do not attend health centres or hospitals and instead rely on traditional treatments.
translations.reference: Dafin cizon maciji Bayani: Dafin cizon maciji cuta ce mai yiwuwar cutar da rayuwa wadda ke haifar da guba idan mutum ya gamu da cikin cizon maciji. Haka kuma cutar dafin cizon tana iya samuwa ta hanyar fesa yawu da wani nauвҖҷin macizai ke yi a cikin idanuwa a matsayin matakin kare kansu. Rashin ЖҷoЖҷarin da aka yi a baya don shawo kan cutar dafin maciji ya haifar da rashin cikakku da ingantattun bayanan yaЙ—uwar cututtuka. Yawancin waЙ—anda suka taЙ“a samun cizon maciji ba sa zuwa cibiyoyin lafiya ko asibitoci; maimakon haka sukan dogara da magungunan gargajiya.
