translations.source: However, available data show 4.5вҖ“5.4 million people get bitten by snakes annually. Of this, 1.8вҖ“2.7 million develop clinical illness and 81 000 to 138 000 die from complications. High-risk groups include rural agricultural workers, herders, fishermen, hunters, working children, people living in poorly constructed houses and those with limited access to education and healthcare. Morbidity and mortality occur most frequently among young people and children suffer higher case fatality. Furthermore, women experience increased barriers to accessing medical care in some cultures and pregnant women are extremely vulnerable.
translations.reference: Duk da cewa bayanan da aka tattara sun nuna cewa maciji yana sarar mutane miliyan 4.5 zuwa 5.4 a duk shekara. Daga cikin waЙ—annan, miliyan 1.8 zuwa 2.7 suna samun rashin lafiya kuma 81 000 zuwa 138 000 suna mutuwa daga saboda wannan cizo. Mutanen da suka fi hatsarin fuskantar wannan sun haЙ—a da masu aikin gona na karkara, makiyaya, masunta, mafarauta, yara masu aiki, mutanen da ke zaune a gidajen da ba a gina su da kyau ba, da kuma waЙ—anda ke da Жҷarancin damar samun ilimi da kiwon lafiya. Kamuwa da cutar da mace-mace na faruwa a-kai-a-kai tsakanin matasa sannan yara kanana sun fi fama da yawan mace-mace. Bugu da Жҷari, mata ba sa samun kulawar asibiti a wasu al'adu kuma mata masu juna biyu sun fi zama masu rauni a wannan fannin.
translations.hypothesis: Щ„ЩғЩҶ, ШҘШӯШөШ§ШЎШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ§ШӯШ© ШӘШёЩҮШұ ШЈЩҶ 4.5-5.4 Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ Шұ person ЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҲЩҶ ЩҮШ¬ЩҲЩ… Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш№Ш§ШЁЩҠЩҶ ЩғЩ„ Ш№Ш§Щ…. Щ…ЩҶЩҮ, 1.8-2.7 Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ ЩҠШ·ЩҲШұЩҲЩҶ ШЁЩҠЩ…Ш§Шұ Ш·ШЁЩҠ, ЩҲ 81,000 ШҘЩ„Щү 138,000 ЩҠЩ…ЩҲШӘЩҲЩҶ ШЁШіШЁШЁ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ЩғЩ„. Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш§ШӘ Ш°ЩҲЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·Шұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠ ШҙЩ…Щ„ЩҲШ§ Ш№Ш§Щ…Щ„ЩҠ ШІШұШ§Ш№Ш©, ШЁШ§Шӯ, ШЁШ§Шӯ, ШЁШ§Шӯ, ШЈШ·ЩҒШ§Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҶ, ШіШ§ЩғЩҶЩҠЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШҜШ§ШұЩҲЩҶ ЩҶШ§, ЩҲ Ш°ЩҲЩҠ ШҘЩ…ЩғШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© Щ…ШӯШҜЩҲШҜШ© Щ„Щ„ШӘШ№Щ„ЩҠЩ… ЩҲШ§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©. ШЁЩҠЩ…Ш§Шұ ЩҲ ЩҲЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ ЩҶШ§ ЩҶШ§ ЩҠШёЩҮШұЩҲЩҶ ШЈЩғШӘШұ ШЁЩҠЩҶ Щ…ШІШ§ШұЩҠЩҶ ЩҲ ШЈШ·ЩҒШ§Щ„ ЩҶШ§ ЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҲЩҶ ЩҲЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ ШЈЩғШӘШұ. ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү Ш°Щ„Щғ, ШіЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩҶШ§ ЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҲЩҶ ШөШ№ЩҲШЁШ§ШӘ ШЈЩғШӘШұ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ Ш№Щ„Щү ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш·ШЁЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ ШЁШ№Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Ш«ЩӮШ§ЩҒШ§ШӘ, ЩҲ ШіЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩҶШ§ ЩҶШ§ ЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҲЩҶ Ш®Ш·Шұ ЩғШЁЩҠШұ.

translations.source: An ongoing crisis restricting access to safe, effective antivenom treatment in many regions, and particularly sub-Saharan Africa, is one factor that contributes to the predisposition for seeking help through traditional medicine. Symptoms: Bites or sprayed venom from venomous snakes can cause a range of acute and serious medical emergencies. Envenoming from different types of snakes can cause different symptoms, some more serious than others. This makes the preparation of correct antivenoms an ongoing problem. Envenoming can cause severe paralysis that may prevent breathing, making immediate medical attention critical.
translations.reference: Rikicin da ke ci gaba da hana samun kulawar lafiya, ingantaccen maganin riga-kafi a yankuna da yawa, musamman ma yankin kudu da hamadar Sahara, wani abu ne da ke ba da gudummawa wajen yiwuwar neman taimako ta hanyar maganin gargajiya. Alamominta: Cizo ko fesa dafin da macizai masu dafi ke yi na iya haifar da mummunan yanayin gaggawa na rashin lafiya. Saka dafin nau'ikan macizai daban-daban na iya haifar da alamomi daban-daban, sai dai wasu sun fi wasu tsanani. Wannan ya sa shirye-shiryen neman ainihin maganin riga-kafi ya zama cike da matsaloli a halin yanzu. Dafin cizon maciji na iya haifar da shanyewar jiki mai tsanani wanda zai iya hana numfashi, kuma yana haifar da matsananciyar kulawar likita cikin gaggawa.

translations.source: People may also experience bleeding disorders that can lead to fatal haemorrhages or irreversible kidney failure. Severe local tissue destruction may also occur, which can lead to permanent disability and even limb amputation. Children are at higher risk of severe effects due to lower body mass than adults. Most deaths and serious consequences from snake bites are entirely preventable by making safe and effective antivenoms more widely available and accessible, particularly in high-risk areas. High quality snake antivenoms are the only effective treatment to prevent or reverse most of the venomous effects of snake bites.
translations.reference: Sannan kuma mutane na iya fuskantar matsalar zubar jini mai kisa ko matsalar Жҷoda da ba za a iya maganinta ba. Har ila yau, za a iya samun mummunar lalacewar tsoka, wanda zai haifar da nakasu na dindindin har ma da yanke gaЙ“oЙ“in jiki. Yara sum fi samun kansu cikin wannan yanayi mai tsanani saboda rashin nauyin jiki. Yawancin mace-mace da munanan lamurran saran maciji ana iya yin riga-kafinsu gaba Й—aya ta hanyar samar da amintattun magungunan kashe Жҷwayoyin cuta da kuma samun dama, musamman a wuraren da ke da haЙ—arin macizai. Magani masu inganci na macizai su ne kawai ingantaccen magani don hanawa ko karkatar da mafi yawan illolin cizon maciji.

translations.source: Treatment: Snake antivenoms are effective treatments to prevent or reverse most of the harmful effects of snakebite envenoming and are included in the WHO list of essential medicines. The availability and accessibility of these antivenoms, along with raising awareness on primary prevention methods among communities and health workers, are the best ways to limit serious consequences and deaths from snakebite envenoming. After a bite by a snake suspected of being venomous, follow these steps: Immediately move away from the area where the bite occurred. Remove anything tight from around the bitten part of the body to avoid harm if swelling occurs.
translations.reference: Yin magani: Magungunan dafin maciji sun kasance suna da inganci wajen hanawa ko sauЖҷaЖҷa mafi yawan illolin cutar saran maciji kuma suna cikin jerin mahimman magunguna na WHO. Samuwar waЙ—annan magungunan kashe dafin, tare da wayar da kan jama'a kan hanyoyin riga-kafin farko a tsakanin al'ummomi da ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya, su ne mafi kyawun hanyoyin da za a iya maganin mace-mace saboda cizon maciji. Bayan saran maciji da ake zargin yana da dafi, to a bi waЙ—annan matakan: Nan da nan mutum ya tashi daga wajen da aka yi masa cizon. A cire duk wani abu da zai iya tamke kewayen sashen jikin da aka ciz don gujewa cutarwa idan aka samu kumburi.

translations.source: Reassure the victim, as most venomous snake bites do not cause immediate death. Immobilize the person completely and transport the person to a health facility as soon as possible Applying pressure at the bite site with a pressure pad may be suitable in some cases. Avoid traditional first aid methods or herbal medicines. Paracetamol may be given for local pain (which can be severe).
translations.reference: Ka kwantar da hankalin wanda abin aka cizan, saboda yawancin saran maciji ba ya kashe mutum nan-take. A hana mutum motsi gaba Й—aya kuma a kai shi asibiti da wuri-wuri Wasu lokutan idan aka Й—an mammatsa wurin cizon, ana iya dacewa. A guji hanyoyin taimakon gaggawa na gargajiya ko magungunan itace. Ana iya ba da paracetamol don kashe zafin wajen (wanda zai iya zama mai tsanani).

translations.source: Vomiting may occur, so place the person on their left side in the recovery position. Closely monitor airway and breathing and be ready to resuscitate if necessary
translations.reference: Mutun yana iya yin amai, don haka a sanya shi a gefen hagunsu don daina aman. A kula da yadda yake numfashi a hankali kuma ku a kasance a shirye don farfado shi idan akwai buЖҷatar hakan.

translations.source: Soil-transmitted helminthiases Overview: Soil-transmitted helminth (STH) infections are among the most common infections worldwide and affect the poorest and most deprived communities. They are transmitted by eggs present in human faeces which in turn contaminate soil in areas where sanitation is poor. The main species that infect people are the roundworm (Ascaris lumbricoides), the whipworm (Trichuris trichiura) and the hookworms (Necator americanus and Ancylostoma duodenale). Intestinal worms produce a wide range of symptoms including intestinal manifestations (diarrhoea, abdominal pain), general malaise and weakness.
translations.reference: Cutar tsutsotsi Bayani: Cututtukan tsutsotsi (wato STH a taЖҷaice) suna daga cikin cututtukan da aka fi sani a duk duniya kuma suna shafar al'ummomin da suka fi talauci da rashin Жҷarfi. Suna samuwa ne ta hanyar Жҷwai da ke cikin najasar Й—an'adam wanda hakan ke gurЙ“ata Жҷasa a wuraren da tsaftar muhalli ta ti Жҷaranci. Manyan nau'ukan da ke cutar da mutane su ne roundworm (Ascaris lumbricoides), whipworm (Trichuris trichiura) da hookworm (Necator Americanus da Ancylostoma duodenale). Tsutsotsi na hanji suna fitar da alamomi iri-iri da suka shafi hanji (zawo, ciwon ciki), rashin lafiya da mutuwar jiki.
translations.hypothesis: ЩҶбә“ahar "Helminthiases" (Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠШҜШ§ЩҶ): "Helminthiases" (Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠШҜШ§ЩҶ) ШҙЩҲЩҮЩҠ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ Щ…ЩҮШ§ШұШ§ШӘ ШіШ§ШұШ№ШӘЩҠ ШҙШ§ЩҠШ№ ШЁШ¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ШЈЩҶШӯШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩҮЩ…Ш§ ШЈШ«Шұ Ш№Щ„Щү ШәЩҶЩҠ ЩҲЩ…ЩҮЩ…Щ„. ЩҮЩ…Ш§ ЩҠЩҸЩҶЩӮЩ„ЩҲЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ШЁЩҠШ¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ ЩҒЩҠ ШЁШұШ§ШІ Ш§Щ„ШЁШҙШұЩҠШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ШЁШҜЩҲШұЩҮ ЩҠЩҸЩ„ЩҲШ« Ш§Щ„ШӘШұШЁШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…Ш§ЩғЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ Щ„Ш§ ШӘЩҲШ¬ШҜ ЩҒЩҠЩҮШ§ Ш®ШҜЩ…Ш§ШӘ ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш¬ЩҠШҜШ©. Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩҸШөЩҠШЁ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ші ЩҮЩ…Ш§ ШҜЩҠШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШҜЩҠШұШ© (Ascaris lumbricoides)ШҢ ШҜЩҠШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш®ЩҠШ· (Trichuris trichiura)ШҢ ЩҲШҜЩҠШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ„ШіШ§ЩҶ (Necator americanus ЩҲ Ancylostoma duodenale). Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…Ш№Ш§ШЎ ШӘЩҸШіШЁШЁ Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© ЩҲШ§ШіШ№Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ШҢ ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…Ш№Ш§ШЎ (ШҘШіЩҮШ§Щ„ШҢ ШЈЩ„Щ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·ЩҶ)ШҢ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЩҒ Ш№Ш§Щ….

translations.source: Hookworms cause chronic intestinal blood loss that result in anaemia. Soil-transmitted helminths are transmitted by eggs that are passed in the faeces of infected people. Adult worms live in the intestine where they produce thousands of eggs each day. In areas that lack adequate sanitation, these eggs contaminate the soil. This can happen in several ways: eggs that are attached to vegetables are ingested when the vegetables are not carefully cooked, washed or peeled;
translations.reference: Hookworms suna haifar da asarar jini na hanji na yau da kullun wanda ke haifar da cutar da ake kira anemia a Turance. Ana samar da waЙ—annan tsutsotsi ne ta hanyar Жҷwai waЙ—anda ke fitowa a cikin najasar mutanen da suka kamu da cutar. Tsutsotsi na manya suna rayuwa ne a cikin hanji inda suke samar da dubban Жҷwai kowace rana. A wuraren da ba su da isasshen tsafta, waЙ—annan Жҷwai suna gurЙ“ata Жҷasa. Wannan na iya faruwa ta hanyoyi da yawa: ana cin wannan Жҷwan da ke maЖҷala da kayan lambu ne a lokacin da ba a dafa kayan lambun da kyau ba, ko ba a wanke ko an Й“are bawon da kyai ba;
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁШіЩҠШ·Ш© ЩҠШіШЁШЁЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШІЩҠЩҒ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩ…Шұ Щ„Ы• cikin ШұЫҶЫҢШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮШ§ШҜШ§ЩҠШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮШ§ШҜШ§ЩҠ. ШҜЩҠШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁШіЩҠШ·Ш© ЩҠЩҸЩҶШҙШұЩҲЩҶ Щ…ЩҗЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ЩғЩҲЩҠШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮШ§ШҜШ§ЩҠШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮШ§ШҜШ§ЩҠ. translations.source: eggs are ingested from contaminated water sources; eggs are ingested by children who play in the contaminated soil and then put their hands in their mouths without washing them. Symptoms: Morbidity is related to the number of worms harboured. People with infections of light intensity (few worms) usually do not suffer from the infection. Heavier infections can cause a range of symptoms including intestinal manifestations (diarrhoea and abdominal pain), malnutrition, general malaise and weakness, and impaired growth and physical development.
translations.reference: ana cin Жҷwan a gurЙ“ataccen ruwa; yaran da ke wasa a gurЙ“ataccen wuri suna cin Жҷwan ne idan sun sanya hannayensu a cikin bakinsu ba tare da wankewa ba. Alamunta: kamuwa da cutar yana da alaЖҷa da adadin tsutsotsi da suka yi wa mutum katutu. Mutanen da ke Й—auke tsutsotsin ЖҷaЙ—an yawanci cutar ba ta kama su. Idan kuma suka yi yawa, suna iya haifar da alamomi iri-iri da suka danganci hanji (zawo da ciwon ciki), rashin nuna cewa mutum yana cin abinci mai gina jiki, raunin jiki da rashin girma da haЙ“akar jiki.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШ¶ ЩҠЩҸШӨЩғЩ„ЩҲЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҲШіШ§Ш· Щ…Ш§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„ЩҲШ«Ш©Шӣ ШЈШ·ЩҒШ§Щ„ ЩҠЩҸШӨЩғЩ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШ¶, ЩҲ ЩҮШӨЩ„Ш§ШЎ ЩҠЩ„Ш№ЩӮЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШұШЁШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„ЩҲШ«Ш©, ЩҲШЁШ№ШҜ Ш°Щ„Щғ ЩҠШ¶Ш№ЩҲЩҶ ШЈЩҠШҜЩҠЩҮЩ… ЩҒЩҠ ШЈЩҒЩҲШ§ЩҮЩҮЩ… ШҜЩҲЩҶ ШәШіЩ„ЩҮШ§. Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш·: Ш§Щ„ШҘШөШ§ШЁШ© ЩҶШ§Ш¬Щ…Ш© Ш№ЩҶ Ш№ШҜШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҒЩҠЩ„ЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜШ©. Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜ Ш°ЩҲЩҠ ШҘШөШ§ШЁШ§ШӘ Ш®ЩҒЩҠЩҒШ© (Ш№ШҜШҜ ЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҒЩҠЩ„ЩҠШ§ШӘ) Ш№Ш§ШҜШ© Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШ№Ш§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘШөШ§ШЁШ©. Ш§Щ„ШҘШөШ§ШЁШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҙШҜЩҠШҜШ© ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ШӘШіШЁШЁ Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶, ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҮШ§ШІ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШ¶Щ…ЩҠ (ШҘШіЩҮШ§Щ„ ЩҲШўЩ„Ш§Щ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·ЩҶ), ШіЩҲШЎ Ш§Щ„ШӘШәШ°ЩҠШ©, ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЩҒ Ш№Ш§Щ…, ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЩҒ ЩҶЩ…ЩҲ, ЩҲЩғШ°Щ„Щғ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ЩҲШұ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШіШҜЩҠ.

translations.source: Infections of very high intensity can cause intestinal obstruction that should be treated surgically. S. stercoralis may cause dermatological and gastro-intestinal morbidity and is also known to be associated with chronic malnutrition in children. In case of reduced host immunity, the parasite can cause the hyperinfection/dissemination syndrome that is invariably fatal if not promptly and properly cured and is often fatal despite the treatment. In 2001, delegates at the World Health Assembly unanimously endorsed a resolution (WHA54.19) urging endemic countries to start seriously tackling worms, specifically schistosomiasis and soil-transmitted helminths. The strategy for control of soil-transmitted helminth infections is to control morbidity through the periodic treatment of at-risk people living in endemic areas.
translations.reference: Lokacin da cutar ta yi tsanani sosai, tana iya haifar da toshewar hanji wanda ya kamata a ce an yi tiyata. S. stercoralis na iya haifar da cututtuka na fara da hanji kuma an san yana da alaЖҷa da rashin abinci mai gina jiki na yau da kullum a tsakanin yara. Idan ma mai Й—auke da cutar garkuwar jikinsa ta ragu, Жҷwayar cuta na iya karaЙ—e masa jiki, wadda tana iya kisa a koyaushe idan ba a yi magani da sauri ba kuma sau da yawa mutum yana iya mutuwa duk da an masa jinya. A shekarar 2001, wakilai a Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya sun amince da wani kuduri (WHA54.19) wanda yake kira ga Жҷasashe masu fama da cutar da su fara yaЖҷar tsutsotsi, musamman schistosomiasis da helminths. Dabarar yaЖҷar cututtukan tsutsotsin ita ce sarrafa cututtuka ta hanyar jinya na lokaci-lokaci na mutanen da ke fama da abin waЙ—anda kuma ke zaune a yankunan da ke fama da cutar.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҮШ§ШЁШ§ШӘ Ш°ЩҠ ШҙШҜЩҠШҜШҢ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШіШЁШЁ Ш§ЩҶШіШҜШ§ШҜ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…Ш№Ш§ШЎШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШ¬ШЁ Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ЩҮ Ш¬ШұШ§ШӯЩҠШ§ЩӢ. *S. stercoralis* ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШіШЁШЁ Щ…ШҙЩғЩ„Ш§ШӘ Ш¬Щ„ШҜЩҠШ© ЩҲ Щ…ШҙШ§ЩғЩ„ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҮШ§ШІ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШ¶Щ…ЩҠШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮЩҲ ШЈЩҠШ¶Ш§ЩӢ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҲЩҒ ШЁШЈЩҶЩҮ Щ…ШұШӘШЁШ· Щ…Ш№ ШіЩҲШЎ Ш§Щ„ШӘШәШ°ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШІЩ…ЩҶ Щ„ШҜЩү Ш§Щ„ШЈШ·ЩҒШ§Щ„. ШҘШ°Ш§ ЩғШ§ЩҶ Ш¬ЩҮШ§ШІ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш№Ш© Ш¶Ш№ЩҠЩҒШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҒЩҠЩ„ЩҠ ЩҮШ°Ш§ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШіШЁШЁ ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ "Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҮШ§ШЁ ШҙШҜЩҠШҜ/Ш§ЩҶШӘШҙШ§Шұ"ШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮШ°ЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ ШәШ§Щ„ШЁЩӢШ§ Щ…Ш§ ШӘЩғЩҲЩҶ Щ…Щ…ЩҠШӘШ© ШҘШ°Ш§ Щ„Щ… ЩҠШӘЩ… Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ЩҮШ§ ШЁШіШұШ№Ш© ЩҲ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ШөШӯЩҠШӯШҢ ЩҲ ШӯШӘЩү Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬. Ш№Ш§Щ… 2001ШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғЩҠЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӨШӘЩ…Шұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ Щ„Щ„ШөШӯШ©ШҢ ЩӮШҜЩҲШ§ ЩӮШұШ§Шұ (WHA54.19) Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШ·Щ„ШЁ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөШ§ШЁШ©ШҢ ШЈЩҶ ШӘШЁШҜШЈ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ„Ш¬Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҒЩҠЩ„ЩҠШ§ШӘШҢ ЩҲ Ш®Ш§ШөШ© Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҒЩҠЩ„ЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩҶШӘЩӮЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШұШЁШ©ШҢ ШЁШ¬ШҜЩҠШ©. Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШұШ§ШӘЩҠШ¬ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„ШіЩҠШ·ШұШ© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҮШ§ШЁШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҒЩҠЩ„ЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩҶШӘЩӮЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШұШЁШ©ШҢ ЩҮЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠШ·ШұШ© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ЩғЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ ШҜЩҲШұЩҠ Щ„Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШұШ¶ЩҠЩҶ Щ„Щ„Ш®Ш·ШұШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ЩҠШ№ЩҠШҙЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш·ЩӮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөШ§ШЁШ©.

translations.source: People at risk are: preschool children school-age children women of reproductive age (including pregnant women in the second and third trimesters and breastfeeding women) adults in certain high-risk occupations such as tea-pickers or miners.
translations.reference: Mutanen da za su iya daukar cutar: Yaran da ba su shiga makaranta ba tukunna Yara Жҙan makaranta matan da suka kai shekarun haihuwa (ciki har da mata masu juna biyu da ke tsakanin wata 6 zuwa 9 da mata masu shayarwa) mutane a wasu sana'o'i masu haЙ—arin Й—aukar wannan cutar akwai masu noman ganyen shayi ko masu haЖҷar ma'adinai.
translations.hypothesis: 'A cikin masu fama, ana bukatar: Жҙan shakata, Жҙan shule, mata masu daidai da shiga, (ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ, mata masu jin, ЩҲ mata masu aiki), wadanda ke aiki a ayyuka masu haЙ—ari, kamar masu kashe ko masu min.

translations.source: TreatmentThe WHO recommended medicines вҖ“albendazole (400 mg) and mebendazole (500 mg) вҖ“ are effective, inexpensive and easy to administer by non-medical personnel (e.g. teachers). They have been through extensive safety testing and have been used in millions of people with few and minor side-effects. Both albendazole and mebendazole are donated to national ministries of health through WHO in all endemic countries for the treatment of all children of school age. Ivermectin for the control of S. stercoralis is expected to be available at affordable price from 2021.
translations.reference: Magani: Magungunan da WHO ta ba da shawarar aiki da su -albendazole (400 MG) da mebendazole (500 MG) - suna da tasiri, ba su da tsada kuma ga sauЖҷin gane yadda za a yi amfani da shi ko ga ma'aikatan da ba likita ba (misali malamai). An duba magungunan sosai ta hanyar gwaji mai yawa kuma an yi amfani da su a kan miliyoyin mutane, kuma ba a ga wata illa tare da su ba. Duka albendazole da mebendazole ana ba da su gudummawa ga ma'aikatun lafiya na Жҷasa ta ЖҷarЖҷashin WHO a duk Жҷasashen da ke fama da cutar don kula da duk yaran da suka isa shiga makaranta. Ivermectin wanda ake sa ran zai rage yaЙ—uwar S. stercoralis zai kasance a farashi mai araha daga 2021.
translations.hypothesis: Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬: Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШөЩү ШЁЩҮШ§ Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШЁЩ„ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© вҖ“ ШЈЩ„ШЁЩҠЩҶШҜШ§ШІЩҲЩ„ (400 Щ…Щ„Шә) ЩҲ Щ…ЩҠШЁЩҠЩҶШҜШ§ШІЩҲЩ„ (500 Щ…Щ„Шә) вҖ“ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ШҢ ШұШ®ЩҠШөШҢ ЩҲ ШіЩҮЩҲЩ„Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШЁЩ„ ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜ ШәЩҠШұ Ш·ШЁЩҠШЁЩҠЩҶ (Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩҶ). Щ„ЩӮШҜ Ш®Ш¶Ш№ЩҲШ§ Щ„Ш§Ш®ШӘШЁШ§ШұШ§ШӘ ШЈЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„Ш©ШҢ ЩҲ Щ„ЩӮШҜ ШӘЩ… Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…ЩҮЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Щ„Ш§ЩҠЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Щ…Ш№ ШўШ«Ш§Шұ Ш¬Ш§ЩҶШЁЩҠШ© ЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ„Ш© ЩҲ Ш·ЩҒЩҠЩҒШ©. ЩғЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩ„ШЁЩҠЩҶШҜШ§ШІЩҲЩ„ ЩҲ Щ…ЩҠШЁЩҠЩҶШҜШ§ШІЩҲЩ„ ЩҠШӘЩ… Ш§Щ„ШӘШЁШұШ№ ШЁЩҮЩ…Ш§ ШҘЩ„Щү ЩҲШІШ§ШұШӘ ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ·ЩҶЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөШ§ШЁШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ°Щ„Щғ Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ·ЩҒШ§Щ„ ЩҒЩҠ ШіЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜШұШіШ©. ЩҠЩҸШӘЩҲЩӮШ№ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠЩғЩҲЩҶ ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© "ШҘЩҠЩҒЩҠШұЩ…ЩҠЩғШӘЩҠЩҶ" Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…Ш© Щ„Щ„ШіЩҠШ·ШұШ© Ш№Щ„Щү "S. stercoralis" Щ…ШӘШ§ШӯШ© ШЁШіШ№Шұ Щ…Ш№ЩӮЩҲЩ„ШҢ ШЁШҜШЎЩӢШ§ Щ…ЩҶ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2021.

translations.source: Stillbirth Overview: A baby who dies after 28 weeks of pregnancy, but before or during birth, is classified as a stillbirth.There are nearly 2 million stillbirths every year вҖ“ one every 16 seconds. Over 40% of all stillbirths occur during labour вҖ“ a loss that could be avoided with improved quality and respectful care during childbirth including routine monitoring and timely access to emergency obstetric care when required. Experiencing a stillbirth during pregnancy or childbirth is a tragedy insufficiently addressed in global agendas, policies and funded programmes. There are psychological costs, especially to women and their families, such as maternal depression, financial consequences and economic repercussions, as well as stigma and taboo.In 2014, the World Health Assembly endorsed the Every Newborn Action Plan (ENAP), which includes a global target of 12 or fewer third trimester (late) stillbirths per 1,000 total births in every country by 2030.
translations.reference: Haihuwar jariri a mace Bayani: Jaririn da ya mutu bayan makonni 28 a ciki, kafin ko lokacin haihuwa, ana Жҷirga shi a matsayin wanda aka haifa a mace. Ana haihuwar jarirai kusan miliyan 2 a mace a kowace shekara - jariri Й—aya ke nan a cikin duk daЖҷika 16. Fiye da kashi 40 cikin 100 na jariran da ake haifa a mace suna mutuwa ne a lokacin naЖҷuda вҖ“ asarar da za a iya guje wa ta hanyar ingantaccen tsari da nuna kulawa yayin haihuwa, ciki har da sa ido na yau da kullum da ba da kulawar haihuwa ta gaggawa lokacin da ya kamata. Mutuwar jarirai a lokacin juna biyu ko lokacin haihuwa wani bala'i ne wanda ba a magance shi ba a cikin ajandar duniya, manufofi da shirye-shiryen da aka ba wa kuЙ—i. Ana samun kaЙ—uwar zuciya, musamman ga mata da danginsu, kamar shiga damuwa lokacin jego, matsalolin kuЙ—i, da kuma nuna Жҷyama da Жҷiyayya. A shekarar 2014, Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya ta amince da Tsarin Hidima ga Jarirai (ENAP), wanda ya haЙ—a da burin rage adadin mace-macen jarirai a cikin mahaifa da guda 12 ko Жҷasa da haka a wata na huЙ—u zuwa shida lokacin rainon ciki a jimillar haihuwa 1,000 a kowace Жҷasa nan da 2030.
translations.hypothesis: ЩҶШёШұШ© Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү ЩҲЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ·ЩҒШ§Щ„: Ш·ЩҒЩ„ ЩҠЩ…ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШӘ ШЁШ№ШҜ 28 ШЈШіШЁЩҲШ№ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ…Щ„ШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩғЩҶЩҮ ЩӮШЁЩ„ ШЈЩҲ ШЈШ«ЩҶШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜШ©ШҢ ЩҠЩҸШөЩҶЩҒ Ш№Щ„Щү ШЈЩҶЩҮ ЩҲЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ. ЩҠШЁЩ„Шә Ш№ШҜШҜ ЩҲЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ·ЩҒШ§Щ„ ШӯЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҠ 2 Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ ШіЩҶЩҲЩҠЩӢШ§ вҖ“ ЩҲШ§ШӯШҜ ЩғЩ„ 16 Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠШ©. Щ…Ш§ ЩҠШІЩҠШҜ Ш№ЩҶ 40% Щ…ЩҶ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ЩҲЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ·ЩҒШ§Щ„ ЩҠШӯШҜШ« ШЈШ«ЩҶШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜШ© вҖ“ ЩҲЩҮЩҠ Ш®ШіШ§ШұШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШӘШ¬ЩҶШЁЩҮШ§ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ Ш¬ЩҲШҜШ© ЩҲШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Щ…ШӯШӘШұЩ…Ш© ШЈШ«ЩҶШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜШ©ШҢ ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ§ЩӮШЁШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШӘШёЩ…Ш© ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩӮШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁ ШҘЩ„Щү ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© ЩҶШіШ§ШҰЩҠШ© Ш·Ш§ШұШҰШ© Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Ш¬Ш©. Щ…ЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮШ© ЩҲЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ·ЩҒШ§Щ„ ШЈШ«ЩҶШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ…Щ„ ШЈЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜШ© ЩҮЩҠ Щ…ШЈШіШ§Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ Щ„Щ… ЩҠШӘЩ… Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШӘЩҮШ§ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ЩғШ§ЩҒ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·Ш· Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠШ§ШіШ§ШӘШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЁШұШ§Щ…Ш¬ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜШ№ЩҲЩ…Ш©. ЩҮЩҶШ§Щғ ШӘЩғШ§Щ„ЩҠЩҒ ЩҶЩҒШіЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ®Ш§ШөШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…ШұШЈШ© ЩҲШ№Ш§ШҰЩ„ШӘЩҮШ§ШҢ Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩғШӘШҰШ§ШЁ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҲШ§ЩӮШЁ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ№ЩҲШ§ЩӮШЁ Ш§ЩӮШӘШөШ§ШҜЩҠШ©ШҢ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү ЩҲШөЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Шұ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩӮШ§Щ„ЩҠШҜ. ЩҒЩҠ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2014ШҢ Ш¬Щ…Ш№ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮШӘ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш®Ш·Ш© Ш№Щ…Щ„ Щ„ЩғЩ„ Ш·ЩҒЩ„ (ENAP)ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӘШ¶Щ…ЩҶ ЩҮШҜЩҒ Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ ЩҲЩҮЩҲ 12 ШЈЩҲ ШЈЩӮЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҲЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ·ЩҒШ§Щ„ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШұШЁШ№ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§Щ„Ш« (Щ„Ш§ШӯЩӮ) Щ„ЩғЩ„ 1,000 ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ ЩғЩ„ ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш© ШЁШӯЩ„ЩҲЩ„ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2030.

translations.source: In 2021, 139 mainly high-income and upper middle-income countries had met this target, but 56 countries will not each the ENAP target by 2030 if further efforts are not made. If current trends continue, 15.9 million babies will be stillborn; nearly half of these (7.7 million, 48%) will occur in sub-Saharan Africa. Causes: With quality health care throughout pregnancy and childbirth, most stillbirths are preventable. The major causes of stillbirth include pregnancy and childbirth-related complications, prolonged pregnancy, maternal infections such as malaria, syphilis and HIV, maternal conditions especially hypertension, and diabetes, and fetal growth restriction (when an unborn baby is unable to achieve its growth potential and therefore smaller than it should be). Congenital abnormalities are responsible for less than 10% of stillbirths reported nationally in high-income countries and the exact proportion in low-income settings is unknown due to limitations in diagnostics.
translations.reference: A shekarar 2021, Жҷasashe 139 galibi masu Жҷarfin tattalin arziki da masu tattalin arziki dama-dama sun cimma wannan manufa, amma Жҷasashe 56 ba za su cimma wannan manufa ta ENAP ba nan da shekarar 2030 idan ba a Жҷara yin kokari ba. Idan aka ci gaba a haka, za a haifi jarirai miliyan 15.9 a mace; kuma kusan rabin waЙ—annan (watau miliyan 7.7, 48%) duk a yankin Жҷasashen kudu da Sahara. Abubuwan da ke jawo shi: Idan akwai ingantacciyar kulawar lafiya tun daga lokacin rainon ciki da haihuwa, ana iya kauce wa mafi yawan haihuwar jarirai a mace. Manyan abubuwan da ke haifar da haihuwar jarirai a mace sun haЙ—a da matsalolin rainon ciki da haihuwa, doguwar naЖҷuda, cututtuka kamar zazzabin cizon sauro, cutar sifilis da cutar sida, hawan jini, da ciwon sukari, da hana girman jaririn da ke ciki. Matsalolin da ake haifar mutum da su suna haddasa Жҷasa da kaso 10 na mutuwar jarirai kafin a haife su kamar yadda aka ruwaito a Жҷasashe masu Жҷarfin tattalin arziki kuma ba a san ainihin adadin ba a Жҷasashe masu Жҷarancin tattalin arziki saboda rashin iya binciko waЙ—annan lamurran.
translations.hypothesis: A cikin 2021, 139 вҖ“ kamar yabo вҖ“ Жҷasa da Жҷasa masu kudaden daf, da kuma Жҷasa masu kudaden tsakanin, sun samu wannan martani, amma 56 Жҷasa ba za su iya cimma martanin ENAP a shekarar 2030, idan ba za a yi Жҷarin ЖҷoЖҷarin ba. Idan ana ci gaba da hanyar da ke faru, miliyan 15.9 na farfanta za su kasance da mutuwa; karin kashi na wannan (miliyan 7.7, 48%) za su faru a yankin Afirka da kusa. Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШЁШ§ШЁ: Da kuma ingantaccen zaman lafiya a cikin zaman da kuma zaman da, karin mutuwa na farfanta za a iya ganowa. Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШЁШ§ШЁ na karin mutuwa na farfanta sun haЙ—a da matasa da zaman da, zaman da da ke faruwa, cututtuka na mahaifa kamar malaria, syphilis da HIV, shawa na mahaifa, kamar hypertension da diabetes, da kuma Жҷara da farfanta (idan farfanta da ba da shiga ba za iya cimma iyakannya, kuma sabawa). Cikin farfanta da ke faruwa, karin kashi na Жҷasa da Жҷasa masu kudaden daf, kuma kashi da ya kamata a Жҷasa da Жҷasa masu kudaden daf ba ya da amin, saboda Жҷananen hanyoyin gano.

translations.source: Factors related to age of the mother and practicing smoking can also increase the risk of maternal disease and stillbirth. Stillbirths can be prevented through family planning to avoid unwanted pregnancies, good health and nutrition prior to and during pregnancy, quality and respectful antenatal and childbirth care including adequate skilled health personnel including midwives. Syphilis treatment in pregnancy could also prevent an estimated 200 000 stillbirths, while fetal heart rate monitoring and labour surveillance and prompt interventions when needed are crucial for preventing 832 000 intrapartum stillbirths and reducing neonatal deaths. Stillbirths are strongly linked to adverse social and economic determinants of health. Prevention and responsive care need to be integrated across the continuum of maternal health care, and beyond.
translations.reference: Abubuwan da suka danganci shekarun uwa da kuma shan taba suna iya Жҷara yiwuwar kamuwa da cututtukan da ke da alaЖҷa da jego da kuma haihuwar jarirai a mace. Ana iya kauce wa haihuwar jarirai a mace ta hanyar tsarin iyali don hana samin haihuwar da ba a buЖҷata, samun cikakken kiwon lafiya da abinci mai gina jiki kafin da lokacin rainon ciki, samun ingantacciyar kulawa yayin haihuwa, ciki har da samar da Жҷwararrun ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya, kamar da ungozoma. Maganin cutar sifilis a lokacin rainon ciki shi ma zai iya hana haihuwar kimanin jarirai 200 000 a mace, yayin da saka idanu kan bugun zuciya da sa ido a kan aiki da kuma kawo Й—auki lokacin da ake buЖҷata suna da mahimmanci don kauce wa mutuwar jarirai da ke cikin mahaifansu guda 832,000 tare da rage mutuwar jarirai. Haihuwar jariri a mace har yanzu tana da alaЖҷa mai Жҷarfi da munanan al'amurran lafiya na zamantakewa da tattalin arziki. Riga-kafi da nuna kulawa ta hanyar kai agaji suna buЖҷatar a haЙ—a su a yi amfani da su a fannin kula da lafiyar mata da sauran fannoni.

translations.source: This includes respectful and supportive care in the event of a death. Listening to the experiences and voices of women and their communities is essential to help address issues of stigma associated with stillbirth. WHO response: More needs to be done to integrate stillbirth prevention within global and national agendas for high quality health care for women, adolescents, and babies. Through the Global Strategy for Women's, Children's and Adolescents Health 2016вҖ“2030 and implementing the recommendations of the Every Newborn Action Plan (2014), WHO is working to end preventable stillbirths, as part of efforts to improve maternal, newborn, child and adolescent health. Most stillbirths do not receive a birth certificate and are not registered.
translations.reference: Wannan ya haЙ—a da kulawa da tallafi a yayin mutuwa. Sauraron abubuwan da suka faru mata da al'ummominsu da suka fito yana da mahimmanci don taimakawa wajen magance matsalolin Жҷyama da ke da alaЖҷa da haihuwar jarirai a mace. Amsar WHO: Ana buЖҷatar Жҷara zage damtse don ganin an sanya yaЖҷi da haihuwar jarirai a mace cikin ajandoji na duniya da na Жҷasa don ingantaccen kiwon lafiya ga mata, matasa, da jarirai. Ta ЖҷarЖҷashin shirin Dabarun Lafiyar Mata, Yara da Matasa a FaЙ—in Diniya 2016-2030 da amfani da shawarwarin kowane Tsarin Hidima wa Jarirai a (2014), WHO na aiki don kawo Жҷarshen haifuwar jarirai mace, a matsayin wani Й“angare na ЖҷoЖҷarin inganta lafiyar mata masu juna biyu, Jariri, yaro da lafiyar matasa. Yawancin jariran da ake haihuwa a mace ba sa samun takardar shaidar haihuwa kuma ba su da rajista.

translations.source: Improving systems for reporting births and neonatal deaths is a matter of human rights and a prerequisite for reducing stillbirths. In addition, there is a need to strengthen routine health information systems to accurately capture and report stillbirths for monitoring and improving the quality of care. WHO provides tools to help countries improve their data on both stillbirths and neonatal deaths. WHO also has guidance to help countries review and investigate individual deaths so they can recommend and implement solutions to prevent similar ones in the future and a standard classification system for perinatal deaths (ICD-PM). WHO and UNICEF are supporting a call for collective action to end preventable stillbirths by:
translations.reference: Inganta tsarin bayar da rahoton haihuwa da mutuwar jarirai al'amari ne na 'yancin Й—an'adam kuma abu ne da ake buЖҷata don rage haifar jarirai a mace. Bugu da Жҷari, akwai buЖҷatar Жҷarfafa tsarin bayanan kiwon lafiya na yau da kullum don samar da sahihin rahoton haihuwa don sa ido da haЙ“aka ingancin ba da kulawar lafiya. WHO ta ba da kayan aiki don taimaka wa Жҷasashe su inganta Й—aukar Жҷididdigarsu game da haihuwa da kuma mutuwar jarirai. WHO ta kuma ba da hanyoyi don taimaka wa Жҷasashe yin nazari da bincika mutuwar mutane don su iya ba da shawararda aiwatar da mafita don hana irin waЙ—annan a nan gaba da kuma samar da tsarin tantance mutuwa kafin haihuwa (ICD-PM). WHO da UNICEF suna goyan bayan kira ga matakin gama kai don kawo Жҷarshen haifuwar jarirai a mace ta hanyar:
translations.hypothesis: Жҳarfawa ana gyara shinge don tauna labarin shiga cikin rayuwa da mutuwa na bayi yana daya daga cikin а°№а°•аұҚа°•аұҒ, kuma yana da mahimmanci don rage mutuwa na bayi. WHO (World Health Organization) yana ba da hanyoyin don taimakawa gobara, domin tauna labarin mutuwa na bayi da mutuwa na bayi. WHO kuma yana da mabuЙ—i don taimakawa gobara, domin nazarin kuma tauna labarin mutuwa, domin su ba da manyan hanyoyin don ganowa kuma taЙ“a, domin rage mutuwa kamar haka a da, kuma shinge na tauna labarin mutuwa na bayi (ICD-PM). WHO da UNICEF ke ba da gobe don Жҷarfawa hakan, domin rage mutuwa na bayi kamar haka a da:

translations.source: increasing awareness and reducing stigma supporting bereaved women and families strengthening health systems to provide high-quality care nationalizing and localizing stillbirth targets improving measurement of stillbirths to enhance evidence and knowledge.
translations.reference: Жҷara wayar da kai da rage jin Жҷyama taimaka wa mata da iyalan da aka mutu aka bari inganta harkar kiwon lafiya kallon matsalar mutuwar jarirai kafin haihuwa abin da ya shafi Жҷasa da al'umma yunЖҷurin Жҷara Жҷaimi wajen Й—aukar Жҷididdigar mutuwar jarirai a mace domin tabbatar da faruwar lamarin da kuma sanin halin da ake ciiki.
translations.hypothesis: ШІЩҠШ§ШҜШ© Щ…ЩҮШ§Шұanci kuma ЩҠШІШ§Щ„, ba da tallafin mata da 'iloji masu zautan, Жҷarfawa tsarin lafiyar don ba da zaman lafiya, Жҷarfawa da Жҷarfawa, Жҷara yawan mutane masu zautan, kuma inganta hanyar sadarwa don Жҷarfawa sakon kuma koyi.

translations.source: Substandard and falsified medical products Overview: Up to two billion people around the world lack access to necessary medicines, vaccines, medical devices including in vitro diagnostics, and other health products, which creates a vacuum that is too often filled by substandard and falsified products. This problem is growing as global supply chains become more complex, meaning products manufactured in one country may be packaged in a second country and distributed across borders to be marketed or sold to consumers in a third. The growth of e-commerce also contributes to this trend by making it easier to purchase medicines online, often from unauthorized sources. WHO has identified this issue one of the urgent health challenges for the next decade given that more than one in ten medicines in low- and middle-income countries are estimated to be substandard or falsified.
translations.reference: Kayan aikin jinya da magunguna marasa inganci da na bogi Bayyani: Kimanin mutane biliyan biyu a duniya ba su da damar samun ainihin magunguna, alluran riga-kafi, na'urorin likitanci da suka hada da na bincika rashin lafiya, da sauran kayayyakin kiwon lafiya, waЙ—anda saboda rashinsu sai dai kawai a yi amfani da marasa inganci kuma na bogi. Wannan matsala tana ta Жҷaruwa ne yayin da salsalar samar da kayayyaki na duniya ke Жҷara cika da sarЖҷaЖҷЖҷiya, ma'ana kayayyakin da aka Жҷera a wata Жҷasa ana iya tattara ninke su cikin fakiti a wata Жҷasa kuma a tura su don a tallata ko a sayar da su ga masu siye a wata Жҷasa daban. BunЖҷasar kasuwancin zamani ya taimaka wajen wannan al'amari ta hanyar sauЖҷaЖҷawa wajen siyan magungunan ta intanet, yawanci ta hannun waЙ—anda ba su cancanta ba. . Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta bayyana wannan matsalar da Й—aya daga cikin matsalolin lafiya da za a fuskanta nan da shekara goma, inda aka yi hasashen samun Й—aya daga cikin magunguna goma yakasance ba shi da inganci ko na jabu a Жҷasashen da ke da Жҷaranci da matsakaicin kuЙ—in shiga.
translations.hypothesis: "ШЁЩҠШ§ЩҲ ЩҲ ШәШҙШ§Шҙ ЩҠШ§ЩҮШҢ Щ…ЩҮШ§Шұ: "ШӯШ§Щ„ЩҠ, Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ§Шұ ЩҲЩҶШөЩҒ Шұ person cikin duniyar ba su iya samu kayan halaka, vacines, na halaka, kuma kayan wasa, kuma kayan wasa, wannan yana sa wani wuri, wanda ko da yake ana cika shi da kayan da ba su da kyau kuma ana gushi. Matsalalin na ci gaba ne, kamar yadda hanyoyin samar na duniya ke ci gaba, wanda yake nuna cewa kayan da an samar a wata kasa, za su iya zama a wata kasa kuma wadata a kan iyin, don su sanya su a tayi, ko su sayan. Ci gaba na e-commerce kuma yana kawo wannan, ta hanyar sa a irin su samu kayan halaka a intanet, ko da yake daga wuraren da ba daidai ba. translations.source: No country remains untouched from this issue, and WHO has received reports of substandard or falsified medical medicines, vaccines and in vitro diagnostics from all regions of the world. Both generic and innovator medicines can be falsified, ranging from very expensive products for cancer to very inexpensive products for treatment of pain. WHO Member States have agreed on a comprehensive global strategy focused on prevention, detection and response to move towards achieving increased access to quality, safe, effective and quality medical products. Impact: Substandard and falsified medical products create many problems for both the individual taking the medicine and for families, the larger society, health care system and supply chain. When medicines do not work the way they should, they can fail to treat or prevent disease, contribute to antimicrobial resistance, waste precious resources and lead to a loss of confidence in medicines and distrust of healthcare providers.
translations.reference: Babu wata Жҷasa da wannan al'amari bai shafa ba, in Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta samu rahotanni game da magunguna da allurori marasa inganci ko na jabu da kuma gwaje-gwajen cututtuka daga kome lungu da saЖҷo na duniya. Wannan lamari na yin jabu ka iya shafar kowane nau'i na magani, kama daga magungunan kansa masu tsada zuwa magungunan kashe zafi masu sauЖҷi. Жҷasashen da cikin Majalisar ЖҠinkin Duniya sun amince da a Й—auki babban mataki da zai mayar da hankali wajen kawarwa da ganowa da kuma Й—aukar mataki wajen samun Жҷaruwar kaiwa ga ingantacce, amintacce kuma gangariyar magani. Tasiri: Magunguna marasa inganci ko na jabu na haifar da matsaloli da dama ga Й—aiЙ—aikun mutane da iyalai da suke amfani da su da ma al'umma da tsarin kula da lafiya da kuma hanyoyin rarraba su. Yayin da maganunguna ba su yi aiki ba, za su gaza ne wajen yin maganin cuta, lamarin da ka iya haifar da tirjiyar Жҷwayoyin cuta da Й“arnar dukiya da kuma daina amincewa da da magunguna da kuma masu samar da kulawa ta lafiya.

translations.source: This can have a negative socioeconomic impact, contributing to related loss in productivity and adding expenses to the individual and national health system. They are most likely to reach patients in situations where there is constrained access to quality and safe medical products, poor governance and weak technical capacity. Although this issue impacts all countries, countries where there are weak or non-existent regulatory systems bear the greatest burden of substandard and falsified medical products. In an increasingly globalized world, no one country has sufficient resources and capacity to deal with this issue in isolation. Through global systems and processes such as the WHO Global Surveillance and Monitoring System and WHO Member State Mechanism,
translations.reference: Wannan ka iya haifar da mummunan tasiri a kan tsarin tattalin arziki da zamantakewa, wanda shi kuma zai taimaka wajen daina samar da magungunan da Жҷarin kashe kuЙ—in ga Й—aiЙ—aikun mutane da kuma tsarin lafiya na Жҷasa. Wannan tasiri ka iya kaiwa ga marasa lafiya, a yayin da aka samu tarnaЖҷi wajen kaiwa wa ga ingantacce kuma amintaccen magani da rashin shugabanci mai nagarta da kuma rauni wajen amfani da fasaha. Kodayake wannan matsala ta shafi kafatanin Жҷasashen duniya, to amma a Жҷasashen da da suke da rauni ko rashin tsarin sa-ido, sun fi samun magunguna marasa inganci ko na jabu. Sakamakon yadda duniya ke ci gaba da kasancewa tamkar Й—aya, babu wata Жҷasa da ke da Жҷarfin tattalin arzikin da za ta tunkari wannan matsalar ita kaЙ—ai. Ta hanyar tsare-tsare na duniya da kuma hukumomi irin su Hukumar Sa-ido ta Hukumar Llafiya ta Duniya da kuma Kwamitin Mambobin Жҷasashe na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya,

translations.source: Suicide prevention Overview: More than 700 000 people die by suicide every year. For each suicide, there are an estimated more than 20 suicide attempts. Suicide can occur at any stage of life and in all regions of the world. In 2019, suicide was the fourth leading cause of death among 15вҖ“29-year-olds globally, and 77% of all suicides happened in low- and middle-income countries.
translations.reference: Magance Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake/ksan-kai Sharhi: Fiye da mutane 700 000 ne suke rasa rayukansu a kowace shekara a sanadiyyar Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake/kisan-kai. Bisa faruwar kowane Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake, akwai hasashen yin Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake fiye da 20. Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake/kisank-kai kan iya aukuwa a kowane mataki na rayuwa, sannan kuma a kowane Й“angare na duniya. A 2019, Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake shi ne na huЙ—u a cikin abubuwan da suke haifar da mutuwa a tsakanin 'yan shekara 15-29 a duniya da kuma kaso 77% na Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake/kisan-kai na faruwa ne a tsakanin Жҷasashe masu mafi qaranci da matsakaicin kuЙ—in shiga.

Ш№Ш§Щ… 2019ШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҶШӘШӯШ§Шұ ЩғШ§ЩҶ ШіШЁШЁ ЩҲЩҒШ§Ш© ШұШ§ШЁШ№ ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ§Щ„ШәЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ШӘШӘШұШ§ЩҲШӯ ШЈШ№Щ…Ш§ШұЩҮЩ… ШЁЩҠЩҶ 15 ЩҲ 29 Ш№Ш§Щ…ЩӢШ§ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҢ ЩҲ 77% Щ…ЩҶ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Щ…ШӯШ§ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҶШӘШӯШ§Шұ ЩҶШ§ЩғЩҲШҙЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш°ЩҠ ШҜШ®Щ„ Щ…ЩҶШ®ЩҒШ¶ ЩҲ Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ·.

translations.source: Almost 20% of global suicides were due to pesticide self-poisoning. While the link between suicide and mental health conditions (in particular, depression and alcohol use disorders) and a previous suicide attempt is well established in high-income countries, many suicides happen impulsively in moments of crisis. Further risk factors for suicide include experience of loss, loneliness, discrimination, a relationship break-up, financial problems, chronic pain and illness, violence, abuse, and conflict or other humanitarian emergencies. Stigma around mental health conditions and suicide means many people thinking about suicide do not seek help. Suicides and suicide attempts have a ripple effect that impacts on families, friends, colleagues, communities and societies.
translations.reference: Kimanin kaso 20% na Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai a duniya, na faruwa ne sakamakon shan guba bisa ra'in Жҷashi-kai. A yayin da aka tabbatar da danganata Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai da yanayin matsalar ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa (Musamman damuwa da shan barasa ba tare da ЖҷaЖҷЖҷautawa ba) da kuma yunЖҷurin yin Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake/kisank-kai a baya a Жҷasashen da yawan kuЙ—in shiga, inda yawan yin Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai ke faruwa a lokacin rigingimu. Abubuwan da ke haifar da Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai sun haЙ—a da karaya da damuwa da nuna bambanci da rabuwar wata alaЖҷa da matsalar kuЙ—i da matsanancin ciwo da cuta da keta haddi da rigingimu da sauran abubuwa da suka shafi keta haddin Й—an'adam. Matsalar yanayin hauka da na Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai shi ne mutane suna yin tunanin Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai ba neman taimako ba. Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai ko ЖҷoЖҷarin yin hakan yana da mummunan tasiri a kan iyalai da abokai da abokan aiki da al'umma gaba Й—aya.

translations.reference: Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai: Adadin faruwarsa a duniya Rahoton faruwar Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai a 2019 a duniya Gwagwarmayar Rayuwa: jagora wajen kawar da yin Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai a Жҷasashe Kawarwa: Akwai matakai da dama da za a iya Й—auka a matakin Й—aiЙ—aikun mutane da al'umma da kuma matakin Жҷasa wajen kawar da aukuwar Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai da kuma yunЖҷurin yin hakan. Hanyoyin da Hukumar Lafiya ta bayar ya kamata a yi amfani da su wajen yin maganin Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai a matakin kowace Жҷasa, wanda ya haЙ—a da:
translations.hypothesis: ЩӮШӘЩ„: Ш§Щ„ШӯЩӮШ§ШҰЩӮ ЩҲ ШҘШӯШөШ§ШҰЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…: Ш§Щ„ЩӮШӘЩ„ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… ЩҒЩҠ ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұ 2019ШҢ LIVE LIFE: ШҜЩ„ЩҠЩ„ ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ°ЩҠ Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШӘЩ„ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶШҢ Щ…ЩҶШ№: Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШІШ§Щ„ ЩҮЩҶШ§Щғ Ш§Щ„ЩғШ«ЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШӘЩ… Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№Ш§ШӘШҢ ЩҲ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҲЩ…ШҢ Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШӘЩ„ ЩҲ Щ…ШӯШ§ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШӘЩ„. Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҮШ¬ "LIVE LIFE" Щ„ЩҖ WHO ЩҠЩҲШөЩҠ ШЁШЈШұШЁШ№Ш© ШӘШҜШ®Щ„Ш§ШӘ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„Ш©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩ„Ш©ШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ ЩҠШ¬ШЁ ШЈЩҶ ШӘЩғЩҲЩҶ Ш¬ШІШЎЩӢШ§ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҠ ШұШҜ ЩҒШ№Щ„ ЩӮЩҲЩ…ЩҠ ШӘШ¬Ш§ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШӘЩ„:

translations.source: limit access to the means of suicide interact with the media for responsible reporting of suicide foster socio-emotional life skills in adolescents early identify, assess, manage and follow up anyone who is affected by suicidal behaviours. translations.reference: hana kaiwa ga hanyoyin Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai mu'amala da kafafen sadarwa domin bayar da cikakken rahoto game da Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai koyar da dabarun jure damuwa ga matasa saurin ganowa da kimantawa da kulawa da kuma bibiyar duk wanda yake da Й—abi'un yin Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai . Abu muhimmi wajen daЖҷile wannan ta'ada shi ne bincike da haЙ—in gwiwar Й“angarori daban-daban da wayar da kai da bayar da horo da sa-ido a kan hada-hadar kuЙ—i da kulawa da kuma kimantawa.

Ш§Щ„ШЈШұЩғШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…ШЁШ§ШҜШұШ§ШӘ ЩҮЩ…Ш§: ШӘШӯЩ„ЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШ¶Ш§Ш№ШҢ ШӘШ№Ш§ЩҲЩҶ ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ·Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„ЩҒШ©ШҢ ШұЩҒШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ№ЩҠШҢ ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШҜШұШ§ШӘШҢ ШӘЩ…ЩҲЩҠЩ„ШҢ Щ…ШұШ§ЩӮШЁШ©ШҢ ЩҲЩ…ШӘШ§ШЁШ№Ш©.

translations.source: Suicide prevention efforts require coordination and collaboration among multiple sectors, including health, education, labour, agriculture, business, justice, law, defence, politics and the media. Suicide prevention is often not adequately addressed because of stigma and lack of awareness that suicide is a major public health problem. Communities also play a crucial role in preventing suicide. The WHO community engagement toolkit guides communities in identifying priorities and implementing activities according to local contexts. WHO response: The urgency to act to prevent suicides has been recognized and prioritized at the highest levels.
translations.reference: YunЖҷurin kawar da Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai na buЖҷatar haЙ—in-kai da haЙ—in gwiwa a tsakanin Й“angarori, waЙ—anda suka haЙ—a da Й“angaren lafiya da ilimi da Жҷwadago da noma da kasuwanci da shari'a da doka da tsaro da siyasa da kuma kafafen watsa labarai. Ba kasafai ake kawar da Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai yadda ya kamata ba saboda damuwa da rashin wayar da kai, wanda shi ne babban Жҷalubalen Й“angaren lafiya. Su ma al'ummomi suna da rawar da za su taka wajen kawar da Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai. Bayanan Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya na yi wa al'ummomi jagoranci sun bayyana yadda al'ummomi za su gano abubuwan da suka fi muhimmanci wajen aiwatar da aiwatar da su bisa ga kowace al'umma. Bayanin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya: An ba wa ЖҷoЖҷarin gaggauta kawar da Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai matuЖҷar fifiko.

Щ…ЩҶШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШӘЩ„ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҶЩҒШі ШәШ§Щ„ШЁЩӢШ§ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШӘЩ… Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШӘЩҮ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ЩғШ§ЩҒ ШЁШіШЁШЁ ЩҲШөЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Шұ ЩҲЩҶЩӮШө Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ№ЩҠ ШЁШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШӘЩ„ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҶЩҒШі ЩҮЩҲ Щ…ШҙЩғЩ„Ш© ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш© ЩғШЁЩҠШұШ©. Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№Ш§ШӘ ШЈЩҠШ¶ЩӢШ§ ШӘЩ„Ш№ШЁ ШҜЩҲШұ ШӯШ§ШіЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШӘЩ„ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҶЩҒШі. ШұШҜ ЩҒШ№Щ„ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©: ЩҮЩҶШ§Щғ ШҘШҜШұШ§Щғ ЩҲШЈЩҲЩ„ЩҲЩҠШ© Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„ Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШӘЩ„ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҶЩҒШі Ш№Щ„Щү ШЈШ№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ.

translations.source: The reduction of suicide rates in countries is an indicator in the UN Sustainable Development Goals (the only indicator for mental health), WHOвҖҷs General Programme of Work and WHOвҖҷs Comprehensive Mental Health Action Plan 2013вҖ“2030. The first WHO world suicide report, Preventing suicide: a global imperative, published in 2014, aimed to increase awareness of the public health significance of suicide and suicide attempts and make suicide prevention a public health priority. Governments are encouraged to implement WHOвҖҷs LIVE LIFE package of effective and evidence-based key interventions for suicide prevention, and to develop or strengthen comprehensive national suicide prevention strategies in a multisectoral public health approach. National leadership and coordination on suicide prevention are further supported by the publication of National suicide prevention strategies: progress, examples and indicators. Recognizing that data and statistics are necessary for advocacy and decision-making, WHO published Suicide worldwide in 2019: Global Health Estimates.
translations.reference: Raguwar yawan aukuwar Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kisan-kai a Жҷasashe alama ce ta ayyukan Hukumar Ci-gaba ta Majalisar ЖҠinkin Duniya (alama ce kawai a Й“abgaren lafiyar ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa) da Shirye-shiryen Ayyuka na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya da kuma Shirin Samar da Wadatacciyar Lafiyar ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa na 2013-2030. Rahoton Hukmar Lafiya ta Duniya a kan Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kashe-kai na farko ya nuna cewa, kawar da Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kashe-kai: rahoton da aka buga a 2014 da manufar Жҷara wayar da kai a kan muhimmancin inganta lafiyar al'umma wajen daЖҷile aukuwar Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kashe-kai ko kuma yunЖҷurin yin hakan da kuma da ba wa kawar da aukuwar Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kashe-kai fifiko tamkar na kula da lafiyar al'umma. An Жҷarfafar gwiyoyin gwamnatoci da su aiwatar da shirin Hukumar Lafiya na Rayuwa yadda ya kamata ta hanyar Й—aukar matakan kawar da Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kashe-kai da kuma samar da dabarun kawar da Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kashe-kai na Жҷasa, ta hanyar dabarun kula da lafiya daban-daban. Ana Жҷarfafar shugabannni da masu sa-ido a kan kawar da Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kashe-kai ta hanyar buga rahotanni game da dabarun daЖҷile Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kashe-kai, ta hanyar bayyana ci-gaban da aka samu da misalai da kuma alamomi. Sakamakon gamsuwa da muhimmancin da ke tattare da da bayanai da Жҷididdiga wajen yanke shawara,Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta buga rahoto aukuwar Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kashe-kai a duniya a 2019: Hashen Lafiya na Duniya.

Ш§Щ„ШЁШ§ШәЩҲЩғ ЩҠЩҲШөЩү ШЁШЈЩҶ ЩҠШ·ШЁЩӮЩҲШ§ ШӯШІЩ…Ш© "LIVE LIFE" Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„Ш© ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩ„Ш© Щ„ЩҖ WHO, ЩҲ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШ·ЩҲШұЩҲШ§ ШЈЩҲ ЩҠЩӮЩҲЩ‘ЩҲЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘШұШ§ШӘЩҠШ¬ЩҠШ§ШӘ ЩҲШ·ЩҶЩҠШ© ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„Ш© Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ№ ЩҶШ§ЖҷШ§ШіЩҠШҜЩҲ, ЩҒЩҠ ЩҶЩҮШ¬ ШөШӯЩҠ Ш№Ш§Щ… Щ…ШӘШ№ШҜШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ·Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ. translations.source: WHOвҖҷs vision is a world where death by suicide is no longer a leading cause of death and where people who are attempting or thinking about suicide feel comfortable seeking help which is provided capably and respectfully to all.
translations.reference: Manufar Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ita ce, ya kasance Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kashe-kai ba ya cikin abubuwan da suke sabbaba mutuwa a duniya, sannan kuma da tallafa wa waЙ—anda suka yi yunЖҷurin Жҷunar-baЖҷin-wake ko kashe-kai.

translations.source: Sustainable development Overview: Sustainable development is a broad term to describe policies, projects and investments that provide benefits today without sacrificing environmental, social and personal health in the future. These policies are often described as green because they focus on limiting the impact of development on the environment. However, the benefits of sustainable development are also felt across a wide cross section of human health and well-being, including reductions in pollution- and environment-related disease, improved health outcomes and decreased stress. As the threats of climate change become increasingly important, win-win strategies for mitigation, health improvement and cost savings offer a range of advantages for various stakeholders.
translations.reference: Ci-gaba Mai ЖҠorewa Жҷarin bayani: Ci-gaba mai Й—orewa kalmomin fannu ne da ke bayyana dokoki da shirue-shirye da saka hannun jari da zai kai ga samun riba a yanzu ba tare da baddala muhalli ko tsarin zamantakewa ko lafiya a nan gaba ba. Ana bayyana waЙ—annan dokoki da koraye, saboda suna mayar da hankali ne wajen taЖҷaita tasirin ci-gaba a kan muhalli. Sai dai an amfana da ci-gaba mai Й—orewa a ko'ina a duniya, wanda ya haЙ—a da kowane Й“angare na lafiya da jin daЙ—in Й—an'adam, kama daga raguwar yawan gurЙ“atar yanayi da cututtuka masu nasaba da muhalli da ingantuwar lafiyar da raguwar wahalhalu. A yayin da barazanar sauyawar yanayi ke da muhimmanci, dabarun samun nasara ta kowane Й“angare wajen magancewa da inganta lafiya da rage kashe kuЙ—i na da matuЖҷar muhimmanci ga masu ruwa da tsaki.

ЩҲЩ…Ш№ Ш°Щ„ЩғШҢ ЩҒЩҲШ§ШҰШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ…Ш© ШЈЩҠШ¶ЩӢШ§ Щ…ШӯШіЩҲШіШ© ЩҒЩҠ ШҙШӘЩү Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘ ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҶШіШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШұЩҒШ§ЩҮЩҠШ©ШҢ ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ ШӘЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ№Щ„ЩӮШ© ШЁШ§Щ„ШӘЩ„ЩҲШ« ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЁЩҠШҰШ©ШҢ ШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШӘШ§ШҰШ¬ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШӘЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲШӘШұ. translations.source: For example, greener health care operations can generate patient and worker health benefits while also saving energy, mitigating climate risks and creating long-term cost savings. The World Health Organization is committed to pursuing sustainable development in all its work to help protect the people of tomorrow from the health growing health risks of today. Impact: Many sustainable development strategies can offer significant wins for health, climate and the environment, and the benefits can be seen almost immediately. For example, many health and development goals can be achieved simultaneously by tackling air pollution, which is responsible for an estimated 7 million premature deaths annually. Polluting emissions include powerful short-lived climate pollutants (SLCPs)вҖ”particularly black carbon, ozone and methaneвҖ”which are very harmful to health but have only brief atmospheric lifetimes.
translations.reference: Alal misali, Shirin Lafiya na 'greener health care operations' zai samar da alfanu ga mara lafiya da ma'aikatan lafiya, da kuma rage amfani da makamashi, wanda shi kuma sauЖҷaЖҷa barazanar sauyin yanayi da kuma da kuma rage kashe kuЙ—i na tsawon lokaci. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta Жҷudiri aniyar tabbatar da ci-gaba mai Й—orewa a duk wasu ayyuka da take aiwatarwa, domin taimakawa wajen kare mutane masu zuwa nan gaba daga barazanar lafiya da ake fuskanta a yanzu. Tasiri: Da dama daga cikin dabarun shirin ci-gaba mai Й—orewa za su matuЖҷar taimakawa wajen samuwar lafiya da sauyin yanayi da muhalli, sannan kuma za a ga kusan alfaninsu nan take. Alal misali, za a iya cim ma nasarar da dama daga cikin manufofin lafiya da na ci-gaba a lokaci guda, ta hanyar shawo kan matsalar gurЙ“atar iska, wadda ita ta yi silar kimanin mace-mace milyan 7 duk shekara. Abubuwan da suke cikin gurЙ“atacciyar iska sun haЙ—a da abubuwa masu Жҷarfi da ka iya Й—umama yanayi, musamman ma kabon da ozon da kuma mesan, waЙ—anda suke cutar da lafiya, amma kuma ba su fiye daЙ—ewa ba.

Ш№Щ„Щү ШіШЁЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШҜЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҮШҜШ§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮЩҮШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ЩҲЩӮШӘ ЩҲШ§ШӯШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ„Ш¬Ш© ШӘЩ„ЩҲШ« Ш§Щ„ЩҮЩҲШ§ШЎШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ Щ…ШіШӨЩҲЩ„ Ш№ЩҶ ШӯЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҠ 7 Щ…Щ„Ш§ЩҠЩҠЩҶ ЩҲЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Щ…ШЁЩғШұШ© ШіЩҶЩҲЩҠЩӢШ§. Ш§ЩҶШЁШ№Ш§Ш«Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„ЩҲШ«Ш§ШӘ ШӘШҙЩ…Щ„ Щ…Щ„ЩҲШ«Ш§ШӘ Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш®ЩҠШ© ЩӮЩҲЩҠШ© ЩӮШөЩҠШұШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШҜ (SLCPs) - ЩҲШ®Ш§ШөШ© Ш§Щ„ЩғШұШЁЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіЩҲШҜШҢ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШІЩҲЩҶШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ«Ш§ЩҶ - ЩҲЩҮЩҠ Ш¶Ш§ШұШ© Ш¬ШҜЩӢШ§ Щ„Щ„ШөШӯШ©ШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩғЩҶ Щ„ЩҮШ§ Ш№Щ…Шұ ЩӮШөЩҠШұ Ш¬ШҜЩӢШ§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШәЩ„Ш§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҲЩҠ.

translations.source: Transport policies and investments that favour clean public transport, along with walking and cycling, can have a dramatic impact on air quality. This can reduce multiple health risks at the same time, including stroke, heart attack, lung disease and some cancers. They can also reduce the estimated 1.25 million deaths annually from traffic injury, while also improving access to health services, particularly in densely populated areas. Sustainable development housing policies can further reduce emissions through considerations such as building siting and land use, choices of construction materials, design features and ventilation and energy. WHO response: WHOвҖҷs work is guided by the Sustainable Development Goals, particularly Goal 3: вҖңEnsure healthy lives and promote well-being for all at all ages.вҖқ
translations.reference: Dokokin sufuri da zuba hannun jarin da ka iya tsaftace hanyoyin sufurin jama'a da kuma tafiyar Жҷasa da tuЖҷa keke na da matuЖҷar tasiri a kan ingancin iska. Wannan zai taЖҷaita barazana iri-iri ga lafiya, wanda ya haЙ—a da shayenwar Й“arin jiki da ciwon zuciya da cututtukan hunhu da kuma kansa. Haka kuma za su iya rage kimanin mace-mace miliyan 1.25 sanadiyyar samun rauni a duk shekara, yayin da kuma za su inganta kaiwa ga kula da lafiya, musamman a wuraren da suke da yawan jama'a. Dokokin Shirin Ci-gaba Mai ЖҠorewa na samar da gidaje zai Жҷara rage Жҷura ta hanyar gine-gine da amfani da filaye da zaЙ“ar kayan gini da tsari da kuma samar da gine-gine na yalwar iska da kuma makamashi. Matakin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya: Aikace-aikacen Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya na tafiya ne bisa manufar Shirin Ci-gaba Mai ЖҠorewa, musamman ma manufar ta 3: '' Tabbatar da lafiyar mutane da Жҷaruwar walwalar kowa da kowa''.

ШіЩҠШ§ШіШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҘШіЩғШ§ЩҶ Щ„ЩҶЩ…ЩҲ Щ…ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ…ШҢ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ШӘЩӮЩ„Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§ЩҶШЁШ№Ш§Ш«Ш§ШӘ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§ШұШ§ШӘ Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШ§Шұ Щ…ЩҲЩӮШ№ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎШҢ Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШ§Ш¶ЩҠШҢ Ш®ЩҠШ§ШұШ§ШӘ Щ…ЩҲШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎШҢ Щ…ЩҠШІШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘШөЩ…ЩҠЩ…ШҢ ШӘЩҮЩҲЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ©. ШұШҜ ЩҒШ№Щ„ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©: Ш№Щ…Щ„ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩҠШӘЩҲШ¬Щ‘ЩҮ ЩҶШӯЩҲ ШЈЩҮШҜШ§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ…Ш©ШҢ ЩҲШ®Ш§ШөШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҮШҜЩҒ ШұЩӮЩ… 3: "Ш¶Щ…Ш§ЩҶ ШӯЩҠШ§Ш© ШөШӯЩҠШ© ЩҲШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ ШұЩҒШ§ЩҮЩҠШ© Щ„Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Щ…Ш§Шұ."

translations.source: The Goals inform projects and policies across the Organization, including guidelines on housing, urban development, transportation systems and health care delivery. For example, the WHO Housing and health guidelines, first published in 2018, highlight the increasing impact of housing conditions on human health in light of urban growth, climate and demographic changes. The guidelines provide Member States, partners and the public with evidence-based recommendations relevant to inadequate living space (crowding), low and high indoor temperatures, injury hazards in the home, and accessibility of housing for people with functional impairments. The Urban Health Initiative (UHI) also focuses on ways for cities to enable good health by catalysing effective action on urban air pollution and short-lived climate pollutants (SLCPs)вҖ”saving lives by linking health, environment and sustainable development. WHO also collaborates with the Climate and Clean Air Coalition (CCAC) on the Breathe Life campaign, which aims to cut air pollution and reduce the 7 million premature deaths annually that it causes.
translations.reference: Manufofin na shelanta shiye-shirye da dokoki a hukumar, waЙ—anda suka haЙ—a da dokokin gina gidaje da gina birane da tsarin sufuri da samar da kulawa da lafiya. Alal misali, dokokin gina gidaje da kula lafiya na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya da aka fara bugawa a 2018, sun yi Жҷarin haske a kan Жҷaruwar tasirin yanayin gidaje a kan lafiyar mutum a yayin da birane suka bunЖҷasa, inda sauyin yanayi da yawan jama'a ke sauyawa. Dokokin sun ba wa mambobin Жҷasashe da abokan hulЙ—a da sauran jama'a shawarwari da ke da nasaba da cunkoso da haЙ—arin cikin gida da kuma samar da gidaje ga mutanen da ke da tawaya. Shi ma Shirin Lafiya a Birane ya mayar da hanakali ne wajen samar da cikakkiyar lafiya a birane, ta hanyar gaggauta Й—aukar matakai a kan guЙ“acewar iska a birane da kuma abubuwan da ke haifar da Й—umamar yanayi, domin ceto rayuka masu matsalar lafiya da muhalli da ci-gaba mai Й—orewa. Haka kuma Hukumar Lafiya ta yi haЙ—in gwiwa da Gamayyar Жҷungiyar Kula da Sauyin Yanayi da Iska Mai kyau wajen wayar da kai a kan sheЖҷar numfashi domin rayuwa, wanda manufarsa ita ce kawo Жҷarshen gurЙ“acewar iska da rage mace-macen mutane miliyan 7 da ke haifarwa a duk shekara.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҮШҜШ§ЩҒ ЩҠЩҲШ¬ЩҮЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶШҙШ·Ш© ЩҲЩҮЩҠШ§ЩғЩ„ ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӨШіШіШ©ШҢ ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ Ш§Щ„ШҘШұШҙШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ ШӯЩҲЩ„ ШіЩғЩҶШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШ¶ШұЩҠШ©ШҢ ШЈЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩӮЩ„ШҢ ЩҲШӘЩӮШҜЩҠЩ… Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©. Ш№Щ„Щү ШіШЁЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШҘШұШҙШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§ШөШ© ШЁШ§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© (WHO) ШӯЩҲЩ„ ШіЩғЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҶЩҸШҙШұШӘ Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„ Щ…ШұШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2018ШҢ ШӘШӨЩғШҜ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШІШ§ЩҠШҜ Щ„ШёШұЩҲЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШіЩғЩҶ Ш№Щ„Щү ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҶШіШ§ЩҶШҢ ЩҒЩҠ Ш¶ЩҲШЎ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩ…ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Ш¶ШұЩҠШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘШәЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш®ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШәЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩ…ЩҲШәШұШ§ЩҒЩҠШ©. Ш§Щ„ШҘШұШҙШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ ШӘЩҲЩҒШұ ШӘЩҲШөЩҠШ§ШӘ ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩ„Ш© Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Ш¶Ш§ШЎШҢ Ш§Щ„ШҙШұЩғШ§ШЎШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§Ш·ЩҶЩҠЩҶШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӘШ№Щ„ЩӮ ШЁШ§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШіЩғЩҶЩҠШ© ШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ЩғШ§ЩҒЩҠШ© (Ш§Щ„Ш§ШІШҜШӯШ§Щ…)ШҢ ШҜШұШ¬Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӯШұШ§ШұШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ®ЩҒШ¶Ш© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ШҢ Щ…Ш®Ш§Ш·Шұ Ш§Щ„ШҘШөШ§ШЁШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШІЩ„ШҢ ЩҲШіЩҮЩҲЩ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШіЩғЩҶ Щ„Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Ш°ЩҲЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ№Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШёЩҠЩҒЩҠШ©. Щ…ШЁШ§ШҜШұШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШ¶ШұЩҠШ© (UHI) ШЈЩҠШ¶ЩӢШ§ ШӘШұЩғШІ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш·ШұЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ Щ„Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ШӘШ№ШІШІ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҠШҜШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ ШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎШ§ШӘ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„Ш© ШЁШҙШЈЩҶ ШӘЩ„ЩҲШ« Ш§Щ„ЩҮЩҲШ§ШЎ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„ЩҲШ«Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш®ЩҠШ© ЩӮШөЩҠШұШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШҜ (SLCPs) - ЩҲШҘЩҶЩӮШ§Ш° Ш§Щ„ШЈШұЩҲШ§Шӯ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ШұШЁШ· Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШҰШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ…Ш©. Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© (WHO) ШЈЩҠШ¶ЩӢШ§ ШӘШӘШ№Ш§ЩҲЩҶ Щ…Ш№ ШӘШӯШ§Щ„ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ЩҮЩҲШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШёЩҠЩҒ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш® (CCAC) ЩҒЩҠ ШӯЩ…Щ„Ш© "Breathe Life"ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩҮШҜЩҒ ШҘЩ„Щү ШӘЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ„ ШӘЩ„ЩҲШ« Ш§Щ„ЩҮЩҲШ§ШЎ ЩҲШӘЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШЁЩғШұШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҠШӘШіШЁШЁ ЩҒЩҠЩҮШ§ ШіЩҶЩҲЩҠЩӢШ§ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩӮШҜШұ ШЁЩҖ 7 Щ…Щ„Ш§ЩҠЩҠЩҶ.

translations.source: Syphilis Overview: Syphilis is a bacterial sexually transmitted infection (STI) caused by Treponema pallidum which results in substantial morbidity and mortality, and it is curable. Syphilis is transmitted through sexual contact with the infectious lesions, via blood transfusion or from a pregnant woman to her fetus. Mother-to-child transmission of syphilis is usually devastating to the fetus in cases that were not detected or treated sufficiently early in pregnancy. Maternal syphilis, when untreated, treated late or not treated with penicillin, results in adverse birth outcomes (ABOs) estimated in 50вҲ’80% of cases, depending on the stage of syphilis.
translations.reference: Tinjere Жҷarin bayani: Tinjere cuta ce da ake Й—auka yayin saduwar namiji da mace sakamakon Жҷwayar cuta, wadda ke haifar da rashin lafiya da kuma mutuwa, amma ana iya warkewa. Tinjere cuta ce da ke yaxuwa a yayin jima'i, inda ake Й—aukar cuta kuma take yaЙ—uwa ko dai ta hanyar jin ko kuma daga uwa mai ciki zuwa jaririn da ke cikinta. YaЙ—uwar cutar tinjere daga uwa zuwa jariri yawanci yana kassara jaririn, musamman idan ba a gano ba ko kuma an Й—auki mataki a farkon juna-biyun. Idan ba a yi maganin yaЙ—uwar tinjere daga uwa zuwa jariri ko ba a yi magani da wuri ba ko ma ba a yi maganinta da fenisilin, tana haifar da matsala yayin haihuwa da kimanin kaso 50-80, ya danganta da matakin cutar ta tinjere.
translations.hypothesis: ЩҶШёШұШ© Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„: Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„ ЩҮЩҲ ШҜШ§ШЎ Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠ ЩҶШ§ШӘШ¬ Ш№ЩҶ ШЁШ§ЩғШӘЩҠШұЩҠШ§ (STI)ШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮЩҲ ЩҶШ§ШӘШ¬ Ш№ЩҶ Treponema pallidumШҢ ЩҲ ЩҠШіШЁШЁ ШЁЩҲШ¬Ш№ ЩҲ ЩҲЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ. ЩҲ ЩҮЩҸШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ШЎ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ Щ„Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬. Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„ ЩҠЩҸЩҶШӘЩӮЩ„ Ш№ЩҶ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШөШ§Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш·ЩӮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөШ§ШЁШ©ШҢ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ЩҶЩӮЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩ…ШҢ ШЈЩҲ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩ… ШӯШ§Щ…Щ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш¬ЩҶЩҠЩҶЩҮШ§. Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩӮЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩ… ШҘЩ„Щү Ш·ЩҒЩ„ШҢ ШәШ§Щ„ШЁЩӢШ§ Щ…Ш§ ЩҠЩғЩҲЩҶ Щ„ЩҮ ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ Щ…ШҜЩ…Шұ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш¬ЩҶЩҠЩҶШҢ Ш®Ш§ШөШ© ШҘШ°Ш§ Щ„Щ… ЩҠШӘЩ… Ш§ЩғШӘШҙШ§ЩҒЩҮ ШЈЩҲ Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ЩҮ Щ…ШЁЩғШұЩӢШ§. Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„ Щ„ШҜЩү ШЈЩ…ШҢ ШҘШ°Ш§ Щ„Щ… ЩҠШӘЩ… Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ЩҮШҢ ШЈЩҲ ШҘШ°Ш§ ШӘЩ… Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ЩҮ Щ„Ш§ШӯЩӮЩӢШ§ШҢ ШЈЩҲ ШҘШ°Ш§ Щ„Щ… ЩҠШӘЩ… Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ЩҮ ШЁШ§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶШіЩ„ЩҠЩҶШҢ ЩҠШіШЁШЁ ЩҶШӘШ§ШҰШ¬ ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜШ© ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ШұШәЩҲШЁ ЩҒЩҠЩҮШ§ (ABOs)ШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮЩҸШ°Ш§ ЩҠШЁЩ„Шә ШӯЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҠ 50-80% ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮЩҸШ°Ш§ ЩҠШ№ШӘЩ…ШҜ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШұШӯЩ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„.

translations.source: These ABOs are often severe and include stillbirth (most commonly), neonatal death, prematurity, low birth weight, and congenitally infected infants. Syphilis can be prevented through safer sex practices including the correct and consistent use of condoms. Many people with syphilis do not have any symptoms or have only minor symptoms that go unnoticed. Identifying infection through laboratory tests and treatment of positive cases will prevent further transmission and adverse pregnancy outcomes including congenital syphilis. Screening can be done using rapid tests that can provide results in less than 20 minutes, allowing for immediate treatment.
translations.reference: Wannan sakamako yawanci yakan tsananta, sannan kuma ya haЙ—a da jariran da ke mutuwa yayin haihuwa (wanda ya fi yawa) da mutuwa bayan haihuwa da kafin balaga da rashin nauyin jariri da kuma jariran da suka Й—auki cuta daga uwa. Za a iya maganin cutar tinjere ta hanyar yin taka-tsantsan wajen yin jima'i, wanda ya haЙ—a da yawan yin amfani da kwaroron roba. Mutane da dama da suka kamu da cutar tinjere ba su ganin wasu alamu. Tabbatar da cuta ta hanyar yin gwaji da kuma yin magana zai hana yaЙ—uwarta da kuma haifar da matsala a yayin haihuwa, wanda ya haЙ—a da nau'in tinjere da jariri ke Й—auka daga uwa. Za a iya tabbatarwa ta hanyar yawaita yin gwaje-gwaje da za su bayar da sakamako a Жҷasa da minti 20, domin yin magani nan take.
translations.hypothesis: ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ЩғЩ„ (ABOs) ШҙШ§ЩҠШ№Ш§ЩӢШҢ ЩҲ ШӘШӘШ¶Щ…ЩҶ ЩҲЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш№ЩҶШҜ ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜШ© (Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ ШҙЩҠЩҲШ№Ш§ЩӢ)ШҢ ЩҲЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш№ЩҶШҜ ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜШ©ШҢ ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜШ© Щ…ШЁЩғШұШ©ШҢ ЩҲШІЩҶ ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜШ© ЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ„ШҢ ЩҲШЈШ·ЩҒШ§Щ„ Ш°ЩҲЩҠ Ш№ШҜЩҲЩү Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜШ©. Щ…ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩҶ (Syphilis) ЩҶЩҸШ№Ш§Щ„Ш¬ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Щ…Щ…Ш§ШұШіШ§ШӘ Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ© ШўЩ…ЩҶШ©ШҢ ШЁШ¶Щ…ЩҶ Ш°Щ„Щғ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШӘШёЩ… Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ§ЩӮЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩғШұЩҠ. Ш§Щ„Ш№ШҜЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөШ§ШЁЩҠЩҶ ШЁЩ…ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩҶ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШёЩҮШұЩҲЩҶ ШЈЩҠ ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ШҢ ШЈЩҲ ЩҠШёЩҮШұЩҲЩҶ ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш®ЩҒЩҠЩҒШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШӘЩ… Щ…Щ„Ш§ШӯШёШӘЩҮШ§. ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШҜЩҲЩү Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§Ш®ШӘШЁШ§ШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШӘШЁШұШҢ ЩҲ Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҠШ¬Ш§ШЁЩҠШ©ШҢ ШіЩҠЩ…ЩҶШ№ Ш§ЩҶШӘШҙШ§ШұЩҮШ§ШҢ ЩҲ ЩҶШӘШ§ШҰШ¬ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ…Щ„ ШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШәЩҲШЁ ЩҒЩҠЩҮШ§ШҢ ШЁШ¶Щ…ЩҶ Ш°Щ„Щғ Щ…ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩҶ Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜШ©. Ш§Щ„ЩҒШӯШө ЩҶЩҸШ¬ШұЩҠ ШЁШ§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Ш®ШӘШЁШ§ШұШ§ШӘ ШіШұЩҠШ№Ш©ШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ШӘЩҸЩӮШҜЩ… ЩҶШӘШ§ШҰШ¬ ЩҒЩҠ ШЈЩӮЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ 20 ШҜЩӮЩҠЩӮШ©ШҢ Щ…Щ…Ш§ ЩҠЩҸЩ…ЩғЩ‘ЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҲШұЩҠ.

translations.source: When untreated, syphilis lasts many years and goes through different stages. Treatment for syphilis is done with injectable penicillin benzathine, with 1 to 3 doses depending on the stage of the disease. Only penicillin can prevent congenital syphilis. Treatment with penicillin has been hampered by periodic and prolonged shortages of benzathine penicillin in numerous countries, including high-, low- and middle-income countries. Symptoms: Many people with syphilis do not present symptoms or do not perceive them.
translations.reference: Ida ba a Й—auKi mataki, tinjere kan Й—auki shekaru a jikin mutum, ta hanyar kaiwa matakai daban-daban. Ana maganin cutar tinjere ta hanyar yin allurar fenicilin sau 1 zuwa 3, ya danganta da matakin cutar. Fenicilin ne kawai yake maganin tinjeren da ake Й—auka daga uwa zuwa yaro. Yin magani da fenicilin ya samu tsaiko sakamakon rashin fenicilin benzatayin na tsawon lokaci a Жҷasashe da dama, waЙ—anda suka haЙ—a da Жҷasashe masu yawa da Жҷaranci da matsakaicin kuЙ—in shiga. Alamomi: Mutane da dama da ke fama da cutar tinjere ba su ganin wasu alamomi.
translations.hypothesis: Lokacin da Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШӘЩ… Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ЩҮШҢ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩҶ (syphilis) ЩҠШіШӘЩ… Ш№Ш§Щ…, ЩҲ ЩҠЩ…Шұ ШЁЩ…ШұШ§ШӯЩ„. Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Щ„ЩҖ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩҶ ЩҠШӘЩ… ШЁШ§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶШіЩ„ЩҠЩҶ (penicillin) Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶШІШ§ШӘЩҠЩҶ (benzathine), Щ…Ш№ Ш¬ШұШ№Ш§ШӘ ШӘШӘШұШ§ЩҲШӯ Щ…ЩҶ 1 ШҘЩ„Щү 3, Ш§Ш№ШӘЩ…Ш§ШҜЩӢШ§ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШұШӯЩ„Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶. Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶШіЩ„ЩҠЩҶ ЩҒЩӮШ· ЩҮЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠЩ…ЩҶШ№ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШұЩҲШ«. Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ ШЁШ§Щ„ШЁЩҶШіЩ„ЩҠЩҶ ЩӮШҜ ЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮ ШөШ№ЩҲШЁШ§ШӘ ШЁШіШЁШЁ ЩҶЩӮШө ШҜЩҲШұЩҠ ЩҲ Ш·ЩҲЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШҜ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶШіЩ„ЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶШІШ§ШӘЩҠЩҶ, ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШҜЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ, ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш°Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ®Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠ, Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ®ЩҒШ¶ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ·. Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶: Ш§Щ„Ш№ШҜЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөШ§ШЁЩҠЩҶ ШЁШ§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩҶ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШёЩҮШұЩҲЩҶ ШЈЩҠ ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶, ШЈЩҲ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШҜШұЩғЩҲЩҶЩҮШ§.

translations.source: Untreated, syphilis lasts many years and is characterized into different stages. Sexual transmission typically occurs during early stages, i.e., up to 2 years after infection. During the initial phase (primary syphilis), which lasts on average 21 days, a solitary, painless, usually hard and round sore (chancre) appears at the site of inoculation (contact), often in the vagina, penis or anus (but it may also be extra-genital) and may go unnoticed. The chancre heals with or without treatment within 3 to 10 weeks. If untreated, the disease progresses to the secondary stage.
translations.reference: Cutar tinjeren da ba yi mata magani ba takan Й—auki shekaru a jikin mutum, inda take xaukar matakai daban-daban. Cutar tana yaxuwa ta hanyar jima'i a mataki farko, wato kusan shekar 2 bayan kawuwa da cutar. A matakin farko, wanda yake Й—aukar kwana 21, inda ita kaЙ—ai kuma mara zafi, wurin kan kawashe yawanci a farji ko zakari ko kuma takashi (ko kuma gaba Й—aya), sannan kuma za a iya kasa gane ta. Ciwon ka iya warkewa ba tare da magani ba a cikin mako 2 zuwa 10. Idan ba a yi magani ba, cutar kan Жҷara gaba zuwa wani mataki.
translations.hypothesis: ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШҢ Щ…ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩҶ ЩҠШіШӘЩ… ЩҲЩҠШіШӘЩ…Шұ Щ„ШіЩҶЩҲЩҶ, ЩҲ ЩҠЩҸЩ…ЩҠШІ ШЁШ¶ШұЩҲЩҒ ЩҶШ§. Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩӮЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠ Ш№Ш§ШҜШ©ЩӢ ЩҠЩҲЩғЩҲШұ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁШҜШ§ЩҠШ©, ШЈЩҠ, Щ…Ш§ ЩҠЩӮЩ„ Ш№ЩҶ 2 ШіЩҶЩҲЩҶ bayan shiga. ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁШҜШ§ЩҠШ© (Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„ЩҠ), wanda ta kammala Щ…Ш§ ЩҠЩӮЩ„ Ш№ЩҶ 21 rana, ЩҠШёЩҮШұ ЩҲШұЩ…, ba ya kashe, kuma Ш№Ш§ШҜШ©ЩӢ, ya kasance, ya kasance, kuma ya kasance, (chancre) a wurin shiga (kirki), kuma Ш№Ш§ШҜШ©ЩӢ, a cikin cikin, penis ko anus ( amma kuma zai iya zama ba a cikin), kuma zai iya zama ba ya san. Ш§Щ„ЩҖ chancre ya kashe, kamar da ba kamar, cikin 3 zuwa 10 kwanan. Idan ba a dauki hanya, za a samu cikin matsala.

translations.source: Secondary syphilis is characterized by a rash that can vary widely and mimic other infectious or non-infectious conditions, but characteristically affects the palms and soles. The rash is non-itchy and can be minimal enough to be overlooked. In warm and moist areas of the body, such as the anus and labia, large white or grey raised lesions may develop at the location of the primary chancre (condyloma lata). The symptoms and signs of secondary syphilis spontaneously resolve, even without treatment. Without treatment, the latent stage starts.
translations.reference: Cutar tinjere nau'i na biyu na siffantauwa ne da fitowar Жҷuraje, waЙ—anda suka bambanta, sannan su haifar da cututtuka masu yaЙ—uwa ko marasa yaЙ—uwa, amma yawanci suna shafar tafin hannu da na Жҷafa. Жҷurajen ba masu ЖҷaЖҷayi ba ne, inda za a iya watsi da su. A sassan jikin da suke da lema ko danshi kamar takashi da leЙ“e, wani farin abu ko ruwan Жҷasa kan fito a wurin da ciwon asali yake. Alamomin nau'in tinjere na biyu kan iya Й“acewa, ba tare da magani ba. Idan ba a Й—auki mataki ba, yanayin iya ci gaba.
