translations.source: All travellers must prepare for the variety of health risks they can be exposed to in unfamiliar environments before, during and after they travel. People planning to travel should seek advice on the potential hazards in their chosen destinations and understand how best to protect their health and minimize the risk of acquiring disease. Forward planning, appropriate preventive measures and careful precautions can protect the health of travellers, and minimize the risks of accident and of acquiring disease. Although the medical profession and the travel industry can provide extensive help and sound advice, it remains the travellerвҖҷs responsibility to seek information, to understand the risks involved and to take the necessary precautions to protect their health while travelling. Risk: When determining the health risks of international travel, travellers and health professionals should consider the following key factors:
translations.reference: Dole ne dukkanin matafiya su shirya don nau'ikan haЙ—ari ga lafiya da za a iya samu cikin yanayin da ba a sani ba a kafin da yayin da kuma bayan tafiya. Ya kamata mutane da ke shirin tafiya su nemi shawara kan haЙ—arin da za su iya samu a wurin da zasu je kuma su fahimci hanyar da zasu kare lafiyarsu da kuma yadda zasu rage haЙ—arin kamuwa da cuta. Shirin gaba sune, matakan da suka dace da taka tsantsan na iya kare lafiyar matafiya, kuma suna rage haЙ—arin haЙ—ari da samun cuta. translations.source: Travellers may also be exposed to a number of infectious diseases, and many of these can be prevented by vaccination. However, there are some infectious diseases, including some of the most dangerous, for which no vaccines exist. Destinations where accommodation, hygiene and sanitation, medical care and water quality are of a high standard pose relatively few serious risks to the health of travellers. Where these services are not provided, travellers should take stringent precautions to avoid illness. Travel warnings from governmental sources should be taken seriously.
translations.reference: Hakanan matafiya zasu iya haЙ—uwa da cututtuka da dama, kuma da yawa daga cikin waЙ—annan za a iya daЖҷile su ta hanyar alurar rigakafi. Duk da haka, akwai wasu cututtuka, ciki har da wasu daga cikin mafiya haЙ—ari, waЙ—anda ba rigakafinsu. Wuraren da inda masauЖҷi ya ke da tsafta da aikin kiwon lafiya da ruwa mai kyau na da Жҷarancin barazana ga lafiyar matafiya. Inda ba a samar da waЙ—annan ayyukan ba, ya kamata matafiya su Й—auki tsattsauran matakan kariya don gujewa rashin lafiya. Ya kamata a dauЖҷi gargaЙ—i bisa tafiya daga majiyoyin gwamnati da mahimmanci.

translations.source: Prevention: Before travel: contact a travel medicine centre or a physician, preferably 4вҖ“8 weeks before departure to receive any required vaccinations; read up on local diseases related to your destination; request information on malaria risk and prevention of mosquito bites. This may include purchasing appropriate preventive medication and packing a bednet and insect repellent; get a medical and dental check-up;
translations.reference: Yin rigakafi: Kafin tafiya: tuntuЙ“i cibiyar magungunan matafiya ko likita, mafi dacewa, makonni 4-8 kafin tafiya don karЙ“ar duk wani rigakafi da ake buЖҷata; Yi karatu kan cututtukan gida masu alaЖҷa da wurin da zaka je; nemi bayani game da haЙ—arin zazzabin cizon sauro da rigakafin cizon sauro. Wannan na iya Жҷunsar sayan magani na kariya da tattara sangen gado mai kwarar Жҷwari; yi binciken lafiyar jiki da na haЖҷori;
translations.hypothesis: Щ…Щ…ЩҶЩҲШ№: В ЩӮШЁЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҒШұ: Щ„Ш§Жҷonin Й—aya, ШЈЩҲ ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШіЩҠ, ЩҠЩҒШ¶Щ„ 4-8 ШЈШіШЁЩҲШ№ В ЩӮШЁЩ„ ЩҒЪ•ЫҶ, В ШӯЩҠШ« В ШіЩҲЩҒ В ЩҠШіШӘЩ„Щ… В Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ В Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ В ЩҠШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ В ШҘЩ„ЩҠЩҮШ§; В ШҜШұШ§ШіШ© В Ш№ЩҶ В Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ В Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯЩ„ЩҠШ© В Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ В ШӘШӘШ№Щ„ЩӮ В ШЁЩ…ЩҲЩӮШ№ В Ш§Щ„ШіЩҒШұ; В Ш·Щ„ШЁ В Щ…Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩ…Ш§ШӘ В Ш№ЩҶ В Ш®Ш·Шұ В Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§Щ„Ш§ШұЩҠШ§ В ЩҲ В Ш·ШұЩӮ В Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩӮШ§ЩҠШ© В Щ…ЩҶ В Ш§Щ„Щ„ШіШ№Ш§ШӘ В Ш§Щ„С…Р°Рј. В ЩҮШ°Ш§ В ЩҠЩҸЩ…ЩғЩҶ В ШЈЩҶ В ЩҠШҙЩ…Щ„ В ШҙШұШ§ШҰЩҮ В Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© В Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ В ШӘШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… В Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ№, В ЩҲ В ШӘШ¬ЩҮЩҠШІ В ШҙШЁЩғШ© В Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҲЩ… В ЩҲ В Щ…ШЁЩҠШҜШ§ШӘ В Ш§Щ„С…Р°Рј; В Ш§Щ„ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ В Ш№Щ„Щү В ЩҒШӯШө В Ш·ШЁЩ‘ЩҠ В ЩҲ В ШЈШіЩҶШ§ЩҶ.

translations.source: obtain prescriptions for medication according to length of stay and assemble a suitable medical kit; purchase medical insurance with appropriate cover abroad During travel: eat only thoroughly cooked food and drink only bottled or packaged cold drinks. Boil drinking-water if safety is doubtful.
translations.reference: samu takardar magani bisa tsawon zama ka kuma tattara duk magungunan da suka dace; sayi inshorar kiwon lafiya da duk abin da ya dace a Жҷasar waje A lokacin tafiya: Ku ci abincin da aka dafa sosai kaЙ—ai da abin sha wanda aka sanya a cikin kwalba mai sanyi. A tafasa ruwan sha idan akwai shakku akan tsaftarsa.
translations.hypothesis:
Щ„Ш§ШӯШөЩ„ЩҲШ§ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© ЩҲЩҒЩӮЩӢШ§ Щ„Щ…ШҜШӘ Ш§Щ„ШіШ§ЩғЩҶШҢ ЩҲШ¬Щ…Ш№ЩҲШ§ Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© Ш·ШЁЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁШ©; ШҙШұЩҲШ§ ШЁЩҠЩ…ЩҮ Ш·ШЁЩҠШЁ Щ…Ш№ ШӘШәШ·ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁШ© ШЁШ§Щ„Ш®Ш§ШұШ¬.
ШЈШ«ЩҶШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҒШұ: Щ„Ш§ ШӘШЈЩғЩ„ЩҲШ§ ШіЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„ШЈШ·Ш№Щ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩ… Ш·ЩҮЩҠЩҮШ§ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ШөШӯЩҠШӯШҢ ЩҲЩ„Ш§ ШӘШҙШұШЁЩҲШ§ ШіЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШұЩҲШЁШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ§ШұШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШЈШӘЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ ШІШ¬Ш§Ш¬Ш§ШӘ ШЈЩҲ Ш№ШЁЩҲШ§ШӘ. ШҘШ°Ш§ ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҮЩҶШ§Щғ ШҙЩғ ЩҒЩҠ ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…Ш© Щ…Ш§ ШӘШҙШұШЁЩҲЩҶШҢ ЩҒЩӮЩ… ШЁШәЩ„ЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§ШЎ.

translations.source: be aware of accidents or problems related to traffic, animals, allergies, sun and sport; carry a card showing your blood group; wear a medical alert bracelet, if you have allergies or a chronic disease Travellers should obtain a medical examination on their return if they: return with a fever from a country where malaria is or may be present

translations.hypothesis: ШәШ§Щ„ШЁЩӢШ§ Щ…Ш§ ЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҲЩҮ ШЁЩ…ШұШ¶ Щ…ШІЩ…ЩҶШҢ ЩҲЩҠШ®ШӘШЁШұЩҲЩҮ ШЁЩ…ШұШ¶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҠШ§Щ… ШӘШ§Щ„ЩҠШ© Щ„ШұШ¬ЩҲШ№ЩҮЩ… ШҘЩ„Щү ШҜЩҠШ§ШұЩҮЩ…ШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩӮШҜ ШӘЩ„ЩӮЩү Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„Ш§ШұЩҠШ§ ШЈШ«ЩҶШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҒШұШҢ ЩҲШұШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҲЩҸШ¬ЩҗШҜЩҲШ§ Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶ Щ…Ш№ШҜЩҠ Ш®Ш·ЩҠШұШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩӮШҜ ЩӮШ¶ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ ЩҠШІЩҠШҜ Ш№ЩҶ 3 ШЈШҙЩҮШұ ЩҒЩҠ ШЁЩ„ШҜ ЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠ.

translations.source: Tuberculosis Overview: TB is caused by bacteria (Mycobacterium tuberculosis) and it most often affects the lungs. TB is spread through the air when people with lung TB cough, sneeze or spit. A person needs to inhale only a few germs to become infected. Every year, 10 million people fall ill with tuberculosis (TB).
translations.reference: Tarin fuka TaЖҷaitaccen bayani: Жҳwayar cuta mai suna Mycobacterium tuberculosis ce ke haifar da cutar tarin fuka, kuma mafi yawan lokaci tana shafar huhu. Tarin fuka na yaЙ—uwa ta hanyar iska idan mutane masu Жҷwayar cutar a huhunsu suka yi tar, attishawa ko tofar da yawu. Mutum na buЖҷatar shaЖҷar Жҷwayoyin cutar kaЙ—an ne kawai kafin ya kamu da ita. A kowace shekara, mutane miliyan 10 ne ke kamuwa da cutar tarin fuka(TB).
translations.hypothesis: ЩҶШёШұШ© Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„: Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„ ЩҶШ§ШӘШ¬ Ш№ЩҶ ШҜЩҠШҜШ§ЩҶ (Mycobacterium tuberculosis)ШҢ ЩҲШәШ§Щ„ШЁЩӢШ§ Щ…Ш§ ЩҠШӨШ«Шұ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШұШҰШӘЩҠЩҶ. Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„ ЩҠЩҶШӘШҙШұ Ш№ЩҶ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮ Ш§Щ„ЩҮЩҲШ§ШЎ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөШ§ШЁЩҠЩҶ ШЁШ§Щ„ШіЩ„ ЩҠШәШ·ЩҲЩҶ ШЈЩҶЩҒЩҮЩ… ШЈЩҲ ЩҠШӘЩӮЩҠШЈ. ШҙШ®Шө ЩҠШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ ЩҒЩӮШ· ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§ШіШӘЩҶШҙШ§ЩӮ Ш№ШҜШҜ ЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩғШӘЩҠШұЩҠШ§ Щ„ЩҠШөШ§ШЁ. ЩғЩ„ Ш№Ш§Щ…ШҢ 10 Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ ШҙШ®Шө ЩҠШөШ§ШЁЩҲЩҶ ШЁЩ…ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„ (ШіЩ„).

translations.source: Despite being a preventable and curable disease, 1.5 million people die from TB each year вҖ“ making it the worldвҖҷs top infectious killer. TB is the leading cause of death of people with HIV and also a major contributor to antimicrobial resistance Most of the people who fall ill with TB live in low- and middle-income countries, but TB is present all over the world. About half of all people with TB can be found in 8 countries: Bangladesh, China, India, Indonesia, Nigeria, Pakistan, Philippines and South Africa. About a quarter of the global population is estimated to have been infected with TB bacteria, but most people will not go on to develop TB disease and some will clear the infection.
translations.reference: Duk da kasancewarta cuta da za a iya karewa kuma ana iya warkewa, mutane miliyan 1.5 suna mutuwa daga tarin fuka a kowace shekara - wanda ya sa ta zama babbar cuta mai yaЙ—uwa da ke kisa a duniya. Tarin fuka na kan gaba a jerin sanadin mutuwar mutane masu cuta mai karyar garkuwar jiki HIV, kuma yana samar da kaso mai yawa na cutuka masu Жҷin jin magani Yawancin masu kamuwa da cutar tarin fuka na rayuwa a Жҷasashe masu Жҷaranci da matsakaicin Жҷarfin tattalin arziЖҷi, amma ana samun TB a ko'ina a duniya. Ana iya samun kusan rabin dukkan masu fama da tarin fuka a kasashe 8: Bangladesh, China, Indiya, Indonesiya, Najeriya, Pakistan, Philippines da Afirka ta Kudu. An Жҷiyasta cewa kimanin kaso Й—aya bisa huЙ—u na al'ummar duniya na kamuwa da Жҷwayar cutar TB, sai dai yawancin mutane ba za su kama cutar ta tarin fuka ba, wasu kuma jikinsu na yaЖҷar cutar.
translations.hypothesis: ШЁШ§ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ ЩғЩҲЩҶЩҮШ§ ШіШӨЩҶ  preventable ЩҲ curable, 1.5 Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ ШұСҶР°Сһ ЩҠЩ…ЩҲШӘЩҲЩҶ Ш№Ш§Щ…ЩҠЩӢШ§ вҖ“ ЩҠШ¬Ш№Щ„ЩҮ ШіШӨЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ ЩӮШ§ШӘЩ„ЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…. ШіШӨЩҶ ЩҮЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШіШЁШЁ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠ Щ„ЩҲЩҒШ§Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Ш°ЩҠЩҶ Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҮЩ… HIV, ЩҲ ШЈЩҠШ¶ЩӢШ§ ЩҠШіШ§ЩҮЩ… ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ЩғШЁЩҠЩ’Шұ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¶Ш§ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҠЩҲЩҠШ©. ШЈШәЩ„ШЁ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ЩҠШөШ§ШЁЩҲЩҶ ШЁШіШӨЩҶ,  reside ЩҒЩҠ ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш°ЩҠЩҶ Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҮЩ… ШҜШ®Щ„ Щ…ЩҶШ®ЩҒШ¶ ЩҲ Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ·, Щ„ЩғЩҶ ШіШӨЩҶ Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ШЈЩҶШӯШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…. ШӯЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҠ ЩҶШөЩҒ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ЩҠШөШ§ШЁЩҲЩҶ ШЁШіШӨЩҶ, za a cikin 8 Жҷasa: Bangladesh, China, India, Indonesia, Nigeria, Pakistan, Philippines, da South Africa. Makas, Жҷimar jama'a a duniya, za a samu, yana da shigewa da sШӨЩҶ, amma karЖҷashin mutanen, ba za su samu sШӨЩҶ ba, kuma wasu za su iya Й“ata wannan shigewa.

translations.source: Those who are infected but not (yet) ill with the disease cannot transmit it. People infected with TB bacteria have a 5вҖ“10% lifetime risk of falling ill with TB. Those with compromised immune systems, such as people living with HIV, malnutrition or diabetes, or people who use tobacco, have a higher risk of falling ill. Symptoms: Common symptoms of TB disease include: Prolonged cough, Chest pain, Weakness or fatigue, Weight loss, Fever, Night sweats Often, these symptoms will be mild for many months, thus leading to delays in seeking care and increasing the risk of spreading the infection to others.
translations.reference: WaЙ—anda ke Й—auke da Жҷwayar cutar amma ba su kamu da rashin lafiya ba tukunna ba sa iya yaЙ—a ta. Mutanen da suka kamu da Жҷwayar cutar tarin fuka na da hatsarin tsawon rayuwa na kaso 5 zuwa 10 na kamuwa da cutar ta TB. Mutanen da ke da raunin garkuwar jiki, kamar mutanen da ke rayuwa da cuta mai karya garkuwar jiki wato HIV, Жҷaranci abinci mai gina jiki ko ciwon suga, ko masu shan sigari, sun fi zama cikin hatsarin yin rashin lafiyar. Alamomi: Alamomin cutar tarin fuka sun haЙ—a da: Taro na lokaci mai tsawo, Ciwon Жҷirji, Kasala ko gajiya, Ramewa, ZazzaЙ“i, Gumin dare. Mafi yawan lokuta, waЙ—annan alamomi sukan kasance marasa tsanani na tsawon watanni, wanda hakan ke haifar da jinkiri wajen neman lafiya da kuma Жҷara hatsarin yaЙ—a cutar ga wasu.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ШЁЩҮЩҠЩҶШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩғЩҶЩҮ (ШӯШ§Щ„ЩҠЩӢШ§) Щ„Ш§ШЁЩҠШҢ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШіШӘШ·ЩҠШ№ЩҲШ§ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠЩҶЩӮЩ„ЩҲЩҮ. Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ШЁЩҮЩҠЩҶ Щ„ЩҖ TBШҢ Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҮЩ… 5-10% Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш© ЩҒШұШө Ш§Щ„ШҘШөШ§ШЁШ© ШЁЩҖ TB. Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜ Ш°ЩҲЩҠ Ш¬ЩҮШ§ШІ Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш№ЩҠ Ш¶Ш№ЩҠЩҒШҢ Щ…Ш«Щ„ ШЈЩҲЩ„ШҰЩғ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ШЁЩҮЩҠЩҶ Щ„ЩҖ HIVШҢ ШіЩҲШЎ Ш§Щ„ШӘШәШ°ЩҠШ©ШҢ ШЈЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШіЩғШұЩҠШҢ ШЈЩҲ ШЈЩҲЩ„ШҰЩғ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ЩҠШіШӘЩҮЩ„ЩғЩҲЩҶ ШӘШЁШәШҢ Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҮЩ… ЩҒШұШө ШЈЩғШЁШұ Щ„Щ„ШҘШөШ§ШЁШ©. Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш·: Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ШҰШ№Ш© Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶ TB ШӘШҙЩ…Щ„: Ш№Ш·Ші Щ„ЩҒШӘШұШ© Ш·ЩҲЩҠЩ„Ш©ШҢ ШЈЩ„Щ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШөШҜШұШҢ Ш¶Ш№ЩҒ ШЈЩҲ ШӘШ№ШЁШҢ ЩҒЩӮШҜШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШІЩҶШҢ ШӯЩ…ЩүШҢ ШӘШ№ШұЩӮ Щ„ЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩӢ. ШәШ§Щ„ШЁЩӢШ§ШҢ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· ШіШӘЩғЩҲЩҶ Ш®ЩҒЩҠЩҒШ© Щ„Ш№ШҜШ© ШЈШҙЩҮШұШҢ Щ…Щ…Ш§ ЩҠШӨШҜЩҠ ШҘЩ„Щү ШӘШЈШ®ЩҠШұ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ ЩҲШІЩҠШ§ШҜШ© Ш®Ш·Шұ ЩҶЩӮЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШҜЩҲЩү ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШўШ®ШұЩҠЩҶ.

translations.source: If the healthcare provider suspects a patient to have TB disease, they will send the patient for testing. In the case of suspected lung TB disease, patients will be asked to give a sputum sample for testing for TB bacteria. For non-lung TB disease, samples of affected body fluids and tissue can be tested. WHO recommends rapid molecular diagnostic tests as initial tests for people showing signs and symptoms of TB. Other diagnostic tools can include sputum smear microscopy and chest X-rays.
translations.reference: Idan ma'aikacin lafiya ya yi zargin mara lafiya na fama a cutar tarin fuka, zai aika wannan marar lafiyar domin yin gwaji. Ta Й“angaren cutar tarin fuka da ta shafi huhu, za a buЖҷaci mara lafiya da ya ba da yawunsa don a yi gwajin cutar ta tarin fuka. Ga tarin fuka da bai shafi huhu ba kuma, ana iya gwada samfurin ruwan jiki ko ko wani Й“angare da cutar ta shafa. WHO na ba da shawara yin gwajin gano Жҷwayoyin cuta cikin sauri a matsayin gwajin farko ga mutanen da ke nuna alamun kamuwa da tarin fuka. Sauran hanyoyin gwaje-gwajen na iya haЙ—awa da duba yawu a ЖҷarЖҷashin madubin binciken ЖҷwaЖҷwaf da kuma hoton Жҷirji.
translations.hypothesis: ШҘШ°Ш§ Щ…ЩҸЩӮШҜЩ… Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© ЩҠШҙШӘШЁЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ Щ…ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„ Щ„ШҜЩү Щ…ШұЩҠШ¶ШҢ ШіЩҠЩҲШ¬ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұЩҠШ¶ Щ„ШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎ ЩҒШӯШө. ЩҲЩҒЩҠ ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш§ШҙШӘШЁШ§ЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰШ©ШҢ ШіЩҠЩҸШ·Щ„ШЁ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶Щү ШӘЩӮШҜЩҠЩ… Ш№ЩҠЩҶШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШәЩ… Щ„ШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎ ЩҒШӯШө Щ„Щ„ЩғШ§ШҰЩҶШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШЁШЁШ© Щ„Щ„ШіЩ„. ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҶШіШЁШ© Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„ ШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰШ©ШҢ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎ ЩҒШӯШө Ш№Щ„Щү Ш№ЩҠЩҶШ§ШӘ ШіЩҲШ§ШҰЩ„ ЩҲШЈЩҶШіШ¬Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШіЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөШ§ШЁШ©. Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ШӘЩҲШөЩҠ ШЁШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎ Ш§Ш®ШӘШЁШ§ШұШ§ШӘ ШӘШҙШ®ЩҠШөЩҠШ© ШіШұЩҠШ№ ЩғЩ…ШұШӯЩ„Ш© ШЈЩҲЩ„Щү Щ„Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶Щү Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ЩҠШёЩҮШұ Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮЩ… Ш№Щ„Ш§Щ…Ш§ШӘ ЩҲШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„. ШЈШҜЩҲШ§ШӘ ШӘШҙШ®ЩҠШөЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ШұЩү ЩӮШҜ ШӘШҙЩ…Щ„ ЩҒШӯШө Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШәЩ… ШӘШӯШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ЩҮШұ ЩҲШөЩҲШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ№Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШөШҜШұ.

translations.source: With TB infection, a person gets infected with TB bacteria that lie inactive in the body. This infection can develop into TB disease if their immune system weakens. People with TB infection do not show any signs or symptoms of TB. To identify TB infection, healthcare providers will screen at-risk patients to rule out active TB, and they may use a skin or blood test to check for TB infection. Treatment: TB disease is curable.
translations.reference: Wajen kamuwa da tarin fuka, mutum na gamuwa da Жҷwayar cutar tarin fuka wacce ta zama a jiki ba tare da wani tasiri ba. Kamuwa da wannan Жҷwayar cutar na iya juyewa ya zama cikakkiyar cutar tarin fuka idan garkuwar jikinsu ta samu rauni. Ta yiwu mutanen da suka kamu da Жҷwayar cutar tarin fuka ba za su nuna wasu alamomin cutar ta tarin fuka ba. Don gano ko an kamu da cutar tarin fuka, ma'aikatan lafiya za su duba marasa lafiya da ke cikin haЙ—ari don kawar da yiwuwar kamuwa da tarin fuka, kuma suna iya amfani da gwajin fata ko jini don bincikar tarin fuka. Magani: Tarin fuka cuta ce da ake iya warkewa.
translations.hypothesis: "Ш№ЩҶ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШҘШөШ§ШЁШ© ШЁЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҲШЁШ§ШіШӘЩҠШұШҢ Ші individual ЩҠ Contracting Щ…Ш№ ШЁЩғШӘЩҠШұЩҠШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҲШЁШ§ШіШӘЩҠШұ, Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ Ш®Ш§Щ…Щ„Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШіЩ…. ЩҮШ°ЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШҘШөШ§ШЁШ© ЩҶШ§weza ШӘШӘШӯЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Щ…ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҲШЁШ§ШіШӘЩҠШұ ШҘШ°Ш§ Ш¬ЩҮШ§ШІ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш№Ш© Ч©ЧңЧ• ЩҠШ¶Ш№ЩҒ. Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ Contracting Щ…Ш№ ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҲШЁШ§ШіШӘЩҠШұ, Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШёЩҮШұ ШЈЩҠ Ш№Щ„Ш§Щ…Ш§ШӘ ШЈЩҲ ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҲШЁШ§ШіШӘЩҠШұ. Щ„ЩғЩҠ ЩҠШӘЩ… ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜ ШҘШөШ§ШЁШ© ШЁЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҲШЁШ§ШіШӘЩҠШұ, Ш§Щ„ШЈШ·ШЁШ§ШЎ ШіЩҠЩӮЩҲЩ…ЩҲЩҶ ШЁЩҒШӯШө Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШұШ¶ЩҠЩҶ Щ„Щ„Ш®Ш·Шұ, Щ„ЩҠШӘЩ… Ш§ШіШӘШЁШ№Ш§ШҜ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҲШЁШ§ШіШӘЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШҙШ·, ЩҲ ЩӮШҜ ЩҠШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Ш®ШӘШЁШ§Шұ Ш¬Щ„ШҜ ШЈЩҲ ШҜЩ…, Щ„ЩҠШӘЩ… ЩҒШӯШө ШҘШөШ§ШЁШ© ШЁЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҲШЁШ§ШіШӘЩҠШұ. Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬: Щ…ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҲШЁШ§ШіШӘЩҠШұ ЩҶШ§weza ЩҠШӘЩ… Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ЩҮ.

translations.source: It is treated by standard 6 month course of 4 antibiotics. Common drugs include rifampicin and isoniazid. In some cases the TB bacteria does not respond to the standard drugs. In this case, the patient has drug-resistant TB. for drug-resistant TB is longer and more complex.
translations.reference: Ana magance ta ta hanyar shan daidaitattun magunguna kala 4 na tsawon wata 6. Magungunan da ake yawan amfani da su sun haЙ—a da rifampicin da isoniazid. Amma wasu lokutan cutar tarin fuka ba ta karЙ“ar daidaitattun magungunan. A wannan yanayin, mara lafiyan yana fama da tarin fuka da ba ya jin magani. Tarin fuka da ba ya jin magani na Й—aukar lokaci mai tsawo kuma yana da sarЖҷaЖҷiya.
translations.hypothesis: ШәШ§Щ„ШЁЩӢШ§ Щ…Ш§ ЩҠЩҸШ№Ш§Щ„Ш¬ Щ…ШұЩҠШ¶ wannan ШіЩҠЩ…ШӘ ШЁШ§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Щ…ЩғЩҲЩ‘ШұШ§ШӘ 4 ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ№Щ…Щ„ Ч‘ЧһЧ©Чҡ 6 ШЈШҙЩҮШұ. Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ШҰШ№Ш© ШӘШҙЩ…Щ„ ШұЩҠЩҒШ§Щ…ШЁЩҠШіЩҠЩҶ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҠШІЩҲЩҶЩҠШ§ШІЩҠШҜ. ЩҒЩҠ ШЁШ№Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘШҢ ШЁЩғШӘЩҠШұЩҠШ§ Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§Ш№ЩҲЩҶ Щ„Ш§ ШӘШіШӘШ¬ЩҠШЁ Щ„Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§ШҜЩҠШ©. ЩҲЩҒЩҠ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш©ШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұЩҠШ¶ Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҮ Ш·Ш§Ш№ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ… Щ„Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ©. Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§Ш№ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ… Щ„Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© ЩҠШӘШ·Щ„ШЁ ЩҲЩӮШӘЩӢШ§ ШЈШ·ЩҲЩ„ ЩҲШЈЩғШ«Шұ ШӘШ№ЩӮЩҠШҜЩӢШ§.

translations.source: The course of TB drugs is provided to the patient with information, supervision and support by a health worker or trained volunteer. Without such support, treatment adherence can be difficult. If the treatment is not properly completed, the disease can become drug-resistant and can spread. In the case of TB infection (where the patient is infected with TB bacteria but not ill), TB preventive treatment can be given to stop the onset of disease. This treatment uses the same drugs for a shorter time.
translations.reference: Ana ba wa marar lafiyar maganin tarin fuka da yake buЖҷata tare da bayanai da kuma sa'ido da tallafi daga ma'aikacin lafiya ko wani mai aikin sa kai da aka horas. Idan babu tallafi, tabbatar da an kammala shan maganin na iya zama abu mai wahala. Idan ba a kammala shan maganin yadda ya kamata ba, cutar na iya juyewa zuwa wacce ba ta jin magani kuma ta yaЙ—u. Game da kamuwa da Жҷwayar cutar tarin fuka kuwa (ta yadda mara lafiyar ya kamu da Жҷwayar cutar amma bai fara rashin lafiya ba), ana iya ba shi maganin kariya daga cutar tarin fuka don hana bayyanar alamomin cutar. Maganin iri Й—aya ake sha da na magance cutar, amma na lokacin da bai kai wancan tsawo ba.

translations.source: Recent treatment options have shortened the duration to treatment to only 1 or 3 months, as compared to 6 months in the past.
translations.reference: ZaЙ“uЙ“Й“ukan magani na baya-bayan nan sun Жҷara gajarce tsawon lokacin shan maganin zuwa wata 1 ko 3 kawai, idan aka kwatanta da watanni 6 da akan yi a baya.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„Ш®ЩҠШ§ШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ§ШӯШ© Щ„Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Щ…ШӨШ®ШұЩӢШ§ ЩӮШҜ ЩӮШөШұШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҠШіШӘШәШұЩӮЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ ШҘЩ„Щү 1 ШЈЩҲ 3 ШЈШҙЩҮШұШҢ Щ…ЩӮШ§ШұЩҶШ© Щ…Ш№ 6 ШЈШҙЩҮШұ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§Ш¶ЩҠ.

translations.source: Ultraviolet radiation Overview: Ultraviolet (UV) radiation covers the wavelength range of 100вҖ“400 nm, which is a higher frequency and lower wavelength than visible light. UV radiation comes naturally from the sun, but it can also be created by artificial sources used in industry, commerce and recreation. The UV region covers the wavelength range 100-400 nm and is divided into three bands: UVA (315-400 nm)UVB (280-315 nm)UVC (100-280 nm). As sunlight passes through the atmosphere, all UVC and approximately 90% of UVB radiation is absorbed by ozone, water vapour, oxygen and carbon dioxide.
translations.reference: Hasken Ultraviolet radiation TaЖҷaitaccen bayani: Ultraviolet radiation (UV) na nufin hasken da ya faЙ—o a ma'aunin haske na 100-400nm, wanda ya fi Жҷarfi kuma yake da Жҷarancin nisan zango fiye da da hasken da ake iya gani da ido. UV radiation na samuwa ne daga rana, amma kuma ana iya ЖҷirЖҷirarsa ta hanyoyin da Й—an adam ya samar waЙ—anda ake amfani da su a masana'antu, kasuwanci da motsa jiki. Yankin UV ya Жҷunshi ma'aunin haske 100-400 nm kuma an raba shi zuwa rukuni uku: UVA (315-400 nm) UVB (280-315 nm) UVC (100-280 nm). Yayin da hasken rana ke wuce sararin samaniya, shimfiЙ—ar sama, tururin ruwa, iskar oxygen da ta carbon dioxide na shanye duk hasken da ke rukunin UVC da kuma kaso 90% na wanda ke rukunin UVB.
translations.hypothesis: ЩҶШёШұШ© Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ№Ш© ЩҒЩҲЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶЩҒШіШ¬ЩҠШ©: Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ№Ш© ЩҒЩҲЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶЩҒШіШ¬ЩҠШ© (UV) ШӘШҙЩ…Щ„ ЩҶШ·Ш§ЩӮ Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҠ Щ…ЩҶ 100-400 ЩҶШ§ЩҶЩҲЩ…ШӘШұШҢ ЩҲЩҮЩҠ ШӘШұШҜШҜ ШЈШ№Щ„Щү ЩҲ Ш·ЩҲЩ„ Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҠ ШЈЩӮЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш¶ЩҲШЎ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШҰЩҠ. Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ№Ш© ЩҒЩҲЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶЩҒШіШ¬ЩҠШ© ШӘШЈШӘЩҠ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ Ш·ШЁЩҠШ№ЩҠ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҙЩ…ШіШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩғЩҶ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҠШ¶ЩӢШ§ ШҘЩҶШӘШ§Ш¬ЩҮШ§ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ШөШ§ШҜШұ ШөЩҶШ§Ш№ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШөЩҶШ§Ш№Ш©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ¬Ш§ШұШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШұЩҒЩҠЩҮ. Щ…ЩҶШ·ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ№Ш© ЩҒЩҲЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶЩҒШіШ¬ЩҠШ© ШӘШҙЩ…Щ„ ЩҶШ·Ш§ЩӮ Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҠ 100-400 ЩҶШ§ЩҶЩҲЩ…ШӘШұШҢ ЩҲЩҮЩҠ Щ…ЩӮШіЩ…Ш© ШҘЩ„Щү Ш«Щ„Ш§Ш«Ш© ЩҶШ·Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ: UVA (315-400 ЩҶШ§ЩҶЩҲЩ…ШӘШұ)ШҢ UVB (280-315 ЩҶШ§ЩҶЩҲЩ…ШӘШұ)ШҢ UVC (100-280 ЩҶШ§ЩҶЩҲЩ…ШӘШұ). ШЁЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ Ш¶ЩҲШЎ Ш§Щ„ШҙЩ…Ші ЩҠЩ…Шұ Ш№ШЁШұ Ш§Щ„ШәЩ„Ш§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҲЩҠШҢ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ№Ш© UVC ЩҲ ШӯЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҠ 90% Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ№Ш© UVB ЩҠШӘЩ… Ш§Щ…ШӘШөШ§ШөЩҮШ§ Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШЁЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШІЩҲЩҶШҢ ШЁШ®Ш§Шұ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§ШЎШҢ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШіШ¬ЩҠЩҶШҢ ЩҲШ«Ш§ЩҶЩҠ ШЈЩғШіЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩғШұШЁЩҲЩҶ.

translations.source: UVA radiation is less affected by the atmosphere. Therefore, the UV radiation reaching the EarthвҖҷs surface is largely composed of UVA with a small UVB component. The amount of UV radiation from the sun that hits the EarthвҖҷs surface depends on several factors, including the sunвҖҷs height in the sky, latitude, cloud cover, altitude, the thickness of the ozone layer and ground reflection. Reductions in the ozone layer due to human-created pollution increase the amount of UVA and UVB that reaches the surface. This can impact human health, animals, marine organisms and plant life.
translations.reference: Hasken rukunin UVA bai cika tasirantuwa da sinadaran da ke sararin samaniya ba. Dun haka, hasken UV da ke isowa duniya yawanci ya Жҷunshi UVA ne da kaЙ—an daga UVB. Adadin hasken UV radiation daga rana da ke isowa duniya ya dogara da abubuwa da yawa, ciki har da tsayin rana a sararin sama, nisa ta Й“angaren latitude, kaurin gajimare, nisan altitude, kaurin shimfiЙ—ar sararin samaniya ta ozone da yanayin Жҷasa. Rage kauri da shimfiЙ—ar sararin samaniya ta ozone ta yi saboda gurЙ“acewar yanayi da Й—an adam ya haifar yana Жҷara adadin UVA da UVB waЙ—anda ke isowa duniya. Wannan na iya yin tasiri ga lafiyar Й—an adam, dabbobi, halittun ruwa da rayuwar shuka.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ№Щ„ "UVA" ЩҠШӘШұШҜШҜ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ„ ШЁШіШЁШЁ Ш¬ЩҲ. ЩҲ Щ„ЩҮШ°Ш§ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ№Ш© "UVA" Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШөЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү ШіШ·Шӯ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШ¶ШҢ ЩҮЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШІШЎ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШЁШұШҢ Щ…Ш№ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ ЩҶШіШЁШ© ШөШәЩҠШұШ© Щ…ЩҶ "UVB". Ш§Щ„ЩғШ«ШұШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ№Ш© "UV" Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШөЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү ШіШ·Шӯ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШ¶ ШӘШ№ШӘЩ…ШҜ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш№ШҜШ© Ш№ЩҲШ§Щ…Щ„ШҢ ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҙЩ…Ші ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ…Ш§ШЎШҢ Ш®Ш· Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұШ¶ШҢ ШәШ·Ш§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШіШӯШ§ШЁШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ШҢ ШіЩ…Щғ Ш·ШЁЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШІЩҲЩҶШҢ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҶШ№ЩғШ§Ші ШіШ·Шӯ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШ¶. Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩӮШө ЩҒЩҠ Ш·ШЁЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШІЩҲЩҶ ШЁШіШЁШЁ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩ„ЩҲШ« Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШіШЁШЁ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҶШіШ§ЩҶШҢ ЩҠШІЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ ЩғЩ…ЩҠШ© "UVA" ЩҲ "UVB" Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШөЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШіШ·Шӯ. wannan za iya СӮР°СҠ СӮР°СҠ translations.source: In humans, increased UV exposure can cause skin cancers, cataracts and immune system damage. Prevention: The rise in the number of cases of skin cancer over the past decades is strongly related to increased exposure to the sun during outdoor activities and to artificial sources of UV radiation such as sunlamps and tanning beds. Overexposure is also the underlying cause of harmful effects on the eyes and immune system. Adopting a few simple precautions can greatly reduce the risk of these health conditions: Limit time in the midday sun from 10 a.m. to 4 p.m., particularly on days when the UV index is high When UV rays are most intense and you must be outside, try to find shade and wear protective clothing, including a brimmed hat that provides sun protection for your head, face and neck.
translations.reference: A cikin mutane, Жҷari a haske UV na iya haifar da ciwon sankarar fata, amosanin ido da karya garkuwar jiki. Kariya: Жҷari a yawan masu kamuwa da cutar kansar fata a cikin gomman shekarun da suka gabata yana da alaЖҷa mai Жҷarfi da Жҷarin shiga rana yayin ayyukan waje da kuma hanyoyin samar da hasken UV da Й—an adam ya samar kamar fitilu masu haske kamar rana da gadajen sauya launin fata. Har ila yau, amfani da ya wuce gona da iri shi ne sanadin cutar da idanu da gaskuwar jiki. ЖҠaukar wasu 'yan matakan na kiyayewa na iya rage hatsarin kamuwa da illolin na lafiya: Iyakance lokaci shiga tsakar rana daga 10 na safe zuwa 4 na yamma, musamman a ranakun da ma'aunin UV ya yi sama Lokacin da hasken UV ya fi tsanani kuma dole sai ka fita waje, yi ЖҷoЖҷari ku nemo gilashin kare rana kuma ka sanya tufafin kariya, gami da hula mai malafa da za ta ba da kariya daga rana ga kai, fuska da wuyanka.

translations.source: Use a broad-spectrum sunscreen of at least 15 SPF вҖ“ ideally higherвҖ“ and reapply every 2 hours. Avoid sunlamps and tanning parlours, as they are known to damage the skin and eyes. ChildrenвҖҷs UV exposure should be carefully limited because they are in a dynamic state of growth and therefore more susceptible to environmental threats than adults. Many vital functions such as the immune system are not fully developed at birth, and unsafe environments may interfere with their normal development. WHO Response: WHO works with Member States and partners to increase public understanding of the effects of overexposure to ultraviolet radiation.
translations.reference: Yi amfani da man shiga rana na aЖҷalla ajin 15 SPF - ko wanda ya fi shi - kuma a sake shafa bayan duk awa 2. Gujewa amfani da fitilu masu haske irin na rana da wuraren sauya launin fata, domin an san suna lalata fata da idanu. A taЖҷaita shigar yara hasken UV saboda suna wani mataki mai muhimmanci na girma don haka sun fi manya saurin fuskantar matsala daga ababe masu hatsari a muhalli. GaЙ“oЙ“i masu muhimmanci, kamar garkuwar jikin Й—an adam ba su kammalu ba yayin da ake haihuwar mutum, don haka muhalli mara aminci na iya kawo cikas a ci gabansu kamar yadda ya dace. Martani daga Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya: Hukumar na aiki da Жҷasashen da ke ЖҷarЖҷashinta da kuma abokan hulЙ—arta don Жҷara wayar da kai game da hatsarin da ke tattare da yawan ta'ammali da haske ultraviolet radiation.
translations.hypothesis: РЎР°РәРҫ, ШіШ§ЩҶШҜШіЩғШұЩҠЩ… Ш°ЩҠ Ш·ЩҠЩҒ Ш№ШұЩҠШ¶, ШҙШ§ЩҠ 15 SPF вҖ“ ЩҲЩҠЩҒШ¶Щ„ ЩҠШ§ШІ, kuma ЩҠШәЩҠЩ‘Шұ ЩғЩ„ 2 ШіШ§Ш№. ЖҠaura da anaЖҷЖҷiya kuma wurin "tanning", saboda ana Жҷaunai cewa suna lalata daЙ—Й—in kuma mata. ЖҠauki da UV ya yi, ya yi a kan anaЖҷЖҷiya, saboda ana Жҷaunai cewa ana cikin wani mataki na Жҷara, kuma sabbin ana Жҷaunai cewa ana Жҷaunai da Жҷalubale daga muhimmiyar hanya, kamar na Жҷarfina. AnaЖҷЖҷiya, ana Жҷaunai cewa ana Жҷaunai cewa ana Жҷaunai da Жҷalubale daga muhimmiyar hanya, kamar na Жҷarfina. AnaЖҷЖҷiya, ana Жҷaunai cewa ana Жҷaunai cewa ana Жҷaunai da Жҷalubale daga muhimmiyar hanya, kamar na Жҷarfina. AnaЖҷЖҷiya, ana Жҷaunai cewa ana Жҷaunai cewa ana Жҷaunai da Жҷalubale daga muhimmiyar hanya, kamar na Жҷarfina. AnaЖҷЖҷiya, ana Жҷaunai cewa ana Жҷaunai cewa ana Жҷaunai da Жҷalubale daga muhimmiyar hanya, kamar na Жҷarfina.

translations.source: The INTERSUN Programme is a collaboration between WHO, the United Nations Environment Programme, the World Meteorological Organization, the International Agency on Cancer Research and the International Commission on Non-Ionizing Radiation Protection. It promotes and evaluates research on the health effects of UV radiation, and develops an appropriate response through guidelines, recommendations and information dissemination. The goals of the programme including providing practical and sound advice on the health and environmental impacts of UV exposure, to encourage countries to take action to reduce UV-induced health risks and to provide guidance to national authorities about sun awareness programmes. To this end, the programme collaborates with experts and specialist agencies to implement key research activities, identifies and quantifies health risks from UV radiation, develops reliable predictions of health and environmental consequences of changes in UV exposure with stratospheric ozone depletion, and develops practical ways of monitoring change in UV-induced health effects over time. The programme provides tools and guidelines related to the UV index, sun protection for children, artificial sunbeds, tourism and occupational health.
translations.reference: Shirin INTERSUN shiri ne na haЙ—in gwiwa tsakanin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya, Shirin Muhalli na Majalisar ЖҠinkin Duniya, Жҳungiyar Lura da Sararin Samaniya ta World Meteorological Organization, cibiyar binciken da ya shafi cutar sankara ta International Agency on Cancer Research da kuma hukumar International Commission on Non-Ionizing Radiation Protection. Yana Жҷarfafawa da tantance bincike a kan UV radiation ga lafiya, kuma yana samar da hanyoyin agaji da suka dace ta hanyar samar da jagora, shawarwari da yaЙ—a bayanai. Manufar shirin ta haЙ—a da bayar da shawarwari masu inganci kan illar da hasken UV ke da shi ga lafiya da muhalli, karfafa gwiwar Жҷasashe su Й—auki matakin rage illa ga lafiya da UV ke haifarwa da kuma samar da tsari ga mahukuntan Жҷasa game da shirye-shiryen wayar da kan hasken rana. Don cimma wannan manufar, shirin yana haЙ—a gwiwa da masana da Жҷwararrun hukumomi wajen aiwatar da muhimman ayyukan bincike, ganowa da Жҷididdige haЙ—arin UV radiation ga lafiya, samar da ingantaccen hasashe game da illar da ke tattare da canji a yawan ta'ammali da hasken UV ga lafiya da muhalli, da lalata sararin samaniya, da samar da hanyoyin da za a iya amfani da su wajen saka ido kan canje-canje masu tasiri kan lafiya da hasken UV ke haifarwa bayan tsawon lokaci. Shirin yana samar da kayan aiki da shawarwari da suka danganci ma'aunin UV, kariya daga hasken rana ga yara, gadaje masu fitar da haske irin na rana, yawon shaЖҷatawa da tabbatar da lafiya yayin gudanar aiki ko sana'a.
translations.hypothesis: "Programu na INTERSUN ЩҮЩҠ ШӘШ№Ш§ЩҲЩҶ ШЁЩҠЩҶ WHOШҢ Ш§Щ„ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ Щ„Щ„ШЁЩҠШҰШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш®ШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩғШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠШ© Щ„ШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШЁШӯШ« Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШіШұШ·Ш§ЩҶШҢ ЩҲШ§ШҰШӘЩ„Ш§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠ Щ„ШӯЩ…Ш§ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘШҙШ№Ш§Ш№ ШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӨЩҠЩҶ. Ш§Щ„ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ ЩҠШұЩҲШ¬ ЩҲЩҠЩӮЩҠЩ‘Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЁШӯШ« Ш№ЩҶ ШўШ«Ш§Шұ ШөШӯЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘШҙШ№Ш§Ш№ ЩҒЩҲЩӮ ШЁЩҶЩҒШіШ¬ЩҠШҢ ЩҲЩҠШҜЩҒШ№ ШҘЩ„Щү ШӘШ·ЩҲЩҠШұ Ш§ШіШӘШ¬Ш§ШЁШ© Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ШҘШұШҙШ§ШҜШ§ШӘШҢ ШӘЩҲШөЩҠШ§ШӘШҢ ЩҲЩҶШҙШұ Щ…Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩ…Ш§ШӘ. Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҮШҜШ§ЩҒ Ч©Чң Ш§Щ„ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ ШӘШҙЩ…Щ„ ШӘЩӮШҜЩҠЩ… Щ…ШҙЩҲШұШ© Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ© ЩҲЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ЩҠШ© ШЁШҙШЈЩҶ ШўШ«Ш§Шұ ШөШӯЩҠШ© ЩҲШЁЩҠШҰЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№ШұШ¶ Щ„Щ„ШҘШҙШ№Ш§Ш№ ЩҒЩҲЩӮ ШЁЩҶЩҒШіШ¬ЩҠШҢ ЩҲШ°Щ„Щғ Щ„ШӘШҙШ¬ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§ШӘШ®Ш§Ш° ШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎШ§ШӘ Щ„ШӘЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ„ Щ…Ш®Ш§Ш·Шұ ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§ШӘШ¬Ш© Ш№ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘШҙШ№Ш§Ш№ ЩҒЩҲЩӮ ШЁЩҶЩҒШіШ¬ЩҠШҢ ЩҲШӘЩӮШҜЩҠЩ… ШҘШұШҙШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„Ш·Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ·ЩҶЩҠШ© ШЁШҙШЈЩҶ ШЁШұШ§Щ…Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲШ№ЩҠШ© ШӯЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШҙЩ…Ші. Щ„ШәШұШ¶ Ш°Щ„ЩғШҢ Ш§Щ„ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ ЩҠШӘШ№Ш§ЩҲЩҶ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш®ШЁШұШ§ШЎ ЩҲЩҲЩғШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Щ…ШӘШ®ШөШөШ© Щ„ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ° Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶШҙШ·Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЁШӯШ«ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜ ЩҲЩӮЩҠШ§Ші Щ…Ш®Ш§Ш·Шұ ШөШӯЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘШҙШ№Ш§Ш№ ЩҒЩҲЩӮ ШЁЩҶЩҒШіШ¬ЩҠШҢ ЩҲШӘШ·ЩҲЩҠШұ ШӘЩҶШЁШӨШ§ШӘ Щ…ЩҲШ«ЩҲЩӮШ© ШЁШҙШЈЩҶ Ш№ЩҲШ§ЩӮШЁ ШөШӯЩҠШ© ЩҲШЁЩҠШҰЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШәЩҠШұШ§ШӘ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№ШұШ¶ Щ„Щ„ШҘШҙШ№Ш§Ш№ ЩҒЩҲЩӮ ШЁЩҶЩҒШіШ¬ЩҠ Щ…Ш№ Ш§ЩҶШ®ЩҒШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШІЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШәЩ„Ш§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҲЩҠШҢ ЩҲШӘШ·ЩҲЩҠШұ Ш·ШұЩӮ Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ…ШұШ§ЩӮШЁШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШәЩҠШұШ§ШӘ ЩҒЩҠ ШўШ«Ш§Шұ ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§ШӘШ¬Ш© Ш№ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘШҙШ№Ш§Ш№ ЩҒЩҲЩӮ ШЁЩҶЩҒШіШ¬ЩҠ ШЁЩ…ШұЩҲШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩӮШӘ. Ш§Щ„ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ ЩҠЩҲЩҒШұ ШЈШҜЩҲШ§ШӘ ЩҲШҘШұШҙШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ№Щ„ЩӮШ© ШЁЩ…ШӨШҙШұ Ш§Щ„ШҘШҙШ№Ш§Ш№ ЩҒЩҲЩӮ ШЁЩҶЩҒШіШ¬ЩҠШҢ ШӯЩ…Ш§ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҙЩ…Ші Щ„Щ„ШЈШ·ЩҒШ§Щ„ШҢ ШЈШіШұШ© Ш§Щ„ШҙЩ…Ші Ш§Щ„Ш§ШөШ·ЩҶШ§Ш№ЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠШ§ШӯШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҮЩҶЩҠШ©."

translations.source: Universal health coverage Overview: Universal health coverage (UHC) means that all people have access to the full range of quality health services they need, when and where they need them, without financial hardship. It covers the full continuum of essential health services, from health promotion to prevention, treatment, rehabilitation and palliative care. To deliver on this promise, countries need to have strong, efficient and equitable health systems that are rooted in the communities they serve. Primary health care (PHC) is the most effective and cost-efficient way to get there.
translations.reference: Gamammen tsarin kula da lafiya a faЙ—in duniya wato Universal Health Coverage TaЖҷaitaccen bayani: Universal Health Coverage (UHC) wato samar da gamammen tsarin kula da lafiya a faЙ—in duniya na nufin cewa kowanne mutum na da damar amfani da cikakku kuma ingantattun ayyukan lafiya da suke buЖҷata, a lokacin da suke buЖҷata kuma a wajen da suke buЖҷatarsu, ba tare da matsalar rashin kuЙ—i ba. Ya haЙ—a da cikakkun ayyukan lafiya na tilas, daga wayar da kai zuwa kariya, magance cuta, gyaran hali da kula da masu matsanantan cututtuka. Domin cika wannan alЖҷawarin, akwai buЖҷatar Жҷasashe su kasance suna da tsarin kiwon lafiya da yake da Жҷarfi, yake aiki kuma suke aiki ga kowa ba tare da wariya ba, masu tushe a cikin al'ummar da suke yi wa aiki. Kula da lafiya matakin farko ne hanya mafi aiki kuma mai arha wajen samar da wannan tsari na kiwon lafiya.
translations.hypothesis: ЩҶШёШұШ© Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘШәШ·ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„Ш©: ШӘШәШ·ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„Ш© (UHC) Щ„ШӘШ№ЩҶЩҠ ШЈЩҺЩҶ ЩғЩҸЩ„ Щ…ЩҺЩҶШҢ ЩҗШ№ЩҶШҜ ЩҗЩҲЩҗШӯШ§Ш¬Ш©ШҢ ЩҗЩҒЩҠ ШЈЩҠ Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҶШҢ ЩҗЩҠШіШӘШ·ЩҠШ№ ЩҗШ§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ЩҗШҘЩ„Щү ЩҗШ¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ЩҗШ®ШҜЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш°Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҲШҜШ©ШҢ ШҜЩҲЩҶ ЩҗШЈЩҠ ШөШ№ЩҲШЁШ§ШӘ Щ…Ш§ШҜЩҠШ©. ЩҗЩҮШ°Ш§ ЩҠШҙЩ…Щ„ ЩҗШ¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ЩҗШ®ШҜЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҗЩ…ЩҶ ЩҗШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ©ШҢ ЩҗШҘЩ„Щү ЩҗЩ…ЩҶШ№ШҢ ЩҗШ№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШҢ ЩҗШҘШ№Ш§ШҜШ© ШӘШЈЩҮЩҠЩ„ШҢ ЩҗЩҲ ЩҗШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© ЩҗШ§Щ„ШұШ§ШӯШ©. ЩҗЩ„ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ ЩҗЩҮШ°Ш§ШҢ ЩҗШҜЩҲЩ„ ЩҗЩҠШ¬ШЁ ЩҗШЈЩҶ ЩҗЩҠЩ…Щ„ЩғЩҲШ§ ШЈЩҶШёЩ…Ш© ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© ШөШӯЩҠШ© ЩӮЩҲЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҗЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„Ш©ШҢ ЩҗЩҲ ЩҗШ№Ш§ШҜЩ„Ш©ШҢ ЩҗШ§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҗШӘШіШӘЩҶШҜ ЩҗШҘЩ„Щү ЩҗШ§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№Ш§ШӘ ЩҗШ§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҗЩҠШ®ШҜЩ…ЩҲЩҮШ§. Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© (PHC) ЩҮЩҠ ЩҗШ§Щ„Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮШ© ЩҗШ§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© ЩҗЩҲ ЩҗШ§ЩӮШӘШөШ§ШҜЩҠ ЩҗЩ„ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ ЩҗЩҮШ°Ш§.

translations.source: Every country has a different path to achieving UHC and to decide what to cover based on the needs of their populations and the resources at hand. Investing in PHC ensures that all those needs are identified, prioritized and addressed in an integrated way; that there is a robust and equipped health and care workforce; and that all sectors of society contribute to confronting the environmental and socio-economic factors that affect health and well-being, including preparing for, responding to and recovering from emergencies. WHO response: As a foundation for UHC, WHO recommends reorienting health systems using a primary health care (PHC) approach. Achieving UHC is a WHO strategic priority, with the goal of 1 billion more people benefitting from universal health coverage by 2025. In countries with fragile health systems, we focus on technical assistance to build national institutions and service delivery to fill critical gaps in emergencies.
translations.reference: Kowace Жҷasa na da hanya ta daban ta cimma gamammen tsarin kula da lafiya su kuma yanke shawarar abin da za su yi ta la'akari da buЖҷatun al'ummarsu da kuma kayan aikin da suke da su. Sanya jari a Matakin Farko na Kula da Lafiya na tabbatar da cewa an gane dukkan waЙ—annan buЖҷatu, an ba su muhimmanci kuma an warware su ta hanyar da ta haЙ—a da kowane Й“angare; an samar da ma'aikatan lafiya wadatattu masu sanin makamar aiki; kuma dukkan Й“angarori a al'umma suna ba da gudummuwa wajen fuskantar Жҷalubalen muhalli da tattalin arziЖҷi da ke shafar lafiya da walwala, wanda ya haЙ—a da shirya wa, kai agaji da kuma farfaЙ—owa da buЖҷatun lafiya da kan taso cikin gaggawa. Martanin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya: A matsayin wani tushe na samar da Gamammen tsarin kula da lafiya (UHC) Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya na ba da shawarar sake saita tsare-tsaren kula da lafiya ta amfani da tsarin kula da lafiya a matakin farko (PHC). Tabbatar da samuwar gamammen tsarin kula da lafiya (UHC) shiri ne mai muhimmanci na Hukumar Kula da Lafiya ta duniya, da burin samun Жҷarin mutane biliyan 1 da za su ci moriyar tsarin kula da lafiya na duniya a shekarar 2025. A Жҷasashe masu tsarin kula da lafiya mai rauni, muna mayar da hankali kan samar da taimakon dabarun aiki don gina hukumomi na Жҷasa da ayyukan da za su cike muhimman gurabe a lokacin buЖҷatun gaggawa.
translations.hypothesis: ЩғЩ„ ШЁЩ„ШҜ Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҮ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮ Щ…ШӘЩ…ЩҠШІ Щ„ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ UHCШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШҜШұШ© Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜ Щ…Ш§ ЩҠШ¬ШЁ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШӘЩ… ШӘШәШ·ЩҠШӘЩҮ ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎЩӢ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӯШӘЩҠШ§Ш¬Ш§ШӘ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ШұШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ§ШӯШ© Щ„Щ„ШіЩғШ§ЩҶ. Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ«Щ…Ш§Шұ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„ЩҠШ© ЩҠШ¶Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҶ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӯШӘЩҠШ§Ш¬Ш§ШӘ ЩҠШӘЩ… ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜЩҮШ§ШҢ ЩҲШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜ ШЈЩҲЩ„ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘЩҮШ§ШҢ ЩҲЩ…Ш№Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШӘЩҮШ§ ШЁШ·ШұЩҠЩӮШ© Щ…ШӘЩғШ§Щ…Щ„Ш©Шӣ ШЈЩҶ ЩҮЩҶШ§Щғ ЩӮЩҲШ© Ш№Ш§Щ…Щ„Ш© ЩӮЩҲЩҠШ© ЩҲЩ…Ш¬ЩҮШІШ© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ©Шӣ ЩҲШЈЩҶ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ·Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№ ШӘШіШ§ЩҮЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҲШ§Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШҰЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ЩӮШӘШөШ§ШҜЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӨШ«Шұ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШұЩҒШ§ЩҮШҢ ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ¬Ш§ШЁШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШ№Ш§ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶ ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҲШ§ШұШҰ. ШұШҜ ЩҒШ№Щ„ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©: ШЁШөЩҒШӘЩҮШ§ ШЈШіШ§ШіЩӢШ§ Щ„ЩҖ UHCШҢ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ШӘЩҲШөЩҠ ШЁШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮШ© Ш№Щ…Щ„ ШЈЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© ШЁШ§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ЩҶЩҮШ¬ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„ЩҠШ© (PHC). ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ UHC ЩҮЩҲ ШЈЩҲЩ„ЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§ШіШӘШұШ§ШӘЩҠШ¬ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ Щ…Ш№ ЩҮШҜЩҒ ШӘЩҲЩҒЩҠШұ ЩҒЩҲШ§ШҰШҜ Щ„ЩҖ 1 Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ§Шұ ШҙШ®Шө ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ШӘШәШ·ЩҠШ© ШөШӯЩҠШ© ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„Ш© ШЁШӯЩ„ЩҲЩ„ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2025. ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҮШ§ ШЈЩҶШёЩ…Ш© ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш¶Ш№ЩҠЩҒШ©ШҢ ЩҶШұЩғШІ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§Ш№ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҠШ© Щ„ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎ Щ…ШӨШіШіШ§ШӘ ЩҲШ·ЩҶЩҠШ© ЩҲШӘЩӮШҜЩҠЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш®ШҜЩ…Ш§ШӘ Щ„Щ…Щ„ШЎ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ¬ЩҲШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШ§Щ…Ш© ЩҒЩҠ ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҲШ§ШұШҰ.

translations.source: In more robust health system settings, we drive public health impact towards health coverage for all through policy dialogue for the systems of the future and strategic support to improve performance. This work is supported by normative guidance and agreements; data, research and innovation; and leadership in the realms of diplomacy, advocacy, gender equality, health equity and human rights, multisectoral action, and finance. 2030 Agenda for SDGs WHOвҖҷs work is aligned with the Sustainable Development Goals (SDG) target 3.8, which focuses on achieving universal health coverage, including financial risk protection, access to quality essential health-care services and access to safe, effective, quality and affordable essential medicines and vaccines for all. Globally, progress towards universal health coverage is a challenge. Progress in service coverage has stalled while the proportion of the population facing catastrophic out-of-pocket health spending increases continuously.
translations.reference: A wuraren da ke da tsarin kula da lafiya tsayayye, muna Жҷarfafar samar da tasirin kula da lafiyar al'umma ta Й“angaren faЙ—aЙ—a aikin ga kowa ta hanyar samar da dokiki don samar da tsare-tsaren da za a ci moriya nan gaba da kuma ba da muhimmin tallafi wajen inganta aiki. Wannan aiki ana yinsa bisa bin tsarin aiwatarwa da aka saba da kuma yarjejeniyoyi; bayanai, bincike da ЖҷirЖҷira; da shugabanci a fagen diflomasiyya, wayar da kai, daidaiton jinsi, wadatar kula da lafiya da haЖҷЖҷoЖҷin al'umma, ayyukan da suka shafi Й“angarori da dama, da kuma hada-hadar kuЙ—i. Ajandar 2030 ta aikace-aikacen Hukumar Kula da Lafiya ta Duniya ta dace da Manufofin Ci gaba Mai ЖҠorewa (SDG'S) na 3.8 wanda yake mayar da hankali wajen samar da gamammen tsarin kula da lafiya a duniya, wanda ya haЙ—a da ba da kariya ga marasa Жҷarfin tattalin arziЖҷi, damar amfani da ingantattun ayyukan kula da lafiya da kuma damar amfani da magangunan da alluran rigakafi da ake buЖҷata masu aminci, da suke aiki, ingantattu kuma masu sauЖҷin saye ga kowa. A duniya bakiЙ—aya, ci gaba a fannin samar da gamammen tsarin kula da lafiya abu ne da ke fuskantar Жҷalubale. Ci gaba ta fannin adadin mutanen da ke amfana da ayyukan lafiya ya samu tsaiko yayin da adadin al'ummar da ke fuskantar mummunan kashe kuЙ—i don neman lafiya ke ci gaba da Жҷaruwa.
translations.hypothesis: ЩҒЩҗЩҠ Шҙughar framework na lafiyar, muna Жҷarfawa tasirin lafiyar ga duk wani, ta hanyar tattaunawa da kawo umarni don shugabanci na gaba, da kuma tallafin da ke taimakawa don inganta. Aikin na ana amfani da umarni, shuwari, bincike, kuma ЖҷirЖҷirar, da kuma shugabanci a fannin dafina, Жҷarfawa, haЙ—uwa, lafiyar, haЖҷЖҷin Й—an adam, aikin manyan Жҷungiyar, da kuma finansanci. "2030 Agenda for SDGs" Aikin WHO ya dogara da Babban Babban Gwanon (SDG) 3.8, wanda ke Жҷiyaye cimma lafiyar ga duk wani, gami da kare dafin, samun sararin lafiyar, da kuma samun dukiya da abin haske na lafiyar, da kuma abin haske, da kuma abin haske, da kuma abin haske, don duk wani. A duniya, cimma lafiyar ga duk wani yana da matsala. Ci gaba a samun sararin lafiyar yana ragu, yayin da Жҷimar jama'a da ke da matakan lafiyar na ci gaba.

translations.source: WHO monitors progress and publishes global reports to reveal the latest evidence every two years. See the reports here and visit the UHC fact sheet for more information.
translations.reference: Hukumar Lafiya ta duniya ta ci gaba da sa ido kan ci gaban tana kuma wallafa rahoto game da halin da duniya ke ciki don bayyana shaida mafi sabunta bayan duk shekara biyu. Duba rahotannin a nan kuma ka ziyarci shafin sahihin bayani game da Gamammen Tsarin Kula da lafiya (UHC) don Жҷarin bayani.
translations.hypothesis: ШіЩҸЩ„ (WHO) ЩҠШұШ§ЩӮШЁ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШҜЩ… ЩҲ ЩҠЩҲШІШ№ ШӘЩӮШ§ШұЩҠШұ Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Щ„ЩҠЩҸШёЩҮШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯШҜШ« ЩғЩ„ Ш№Ш§Щ…ЩҠЩҶ. translations.source: Urban health Overview: Urbanization is one of the leading global trends of the 21st century that has a significant impact on health. Over 55% of the worldвҖҷs population live in urban areas вҖ“ a proportion that is expected to increase to 68% by 2050. As most future urban growth will take place in developing countries, the world today has a unique opportunity to guide urbanization and other major urban development trends in a way that protects and promotes health. This is important, not least because the health and well-being of citizens is perhaps a cityвҖҷs most important asset.
translations.reference: Kula da lafiya a birane TaЖҷaitaccen bayani: FaЙ—aЙ—ar birani na Й—aya daga cikin ababen na kan gaba da ke tashe a duniya a Жҷarni na 21 wanda ke da tasiri sosai a kan lafiya. Sama sa kaso 55 da al'ummar duniya na rayuwa a birane - ana sa rai wannan adadin zai Жҷaru zuwa kaso 68 nan da 2050. Da yake faЙ—aЙ—a birane da zai zo nan gaba zai auku ne a Жҷasashe masu tasowa, duniyar a yau tana da wata dama ta musamman ta tsara yadda faЙ—aЙ—ar biranen za ta kasance da ma sauran manyan ababen da suka shafi ci gaban birane a wata hanya da za ta ba da kariya ta kuma Жҷarfafi kiwon lafiya. Wannan yana da muhimmanci, musamman da yake lafiya da walwalar al'umma na iya zama kadara mafi daraja ta kowanne birni.
translations.hypothesis: ЩҶШёШұШ© Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҶ: Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲШіШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҶ ЩҮЩҲ ШЈШӯШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШ¬Ш§ЩҮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШұЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ШҜЩҠ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№ШҙШұЩҠЩҶШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ Щ„ЩҮ ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ ЩғШЁЩҠШұ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ©. Щ…Ш§ ЩҠШІЩҠШҜ Ш№ЩҶ 55% Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ЩҠШ§ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ші ШӯЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… ЩҠШ№ЩҠШҙЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш·ЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ¶ШұЩҠШ© вҖ“ ЩҶШіШЁШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҠЩҸШӘЩҲЩӮШ№ ШЈЩҶ ШӘШІЩҠШҜ ШҘЩ„Щү 68% ШЁШӯЩ„ЩҲЩ„ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2050. ЩҲШЁЩ…Ш§ ШЈЩҶ Щ…Ш№ШёЩ… Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩ…ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Ш¶Шұ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҶ ШіЩҠШӯШҜШ« ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҒШҘЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ… Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҮ ЩҒШұШөШ© ЩҒШұЩҠШҜШ© Щ„ШҘШұШҙШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲШіШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҶ ЩҲШЈЩҠ Ш§ШӘШ¬Ш§ЩҮШ§ШӘ ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© ШЈШ®ШұЩү ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШ¶ШұЩҠШ© ШЁШ·ШұЩҠЩӮШ© ШӘШӯЩ…ЩҠ ЩҲШӘШ№ШІШІ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ©. ЩҮШ°Ш§ ШЈЩ…Шұ Щ…ЩҮЩ…ШҢ ЩҲШ®Ш§ШөШ© Щ„ШЈЩҶ ШөШӯШ© ЩҲШұЩҒШ§ЩҮЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§Ш·ЩҶЩҠЩҶ ЩӮШҜ ШӘЩғЩҲЩҶ ШЈЩҮЩ… ШЈШөЩ„ Щ„Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҠЩҶШ©.

translations.source: However, most of the 4.2 billion people living in cities suffer inadequate housing and transport, poor sanitation and waste management, and air quality that fails WHO guidelines. Other forms of pollution, such as noise, water and soil contamination, so-called urban heat islands, and a lack of space for walking, cycling and active living further combine to make cities epicentres of a noncommunicable disease epidemic and drivers of climate change. WHO Repository on Urban Health Impact: Around 40% of urban growth is in slums that lack safe water and sanitation, and 91% of people in urban areas breathe polluted air. When it comes to healthy diets, urbanization increases the distance from farm to fork, driving demand for unhealthy, processed foods.
translations.reference: Sai dai, da yawa daga cikin mutane biliyan 4.2 da ke rayuwa a birane na fama da matsalar Жҷarancin muhalli da hanyoyin sufuri, rashin tsaftar muhalli da sarrafa shara, da kuma ingancin iskar shaЖҷa wanda bai cika sharuЙ—Й—an da hukumar lafiya ta duniya ta bayar ba. Sauran nau'ukan gurЙ“atar yanayi, kamar su hayaniya, ruwa da guЙ“acewar Жҷasa, da wuraren da ake kira tsibiran zafi na birane, da rashin sarari don yin tafiyar Жҷafa, tuЖҷa keke da kuma rayuwa mai cike da kuzari sun haЙ—u sun sanya biranen zama cibiyar annobar cutukan da ba sa yaЙ—uwa da kuma haddasa sauyin yanayi. Ma'ajiyar Bayanai ta Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya game da Kiwon Lafiya a Birane Tasiri: Kusan kaso 40 na faЙ—aЙ—ar birane na faruwa ne a unguwannin talakawa da ba su da ruwa mai tsafta da tsaftar muhalli, kuma kaso 91 na mutanen da ke zaune a birane na shaЖҷar gurЙ“atacciyar iska. Idan ana batun abinci mai lafiya, faЙ—aЙ—ar birane na Жҷara nesanta mutane da gonaki wanda ke Жҷara Жҷarfafar buЖҷatar abincin da aka sarrafa wanda ba shi da kyau ga jiki.
translations.hypothesis: Щ„ЩғЩҶШҢ ШЈШәЩ„ШЁ 4.2 Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ§Шұ Шұ stanovnika cikin birran suna fuskantar Жҷasa Й“oye kuma ayyuka, Жҷasa da maЖҷaЙ—a, da Жҷalubale da ЖҷaЖҷara, da jikin hawan da ba ya amana da kaidai na WHO. ШіШ§Жҷa, Жҷasa da Жҷasa, da "birran da ke da zafi", da Жҷasa da ba ta da wuri don tafiya, da kuma ayyuka, duk suna da sauran, suna sa birran zama wajen shiga cikin cututtan da ba za a iya ganawa ba, da kuma sauran. Kaidai na WHO game da tasirin hawan birran: 40% na hawan birran yana a cikin Жҷasa Й“oye da ba da amana, kuma 91% na mutanen cikin birran sun yi amfani da hawan da ke da Жҷasa. Game da abin da za a kuma kuma, hawan birran yana Жҷara motsa daga farima zuwa Жҷasa, kuma yana sa sha'awa da abin da ba ya amana.

translations.source: Urban dwellers are also highly vulnerable to the effects of climate change because of their dependence on fossil fuels for transport, cooking and heating. Cities account for over two thirds of the worldвҖҷs energy and emit 60% of greenhouse gases, and those inland may experience temperatures 3вҖ“5Вә C higher than surrounding rural areas because of their large expanses of concrete and limited open green spaces. All of this puts urban dwellersвҖҷ health at risk. Most the top 10 causes of death are closely related to rapid and unplanned urbanization, and poor urban design and planning. Cities face the triple health burden of infectious diseases like HIV/AIDS, tuberculosis, pneumonia, dengue and diarrhoea;
translations.reference: Mazauna birane suna cikin hatsarin fuskantar abubuwan da sauyin yanayi ke haifar wa saboda sun dogara da makamashi mai Жҷonewa wajen sufuri, girki da Й—umama gidaje. Birane ne ke da alhakin samar fiye da kaso biyu bisa uku na makamashi a duniya kuma suke fitar da kaso 60 na gurЙ“atacciyar iskar gas, kuma waЙ—anda ke birane na iya fuskantar yanayin da ya fi na Жҷauyukan da ke kewaye da su tsauri da digiri 3-5 saboda yaЙ—uwar gine-gine da Жҷarancin buЙ—aЙ—Й—un wurare masu bishiyoyi. Dukkan waЙ—annan na saka mazauna birane cikin hatsari ta fuskar lafiya. Yawancin sabubban mutuwa na kan gaba guda 10 na da alaЖҷa ta kusa da faЙ—aЙ—ar birane cikin sauri kuma ba bisa tsari ba, da kuma tsarawa da shirya birane ba yadda ya kamata ba. Biranen suna fuskantar ninki uku na hatsarin yaЙ—uwar cututtuka kamar HIV/AIDS, tarin fuka, limoniya, zazzaЙ“in dengue da gudawa;

translations.source: noncommunicable diseases like heart disease, stroke, asthma, cancer, diabetes and depression; and violence and injuries, including road traffic injuries. WHO response: Despite their challenges, cities can create opportunities for better health, cleaner environments and climate action. Strong urban policies must prioritize health, as it is essential for fostering good urban livelihoods, building a productive workforce, creating resilient and vibrant communities, enabling mobility, promoting social interaction and protecting vulnerable populations. WHOвҖҷs approach to urban health focuses on better air quality, water and sanitation, and other environmental determinants; healthy urban planning; healthier and smoke-free environments; safe and healthy mobility; preventing violence and injuries; promoting healthy food systems and diets; environmental management of vector-borne diseases; and urban preparedness for emergencies.
translations.reference: da cututtuka marasa yaЙ—uwa kamar cututtukan zuciya, bugun jini, asma, kansa, ciwon sukari da damuwa; da kuma tashin hankali da raunuka, ciki har da rauni da hatsarin ababen hawa. Martani daga Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya: Duk da Жҷalubalen da suke fuskanta, biranen na iya samar da damammaki don ingantacciyar lafiya, tsabtataccen muhalli da ayyukan da suka shafi inganta yanayi. Dole ne dokoki masu Жҷarfi na birane su ba da fifiko kan kiwon lafiya, saboda tana da mahimmanci wajen samar da rayuwa mai kyau a birane, samar da ma'aikata masu Жҷwazo, samar da al'ummomin masu juriya da karsashi, ba da damar tafiye-tafiye, haЙ“aka hulЙ—ar zamantakewa da kare al'umma masu rauni. Tsarin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya game da lafiyar birane ya mayar da hankali kan samun ingantacciyar iska, ruwa da muhalli mai tsafta, da sauran abubuwan da ke tabbatar da muhalli; lafiyayyen tsarin birane; muhalli mai cike da Жҷoshin lafiya kuma mara hayaЖҷi; tafiye-tafiye cikin aminci da lafiya; hana aukuwar tashin hankali da raunuka; goyon bayan ingantaccen tsarin samar da abinci; kula da muhalli ta fannin sa ido kan cututtukan da Жҷwari masu shan jini ke yaЙ—awa; da kuma shirya birane wajen fuskantar buЖҷatun gaggawa.

translations.source: Working across sectors and ensuring the coherence of policies across different areas is key to creating supportive and enabling environments for health, which ensures that health and equity considerations are integrated throughout the planning process, investments and policy decisions at the local level. To help Member States address the above priorities, WHO works to strengthen the evidence base to help policy-makers make informed decisions when addressing health risks. It provides tools and guidance on what works, and supports monitoring of key health-related indicators. WHO leads and engages in fostering city-to-city exchanges and helps develop institutional and policy frameworks for good urban governance for health and well-being in cities.
translations.reference: Yin aiki a sassa daban-daban da kuma tabbatar da haЙ—in kai na manufofi a wurare daban-daban na da muhimmanci wajen samar da muhalli mai cike goyon baya da kuma samar da kyakkyawan yanayi don kiwon lafiya, wanda ke tabbatar da cewa an yi la'akari da lafiya da adalci a wajen tsarawa, zuba jari da yanke shawara a matakin gida. Don taimakawa Жҷasashen da ke ЖҷarЖҷashinta su magance waЙ—annan abubuwa masu muhimmanci da ke sama, Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya tana aiki don Жҷarfafa tabbataccen tsari mai tushe don taimakawa mahukunta su yanke shawara cike da ilimi yayin magance matsalolin lafiya. Yana ba da kayan aiki da ba da shawara kan abin da ke aiki, kuma yana goyan bayan sa ido kan muhimman alamun da ke da alaЖҷa da lafiya. Hukumar lafiya ta duniya ta jagoranci da Й—abbaЖҷa tsarin inganta mu'amala tsakanin birni-da-birni da kuma taimakawa wajen samar da cibiyoyi da tsare-tsaren aiwatarwa don kyakkyawan shugabanci don lafiya da walwala a birane.

translations.source: Violence against children Overview: Violence against children includes all forms of violence against people under 18 years old. For infants and younger children, violence mainly involves child maltreatment (i.e. physical, sexual and emotional abuse and neglect) at the hands of parents and other authority figures. Boys and girls are at equal risk of physical and emotional abuse and neglect, and girls are at greater risk of sexual abuse. As children reach adolescence, peer violence and intimate partner violence, in addition to child maltreatment, become highly prevalent.
translations.reference: Cin zarafin yara TaЖҷaitaccen bayani: Cin zarafin yara ya Жҷunshi duk wani nau'i na cin zarafi da ake yi wa mutane 'yan Жҷasa da shekara 18. Ga jarirai da Жҷananan yara, yawanci cin zarafi na Жҷunsar musgunawa yara (watau cin zarafi da ya shafi duka a jiki, lalata da rashin kulawa) daga iyaye da sauran masu iko. Yara maza da mata na fuskantar barazana iri Й—aya ta cin zarafi na zahiri da sauya tunani, da rashin kula, kuma yara mata sun fi fuskantar barazanar cin zarafi da ya shafi lalata. Yayin da yara ke kaiwa matakin samartaka, cin zarafi tsakanin tsararraki da abokan hulЙ—a na kusa, Жҷari a kan cin zarafin yara na Жҷara yaЙ—uwa sosai.

translations.source: Violence against children can be prevented. Preventing and responding to violence against children requires that efforts systematically address risk and protective factors at all four interrelated levels of risk (individual, relationship, community, society). May 2016 World Health Assembly resolution endorsed the first ever WHO Global plan of action on strengthening the role of the health system within a national multisectoral response to address interpersonal violence, in particular against women and girls, and against children. A According to this plan, WHO in collaboration with Member States and other partners, is committed to: Monitoring the global magnitude and characteristics of violence against children and supporting country efforts to document and measure such violence. Maintaining an electronic information system that summarizes the scientific data on the burden, risk factors and consequences of violence against children, and the evidence for its preventability.
translations.reference: Ana iya hana aukuwar cin zarafin yara. Kariya da kuma lura da cin zarafin yara na buЖҷatar wani tsararren yunЖҷurin duba zuwa ga dalilan da ke haddasa hatsarin fuskantar cin zarafi da hanyoyin kariya a dukkan matakan fuskantar barazanar guda huЙ—u masu alaЖҷa da juna ( Й—aiЙ—aikun mutane, mutane masu alaЖҷa da juna, unguwanni da al'umma). A Mayun 2016, yarjejeniyar Majalisar Lafiya ta Duniya ta amince da shirn Hukumar Lafiya ta duniya da za a aiwatar a faЙ—in Duniya a karo na farko wand azai Жҷarfafi matsayin Й“angaren lafiya a wani yanki na ceto da ya Жҷunshi Й“angarori da dama wajen magance cin zarafi tsakanin mutane makusanta, musamman kan manyan mata da Жҷanana, da kuma yara. A bisa wannan shirin, Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya tare da haЙ—in gwiwar Жҷasashen da ke ЖҷarЖҷashinta da sauran abokan hulЙ—a, sun jajirce wajen: Kula tsananin matsalar cin zarafin yara a duniya, da salon cin zarafin yara da kuma tallafawa ЖҷoЖҷarin Жҷasa wajen tattarawa da auna irin wannan cin zarafin. Samar da tsarin samun bayanai ta na'ura wanda zai taЖҷaice bayanan kimiyya game da nauyi, dalilan shiga hatsari da sakamakon cin zarafin yara, da kuma shaidar yiwuwar kare aukuwar sa.

translations.source: Developing and disseminating evidence-based technical guidance documents, norms and standards for preventing and responding to violence against children. Regularly publishing global status reports on country efforts to address violence against children through national policies and action plans, laws, prevention programmes and response services. Supporting countries and partners in implementing evidence-based prevention and response strategies, such as those included in INSPIRE: Seven strategies for ending violence against children. Collaborating with international agencies and organizations to reduce and eliminate violence against children globally, through initiatives such as the Global Partnership to End Violence against Children, the Global Partnership to End Violence against Children,
translations.reference: Samarwa da yaЙ—a takardun da ke nuna daburu, al'adu da matakan ba da kariya da ceto yara daga cin zarafi. Wallafa rahoton halin da ake ciki a duniya akai-akai game da ЖҷoЖҷarin Жҷasa wajen magance cin zarafin yara ta hanyar manufofin Жҷasa da tsare-tsaren ayyuka, dokoki, shirye-shiryen ba da kariya da ayyuka ceto. Ba da goyon baya ga Жҷasashe da abokan hulЙ—a wajen aiwatar da dabarun kariya da ba da agaji kan lokaci da ke da shaidar aiki, kamar waЙ—anda ke cikin INSPIRE: Dabaru bakwai na kawo Жҷarshen cin zarafin yara Жҷanana. Akwai buЖҷatar haЙ—a kai da cibiyoyi da Жҷungiyoyi na Жҷasa da Жҷasa wajen ragewa da kawo Жҷarshen Й—abiвҖҷar gallaza wa yara a faЙ—in duniya ta hanyar shirye-shirye kamar na Global Partnership to End Violence against Children, da HaЙ—akar ta Duniya don YaЖҷi da Cutar da Yara,

translations.source: Together for Girls and the Violence Prevention Alliance. Child maltreatment Child maltreatment is the abuse and neglect that occurs to children under 18 years of age. It includes all types of physical and/or emotional ill-treatment, sexual abuse, neglect, negligence and commercial or other exploitation, which results in actual or potential harm to the childвҖҷs health, survival, development or dignity in the context of a relationship of responsibility, trust or power. Exposure to intimate partner violence is also sometimes included as a form of child maltreatment.
translations.reference: Жҳarfafar shirin mutane don bada kulawa kan afkuwar ibtilaвҖҷi. Cin zarafin yara Cin zarafin yaro shi ne Й—abiвҖҷar cuzgunawa ko nuna halin koвҖҷin-kula da yara da ke Жҷasa da shekaru 18 ke fuskanta. Da kan Жҷunshi duk wani nauвҖҷi na cuzgunawa na fili ko na baЙ—ili da haike wa yara da watsi da su da rashin nuna kulawa da saryar da su ko cin moriyarsu wanda hakan Жҷarara ka iya zama cutarwa ga lafiyar yara, baraza ga rayuwarsu, cigabansu ko mutuncinsu a wani Й“angare da ya shafi watsi da alhakin kula da su ko amana. Ana kuma alamta gallazawa ta sako a wasu lokutan a matsayin nauвҖҷi na cin zarafin yara.
translations.hypothesis: "Together for Girls" Ч•ЩҖ "Alliance don ganannen karya". Karya ga yar, Karya ga yar yana kuma yana kashe da ba da kiyayya ga masu zaman sha da Жҷwa. Hakan ya haЙ—a da duk nau'o na karya, kamar karya jiki, karya damara, karya sha'awa, ba da kiyayya, ba da kiyayya, kuma karya kasuwanci ko nau'ikan sauran, wanda ya haifar da lalasa ko wata wata ga lafiyyar, rayuwa, haЖҷuri ko kiyayya ga yar, a yanayin alaЖҷa da tanggunganci, aminci ko iko. Ganin karya daga shugabanci kuma a wasu lokata ana Й—aukar shi ne kamar nau'o na karya ga yar.

translations.source: Child maltreatment has enormous immediate and long-term repercussions. Beyond death, physical injury and disability, violence can lead to stress that impairs brain development and damages the nervous and immune systems. This in turn is associated with delayed cognitive development, poor school performance and dropout, mental health problems, suicide attempts, increased health-risk behaviours, revictimization and the perpetration of violence. The good news is that child maltreatment can be prevented through interventions that support parents and caregivers, promote non-violent norms and values, provide education and life skills training, strengthen familiesвҖҷ income and economic security, offer high quality response and support services, create and sustain safe environments for children, and implement and enforce laws against child maltreatment. WHO, in collaboration with a number of partners:

A sakamakon hakan, akan samu raunin hazaЖҷar kwakwalwa da rashin ЖҷoЖҷari a makaranta da rashin zuwa makarantar da larurorin kwakwalwa da yunЖҷurin kashe-kai, da samun Й—alibiвҖҷu da ka iya shafar lafiya da fargabar sake shiga mawuyacin hali da cigaba gallazawa. Labari mai daЙ—i shi ne, za a iya magance matsalar gallaza wa yara ta hanyoyin tallafa wa iyaye da masu kula da 'ya'ya da ke goyon bayan tsarin rayuwa da samar da ilimi da dabarun tafi da rayuwa da bunЖҷasa tattalin arziЖҷin iyali da tabbataccen abin yi da samar da tsarin kai Й—auki da ayyuka na taimako da tabbatar da ingantaccen muhalli ga yara da tabbatar da dokoki da suka shafi yaЖҷi da gallaza wa yara. translations.source: It includes a range of acts from bullying and physical fighting, to more severe sexual and physical assault to homicide. Youth violence dramatically increases health, welfare and criminal justice costs; reduces productivity; and generally undermines the fabric of society. Beyond deaths, injuries and psychological harm, youth violence can lead to increased health risk behaviours such as smoking, substance abuse, unsafe sex, and further violence. These in turn are associated with chronic respiratory diseases, cancer, cardiovascular diseases, diabetes, early pregnancy and sexually transmitted diseases. Effective prevention and response strategies include those that promote parenting and early childhood development;
translations.reference: Ta shafi abubuwa kamar na cuzgunawa da yin faЙ—a da haikewa da dukan kawo wuka da kisa-kai. Baya ga rasa rai da raunuka da shafar nutsuwa, gallazawa tsakanin matasa na iya haifar da Й—abiвҖҷun da kan illata lafiya kamar na shan taba da shan kayan maye da saduwa mai cutarwa da sauransu nauвҖҷika na damuwa. A sakamakon hakan, a kan gamu da cutattukan numfashi masu tsanani da cutar daji da cutattuka da kan shafi zuciya da jijiyoyi da cutar siga da Й—aukar juna biyu a Жҷananan shekaru da kamuwa da cutattuka da ke yaЙ—uwa ta saduwa. Hanya mafi tasiri wajen kariya da dabarun kai Й—auki sun haЙ—a da hanyoyin da suka Жҷunshi Й—abbaЖҷa tsarin rainon вҖҳyaвҖҷya da bunЖҷasa yara tun a farkon matakin yarinta.;

translations.reference: Magance cuzgunawa a makarantu da na wuraren neman ilimi da ruyuwa da shirye-shirye na koyar da dabarun bunЖҷasa kai; Bin hanyoyin na waraka ga waЙ—anda halin da suke ciki ya taвҖҷazzara da bin tsari na magance matsalar a mataki na alвҖҷumma kmar rage yawan damar samu da wuce gona-da-iri wajen taвҖҷammali da giya, da bindigu da wuraren masu sa fargaba da amfani da tsarin nemo mafita ga matsaloli da bunЖҷasa birane da daЖҷile bazuwar talauci. translations.source: Violence against women Overview: Violence against women вҖ“ particularly intimate partner violence and sexual violence вҖ“ is a major public and clinical health problem and a violation of women's human rights. It is rooted in and perpetuates gender inequalities.Globally 1 in 3 women experience physical and/or sexual violence in their lifetime, mostly by an intimate partner. This is a stark reminder of the scale of gender inequality and discrimination against women. The United Nations defines violence against women as "any act of gender-based violence that results in, or is likely to result in, physical, sexual, or mental harm or suffering to women, including threats of such acts, coercion or arbitrary deprivation of liberty, whether occurring in public or in private life.
translations.reference: Cin zarafin mata A dunЖҷule: Cin zarafin mata - musamman cin zarafi daga abokin zama da kuma cin zarafi ta fuskar saduwa - Й—aya ne daga cikin Жҷalubale da suke shafar harkar lafiya da kuma keta вҖҳyancin bilвҖҷAdama da ya danganci haЖҷЖҷin mata. Tushensa da faruwar hakan na da nasaba da rashin daidaito na jinsi. A duniya bakiЙ—aya, 1 cikin 3 na mata sukan fuskanci cin zarafi ko haikewa a rayuwarsu, musammman daga mafi kusanci da su. Wannan muhimmin tunatarwa ne game da irin girman rashin daidaito na jinsi da nuna bambanci ga mata. Majalisar ЖҠinkin Duniya ta bayyana cin zarafin mata da cewa; вҖңduk wani abu da za aikata da ya shafi kallon jinsi a siga ta cin zarafi da ke haifar ko ka iya kai wa ga shafar mutum a fili, ko ta saduwa ko sosa rai ko shiga mawuyacin halli da kuma ya haЙ—a har da barazanar aikata waЙ—annan abubuwa ko tilastawa ko tauye вҖҳyancin walwala ko a bayyanar jamaвҖҷa ko a keЙ“e.

translations.source: Intimate partner violence refers to behaviour by an intimate partner or ex-partner that causes physical, sexual or psychological harm, including physical aggression, sexual coercion, psychological abuse and controlling behaviours. Sexual violence is "any sexual act, attempt to obtain a sexual act, or other act directed against a personвҖҷs sexuality using coercion, by any person regardless of their relationship to the victim, in any setting. It includes rape, defined as the physically forced or otherwise coerced penetration of the vulva or anus with a penis, other body part or object." Impact: Violence against women is a global problem of pandemic proportions. It causes devastating, harm to womenвҖҷs lives and that of their children.
translations.reference: Cin zarafi daga abokin zama wata Й—abiвҖҷa ce da abokin zama ko wanda aka rabu ke yi da ka iya shafar nutsuwa ta zahiri ko ta baЙ—ini ko ta saduwa da kan Жҷunshi yin faЙ—a a fili ko tilasta saduwa ko haifar da fargaba da bibiyar rayuwar mutum. Cin zarafi na jimaвҖҷi вҖңwani yunЖҷuri ne na biyan buЖҷata ko bin wasu hanyoyi da suka danganci haka ta hanyar amfani da Жҷarfin tuwo daga kowanne mutum ko mai kuwa kusancinsa da wanda abin ya shafa a kowanne irin yanayi. Wannan ya haЙ—a da: fyaЙ—e wanda aka ayyana a matsayin amfani da Жҷarfi a fili wajen shiga budurci ta gaba ko ta baya ta amfani da azzakari ko wani abu daban. Tasiri: Cin zarafin mata matsala ce a duniya bakiЙ—aya da ya zama ruwan dare. Yana haifar da mummanan illa ga rayuwar mata da ta вҖҳyaвҖҷyansu.
translations.hypothesis: ШәШ§ШІШ§ЩҠ cikin ШҜШ§Шұ, ШіЩҠШ§ЩӮ, ШЈЩҲ ШіЩҠШ§ЩӮ ШіШ§ШЁЩӮШ©, Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШіШЁШЁ Ш¶ШұШұ, ШіЩҲШ§ШЎ ЩғШ§ЩҶ Ш¬ШіШҜЩҠ, Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠ, ШЈЩҲ Ш№Ш§Ш·ЩҒЩҠ, ШЁШ¶Щ… ЩҮШ¬ЩҲЩ…, Ш¶ШәШ· Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠ, ШіЩҲШЎ Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш№Ш§Ш·ЩҒЩҠ, ЩҲ ШіЩҠШ§ЩӮ. ШәШ§ШІШ§ЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠ ЩҮЩҲ "ШЈЩҠ Ш№Щ…Щ„ Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠ, Щ…ШӯШ§ЩҲЩ„Ш© Щ„Щ„ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш№Щ…Щ„ Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠ, ШЈЩҲ ШЈЩҠ Ш№Щ…Щ„ ШўШ®Шұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҮ Ш¶ШҜ ШӯЩҠШ§Ш© Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠШ©, ШЁШ§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш¶ШәШ·, Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҠ ШҙШ®Шө, ШЁШәШ¶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШёШұ Ш№ЩҶ Ш№Щ„Ш§ЩӮШӘЩҮ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш¶ШӯЩҠШ©, ЩҒЩҠ ШЈЩҠ Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҶ. ШЁШ¶Щ… Ш§ШәШӘШөШ§ШЁ, Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠЩҸШ№ШұЩ‘ЩҒ ШЁШЈЩҶЩҮ ЩӮШіШұЩҠ ШЈЩҲ ШәЩҠШұ ЩӮШіШұЩҠ ШҜШ®ЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Щ…ЩҶШ·ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш¬Ш§ЩҶ ШЈЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҲЩ„ЩҲЩҶ, ШЁШ§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ¶ЩҠШЁ, ШЈЩҲ ШЈЩҠ Ш¬ШІШЎ ШўШ®Шұ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШіЩ…, ШЈЩҲ ШЈЩҠ ШҙЩҠШЎ ШўШ®Шұ." Ш§Щ„ШЈШ«Шұ: ШәШ§ШІШ§ЩҠ Ш¶Ш§Шұ, ЩҮЩҲ Щ…ШҙЩғЩ„Ш© Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©, Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШІШҜШ§ШҜ ШЁШіШұШ№Ш©. ЩҠШіШЁШЁ Ш¶ШұШұ, ЩҲ ЩҠШӨШ«Шұ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӯЩҠШ§Ш©, ЩҲ ШӯЩҠШ§Ш© ШЈШ·ЩҒШ§Щ„.

translations.source: It also hurts the economic and social health of their families, communities, and countries. While some women are more at risk than others, violence can happen to any woman, in any country вҖ“ regardless of culture, religion or economic status. Gender inequality including harmful gender norms are key drivers of violence against women. Violence can negatively affect womenвҖҷs physical, mental, sexual, and reproductive health. It is associated with increased risk of injuries, depression, anxiety disorders, unplanned pregnancies, sexually transmitted infections, HIV and many other health problems.
translations.reference: Haka kuma yana shafar tattalin arziЖҷi da lafiyar iyali da alвҖҷumma da ma Жҷasashen da ake samun hakan. Kodayake da wasu matan sun fi wasu fuskantar wannan barazana, sai dai cin zarafi abu ne da kowacce mace na iya fuskanta a kowacce Жҷasa ba tare da laвҖҷakari da alвҖҷada ko addini ko yanayin tattalin arziЖҷi ba. Rashin daidaito na jinsi da wasu alвҖҷadu game da jinsi su ne musabbabin cin zarafin mata. Cin zarafi kan iya illata mata a zahiri ko a baЙ—ili ko fuskar saduwa ko lafiyar mahaifarsu. Ana alaЖҷanta hakan da Жҷaruwar ciwuka na fili da cutar damuwa da larura ta yawan fargaba da samun juna biyu da kamuwa da cututtuka masu yaЙ—uwa da HIV da sauran matsaloli na lafiya.

translations.source: Children who grow up in families where there is violence may suffer a range of behavioural and emotional disturbances. These can lead to mental and development problems and also be associated with perpetrating or experiencing violence later in life. WHO response: WHO plays a key role in bringing attention to and responding to violenceagainst women as a public health and gender equality issue through: Research and evidence-building to highlight the magnitude of violence against women, its risk factors and consequences, and to identify effective interventions for prevention and response. Developing guidelines and tools, setting norms and standards for an effective health response to violence against women.
translations.reference: Yaran da suka taso a gidajen da ake fuskantar cin zarafi kan gamu da matsaloli da kan shafi Й—abiвҖҷarsu. Wannan kan shafi tsarin bunЖҷasa tunani da kuma ke tasiri wajen fuskanta ko aikata cin zarafin a rayuwar mutum. Matakin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya: Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen jan hankali ga abin da ya shafi cin zarafin mata a matsayin lamari da ya shafi lafiya da rashin daidaito na jinsi ta hanyar: Bincike da tattara hujjoji wajen nuna girman matsalar cin zarafin mata da illolinta da sakamakonta da kuma zaЖҷulo sahihan hanyoyin kai Й—auki domin hana afkuwar hakan da tallafawa. Samar da tsari na cigaba da ЖҷirЖҷirar dokoki da cimma matsaya ingantacciya wajen duba lafiyar matan da suka fuskanci cin zarafi.

translations.source: Strengthening country capacity of health systems and providers to prevent and respond to violence against women. Encouraging leadership in health systems and building political will to address violence against women through advocacy and partnerships. The WHO 13th General Programme of Work (GPW) includes violence against women as part of its contribution to Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) 5 on gender equality and womenвҖҷs empowerment (specifically, SDG 5.2 on the elimination of violence against women and girls). At the World Health Assembly in May 2016, Member States endorsed a global plan of action on strengthening the role of the health systems in addressing interpersonal violence, in particular against women and girls and against children.
translations.reference: Inganta tsarin kiwon lafiya na Жҷasa wajen magance da tallafa wa batun cin zarafin mata. Жҳarfafa wa shugabanni guiwa ta fuskar tsarin kiwon lafiya da Жҷarfafa musu wajen Й—aukar matakai na wayar da kai da haЙ—in guiwa game da matsalar cin zarafin mata. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta sanya cin zarafin mata a cikin Kudin Muradan Ayyukanta karo 13 (GPW) a matsayin wani Й“angare na Manufofin Samar da Cigaba Mai ЖҠorewa (SDG) na batu kan daidaiton jinsi da tallafa wa mata (musamman, SDG 5.2, kawo Жҷarshen cin zarafin mata da yara mata) A yayin Taron Жҳoli Hukumar Lafiya na Duniya da aka yi a watan Mayun 2016, mambobin hukumar sun nunaA yayin Taron Жҳoli Hukumar Lafiya na Duniya da aka yi a watan Mayun 2016, mambobin hukumar sun nuna goyon bayansu ga matakin inganta kiwon lafiya wajen magance cin zarafi na tsakanin mutane musamman ga mata da yara mata da Жҷananan yara.

translations.source: Wildfires Overview: Wildfires are increasing around the globe in frequency, severity and duration, heightening the need to understand the health effects of wildfire exposure. The risk of wildfires grows in extremely dry conditions, such as drought, heat waves and during high winds.Wildfire smoke is a mixture of hazardous air pollutants, such PM2.5, NO2, ozone, aromatic hydrocarbons, or lead. In addition to contaminating the air with toxic pollutants, wildfires also simultaneously impact the climate by releasing large quantities of carbon dioxide and other greenhouse gases into the atmosphere. With climate change leading to warmer temperatures and drier conditions and the increasing urbanization of rural areas, the fire season is starting earlier and ending later.
translations.reference: Gobarar daji TaЖҷaitaccen bayani: yawan Жҷaruwar afkuwar gobarar daji abu ne da ke nuni da buЖҷatar fahimtar Жҷalubale na lafiya da wutar daji ke da shi ga waЙ—anda ya ritsa da su. Illar wutar daji na Жҷaruwa matuЖҷa a wuri da ke Жҷamfar ruwa kamar inda ake da Жҷarancin ruwan sama da tsananin zafi da iska mai Жҷarfi. HayaЖҷin wutar daji na Й—auke da sinadai masu guba da ke gurЙ“ata iska kamar PM2.5 da ozone da hydrocarbon ko lead. Sannan, game da batun gurЙ“ata iska da sinadarai masu guba, gobarar daji a lokaci guda na shafar sauyin yanayi ta hanyar fitar da iska ga sararin samaniya a matsayin hayaЖҷin da ke Й—auke da kabon-dai-oksida da sauran nau'ikan iska da ke cuЙ—anya da zafi. La'akari da sauyin yanayi da ke kan gaba wajen Й—umama yanayi da yanayi bushewar wuri da Жҷaruwar Й—abi'ar mai da Жҷauyuka birane, akwai yuwuwar gobarar na iya fara ruruwa da wuri da kuma Й—aukar lokaci mai Й—an tsawo.

translations.source: Wildfire events are getting more extreme in terms of acres burned, duration and intensity, and they can disrupt transportation, communications, water supply, and power and gas services. Impact: Wildfires that burn near populated areas can have significant impact on the environment, property, livestock and human mortality and morbidity depending on the size, speed and proximity to the fire, and whether the population has advanced warning to evacuate. Wildfire smoke is a mixture of air pollutants of which particulate matter (PM) is the principal public health threat. PM2.5 from wildfire smoke is associated with premature deaths in the general population, and can cause and exacerbate diseases of the lungs, heart, brain/nervous system, skin, gut, kidney, eyes, nose and liver. It has also been shown to lead to cognitive impairment and memory loss.
translations.reference: afkuwar gobarar daji na cikgaba da tsananta ta hanyar Жҷone kadada mai yawa da irin lokaci da Жҷarfin da gobarar ke da shi wanda tana iya kawo cikas ga harkokin sufuri da sadarwa da samar da ruwan sha da samar da makamashi da iskar gas. Tasiri: gobarar daji da ke Жҷone wurare masu cukowar al'umma zai iya shafar muhalli da dukiya da dabbobi da Й—abi'u da kamuwa da cutattuka duk da ya danganta da girman wurin da sauri da kusanci da gobarar da kuma yuwuwar samun gargaЙ—i na barin wurin da abin ka iya faruwa. hayaЖҷin gobarar daji haЙ—e yake da batun gurЙ“ata iska wanda ya sanya ta Й—aya daga cikin lura a fannin lafiyar al'umma. ana alaЖҷanta mutuwar fuju'a ta mutane da sinadarai masu girman PM2.5 da ake samu a cikin iskar gobarar daji wanda kuma ke taЙ“arЙ“ara cutattukan da suka shafi hunhu da na zuciya da tsarin zubin ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa da jijiyoyi da fata da hanji da Жҷoda da idanu da hanci da hanta. sannan bincike ya tabbatar da cewa takan iya shafar sashen tunanin abin da aka saba yi na ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa da mantuwa.

Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШөЩ„ШЁШ© (PM2.5) Щ…ЩҶ ШҜШ®Ш§ЩҶ ШӯШұШ§ШҰЩӮ ШәШ§ШЁШ§ШӘ Щ…ШұШӘШЁШ·Ш© Щ…Ш№ ЩҲЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Щ…ШЁЩғШұШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§ШіШҢ ЩҲЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ШӘШіШЁШЁ ЩҲШӘЩҒШ§ЩӮЩ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩ„ШЁШҢ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩ…Ш§Шә/ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШөШ§ШЁШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш¬Щ„ШҜШҢ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…Ш№Ш§ШЎШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩ„ЩүШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҠЩҶШҢ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶЩҒШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩғШЁШҜ. translations.source: Firefighters and emergency response workers are also greatly impacted by injuries, burns and smoke inhalation, particularly at high concentrations. More interdisciplinary research is warranted to understand the latent and long-term health effects of wildfire exposure on vulnerable populations (children, older people, pregnant people, chronically ill people), particularly for geographic areas enduring repeated and cyclical exposure to these wildп¬Ғre events. WHO Response: The magnitude of the physical and human costs from wildfires can be reduced if adequate emergency prevention, preparedness, response and recovery measures are implemented in a sustainable and timely manner. Working with Member States, WHO helps to build resilient and proactive health systems that can anticipate the needs and challenges during emergencies, so that we can be more likely to reduce risks and respond effectively when needed. WHO works with partners in preparing, preventing, detecting, responding and recovering from emergencies and disasters, including environmental exposures, such asimplementing early warning systems and issuing health and air quality advisories;
translations.reference: Masu kashe gobarar dajin da jami'an kai Й—auki na gamuwa da raunuka da shaЖҷar iska da yawa. bincike a fannoni daban-daban ya nuna irin tasirin na dogon lokaci da gobarar daji ke da shi ga lafiyar masu fama da ita (yara da tsofaffi da masu juna biyu da masu fama da cuta mai tsanani) musamman a wurare da ake yawan samun afkuwar gobarar daji akai-akai. Matakin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya: za a iya rage yadda gobarar daji ke shafar al'umma idan aka samar da wadatattun hanyoyin magance ta da gaggawa da zaman ko-ta-kwana da tabbatar da matakan kai Й—auki a kan lokaci ba tare da wata gazawa ba. Yin aiki tare da Жҷasashen mambobin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya wajen taimaka musu su samar da tabbataccen tsarin kiwon lafiya da zai uta fuskantar Жҷalubale na gaggawa da ka iya tasowa ta yadda za a iya rage haЙ—ari da kai dauki a lokacin da ya dace. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya na yin aiki da masu haЙ—in guiwa wajen shiryawa da magancewa da ganowa da farfaЙ—owa daga yanayi na gaggawa ko annoba, har ma da jan hankalin al'umman da ke fuskantar barazanar gobarar ta hanyar gargaЙ—insu a kan lokaci da ba shawarwari na kiwon lafiya da na ingancin matsayin iskar da ake shaЖҷa.;

translations.source: Women's health Overview: Being a man or a woman has a significant impact on health, as a result of both biological and gender-related differences. The health of women and girls is of particular concern because, in many societies, they are disadvantaged by discrimination rooted in sociocultural factors. For example, women and girls face increased vulnerability to HIV/AIDS. Some of the sociocultural factors that prevent women and girls to benefit from quality health services and attaining the best possible level of health include:
translations.reference: Kiwon lafiyar mata TaЖҷaitaccen bayani: kasancewa namiji ko mace abu ne mai muhimmanci ga batun lafiya saboda irin bambance-bambance da ke samu na halitta. Lafiyar mata da Жҷananan yara mata na da muhimmanci domin a wasu al'ummatan sukan rasa gata saboda bambanci da ke da alaЖҷa da al'ada ta rayuwar yau da kullum.
