translations.source: unequal power relationships between men and women; social norms that decrease education and paid employment opportunities; an exclusive focus on womenвҖҷs reproductive roles; and potential or actual experience of physical, sexual and emotional violence. While poverty is an important barrier to positive health outcomes for both men and women, poverty tends to yield a higher burden on women and girlsвҖҷ health due to, for example, feeding practices (malnutrition) and use of unsafe cooking fuels (COPD).
translations.reference: bambancin iko da ke akwai tsakanin maza da mata; Tsarin zamantakewa da ke daЖҷile ilimi da batun damarmaki na aikin da za a biya mutum; Ba wa Й“angaren batun rawar mata wajen haihuwa muhimmanci; da da kuma fuskantar cin zarafi na sarari ko na fannin saduwa ko na imoshan. Duk da talauci na taka rawa wajen kawo cikas ga samun ingantaccen kiwon lafiya ga maza da mata; mata da Жҷananan yara mata sun fi fuskantar Жҷalubalen talauci, ga misali Й“angaren cin abinci (rashin wadataccen abinci) da amfani da abin girki masu illa (COPD).
translations.hypothesis: Ш№ШҜЩ… Ч©Ч•Ч•ЧҷЧ•Чҹ Ч‘ а°¶аІ•аіҚаІӨаІҝ Ч‘etiti mata da maza; Жҷyamar al'ada da ke Жҷara Жҷalubala damar koyo da aiki; Жҷyattara ga muhimmin rukunin mata; da yadda ake sha kiba, sha, da kuma sha. Sai da rashin da shi yana Жҷalubalewa ga nasara ga mata da maza, rashin da shi yana Жҷara Жҷalubalewa ga lafiyar mata da mata, saboda misali, hanyoyin da ake amfani da shi (rashin abinci) da amfani da abubuwa da ba su da aminci (COPD).

translations.source: Yaws (Endemic treponematoses) Overview: Yaws is a chronic skin infection characterized by papillomas (noncancerous lumps) and ulcers. It is caused by the bacterium Treponema pallidum subspecies pertenue, which belongs to the same group of bacteria that causes venereal syphilis. Yaws primarily affects children aged under 15 years who live in poor communities in warm, humid and tropical forested areas of Africa, Asia, Latin America and the Pacific islands. The majority of affected populations live rural areas, far from health services.
translations.reference: cutar fata (Endemic treponematoses) TaЖҷaitaccen bayani: cutar fata ta Yaws cutar fata ce mai tsananin gaske da ke da yanayi na kumburi da gyambo (ciwo). Bakteriyar da ake kira Treponema Pallidum ce ke haifar da wannan cutar fata wacce aka sanya ta cikin kashin baktariyar da ke haifar da sifilis da ake samu ta hanyar saduwa. cutar fata ta Yaws ta fi shafar yara 'yan Жҷasa da shekaru 15 da ke rayuwa cikin talauci a wuri mai yanayin zafi a yankin Afirka da Asiya da Latin America da tsibirin Fasifik. Mafi yawan waЙ—anda ke kamuwa da cutar na rayuwa ne a Жҷauyuka da ke da nisa da wuraren kiwon lafiya.
translations.hypothesis: ЩҶШёШұШ© Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү ЩҠШ§ЩҲШі (Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§ШұЩҠ): ЩҠШ§ЩҲШі ЩҮЩҲ ШҜШ§ШЎ Ш¬Щ„ШҜЩҠ Щ…ШІЩ…ЩҶШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШёЩҮШұ Щ…Ш№ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ "ШЁЩӮШ№" (ШЁЩӮШ№ ШәЩҠШұ ШіШұШ·Ш§ЩҶЩҠ) ЩҲ "Ш¬ШұЩҲШӯ". ЩҠШіШЁШЁ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶ ШЁЩғШӘЩҠШұЩҠШ§ "Treponema pallidum"ШҢ ШіЩ„Ш§Щ„Ш© "pertenue"ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩҶШӘЩ…ЩҠ ШҘЩ„Щү ЩҶЩҒШі Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© Щ…ЩҶ ШЁЩғШӘЩҠШұЩҠШ§ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШіШЁШЁ "sexually transmitted syphilis". ЩҠШ§ЩҲШі ЩҠШӘШ§Ш«ЩҠШұ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ Ш®Ш§Шө Ш№Щ„Щү ШЈШ·ЩҒШ§Щ„ ШЁЩҠШ§Ш№ЩҶ 15ШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ЩҠШ№ЩҠШҙЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№Ш§ШӘ ЩҒЩӮЩҠШұШ©ШҢ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш·ЩӮ ШӯШ§ШұШ©ШҢ ШұШ·ШЁШ©ШҢ ЩҲ ШәШ§ШЁШ§ШӘ Ш§ШіШӘЩҲШ§ШҰЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ ЩӮШ§ШұШ© РҗС„СҖРёРәР°ШҢ ШўШіЩҠШ§ШҢ ШЈЩ…ШұЩҠЩғШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠЩҶЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲ Ш¬ШІШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯЩҠШ· Ш§Щ„ЩҮШ§ШҜШҰ. ШЈШәЩ„ШЁ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҠШӘШ§Ш«ЩҠШұШҢ ЩҠШ№ЩҠШҙЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш·ЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШұЩҠЩҒЩҠШ©ШҢ ШЁШ№ЩҠШҜЩӢШ§ Ш№ЩҶ Ш®ШҜЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©.

translations.source: Poverty, low socio-economic conditions and poor personal hygiene facilitate the spread of yaws. Although there are over 80 000 cases of yaws each year, experts believe the disease can be controlled and ultimately eradicated for several reasons. First, it only occurs in humans, not animals, making control much easier. It is also easy to treat with readily available drugs and has already been eliminated in some countries, including India. The remaining pockets of yaws infection, although usually in remote places, means further spread is less likely with proper surveillance and control measures.
translations.reference: Talauci da yanayi na rashin abin hannu da rashin tsabta ne ke taimakawa wajen yaЙ—uwar cutar fata ta Yaws. duk da akwai rahotanni 80000 na kamuwa da cutar fata ta Yaws a duk shekara, masana sun yi amanna cewa za a iya magance cutar da ma kawar da ita saboda da dalilai masu yawa. Da farko dai ana samun cutar ne a cikin bil'Adama ba dabba ba wanda ke nuna sauЖҷin magance cutar. Za a iya magance cutar cikin sauЖҷi ta hanyar amfani da magunguna da tuni akwai su kamar yadda aka yi nasarar kawar da cutar a wasu Жҷasashe kamar Indiya. Wasu 'yan Жҷalilan da ke da cutar na zaune a keЙ“antattun wurare wanda hakan ke nuna sauЖҷin daЖҷile yaЙ—uwarta idana aka yi amfani da matakai na bibiya da kulawa.

translations.source: Symptoms: There are two stages of yaws infection. The early stage is when the patient is infectious and can spread the disease to others. In this stage, a papule (a noncancerous, outward-growing lump) develops at the site of infection. This papule is full of the organisms and may persist for 3вҖ“6 months followed by natural healing. Without treatment, this is followed by disseminated skin lesions over the body.
translations.reference: Alamomin kamuwa: Akwai matakai biyu na kwamuwa da cutar fata ta Yaws. mataki na farko shi ne matakin da mai larurar ke Й—auke da cutar kuma zai iya yaЙ—awa ga sauran mutane. a wannan mataki a kan samu Й“ullowar Жҷurji (wanda bai shafi kansa ba da ke Й“ullowa kamar Жҷurji) wanda ke fara girma da zarar mutum ya kamu da shi. Жҷurjin yana dauke da Жҷwayar cutar da kuma kan Й—auki watanni 3-6 ana maganinsa. Idan kuma ba a Й—auki mataki na magani ba, yana cigaba da yaЙ—uwa ne a kan fatar zuwa sauran sassan jiki.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶: ЩҠaws yana da ШҜЩҲ Щ…ШұШӯЩ„Ш©. Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШӯЩ„Ш©а№ҒаёЈаёҒ, Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұЩҠШ¶ yana masu zaЙ“a kumaаёӘаёІаёЎаёІаёЈаё–а№ҒаёһаёЈа№Ҳа№ӮаёЈаё„аёӯаё·а№Ҳаёҷ. ШіШ§, ЩҠШёЩҮШұ "papule" (ШЁШӨШұ ШәЩҠШұ ШіШұШ·Ш§ЩҶЩҠ, ШӘШІШ§ЩҠШҜ Ш®Ш§ШұШ¬ЩҠ) ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҲЩӮШ№ Ш§Щ„ШҘШөШ§ШЁШ©. wannan papule yana Ш¬Щ„ШЁ, ЩҲ ЩӮШҜ ЩҠШіШӘЩ…Шұ Щ„Щ…ШҜШ© 3-6 ШЈШҙЩҮШұ, ШЁШ№ШҜ Ш°Щ„Щғ, ЩҠШҙЩҒЩү ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ Ш·ШЁЩҠШ№ЩҠ. ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬, wannan ЩҠШӘШЁШ№ЩҮ, ШёЩҮЩҲШұ Ш¬ШұЩҲШӯ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш¬Щ„ШҜ ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ШЈШ¬ШІШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШіЩ….

translations.source: Bone pain and bone lesions may also occur. The second stage is noninfectious and typically appears five years after infection. It is characterized by disabling consequences of the nose, bones and palmar/plantar hyperkeratosis (thickening). After a field diagnosis based on these symptoms, the disease can be confirmed by examining a sample from a skin legion under a special type of microscope (darkfield examination). Blood tests are not typically used because yaws is closely related to the bacterium that causes syphilis and the two diseases will show the same result.
translations.reference: ana iya fara jin raЙ—aЙ—i daga cikin Жҷashi da musayar lafiyayyen Жҷashi da wani. mataki na biyu shi ne matakin da cutar ba za ta iya yaЙ—uwa ba wanda hakan na faruwa ne kusan shekaru biyar da kamuwa da cutar. ana iya fayyace cutar da Жҷandarewar hanci da Жҷashi da tafin hannu/dunduniya (kaurara). bayan nazarin alamomin cutar, za a iya tabbatar da cutar ne kawai idan aka haska fatar da wata nau'in nau'irar ganin ЖҷwaЖҷwaf ta musamman (darkfield examination). ba cika amfani da gwajin jini ba saboda cutar fata ta yaws na da alaЖҷa da bakteriyar da ke haifar da cutar sifilis, don haka sakamako Й—aya za a samu na cututtukan biyu.
translations.hypothesis: ЩҲШ¬Ш№ Ш№ШёШ§Щ… ЩҲ Ш№ЩҲШ§ШұШ¶ Ш№ШёШ§Щ… likewise ШІai iya faruwa. Ш§Щ„ШЁШ§, wannan matsala ba ta da lalala kuma ta faru 5 shehu bayan lalala. Ta da dalilai da ke shafar cikin, Ш№ШёШ§Щ…, da kuma hyperkeratosis (kashe) na karkanda/karkanda. bayan gwada a wurin da ana amfani da irin wannan dalilai, matsala za a iya tabbatar da ita ta hanyar gwada misalin daga karkanda ta amfani da nau'in mikroskop na musamman (gwada cikin). gwada kananan jini ba za a amfani da ita ba, saboda wannan matsala ta da alaЖҷa da bacil da ke sabbin syphilis, kuma biyu na matsala za su bawa matsuwa.

translations.source: Treatment: There is currently no vaccine for yaws. Health education and improved personal hygiene are the most important tactics for prevention. Two antibiotics can be used to treat yaws. A single oral dose of azithromycin (30 mg/kg, maximum 2 g) is the recommended treatment. Benzathine penicillin (single intramuscular dose) at 0.6 million units (children aged under 10 years) and 1.2 million units (people aged over 10 years) can be used for patients with suspected clinical treatment failure after azithromycin, or patients who cannot be treated with azithromycin.
translations.reference: Magani: A yanzu ba babu wata rigakafi ta cutar fata ta yaws. Ilimantarwa da inganta tsabtar jiki su ne muhimman dabarun da ake amfani da su na kariya. ana iya amfani da nau'o'in antibayotik guda biyu wajen maganin cutar fata ta yaws. an yi ba da shawarar amfani da maganin sha na azithromycin (30 mg/kg, maximum 2 g). za a iya amfani da maganin Benzathine penicillin (ta hanyar allura sau Й—aya) a kan waon 0.6 (ga yara 'yan Жҷasa da shekaru 10) da awon 1.2 (ga yara 'yan sama da shekaru 10) ga marasa lafiya da ake zargin gazawar maganin da aka Й—ora su a kai bayan azithromycin ko marasa lafiyar da laurarsu ta fi Жҷarfin azithromycin.
translations.hypothesis: Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬: Щ„Ш§ ШӘЩҲШ¬ШҜ Щ„ЩӮШ§Шӯ Щ„ЩҖ "yaws" (Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶) Щ…ШӘШ§Шӯ ШӯШ§Щ„ЩҠЩӢШ§. Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШұЩҠШі Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШёШ§ЩҒШ© Ш§Щ„ШҙШ®ШөЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШ¶Щ„ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ ШЈЩҮЩ… ЩҲШіЩҠЩ„Ш© Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ№. Щ„Ш§ less, bi sabon Жҷasa za a iya amfani da su don Й—aukar "yaws". ШҜЩҲШІЩҠ Й—aya na azithromycin (30 mg/kg, mafiya 2 g) shineЖҠan yadda da ake ba da abin da ake amfani da shi. Benzathine penicillin (Й—aya Жҷasa da Жҷasa) a 0.6 million units (mutanen da Жҷware 10 shehu) kuma 1.2 million units (mutanen da Жҷware 10 shehu) za a iya amfani da su don mutane da ana shаҰҫаҰүda cewa ana da Й“usar daЙ—a bayan amfani da azithromycin, ko mutane da ba za a iya Й—aukar azithromycin ba.

translations.source: This treatment will result in complete clinical healing in 95% of cases but patients should be re-examined 4 weeks after receiving the antibiotics. A review of the historic documents from 1950s shows that over 90 countries and territories were endemic for yaws. Only 14 out of the 90 countries and territories have recent data on yaws based on the routine surveillance system; however, these figures may just be an indication of the presence of the disease and not its full extent. Ghana, Papua New Guinea and the Solomon Islands report over 10 000 cases per year. Ecuador and India appear to have interrupted transmission.
translations.reference: wannan mataki na magani sai warkar kashi 95% na masu cutar, sai dai akwai buЖҷatar sake duba su bayan mako 4 da karЙ“ar antibiyotik Й—in. wani bincike ya nuna bayanan da suka gabata daga 1950 cewa Жҷasashe 90 da yankuna suna fama da cutar fata ta yaws. kuma 14 cikin 90 na Жҷasashen ne ke da bayanan na kusa-kusa a kan cutar fata ta yaws idan aka yi la'akari da tsarin bibiyar cutar, duk da cewa waЙ—annan al'Жҷaluma ka iya zama manuniya ce ta wanzuwar wannan cutar, sai dai an rage mata Жҷarfi. Жҳasashen Ghana da Papua New Guineada Tsibirin Solomon sun tabbatar da cewa suna samun sama masu cutar 10000 a kowacce shekara. Жҳasashen Ecuado da India sun yi nasarar daЖҷile yaЙ—uwar cutar.
translations.hypothesis: wannan hanya za ta kai zuwa ganowa na kabila a 95% na rassarun, amma masu kasuwa dole ne su karanta shiga 4 kwanne bayan su karanta masu halaka. Binciken da ya yi da takunkinin 1950 ya nuna cewa sama da 90 kasashe da yanken suna da yaws. Ba 14 daga cikin 90 kasashe da yanken da ke da labarin yaws da ya kasance, kamar yadda ana yi a shirin nazarin; amma, waЙ—annan ayyuka kawai na nuna cewa za a samu wannan kasarra, kuma ba ya da kwaya. Ghana, Papua New Guinea, da Yankin Solomon sun rikodan sama da 10,000 rassarun a shekara. Ecuador da India suna nuna cewa za a dakatar da rassar.

translations.source: Yellow fever Overview: Yellow fever is a viral disease that is transmitted to humans by the bites of infected mosquitoes. It is prone to epidemics and is preventable with a vaccine. These day-biting mosquitoes breed around houses (domestic), in forests or jungles (wild), or in both habitats (semi-domestic). Yellow fever is a high-impact, high-threat disease, with a risk of international spread, representing a potential threat to global health security.
translations.reference: ZazzaЙ“in masassara ko shawara TaЖҷaitaccen bayani: zazzaЙ“in masassara ko shawara cuta ce da 'yan Adam ke kamuwa da ita ta hanayr ciwon sauri. akwai yuwuwar yaЙ—uwarsa kuma ana iya magance ta ta hanyar rigakafi. waЙ—annan sauraye da ke cizo na iya hayayyafa a kusa da muhallan mutane (domestic) da dazuka (wild) da kuma duka muhallan biyu (semi-domestic). masassara ko shawara zazzaЙ“i ne mai tasiri kuma cuta mai illar gaske da ke da yuwuwar yaЙ—uwa a duniya wanda ake kallo a matsayin barazana ga kiwon lafiya a duniya.

translations.source: There are 3 types of transmission cycles: Sylvatic (or jungle) yellow fever spreads when monkeys are bitten by wild mosquitoes that pass the virus on to other monkeys and humans. Intermediate yellow fever spreads when semi-domestic mosquitoes infect both monkeys and people. This is the most common type of outbreak in Africa. Urban yellow fever can cause large epidemics when infected people introduce the virus into heavily populated areas with high mosquito density and where people have little immunity. Occasionally, infected travellers have exported cases to countries that are free of yellow fever.
translations.reference: akwai hanyoyi 3 na hanyoyin yaЙ—uwar cutar: Sylvatic; cutar na yaЙ—uwa ne ta hanyar ciwon da sauraye ke yi wa birrai wanda daga nan ne suke yaЙ—a wa sauran birrai da mutane. zazzaЙ“in masassara ko shawara tsakanin halittu biyu na yaЙ—uwa ne a lokacin da sauraye suka harbi birrai da mutane. wannan nau'i ne na cuta ake yawan samun Й“arkewarsa a yankin Afirka. ZazzaЙ“in masassara na iya yaЙ—uwa a birane idan mutanen da suka harbu tare da yaЙ—a ta a wuraren da ke da yawan sauraye a kuma muhallin da mutane ke da Жҷarancin kariya daga cutar. a wasu lokutan matafiya ne yaЙ—a wannan zazzaЙ“i na masassara a Жҷasashen da ba su da ita.
translations.hypothesis: "Exists 3 ЧЎЧ•Ч’ЩҠ СҶРёРәР»РҫРІ Р·Р°СҖР°Р·: Sylvatic (ШЈЩҲ ШәШ§ШЁШ©) - ШҜШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲШ§Щғ ЩҠШ§ЩҶШӘШҙШұ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§ ЩӮШұШҜЩҲЩҶ ЩҠЩҸШӯШҙШұЩҲЩҶ Щ„ЩҲЩ… Щ„ЩҲЩ… ШәШ§ШЁШ© Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ ЩҠЩҲШөЩ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі ШҘЩ„Щү ЩӮШұШҜЩҲЩҶ ЩҲ ШЁШ§ШҙЩҶ. Intermediate yellow fever ЩҠШ§ЩҶШӘШҙШұ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§ Щ„ЩҲЩ… Щ„ЩҲЩ… ЩҶШөЩҒ-Щ…ЩҶШІЩ„ЩҠ ЩҠЩ„ЩҲШ« ЩӮШұШҜЩҲЩҶ ЩҲ ШЁШ§ШҙЩҶ. wannan shine Ш§Щ„ШіЧ•Ч’ЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ ШҙЩҠЩҲШ№ Щ„ЩҖ "ЩҲШЁШ§ШЎ" ЩҒЩҠ ШЈЩҒШұЩҠЩӮЩҠШ§. Urban yellow fever ЩҠШіШЁШЁ "ЩҲШЁШ§ШЎ" Щ„Ш§ШұЩҮ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§ ШЁШ§ШҙЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„ЩҲШ«ЩҠЩҶ ЩҠЩҸШҜШ®ЩҗЩ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі ШҘЩ„Щү Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш·ЩӮ Щ…ШЈЩҮЩҲЩ„Ш© ШЁШҙШҜШ© Щ…Ш№ ЩғШ«Ш§ЩҒШ© Щ„ЩҲЩ… Щ„ЩҲЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ©ШҢ ШӯЩҠШ« ШЁШ§ШҙЩҶ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠЩ…ШӘЩ„ЩғЩҲЩҶ Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш№Ш©. ШЈШӯЩҠШ§ЩҶШ§ЩӢШҢ ШЁШ§ШҙЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„ЩҲШ«ЩҠЩҶ ЩӮШҜ ЩҶЩӮЩ„ЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ ШҘЩ„Щү ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠЩҲШ¬ШҜ ЩҒЩҠЩҮШ§ ШҜШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲШ§Щғ.

translations.source: However, the disease can only spread easily to a new country if there are mosquito species able to transmit it, specific climatic conditions, and the animal reservoir needed to maintain it. Symptoms: Yellow fever can present with a wide range of symptoms and severity. Once contracted, the yellow fever virus incubates in the body for 3вҖ“6 days. Many people do not experience symptoms, but when these do occur, the most common are fever, muscle pain with prominent backache, headache, loss of appetite, and nausea or vomiting. In most cases, symptoms disappear after 3вҖ“4 days.
translations.reference: kodayake, Жҷwayar cutar na yaЙ—uwa cikin sauЖҷi ne a Жҷasashen da ke da nau'in wannan sauro wanda ke iya yaЙ—a cutar, ko wani yanayi da kuma yawan dabbobin da ke iya ajiye Жҷwayar cutar. Alamomin kamuwa da cutar: zazzaЙ“in masassara na da alamomin mabambanta. da zarar mutum ya kamu, Жҷwayar cutar na ЖҷyanЖҷyashewa a jikinsa ne tsakanin kwanaki 3-6. Wasu mutane ba za sa jin alamun kamuwa, amma idan hakan ta faru, mafi yawan alamun da mutum ke ji shi ne zazzaЙ“i, zugi tare da ciwon baya da ciwon kai da rashin son cin abinci da jin hararwa ko yin amai. A mafi yawancin lokuta akan nemi alamun zazzaЙ“in a rasa bayan kwanaki 3-4.
translations.hypothesis: Щ„ЩғЩҶ, ШіЩҠЩ…ШұШ¶ ЩҠШіЩҮЩ„ Ш§ЩҶШӘШҙШ§ШұЩҮ ШҘЩ„Щү ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜШ© ШҘШ°Ш§ ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҮЩҶШ§Щғ ШЈЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ ШЁЩҲЩғЩҠШі ЩӮШ§ШҜШұШ© Ш№Щ„Щү ЩҶЩӮЩ„ЩҮ, ШёШұЩҲЩҒ Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш®ЩҠШ© Щ…ШӯШҜШҜШ©, ЩҲ Щ…ШөШҜШұ ШӯЩҠЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШІЩ… Щ„ЩҠШӯШ§ЩҒШё Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮ. Щ„аҙ•аөҚаҙ·аҙЈ: ШҜШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲЩ„ЩҠШұШ§ (Yellow fever) ЩҠШёЩҮШұ Щ…Ш№ Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© Щ…ШӘЩҶЩҲШ№Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ ЩҲ ШҙШҜШ©. ШЁШ№ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШҘШөШ§ШЁШ©, ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲЩ„ЩҠШұШ§ ЩҠЩҶЩ…ЩҲ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШіЩ… Щ„Щ…ШҜШ© 3-6 ШЈЩҠШ§Щ…. Ш§Щ„Ш№ШҜЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Щ„Ш§ ЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҲЩҶ ШЈЩҠ ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶, Щ„ЩғЩҶ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§ ШӘШёЩҮШұ, Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ ШҙЩҠЩҲШ№Ш§ЩӢ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ ШӯЩ…Щү, ШЈЩ„Щ… Ш№Ш¶Щ„Ш§ШӘ Щ…Ш№ ШЈЩ„Щ… ШёЩҮШұШҢ ШөШҜШ§Ш№ШҢ ЩҒЩӮШҜШ§ЩҶ ШҙЩҮЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲ ШәШ«ЩҠШ§ЩҶ ШЈЩҲ ЩӮЩҠШЎ. ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш№ШёЩ… Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ, Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ ШӘШ®ШӘЩҒЩҠ ШЁШ№ШҜ 3-4 ШЈЩҠШ§Щ….

translations.source: A small percentage of patients enter a second, more toxic phase within 24 hours of recovering from initial symptoms. High fever returns and several body systems are affected, usually the liver and kidneys. In this phase, people are likely to develop jaundice (yellowing of the skin and eyes, hence the name yellow fever), dark urine, and abdominal pain with vomiting. Bleeding can occur from the mouth, nose, eyes, or stomach. Half of these patients die within 7вҖ“10 days.Yellow fever is difficult to diagnose, especially during the early stages.
translations.reference: wasu daga cikin marasa lafiya suna shiga mataki na biyu kuma mafi haЙ—ari bayan awanni 24 daga daina jin alamomin farko. ZazzaЙ“i mai zafi na dawowa da kuma ke shafar sassan jiki da dama kamar hanta da Жҷodoji. A wannan mataki, akwai yuwuwar mutane su fuskanci sauyin launi a wani sashe na jiki (sauyawar launin fata da Жҷwayar idanu zuwa launin rawaya wanda hakan ya sa ake kiran cutar da 'yellow fever') da bawali mai launin baЖҷi da ciwon ciki da hararwa. Ana iya samun zubar jini daga baki da hanci da idanu ko ciki. Rabin waЙ—annan marasa lafiya sun mutu a cikin kwananki 7-10.cutar zazzaЙ“in yana da wuyar ganewa,musamman a lokacin farkon matakan.

ЩҒЩҠ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШӯЩ„Ш©ШҢ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩ…Щ„ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШёЩҮШұ Щ„ЩҲЩҶ ШөЩҒШ§Шұ (Ш§ШөЩҒШұШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„Ш¬Щ„ШҜ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№ЩҠЩҶШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШіШЁШЁ ЩҠШіЩ…Щү "ЩҲЩҮЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈШөЩҒШұ")ШҢ ШЁЩҲЩ„ ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶШҢ ЩҲШЈЩ„Щ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·ЩҶ Щ…Ш№ ЩӮЩҠШЎ. ЩӮШҜ ЩҠШӯШҜШ« ЩҶШІЩҠЩҒ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩ…ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶЩҒШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҠЩҶШҢ ШЈЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·ЩҶ. Ш§Щ„ЩҶШөЩҒ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҮШӨЩ„Ш§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶Щү ЩҠЩ…ЩҲШӘЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШәШ¶ЩҲЩҶ 7-10 ШЈЩҠШ§Щ…. "ЩҲЩҮЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈШөЩҒШұ" ШөШ№ШЁШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШҙШ®ЩҠШөШҢ Ш®Ш§ШөШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ§ШӯЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШЁЩғШұШ©.

translations.source: More severe cases can be confused with severe malaria, leptospirosis, viral hepatitis (especially fulminant forms), other haemorrhagic fevers, infection with other flaviviruses (such as dengue haemorrhagic fever) and poisoning. Polymerase chain reaction (PCR) testing in blood and urine can sometimes detect the virus in early stages of the disease. In later stages, testing to identify antibodies is needed (IgM). Treatment: Yellow fever infections can cause serious illness and can be fatal in severe cases. Early supportive treatment in hospitals improves survival rates.
translations.reference: Za'a iya rikitar da lamura masu tsanani tare da matsanancin zazzabin cizon sauro, leptospirosis, hepatitis na kwayar cuta (musamman nau'ikan fulminant), sauran zazzabi na haemorrhagic, kamuwa da wasu flaviviruses (kamar zazzabin haemorrhagic na dengue) da guba. Gwajin polymerase{PCR} a cikin jini da fitsari wani lokaci na gano Жҷwayar cutar a farkon matakan cutar. A cikin matakai na gaba, ana buЖҷatar gwaji don gano Жҷwayoyin cutar (IgM). Matakin magance cutar:kamuwa da zazzaЙ“in masassara na iya haifar da mummunar cuta kuma na iya zama mai kisa a lokuta masu tsanani. tallafin magani na farko a asibitoci yana inganta Жҷimar rayuwa.

translations.source: There is currently no specific anti-viral drug for yellow fever, but specific care to treat dehydration, fever, and liver and kidney failure improves outcomes. Associated bacterial infections can be treated with antibiotics. Patients need to stay under mosquito nets during the day to limit the risk of spreading to others through mosquito bites. Vaccination is the single most important measure for preventing yellow fever. The prevention of outbreaks can only be achieved if the majority of the population is immunized.
translations.reference: A halin yanzu babu wani takamaiman maganin rigakafin Жҷwayar cuta don zazzaЙ“i, amma takamaiman kulawa don magance rashin isashshen ruwa a jiki, zazzabi, da gazawar hanta da koda yana inganta sakamako. Ana iya magance Жҷwayoyin cuta masu alaЖҷa da maganin rigakafi. Marasa lafiya suna buЖҷatar zama a gidan sauro da rana don irage haЙ—arin yadawa ga wasu ta hanyar cizon sauro. Alurar riga kafi ita ce hanya mafi mahimmanci don hana zazzabi. Za a iya hana barkewar cutar ne kawai idan an yiwa yawancin jama'a allurar rigakafi.
translations.hypothesis: A wata, Щ„Ш§ ЩҠЩҲШ¬ШҜ ШҜЩҲШ§ШЎ Ш®Ш§Шө Щ„ЩҖ "yellow fever"ШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩғЩҶЩҮШҢ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҮШӘЩ…Ш§Щ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШҜШҜ Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ ЩӮЩ„Ш© Щ…Ш§ШЎШҢ ШӯЩ…ЩҠШҢ ЩҲ ЩҒШҙЩ„ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғШЁШҜ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш«Ш§ЩҶШ©ШҢ ЩҠШіШ§ЩҮЩ… ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШӘЩҠШ¬Ш©. Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШЁШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§ШӘШ¬Ш© Ш№ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩғШӘЩҠШұЩҠШ§ШҢ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ЩҮШ§ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¶Ш§ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҠЩҲЩҠШ©. Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұЩҠШ¶Ш§ШӘ ЩҠШ¬ШЁ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШәШ·ЩҠЩҲШ§ ШЈЩҶЩҒШіЩҮЩ… ШЁЩҖ "mosquito nets" Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҮШ§ШұШҢ ЩҲШ°Щ„Щғ Щ„ШӘЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ„ Ш®Ш·Шұ Ш§ЩҶШӘШҙШ§ШұЩҮШ§ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШўШ®ШұЩҠЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Щ„ШҜШәШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ№ЩҲШ¶. Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·Ш№ЩҠЩ… ЩҮЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ ШЈЩҮЩ…ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ№ "yellow fever". Щ…ЩҶШ№ ШӘЩҒШҙЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ШҢ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮЩҮ ЩҒЩӮШ· ШҘШ°Ш§ ЩғШ§ЩҶ ШәШ§Щ„ШЁЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШіЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩӮШҜ ШӘЩ… ШӘШ·Ш№ЩҠЩ…ЩҮЩ….

translations.source: The yellow fever vaccine is safe and affordable, and a single dose provides life-long immunity against the disease. People who recover from yellow fever infection are also protected for life. Read more about the yellow fever vaccine. Mosquito control can also help to prevent yellow fever and is vital in situations where vaccination coverage is low or the vaccine is not immediately available. Mosquito control includes eliminating sites where mosquitoes can breed and killing adult mosquitoes and larvae by using insecticides in areas with high mosquito density.
translations.reference: Maganin cutar zazzabin shawara yana da aminci kuma mai araha, kuma kashi Й—aya na alluran rigakafi yana ba da rigakafi na tsawon rayuwa daga cutar. Mutanen da suka warke daga kamuwa da cutar zazzaЙ“i kuma suna da kariya har tsawon rayuwars. Жҷara karantawa game da allurar rigakafin zazzaЙ“in cizon sauro. Kula da sauro na iya taimakawa wajen hana zazzabin rawaya kuma yana da mahimmanci a cikin yanayin da allurar rigakafi ba ta da yawa ko kuma ba a samun rigakafin nan da nan. Kula da sauro ya haЙ—a da kawar da wuraren da sauro ke hayayyafa da kashe manya sauro da tsutsa ta hanyar amfani da maganin kashe kwari a wuraren da ke da yawan sauro.

translations.source: Community involvement through activities, such as cleaning household drains and covering water containers where mosquitoes can breed is an important and effective way to control mosquitoes.

translations.hypothesis: Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғШӘЩҠ ШӨЩ…ЩҶ ШіШ§ЩғЩҲ, kamar ШӘЩҶШёЩҠЩҒ ШҜЩҲШҙЩҲЩҶ, ЩҲ ШӘШәШ·ЩҠЩҮ ШЈЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠ Щ…Ш§ШЎ, ШӯЩҠЩҶЩҮ ЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ШҜЩҲЩҶ ШҜЩҠШҜШ§ЩҶ, ЩҮЩҠ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮЩҮ Щ…ЩҮЩ…Ш© ЩҲЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„Ш© Щ„ЩҖ "ШӯШөШұ" ШҜЩҠШҜШ§ЩҶ.

translations.source: People with medical needs are вҖңleft behind in painвҖқ reveals new report The World Health Organization (WHO) has published a new report on access to morphine for medical use, which describes how the global distribution of morphine, as a vital pain medicine, is unequal and does not fulfil the medical need. The report, titled вҖңLeft behind in painвҖқ, highlights the problems in access to this essential medicine and offers actions to improve safe access through balanced policy. Despite morphine being an effective and relatively low-cost medicine for relieving strong pain, listed since 1977 in the first edition of the WHO Model list of Essential Medicines, the disparity in access across countries is stark. There is a 5- to 63-fold difference in the estimated median consumption of morphine between high-income countries and lower income countries.
translations.reference: An bar mutanen da ke da buЖҷatar kulawar likita a baya cikin raЙ—aЙ—i, sabon rahoto ya bayyana. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) ta fitar da wani sabon rahoto kan samun damar yin amfani da sinadarin morphine a matsayin magani, wanda ya bayyana yadda rarraba morphine a duniya a matsayin maganin raЙ—aЙ—i mai mahimmanci, bai daidaita ba kuma baya biyan bukatun likita.B50. Rahoton, mai taken "cikin raЙ—aЙ—i", yana nuna matsalolin samun damar yin amfani da wannan magani mai mahimmanci tare da bayyana hanyoyin samar da shi cikin ta hanyar daidaitattun manufofi. Duk da cewa morphine magani ne mai inganci kuma mai sauЖҷin farashi don kawar da raЙ—aЙ—i mai Жҷarfi, wanda aka jera tun 1977 a cikin wallafar WHO ta farko na jerin samfuran Mahimman Magunguna, rarrabuwar kai a cikin Жҷasashe yana da Жҷarfi. Akwai bambanci ninki 5 zuwa 63 a kiyasin matsakaicin yawan amfani da morphine tsakanin Жҷasashe masu samun kuЙ—in shiga da Жҷasashe masu Жҷaramin karfi.

"Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©" (WHO) ЩӮШҜ ЩҶШҙШұ ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ Ш№ЩҶ ШҘЩ…ЩғШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ЩҲШұЩҒЩҠЩҶ Щ„Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„Ш·ШЁЩҠШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠЩҲШ¶Шӯ ЩғЩҠЩҒ ШӘЩҲШІЩҠШ№ Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҲШұЩҒЩҠЩҶШҢ ШЁШ§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§ШұЩҮ ШҜЩҲШ§ШЎ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„Щ…ШҢ ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ШӘШіШ§ЩҲ ЩҲЩ„Ш§ ЩҠЩ„ШЁЩ‘ЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӯШӘЩҠШ§Ш¬Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·ШЁЩҠШ©. Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШұШәЩ… Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШұЩҒЩҠЩҶ ЩҮЩҲ ШҜЩҲШ§ШЎ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ЩҶШіШЁЩҠШ§ЩӢ ЩҲШұШ®ЩҠШөШҢ ЩҲЩҠШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„Щ… Ш§Щ„ШҙШҜЩҠШҜШҢ ЩҲЩӮШҜ ШӘЩ… ШҘШҜШұШ§Ш¬ЩҮ Щ…ЩҶШ° Ш№Ш§Щ… 1977 ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШіШ®Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„Щү Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ ШҘЩ„Ш§ ШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§ЩҲШӘ ЩҒЩҠ ШҘЩ…ЩғШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮ ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ ЩҲШ§Ш¶Шӯ. ЩҮЩҶШ§Щғ ЩҒШұЩӮ ЩғШЁЩҠШұ ШЁЩҠЩҶ ШӘЩӮШҜЩҠШұ Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ· Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘЩҮЩ„Ш§Щғ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШұЩҒЩҠЩҶ ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш°Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ®Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШӘЩҒШ№ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш°Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ®Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ®ЩҒШ¶ШҢ ЩҠШӘШұШ§ЩҲШӯ ШЁЩҠЩҶ 5 ЩҲ 63 Щ…ШұШ©.

translations.source: Consumption pattern varies significantly across countries of similar wealth; it does not correspond to medical need, as indicated by the estimated number of days people are in pain or suffer with severe shortness of breath for people with a terminal illness. This data echoes that of the 2018 Lancet Commission which described the lack of access to pain relief medication as вҖҳone of the most heinous, hidden inequities in global healthвҖҷ with the richest 10% of countries possessing 90% of distributed morphine-equivalent opioids. вҖңLeaving people in pain when effective medicines are available for pain management, especially in the context of end-of-life care, should be a cause of serious concern for policy-makers,вҖқ says Dr Yukiko Nakatani, WHO Assistant Director-General for Medicines and Health Products. вҖңWe must urgently advocate for safe and timely access to morphine for those in medical need through balanced policy, everywhere.вҖқ
translations.reference: Yanayin amfani ya bambanta sosai a cikin Жҷasashe masu irin wannan arziki; Bai dace da buЖҷatun kiwon lafiya ba, kamar yadda Жҷiyasin adadin kwanakin da mutane ke fama da raЙ—aЙ—i ko fama da matsanancin Жҷarancin numfashi ga masu fama da rashin lafiyan da ba na tashi ba. Wadannan bayanan sun yi daidai da na Hukumar Lancet ta 2018 wacce ta bayyana rashin samun damar yin amfani da magungunan rage jin zafi a matsayin daya daga cikin rashin adalci mafi muni, a harkar kiwon lafiya ta duniya tare da 10% mafiya arzikin Жҷasashe da ke daukar kashi 90% na morphine da aka rarraba. daidai opioids. Barin mutane cikin raЙ—aЙ—i a lokacin da ake samun ingantattun magunguna don magance raЙ—aЙ—in ciwo, musamman a yanayin kula da lafiya na karshen rayuwa, ya kamata ya zama abin damuwa ga masu tsara manufofi, in ji Dokta Yukiko Nakatani, Mataimakin Daraktan WHO. -GabaЙ—aya don Magunguna da Kayayyakin Lafiya. Dole ne mu yi kira da gaggawa a samar da morphine kan lokaci ga waЙ—anda ke cikin buЖҷatun likita ta hanyar madaidaitan manufofi, a ko'ina.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩ…Ш· Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠЩҸШіШӘЩҮЩ„Щғ ЩҠШ®ШӘЩ„ЩҒ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ЩғШЁЩҠЩҠШұ ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш°ЩҲШ§ШӘ Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш«ШұЩҲШ© Щ…ЩҲШ§ШІЩҚШӣ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШӘЩ…Ш§ШҙЩү Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӯШӘЩҠШ§Ш¬Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·ШЁЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩғЩ…Ш§ ЩҮЩҲ Щ…ЩҲШ¶Шӯ Щ…ЩҶ Ш№ШҜШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҠШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШ№Ш§ЩҶЩҠ ЩҒЩҠЩҮ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ші Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩ„Щ… ШЈЩҲ Ш¶ЩҠЩӮ ШҙШҜЩҠШҜ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩҒШіШҢ Ш®Ш§ШөШ©ЩӢ Щ„Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ЩҠШ№Ш§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ШұШ¶ ЩӮШ§ШӘЩ„. ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШ§ЩҶШ§ШӘ ШӘШӘЩҒЩӮ Щ…Ш№ ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұ Lancet Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ… 2018ШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҲШөЩҒ ЩҶЩӮШө ШҘЩ…ЩғШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШ®ЩҒЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„Щ… Ш№Щ„Щү ШЈЩҶЩҮШ§ "ЩҲШ§ШӯШҜШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШіЩҲШЈ ЩҲШЈШ®ЩҒЩү Ш№ШҜЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§ЩҲШ§Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©"ШҢ ШӯЩҠШ« ШЈЩҶ 10% Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Ш«ШұШ§ШЎЩӢ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ ЩҠЩ…ШӘЩ„ЩғЩҲЩҶ 90% Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ШЁЩҮШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҲШұЩҒЩҠЩҶ. "ШӘШұЩғ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ші ЩҠШ№Ш§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§ ШӘЩҲШ¬ШҜ ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„Ш© Щ„ШҘШҜШ§ШұШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„Щ…ШҢ ЩҲШ®Ш§ШөШ©ЩӢ ЩҒЩҠ ШіЩҠШ§ЩӮ ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© ЩҶЩҮШ§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҠШ§Ш©ШҢ ЩҠШ¬ШЁ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠЩғЩҲЩҶ Щ…ШөШҜШұ ЩӮЩ„ЩӮ ЩғШЁЩҠШұ Щ„Щ„Щ…ШіШӨЩҲЩ„ЩҠЩҶ"ШҢ ЩҠЩӮЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ЩҠЩҲЩғЩҠЩғЩҲ ЩҶШ§ЩғШ§ШӘШ§ЩҶЩҠШҢ Щ…ШіШ§Ш№ШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ… Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШӘШ¬Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©. "Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҶШ§ ШЈЩҶ ЩҶШ·Ш§Щ„ШЁ ШЁШҙШҜШ© ШЁШҘЩ…ЩғШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШўЩ…ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШұЩҒЩҠЩҶ Щ„Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ЩҠШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ЩҲЩҶ ШҘЩ„ЩҠЩҮШҢ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ШіЩҠШ§ШіШ§ШӘ Щ…ШӘЩҲШ§ШІЩҶШ©ШҢ ЩҒЩҠ ЩғЩ„ Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҶ."

translations.source: Reasons for the disparity Access to morphine for medical use is influenced by many interacting factors including enablers related to good governance, reliable/efficient procurement and supply processes, resource availability and capacity-building activities, along with barriers related to overly restrictive legislation and policies, inadequate service provision, and misinformed attitudes and perception. Given different country contexts, enablers, barriers and priorities for action vary; a stakeholder survey presented in this report, with respondents from 105 WHO Member States, confirms this variation. For example, irregular supply of morphine and other strong opioids at health facilities due to limited financing were commonly noted as a barrier in low- and middle-income countries compared to high-income countries. More than a third of respondents across all regions also noted barriers arising from legislative and regulatory factors while recognizing the importance of a legislative and regulatory framework in achieving safe access.
translations.reference: Dalilan banbance-banbance Damar samun morphine a matsayin magani yana da alaЖҷa da abubuwa da dama da suka haЙ—a da shugabanci nagari, ingantaccen sayayya da hanyoyin samar da kayayyaki, wadatar albarkatu da ayyukan haЙ“aka iya aiki, tare da shamakain da ke da alaЖҷa da ЖҷaЖҷЖҷarfan dokoki da manufofi, Жҷarancin bayar da kulawa, da rashin fahimtar halaye da fahimta. Duba da yanayin Жҷasashe daban-daban, abubuwan da ke samar da dama da tsaiko da fifiko wajen mahimmancin Й—aukar mataki sun bambanta; wani binciken masu ruwa da tsaki da aka gabatar a wannan rahoto, mai masu amsa tambayoyi daga mambobin Жҷasashen WHO guda 105, ya tabbatar da wannan bambancin. Misali, ana Й—aukar rashin samar da sinadarin morphine da sauran magungunan opioid masu karfi a wuraren kiwon lafiya saboda Жҷarancin kuЙ—aЙ—e a matsayin wani shamakai a Жҷasashe masu Жҷaramin karfi da matsakaicin kuЙ—in shiga idan aka kwatanta da Жҷasashe masu tasowa. Fiye da kashi Й—aya bisa uku na waЙ—anda suka amsa tambayoyi a duk faЙ—in yankuna sun bayyana cewa dalilan dake kawo cikas sun shafi dokoki da Жҷa'idoji, a yayin da suka fahimci muhimmancin tsarin doka da Жҷa'ida wajen samar da dama cikin aminci.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШЁШ§ШЁ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӨШҜЩҠШ© ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш®ШӘЩ„Ш§ЩҒ: ШҘЩ…ЩғШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ЩҲШұЩҒЩҠЩҶ Щ„Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„Ш·ШЁЩҠ ШӘШӘШЈШ«Шұ ШЁШ№ШҜШ© Ш№ЩҲШ§Щ…Щ„ШҢ ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ Ш№ЩҲШ§Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШ№ШІШІ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩғЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҠШҜШҢ Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ§ШӘ ШҙШұШ§ШЎ ЩҲШӘЩҲШұЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҲШ«ЩҲЩӮШ© ЩҲЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„Ш©ШҢ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ШұШҜШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЈЩҶШҙШ·Ш© Щ„ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШҜШұШ§ШӘШҢ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҲШ§ШҰЩӮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ№Щ„ЩӮШ© ШЁЩӮЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠЩҶ ЩҲШіЩҠШ§ШіШ§ШӘ ШөШ§ШұЩ…Ш© Щ„Щ„ШәШ§ЩҠШ©ШҢ ШӘЩҲЩҒЩҠШұ Ш®ШҜЩ…Ш§ШӘ ШәЩҠШұ ЩғШ§ЩҒШҢ ЩҲЩ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮЩҒ ЩҲШӘШөЩҲШұШ§ШӘ ШәЩҠШұ ШөШӯЩҠШӯШ©. Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®Ш° ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ШёШұЩҲЩҒ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„ЩҒШ© ЩҒЩҠ ЩғЩ„ ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш©ШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҲШ§Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШ№ШІШІШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҲШ§ШҰЩӮШҢ ЩҲШЈЩҲЩ„ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„ ШӘШ®ШӘЩ„ЩҒШӣ Ш§ШіШӘШ·Щ„Ш§Ш№ ШўШұШ§ШЎ Ш°ЩҲЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§ЩӮШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ШӘЩ… ШӘЩӮШҜЩҠЩ…ЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұШҢ Щ…Ш№ Ш§ШіШӘШ¬Ш§ШЁШ© Щ…ЩҶ 105 ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш№Ш¶ЩҲШ© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҠШӨЩғШҜ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш®ШӘЩ„Ш§ЩҒ. Ш№Щ„Щү ШіШЁЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ШҢ ЩҶЩӮШө ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҲШұЩҒЩҠЩҶ ЩҲШәЩҠШұЩҮШ§ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҲЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ШұШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©ШҢ ШЁШіШЁШЁ Щ…ШӯШҜЩҲШҜЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩ…ЩҲЩҠЩ„ШҢ ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҠЩҸЩ„Ш§ШӯШё ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ШҙШ§ШҰШ№ ЩғШ№Ш§ШҰЩӮ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш°Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ®Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ®ЩҒШ¶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ·ШҢ Щ…ЩӮШ§ШұЩҶШ© ШЁШ§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш°Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ®Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШӘЩҒШ№. ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Щ…ЩҶ Ш«Щ„Ш« Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ¬ЩҠШЁЩҠЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш·ЩӮШҢ ШЈЩҠШ¶ЩӢШ§ШҢ ШЈШҙШ§ШұЩҲШ§ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш№ЩҲШ§ШҰЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩҶШҙШЈ Щ…ЩҶ Ш№ЩҲШ§Щ…Щ„ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶЩҠШ© ЩҲШӘЩҶШёЩҠЩ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ Щ…Ш№ ШҘШҜШұШ§Щғ ШЈЩҮЩ…ЩҠШ© ШҘШ·Ш§Шұ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶЩҠ ЩҲШӘЩҶШёЩҠЩ…ЩҠ Щ„ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШўЩ…ЩҶ.

translations.source: Unduly restrictive requirements could hamper patient access because they impede the flow of supply or make prescribing and dispensing difficult for health-care professionals. It is important to note that concerns about the potential harmful effects of opioids are valid, such as their potential to lead to opioid use disorder. For this reason, a certain amount of caution about the potential harms of opioid use (e.g. use in chronic non-cancer pain) is important for public health insofar as its use is well-informed and proportionate to risks. Such concerns should not undermine the benefits of opioid use when clinically indicated and when used safely by trained professionals. Opportunities for actionThe report presents a complementary set of areas for action that aim to improve safe access to morphine.
translations.reference: Жҷayyadaddun buЖҷatu na babu gaira babu dalili na iya kawo cikas ga majiyyaci wajen samun dama saboda suna hana samarwa ko rubutawa da rarrabawa ga ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya. Yana da kyau a lura cewa damuwa game da yuwuwar illolin magungunan opioid abu ne mai tushe, kamar yuwuwar su na haifar da matsalolin dakr da alaЖҷa da amfani da opioids. Saboda wannan dalili, Й—aukan wani mataki na taka tsantsan game da yuwuwar cutarwar amfani da opioid (misali amfani a cikin ciwon daji na yau da kullun ba tare da ciwon daji ba) yana da mahimmanci ga lafiyar jama'a matuЖҷar an san amfaninsa daidai yake da haЙ—arinsa. Kada ire-iren waЙ—annan damuwa su lalata fa'idojin amfani da magungunan opioid lokacin da lafiya ta buЖҷaci hakan da lokacin amfani da su ta hanyar Жҷwararrun ma'aikata. Damar daukar mataki: Rahoton ya gabatar da wasu jerin Й“angarorin Й—aukar matakai da nufin inganta damar samun morphine.

translations.source: These include implementing small-scale regional or state-wide programmes on improving access to morphine for medical use with a package of essential services and products for palliative care that is formulated according to the WHO Model List of Essential Medicines and the WHO Essential Package of Palliative Care. They also include improving governance, streamlining procurement and supply processes to address any inefficiency, improving resourcing such as stable funding, enhancing competent skill sets of the health workforce, and raising awareness about both the benefits and potential harms of opioid use. The success of these actions will hinge on collaboration and cooperation among all stakeholders at national, regional, and global levels.
translations.reference: WaЙ—annan sun haЙ—a da aiwatar da Жҷananan shirye-shirye na yankuna da na jihohi kan haЙ“aka damar yin amfani da morphine wajen kiwon lafiya tare da mahimman ayyuka da kayayyaki don kulawa da jin daЙ—i, wanda aka tsara akan Jerin Kayayyakin WHO na Mahimman Magunguna da Muhimman Жҳunshin Lafiya na Kulawar WHO. Har ila yau, sun haЙ—a da inganta tsarin mulki, daidaita sayayya da hanyoyin samar da kayayyaki don magance duk wani tasgaro, inganta kayan aiki kamar samar da kuЙ—aЙ—e, samar da Жҷwarewa a ma'aikatar kiwon lafiya, da wayar da kan jama'a game da fa'idodi da illar amfani da opioid. Nasarar waЙ—annan ayyukan za ta ta'allaЖҷa ne kan haЙ—in gwiwa da haЙ—in kai tsakanin dukkan masu ruwa da tsaki a matakan Жҷasa, yanki da duniya baki Й—aya.

translations.source: Small islands agree bold plan of action on noncommunicable diseases and mental health Today, the 2023 Bridgetown Declaration on Noncommunicable Diseases (NCDs) and Mental Health was launched, to address some of the worldвҖҷs deadliest diseases in Small Island Developing States (SIDS), which are especially at risk. The Declaration is a key outcome of the SIDS Ministerial Conference on Noncommunicable Diseases (NCDs) and Mental Health, running from 14 to 16 June, co-hosted by the World Health Organization (WHO), the Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) and the Government of Barbados. SIDS are disproportionately impacted by NCDs вҖ“ which cause 74% of all deaths globally вҖ“ due to their reliance on imported food, commercial influences and the climate crisis. A new WHO report shows that 8 of the 15 countries with more than a 30% risk of premature death from cardiovascular disease, cancer, diabetes, or chronic respiratory disease are SIDS.
translations.reference: Жҳananan tsibirai sun amince kan babban shirin ayyuka kan cututtukan da ba sa yaЙ—uwa da cututtukan ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa. A yau, an Жҷaddamar da sanarwar Bridgetown na 2023 akan Cututtukan da ba sa yaЙ—uwa (NCDs) da Lafiyar ЖҳwaЖҷwalwa, don magance wasu cututtukan masu tsanani a duniya a cikin Жҳananan Tsibirai masu tasowa (SIDS), musamman waЙ—anda ke cikin haЙ—ari. Sanarwar ita ce mahimmiyar sakamako na taron ministocin SIDS kan cututtukan da ba sa yaЙ—uwa (NCDs) da lafiyar ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa, wanda ke gudana daga ranar 14 zuwa 16 ga Yuni, wanda Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO), da kuma Pan American Health Organisation (PAHO) suka shirya. Gwamnatin Barbados. NCDs na da matuЖҷar tasiri ga SIDS, wanda hakan ke haifar da kashi 74% na duk mace-mace a duniya saboda dogaro da abincin da ake shigowa da su daga waje, tasirin kasuwanci da kuma rikicewar yanayi. Wani sabon rahoton na WHO ya bayyana cewa 8 daga cikin Жҷasashe 15 da ke da fiye da kashi 30 cikin dari na haЙ—arin mutuwa da wuri daga cututtukan zuciya, ciwon daji, ciwon sukari, ko cututtukan numfashi na yau da kullun sune SID.

Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ…ШҢ ШӘЩ… ШҘШ·Щ„Ш§ЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ№Щ„Ш§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§Шө ШЁЩҖ 2023 ШЁЩҖ Bridgetown ШЁШҙШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ ШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШҜЩҠШ© (NCDs) ЩҲШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩӮЩ„ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ°Щ„Щғ Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮШ© ШЁШ№Ш¶ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШ®Ш·Шұ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ ЩҒЩҠ ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШІЩҠШұШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШәШ§ШұШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ ЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҶ Ш®Ш·Шұ Ш®Ш§Шө. ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ№Щ„Ш§ЩҶ ЩҮЩҲ ЩҶШӘЩҠШ¬Ш© ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…ШӨШӘЩ…Шұ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШІШ§ШұЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§Шө ШЁШ§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ ШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШҜЩҠШ© (NCDs) ЩҲШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩӮЩ„ЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠЩ…ШӘШҜ Щ…ЩҶ 14 ШҘЩ„Щү 16 ЩҠЩҲЩҶЩҠЩҲШҢ ЩҲЩҠЩӮШ§Щ… ШЁШ§Щ„ШҙШұШ§ЩғШ© Щ…Ш№ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© (WHO)ШҢ ЩҲЩ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұЩҠЩғШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠЩҶЩҠШ© (PAHO)ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӯЩғЩҲЩ…Ш© ЩҒЩҠ ШЁШ§ШұШЁШ§ШҜЩҲШі. ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШІЩҠШұШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШәШ§Шұ ШӘШӘШЈШ«Шұ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ШӘЩҶШ§ШіШЁ ШЁШ§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ ШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШҜЩҠШ© вҖ“ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ ШӘШіШЁШЁ 74% Щ…ЩҶ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ЩҲЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ ШӯЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… вҖ“ ШЁШіШЁШЁ Ш§Ш№ШӘЩ…Ш§ШҜЩҮЩ… Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШәШ°Ш§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩҲШұШҜШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ¬Ш§ШұЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲ ШЈШІЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш®. ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩҠШёЩҮШұ ШЈЩҶ 8 Щ…ЩҶ ШЁЩҠЩҶ 15 ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ ЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҶ Ш®Ш·Шұ ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Щ…ЩҶ 30% Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩҒШ§Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШЁЩғШұШ© ШЁШіШЁШЁ ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩ„ШЁШҢ Ш§Щ„ШіШұШ·Ш§ЩҶШҢ Ш§Щ„ШіЩғШұЩҠШҢ ШЈЩҲ ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҮШ§ШІ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩҒШіЩҠШҢ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШІЩҠШұШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШәШ§Шұ.

translations.source: The 10 countries with the highest obesity rates globally are all SIDS in the Pacific, where over 45% of adults live with obesity. Mental health conditions are common in SIDS countries, affecting an estimated 15.2% of the population in the Caribbean and 11.2% of the population in the Pacific. People with mental health conditions face a higher risk of premature mortality, including from unaddressed physical health conditions and from suicide. Stigma, specialized staff shortages and the impact of climate change contribute to a challenging situation in SIDS that requires immediate attention. The 2023 Bridgetown Declaration outlines bold steps to address the range of social, environmental, economic and commercial issues that lead to NCDs and mental health conditions.
translations.reference: Жҳasashe 10 da ke da mafiya yawan masu fama da cutar Жҷiba a duniya duk SID ne a cikin Pasifik, inda sama da kashi 45% na manya ke rayuwa da cutar Жҷiba. Matsalolin lafiyar ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa ya zama ruwan dare a cikin Жҷasashen SIDS, wanda ya shafi kimanin kashi 15.2 na yawan jama'ar Caribbean da kashi 11.2 na yawan jama'ar Pasifik. Mutanen da ke fama da matsalar lafiyar ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa suna fuskantar haЙ—arin mutuwa da wuri, rashin samun isasshen kulawa ta lafiyar jiki gami da kuma yunkurin kashe kawunansu. Abin kunya, Жҷarancin Жҷwararrun ma'aikata da tasirin sauyin yanayi suna ba da gudummawa wajen fuskantar Жҷalubale a cikin SIDS wanda ke buЖҷatar kulawa da gaggawa. Sanarwar Bridgetown ta 2023 ta zayyana Жҷwararan matakai don magance matsalolin zamantakewa, muhalli, tattalin arziki da kasuwanci waЙ—anda ke haifar da NCDs da yanayin lafiyar hankali.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШ¶ЩҠЩҶ 10аё—аёөа№ҲаёЎаёө Щ…Ш№ШҜЩ„ Щ„ obesity (Ш§Щ„ШіЩ…ЩҶШ©)  Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Щ„Щү Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҢ ШіШ§Шұ ЩғЩ„ЩҮ ЩҠЩӮШ№Ш§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШ·ЩӮШ© "SIDS" (ШҜЩҲЩ„ ШөШәЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш°Ш§ШӘ Щ…ЩҲШ§ШұШҜ Ш·ШЁЩҠШ№ЩҠШ©)ШҢ ШӯЩҠШ« Щ…Ш§ ЩҠЩӮЩ„ Ш№ЩҶ 45% Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ§Щ„ШәЩҠЩҶ ЩҠШ№Ш§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ…ЩҶШ©. Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ЩғЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ№Щ„ЩӮШ© ШЁШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩӮЩ„ЩҠШ© ШҙШ§ШҰШ№Ш© ЩҒЩҠ ШҜЩҲЩ„ "SIDS"ШҢ ЩҲШӘШӨШ«Шұ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…Ш§ ЩҠЩӮШҜШұ ШЁЩҖ 15.2% Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШ·ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„ШЁШӯШұ Ш§Щ„ЩғШ§ШұЩҠШЁЩҠ ЩҲ 11.2% Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШіЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШ·ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯЩҠШ· Ш§Щ„ЩҮШ§ШҜШҰ. Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜ Ш°ЩҲЩҠ Щ…ШҙШ§ЩғЩ„ ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш№ЩӮЩ„ЩҠШ© ЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҲЩҶ Ш®Ш·Шұ ШЈЩғШЁШұ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩҒШ§Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШЁЩғШұШ©ШҢ ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ШҙШ§ЩғЩ„ ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш¬ШіШҜЩҠШ© ШәЩҠШұ Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ„Ш¬Ш© ЩҲЩ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҶШӘШӯШ§Шұ. Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩ…Ш©ШҢ ЩҶЩӮШө ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜШұШЁЩҠЩҶШҢ ЩҲШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ ШӘШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш®ШҢ ЩҠШіШ§ЩҮЩ…ЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ ШөШ№ШЁ ЩҒЩҠ ШҜЩҲЩ„ "SIDS" Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӘШ·Щ„ШЁ Ш§ЩҮШӘЩ…Ш§Щ… ЩҒЩҲШұЩҠ. ШҘШ№Щ„Ш§ЩҶ ШЁШұЩҠШҜШ¬ШӘЩҲЩҶ Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ… 2023 ЩҠЩҲШ¶Шӯ Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ§ШӘ Ш¬ШұЩҠШҰШ© Щ„Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ„Ш¬Ш© Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© Щ…ШӘЩҶЩҲШ№Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ЩғЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЁЩҠШҰЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ЩӮШӘШөШ§ШҜЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШ¬Ш§ШұЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӨШҜЩҠ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШІЩ…ЩҶШ© (NCDs) ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ЩғЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ№Щ„ЩӮШ© ШЁШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩӮЩ„ЩҠШ©.

translations.source: Developed through an inclusive process led вҖҳforвҖҷ and вҖҳbyвҖҷ SIDS, the declaration highlights that NCDs and mental health conditions cannot be properly addressed without responding to the climate crisis. вҖңBold action for our climate, good health, and well-being relies on redressing and reorganizing global financing to unlock billions in investment, while making it less punishing for developing countries to pay their debts,вҖқ said Her Excellency Mia Amor Mottley, Prime Minister of Barbados. вҖңFunding for climate change adaptation and mitigation in the most vulnerable countries is also key, with noncommunicable diseases and mental health accounted for.вҖқ "The challenges faced by Small Island Developing States are interconnected and multifaceted. Climate change, environmental degradation, social and economic inequalities, and the commercial determinants of health exacerbate the burden of NCDs and mental health conditions," said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General.
translations.reference: Ta hanyar gamammiyar tsari da SID ta jagoranta, sanarwar ta nuna cewa ba za a iya magance NCDs da matsalolin lafiyar ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa yadda ya kamata ba, ba tare da magance rikicin yanayi ba. ЖҠaukan Жҷwararan matakai da suka dace a game da yanayi, lafiya da kuma walwalarmu, ya dogara ne kan gyaran tsarin tafiyar da kuЙ—aЙ—e a duniya, don samar da biliyoyin hanyoyin zuba hannun jari, da rage wa Жҷasashe masu tasowa nauyin biyan basussukan da ake bin su. Firayim Ministan Barbados. Bayar da kuЙ—i ga Жҷasashe masu rauni don daidaitawa da sauyin yanayi abu ne mai muhimmanci, tare da Жҷididdige cututtuka marasa yaЙ—uwa da lafiyar ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa. Жҳalubalen da Jihohin masu tasowa a Kananan Tsibirai ke fuskanta, suna da alaЖҷa da juna, da fuskoki daban-daban. Sauyin yanayi, lalacewar muhalli, rashin daidaiton zamantakewa da tattalin arziki, da kuma hanyoyin kasuwanci na kiwon lafiya suna Жҷara tsananta nauyin NCDs da yanayin lafiyar ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa," in ji Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Darakta-Janar na WHO.
translations.hypothesis: "ШӯШұЩҒЩҠЩҲЩҮ wannan, wanda ana yi a cikin mabuЙ—i wanda 'SIDS' ke jagorawa, yana nuna cewa, Щ„Ш§ ЩҠЩҸЩ…ЩғЩҗЩҶ Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ„Ш¬Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШІЩ…ЩҶШ© (NCDs) ЩҲШҙШӨЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩӮЩ„ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ШөШӯЩҠШӯШҢ ШҘЩ„Ш§ ШҘШ°Ш§ Щ„ШІЩ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…Шұ Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ„Ш¬Ш© ШЈШІЩ…Ш© Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш®. "ШЈЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ЩӮЩҲЩҠШ© Щ„ШЁЩҠШҰШӘЩҶШ§ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҠШҜШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШұЩҒШ§ЩҮЩҠШ©ШҢ ШӘШ№ШӘЩ…ШҜ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘШ№ШҜЩҠЩ„ ЩҲШҘШ№Ш§ШҜШ© ШӘЩҶШёЩҠЩ… Ш§Щ„ШӘЩ…ЩҲЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШҢ Щ„ЩғЩҠ ЩҶШӘЩ…ЩғЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ§ШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш§ШұШ§ШӘ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ«Щ…Ш§ШұШҢ Щ…Ш№ Ш¬Ш№Щ„ЩҮШ§ ШЈЩӮЩ„ ШөШ№ЩҲШЁШ© Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠШ© Щ„ШҜЩҒШ№ ШҜЩҠЩҲЩҶЩҮЩ…"ШҢ ЩҮЩғШ°Ш§ ЩӮШ§Щ„ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠШҜШ© Щ…ЩҠШ§Щ… ШЈЩ…ЩҲШұ Щ…ЩҲШӘЩ„ЩҠШҢ ШұШҰЩҠШіШ© ЩҲШІШұШ§ШЎ ШЁШ§ШұШЁШ§ШҜЩҲШі. "ШӘЩ…ЩҲЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩғЩҠЩҒ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШ®ЩҒЩҠЩҒ Щ…ЩҶ ШўШ«Ш§Шұ ШӘШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш® ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Ш¶Ш№ЩҒЩӢШ§ШҢ ЩҮЩҲ ШЈЩҠШ¶ЩӢШ§ ШЈЩ…Шұ ШЁШ§Щ„Шә Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҮЩ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ ШӯЩҠШ« ШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ ШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШҜЩҠШ© ЩҲШҙШӨЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩӮЩ„ ШӘЩ… ШЈШ®Ш°ЩҮШ§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§Шұ." "Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШөШәЩҠШұШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ·ЩҲШұШ©ШҢ ЩҮЩҠ Щ…ШӘШҙШ§ШЁЩғШ© ЩҲЩ…ШӘШ№ШҜШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШ¬ЩҮ. ШӘШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш®ШҢ ШӘШҜЩҮЩҲШұ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШҰШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§ЩҲШӘШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ЩӮШӘШөШ§ШҜЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№ЩҲШ§Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ¬Ш§ШұЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ№Щ„ЩӮШ© ШЁШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ©ШҢ ЩғЩ„ЩҮШ§ ШӘШІЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ ШөШ№ЩҲШЁШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШІЩ…ЩҶШ© ЩҲШҙШӨЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩӮЩ„"ШҢ ЩҮЩғШ°Ш§ ЩӮШ§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШӘЩҠШҜШұЩҲШі ШЈШҜШ§ЩҶЩҲЩ… ШәЩҠШЁШұЩҠШіЩҲШіШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ… Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©.

translations.source: "Despite their limited resources and geographical constraints, these nations have shown remarkable resilience in the face of adversity. Together, we must forge a path that is based on equity, resilience, and sustainability. We must strengthen health systems, enhance prevention and early detection measures, and prioritize the integration of NCD and mental health services into primary health care. "The Director-General also pledged that WHO would work to mobilize financial resources to develop climate resilient, environmentally sustainable health-care facilities in the SIDS. WHO will also continue to advocate for вҖҳloss and damageвҖҷ funding for climate change adaptation and mitigation investments in lower income countries.
translations.reference: Duk da Жҷarancin albarkatun da suke da shi da kuma matsalar yanki, wadannan alвҖҷummomi sun nuna matukar jajircewa wajen fuskantar matsaloli. Tare, dole ne mu samar da hanyar da ta ginu akan daidaito, juriya, da Й—orewa. Dole ne mu Жҷarfafa tsarin kiwon lafiya, haЙ“aka matakan kariya da ganowa da wuri, da kuma ba da fifiko ga haЙ—in gwiwar NCD da ayyukan kula da lafiyar ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa a cikin kiwon lafiya na farko. Darakta-Janar Й—in ya kuma yi alЖҷawarin cewa WHO za ta yi aiki don tattara kuЙ—aЙ—e don bunЖҷasa yanayin juriya, wuraren kula da lafiya masu Й—orewa a cikin SIDS. WHO za ta kuma ci gaba da bayar da shawarwari don samar da kuЙ—aЙ—e na asara da lalacewa don daidaita canjin yanayi da rage saka hannun jari a Жҷasashe masu Жҷaramin karfi.

translations.source: As part of agreeing the Declaration, SIDS signed up to undertake a suite of actions, covering areas such as engaging all of society, accelerating implementation, securing investments, aligning across governments and accounting for progress. The conference also showcased specific commitments by SIDS on NCDs and mental health, including to improve access to mental health care in primary care facilities, update tobacco control legislation to cover e-cigarettes and vaping, and reduce populationsвҖҷ salt and sugar intake. These commitments align with WHOвҖҷs вҖҳbest buysвҖҷ вҖ“ a set of cost-effective, evidence-based interventions to tackle NCDs. The list of best buys was recently updated at the World Health Assembly in May to include secondary prevention for rheumatic fever, acute and long-term management of asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease as well as several interventions for cervical, breast, colorectal, liver and childhood cancer, and the comprehensive treatment of cancer for those living with HIV. вҖңSIDS in the Americas remain overwhelmingly vulnerable to NCDs.
translations.reference: A matsayin wani Й“angare na amincewa da sanarwar, SIDS ta sanya hannu don gudanar da ayyuka daban-daban, waЙ—anda suka shafi fannoni kamar haЙ—ar da al'umma gabaЙ—aya, haЙ“aka aiwatarwa, tabbatar da saka hannun jari, daidaitawa tsakanin gwamnatoci da lissafin ci gaba. Taron ya kuma nuna takamaiman alЖҷawurra na SIDS akan NCDs da lafiyar ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa, gami da inganta samun damar kula da lafiyar ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa a wuraren kulawa na farko, sabunta dokokin sarrafa taba don rufe sigari da vaping, da rage yawan cin gishiri da sukari. WaЙ—annan alЖҷawuran sun yi daidai da mafi kyawun tsarin WHO masu sauЖҷin kuЙ—i, abubuwan da suka dogara da shaida don magance NCDs. A baya-bayan nan, an sabunta jerin mafiya kyawun sayayya a Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya a watan Mayu don haЙ—e Жҷananan rigakafi ta cutar rheumatism, cikakkiyar kulawa da cutar numfashi mai tsanani da tsawo, cututtukan huhu, da kuma cututtukan kansar mahaifa, nono, colorectal, hanta da ciwon daji na yara, da kuma cikakken maganin cutar kansa ga masu Й—auke da cutar HIV. "SIDS a Жҷasashen nahiyar Amurka na cigaba da zama masu rauni sosai ga NCDs.

translations.source: This Ministerial Conference comes at a unique time and will be key to amplifying the voice and needs of SIDS, bringing NCDs and mental health to the forefront of our priority list,вҖқ said Dr Jarbas Barbosa, PAHO Director, and WHO Regional Director for the Americas. вҖңTo build on this momentum, we must act now. PAHO is ready to support accelerated implementation of interventions in our region, including mainstreaming care for these conditions into primary health services and taking advantage of innovations such as digital health tools.вҖқ SIDS countries have a track record of driving global decision-making; their Port of Spain and SAMOA pathway agreements paved the way for the first-ever UN political declaration on NCDs in 2018. The conference and the Declaration will inform and shape forthcoming UN General Assembly High-Level Meetings on universal health coverage in September 2023 and on NCDs in 2025.
translations.reference: Wannan taron na ministoci ya zo a lokaci na musamman, kuma zai zama mabuЙ—i don ci gaba da tattaunawa, dangane matsalar (mutuwa ta fuju'a) SIDS, da kuma bayyana matsalar (cututtuka marasa yaЙ—uwa) NCDs, da matsalar (lafiyar ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa ) a sahun gaba cikin jerin muhimman abubuwan tattaunwa, in ji Dr Jarbas Barbosa, Daraktan ( Жҷungiyar lafiya ta Amurka)PAHO, kuma Daraktan (Жҷungiyar likitoci ta duniya yankin Amurka) WHO. Domin tabbatar wannan yunЖҷurin, dole ne mu yi ЖҷoЖҷari yanzu. PAHO (Жҷungiyar lafiya ta Amurka) a shirye take don tallafawa aiwatar da ayyukan gaggawa a yankinmu, gami da kula da waЙ—annan yanayi cikin ayyukan kiwon lafiya a Жҷaramin mataki, da kuma cin gajiyar abubuwan bunЖҷasawa, kamar kayan aikin kiwon lafiya na na'ura. Жҳasashe masu fama da (mutuwar fuju'a) SIDS sun yi nasarar yanke shawara ta duniya; a nan ne birnin Spain (Port of Spain) da yankin ( SAMOA )suka shimfida yarjejeniya, wacce ta ba da damar yin sanarwar duniya a Karo na farko, dangane da cututtuka marasa yaduwa, (NCDs) a shekara ta 2018. Taron na Жҷarawa juna sani, da sanarwar da ta gabata; za su haska babban taron majalisar ЖҠinkin duniya da ke tafe, kan batun kiwon lafiyar duniya a watan Satumba na 2023 da kuma kan cututtuka marasa yaЙ—uwa (NCDs) a shekara ta 2025.
translations.hypothesis: wannan taron kwamfyuten yana zuwa wata wata, kuma za ta kasance muhimmin hanyar Жҷarfawa ЖҷaЖҷЖҷara da buЖҷatun Жҷasa masu Жҷara da Жҷira (SIDS), kuma kuma Жҷara ma'aikata da lafiyar Й—an adam zuwa cikin muhimmin hanyar aikinmu. вҖ“ Dr Jarbas Barbosa, Mai jagoranci na PAHO, kuma Mai jagoranci na WHO ga Amurika. translations.source: WHOвҖҷs Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme PartnersвҖҷ Meeting ends with stirring call for worldwide action Delegates and representatives left the Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme PartnersвҖҷ Meeting with a stirring call to action from its director Dr Ibrahima SocГ© Fall. As the multinational meeting, attended by some 300 key partners, came to an end in Geneva on Tuesday 13 June, Dr Fall urged participants to take on board the message that, вҖңif we do not challenge ourselves, we cannot evolve and improveвҖқ. In a wide-ranging event held to review progress against the WHO road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021вҖ“2030 and generate a better understanding of global NTD operations from both disease-specific and cross-cutting perspectives, partners, donors, technical partners, institutions and country representatives reinforced their commitment to achieving an ambitious target: a world free from neglected tropical diseases by 2030. The meetingвҖҷs primary theme centred around the vision of вҖңOne community delivering one Global NTD ProgrammeвҖқ.
translations.reference: Tattaunawar Жҷungiyar ma'aikatan lafiya na duniya, na ma'abota shirin nazarin cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin Rana wa'yanda a kayi sake; ya Жҷare da kiran Й—aukar mataki a fadin duniya. Jama'a da wakilai sun bar wajen shirin da aka yi na abokan hulЙ—ar nazarin cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin rana; tare da kiran mayar da hankali wajen Й—aukar mataki daga darektanta Dr Ibrahima SocГғ Fall. Yayin da taron kasa da kasa, wanda ya samu halartar wasu manyan abokan hulЙ—a 300, ya samu ЖҷarЖҷarewa a Geneva a ranar Talata 13 ga watan Yuni, Dr Fall ya bukaci mahalarta taron da su dauki sakon cewa, idan ba mu kalubalanci kanmu ba, ba za mu iya ingantawa ba ko Cigaba. A cikin wani babban taron da aka gudanar don nazarin ci gaban (Жҷungiyar likitoci ta duniya) WHO, a tsare - tsarenta don kula da cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin rana a 2021- 2030, da samar da kyakkyawar fahimta game da ayyukan ( cututtuka marasa yaЙ—uwa )NTD na duniya daga Жҷayyadaddun cututtuka da kuma hangen gaba, abokan tarayya, masu ba da gudummawa, abokan fasaha, cibiyoyi da wakilan Жҷasa; sun Жҷarfafa himmarsu don cimma manufa mai fa'ida: a hasashen duniya Na kubuta daga cututtuka marasa yaЙ—uwa a yankunan masu fama da zafin rana a shekara ta 2030. Jigon taron ya tattara ne akan Samar da al'umma guda, wajen gudanar da shirin NTD na duniya bai Й—aya.

translations.source: Taking their cues from the three key strategic shifts advocated in the road map вҖ“ greater country ownership, measuring impacts not process, and a commitment to cross-cutting activities and collaboration for greater efficiency вҖ“ discussions were pragmatic, clear-sighted and suffused also with the need for health equity and justice to tackle NTDs. Only such an approach, the meeting heard, can bring about the change that is needed by some of the worldвҖҷs poorest communities to achieve the United Nations 2030 Sustainable Development Goals. In the first such global meeting since the launch of the road map in January 2021, delegates heard also from WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Welcoming participants at the beginning of the two-day symposium, Dr Tedros said, вҖңThis gathering illustrates what WHO is all about вҖ“ partners coming together to leverage their collective strength to address global health challenges that none of us could address alone. вҖңA multifaceted challenge like neglected tropical diseases takes a multifaceted approach, and that is what we bring, togetherвҖқ.
translations.reference: Ta hanyar daukar bayanai masu mahimmanci guda, Wanda ya assasa tsarin mallakar nagartacciyar kasa, wajen auna cigaba ba hanyoyinsa ba, da jajircewa na al'amura , da haЙ—in gwiwa domin tabbatar da nuna kwarewa, abubuwan da aka tattauna an gudanar dasu a aikace , a bayyane kuma an yaЙ—ata tare da buЖҷatar daidaito da adalci a harkar kiwon lafiya, domin daЖҷile matsalar NTDs. Irin wannan tsarin ne kawai, in ji taron, zai iya samar da sauyin da wasu al'ummomin duniya mafi talauci ke buЖҷata domin cimma muradun ci gaba mai dorewa na Majalisar Й—inkin Duniya a shekarar 2030. A cikin irin wannan taron na farko na duniya tun bayan Жҷaddamar da tsarin a watan Janairun 2021, wakilai kuma sun ji ta bakin daraktan WHO - Janar Dr tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Da yake maraba da mahalarta farkon taron na kwanaki biyu, Dr tedros ya ce, wannan taron ya bayya komai game da WHO, abokan hadin gwiwa da ke haduwa don yin amfani da karfin hadin gwiwarsu don magance kalubalen kiwon lafiyar duniya wanda babu daya daga cikimmu da zai iya magancewa shi kadai. Kalubale iri-iri kamar cututtukan yankuna masu fama zafi rana, da aka yi sake da su, kuma shi ne abin da muka kawo tare.

translations.source: Delegates and participants spent the subsequent two days identifying the major gaps and challenges to achieving high-level goals and local, on-the-ground challenges. Those on-the-ground challenges include ensuring that people directly affected by NTDs, and those directly responsible for administering interventions against NTDs, are solicited and acknowledged, particularly in terms of communication and community engagement. The meeting noted also the importance of developing communities of practice, in order to build the capacity and confidence of the global NTD workforce. In further discussions, delegates agreed on principles and practical steps to implement action towards the stated targets and planned together for a Global Action Plan for 2025вҖ“2030. Key actions and decisions arising from the meeting included recommendations for strengthening and operationalizing national coordination platforms to ensure coordination for joint planning and for monitoring and evaluation, and to ensure more efficient supply chain management within national systems.
translations.reference: Wakilai da mahalarta taron sun shafe kwanaki biyu, suna bankaЙ—o manyan giЙ“ina da Жҷalubalen cimma manyan burika da kuma Жҷalubale na gida. WaЙ—anda ke fuskantar Жҷalubalen Жҷasa da suka haЙ—a da mutanen da abin ya shafesu kaitsaye, dangane da NTDs da waЙ—anda ke da alhakin gudanar da ayyukan magance NTDa, an nemi su yarda, musamman ta fuskar sadarwa da haЙ—in gwiwar al'umma. Taron ya kuma lura da mahimmancin haЙ“aka al'ummomi masu kokari, don haЙ“aka iyawa da kwarin gwiwa da amincewar ma'aikatan NTD na duniya. A ci gaba da tattaunawa, wakilai sun amince da ka'idoji da matakai masu amfani don aiwatar da ayyuka zuwa ga maЖҷasudan da ake so a cimma, tare da tsarawa Bai Й—aya, domin Й—aukar mataki na duniya na 2025-2030. Muhimman matakai da yanke shawarwari a taron sun haЙ—a da shawarwari don Жҷarfafawa da aiwatar da haЙ—in gwiwar amfani da kafafen sadarwa na zamani, don tabbatar da haЙ—in kai don cigaba da tsare - tsare, wajen lura da rairayewa, da kuma tabbatar da ingantaccen tsarin sarrafa kayan aiki a cikin tsarin kasa.

translations.source: The PartnersвҖҷ Meeting took place also at the end of a major functional review process within WHOвҖҷs Department of Control of Neglected Tropical Diseases. Over the course of the past four months, WHO has been hearing contributions and testimony from all its partners and stakeholders, in order to ensure that it itself embodies the values of accountability, transparency and equity that it espouses and demands. Those values also include ensuring that NTDs are repositioned in the global health architecture. Meeting participants welcomed the emphasis on the key roles that the NTD community can and must play in contributing to wider challenges such as Universal Health Coverage, One Health and the increasing threat of global climate change. Delegates attending in person were also able to enjoy an exhibition dedicated to neglected tropical diseases at WHO headquarters.
translations.reference: Taron abokan hulЙ—ar ya gudana kuma a Жҷarshen babban aikin bita a cikin Sashen Kula da Cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin rana na WHO. A cikin watanni hudu da suka gabata, WHO tana jin gudumawa da shaida daga dukkan abokan hulЙ—arta da masu ruwa da tsaki, domin tabbatar da cewa ita kanta ta kunshi dabiвҖҷun rikon amana da gaskiya da daidaito,wanda ta yadda da kuma buЖҷata. WaЙ—annan abubuwa masu Жҷima sun haЙ—a da tabbatar da cewa an bunЖҷasa NTDs a cikin tsare - tsaren cigaban kiwon lafiya na duniya. Mahalarta taron sun yi maraba da abin lura kan muhimman ayyukan da al'ummar NTD za su iya, kuma dole ne su bada gudummuwa ga manya - manyan kalubale, gamayyar harkar Lafiya ta Duniya, harkar lafiya ta Bai Й—aya, Жҷaro ЖҷoЖҷarin magance barazanar sauyin yanayi a duniya. Wakilan da suka halarta kai tsaye sun sami damar jin daЙ—in wani baje kolin da aka keЙ“e don kula da cututtuka na yankuna masu fama da zafin rana a hedikwatar WHO.

translations.source: A set of metal panels was commissioned to illustrate the 20 conditions that make up the NTD grouping, and these were accompanied by photographs and information illustrating the actions that have been put in place over the course of many decades to tackle them.
translations.reference: An dauki wasu Jerin shawarwari don killace yanayin 20 da ya haЙ—a da rukinin NTD, kuma waЙ—annan sun haЙ—a da hotuna da bayanai da ke nuna ayyukan da aka yi a cikin shekaru masu yawa don magance su.

translations.source: Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme PartnersвҖҷ Meeting, 12вҖ“13 June 2023 Representatives of the global NTD community will gather in Geneva next week to participate in the Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme PartnersвҖҷ Meeting, which takes place in headquartersвҖҷ auditorium on 12-13 June 2023. The objectives of the meeting are to review progress on the WHO road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021вҖ“2030 and generate a better understanding of global NTD operations from both disease-specific and cross-cutting perspectives, as well as to engage in wide-ranging discussions around the vision for One WHO delivering on one Global NTD Programme. While previous global meetings of NTD partners were convened by WHO in 2007 and 2017, this third upcoming event is the first since the launch of the road map in January 2021. The WHO road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021вҖ“2030 is a comprehensive framework that outlines targets, mechanisms for alignment with the Sustainable Development Goals and other global agendas and calls for strategic shifts in NTD approaches with the aim of ending the epidemic of neglected tropical diseases by 2030.
translations.reference: Taron Abokan nazarin Cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin rana na Duniya wadaanda aka yi sake (NTDs), 12 - 13 ga watan Yuni 2023 . Wakilan al'ummar NTD na duniya za su hallara a Geneva mako mai zuwa don cuЙ—anya a cikin shirin (NTDs), wanda ke gudana a Й—akin taron hedikwatar, a 12-13 Yuni 2023. Makasudin taron shi ne duba ci gaba akan tsare - tsaren WHO don kula da cututtuka na yankuna masu fama da zafin rana 2021- 2030 da samar da kyakkyawar fahimta game da ayyukan NTD na duniya daga dukkanin ainihin cututtuka, da ra'ayoyi daban-daban, da kuma tattaunawa mai yawa dangane da hangen nesa wajwn gudanarwar WHO Na bai Й—aya, na s hirin ( NTD). Yayin da taron duniya da ya gabata na abokan huldar NTD, an tattauna da WHO a 2007 da 2017, wannan taron na uku da ke tafe shi ne na farko tun bayan kaddamar da sababbin tsare - tsare a cikin Janairu na 2021. Tsare -tsaren WHO don kula da cututtukan yankuna masu fama zafin rana 2021 - 2030 wani tsari ne mai mahimmanci wanda ke bayyana manifofi, hanyoyin tsara dabaru tare da Manufofin Ci gaba mai dorewa, da sauran ajandoji na duniya, an kuma yin kira dangane da cigaban NTD Na nan gaba, tare da da nufin kawo karshen annobar cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin rana nan da shekarar 2030.
translations.hypothesis: Majiyar Mawa tare da Program na Kasancewa da Matsaloli na Kasancewa, 12-13 Jun 2023, Masaukin kwamanda na kasancewa za su hadu a Geneva a wasan kwam, wanda zai gabata a gidan cin abinci na ofis na 12-13 Jun 2023. Tujuan wannan majiyar shi ne don nazarin ci gaba da babban rajon WHO na kasancewa daga 2021-2030, kuma kuma don Жҷarfafawa fahimtar daidai da kasancewa daga manyan hanyoyin, kamar da kuma shiga cikin muhawara da dama game da wani babban rajon WHO wanda zai kammala. Ta hanyar, majiyar da ta gabata na kasancewa da masu haЙ—a, ta gabata a 2007 da 2017, amma wannan majiyar ta uku, wanda zai gabata, ita ce ta farka bayan fara babban rajon a ranar Janairu 2021. Babban rajon WHO na kasancewa daga 2021-2030, shi ne tsarin da ke bayyana matakan, hanyoyin da za a yi amfani da su don yaЖҷi da matakan daidai, da kuma hanyoyin kasancewa, kuma yana bukatar canji daidai da hanyoyin kasancewa, tare da manufa na kammala matsalar kasancewa a shekarar 2030.

translations.source: The meeting will focus on: reviewing current progress to achieving the 2030 targets; identifying the major gaps and challenges to reaching those targets; agreeing principles and practical steps for how to implement action towards the targets; galvanizing support and commitment from NTD partners to operationalize the shifts advocated in the road map and to achieve its targets; and
translations.reference: Tattaunawar za ta ta'allaka ne a kan: duba irin ci gaban da aka samu a yanzu don cimma muradun 2030; gano manyan giЙ“ina da Жҷalubalen da ake fuskanta wajen cimma waЙ—ancan maЖҷasudan; yarda da ka'idoji da matakai masu amfani don yadda za a aiwatar da ayyuka don cimma manufa; tallafawa goyon baya da sadaukarwa daga abokan hulЙ—ar NTD don aiwatar da canjin shawarwarin da aka bayar a tsare - tsare, don cimma burika ; da kuma

translations.source: planning together for a Global Action Plan 2025вҖ“2030. Over 300 participants in the meeting are expected to attend, either in-person or online. They will include representatives of the global NTD community, from countries and donors to implementing and technical partners, from academia to patientsвҖҷ associations and all other entities and institutions involved in the fight against NTDs. An exhibition on neglected tropical diseases will take place in the mezzanine of the B building, just above the cafeteria. A set of metal panels will illustrate the 20 conditions grouped under the NTD umbrella and provide information on actions implemented to tackle their burden.
translations.reference: shiryawa a tare don gudanar da ayyukan Duniya na 2025 - 2030. Sama da mahalarta 300 a taron ana sa ran za su halarci, ko dai Ido da Ido ko kuma ta kafar sadarwa. Za su hada da wakilan al'ummar NTD na duniya, daga kasashe da masu ba da gudummawa ga aiwatarwa da abokan aikin fasaha. Tun daga makarantun ilimi har zuwa Жҷungiyoyin marasa lafiya da duk wasu Жҷungiyoyi da cibiyoyi da ke da hannu a yaЖҷi da NTDs,. baje kolin cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin rana, zai gudana a mezzanine na B building, kusa da wurin cin abinci. Jerin wasu fanel-fanel za su nuna yanayi 20 da aka haЙ—a a ЖҷarЖҷashin inuwar NTD tare da ba da bayanai a kan ayyukan da aka aiwatar don magance matsalolinsu.

translations.source: WHO announces winners of the 4th Health for All Film Festival 7 winning short films, 4 special mentions from the jury The World Health Organization has announced the official selection of this yearвҖҷs winning films at its 4th Annual Health for All Film Festival, held at WHO Headquarters, Geneva. The event, attended in person and online by actors, producers and public figures, saw winning films announced for 7 different categories, while 4 films received special mentions from the jury.

translations.source: This is the fourth year of the film festival and competition was no less fierce, with some 93 shortlisted films covering issues ranging from anxiety and depression through to the effects of climate change on health, as well as the health challenges of people with disabilities. The films were judged by a panel of distinguished professionals, artists and activists, including the renown actors, Sharon Stone and Alfonso Herrera, dance choreographer, Sherrie Silver, climate activist, Sophia Kianni and media personality, Adelle Onyango. They were joined by senior United Nations officials and WHO staff. вҖңThe Health for All Film Festival brings a human face to WHOвҖҷs scientific work,вҖқ said WHO Director-General, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. вҖңListening to the voices of people affected by health issues is a powerful way to raise awareness and improve our understanding of peopleвҖҷs experiences and this can help us advance towards health for all.вҖқ
translations.reference: Wannan ita ce shekara ta hudu ta gudanar da bikin fim, kuma gasar ba ta yi kasa a gwiwa ba, inda wasu fina-finai 93 da aka tantance waЙ—anda suka kunshi batutuwan da suka hada da damuwa da Жҷunci a sakamakon tasirin sauyin yanayi a harkar lafiya, da kuma kalubalen kiwon lafiyar nakasassu. Wasu gungun kwararrun masana, masu fasaha da masu fafutuka ne suka tantance fina-finan, ciki har da fitattun 'yan wasan kwaikwayo, Sharon Stone da kuma Alfonso herrera, mawaЖҷin rawa, sherri silver, mai fafutukar Lura da sauyin, sophia kianni da cikakken Й—an media, adelle onyango. Sun hade da manyan jami'o'i da ma'aikatan kungiyar likitoci ta duniya. Taron ingancin fina-finai ya yi Jan hankali ga WHO, cewar daraktan daraktoci na WHO, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Sauraron muryoyin mutanen da al'amurran kiwon lafiya suka shafa dangane da matsalolin harkar lafiya, wata hanya ce mai karfi don wayar da kan jama'a da inganta fahimtarmu game da abubuwan da mutane ke fuskanta, kuma wannan zai iya taimaka mana mu bunЖҷasa kiwon lafiya zuwa gaba.

translations.source: From the official selection one вҖңGRAND PRIXвҖқ is attributed for each of the three main competition categories: Universal Health Coverage, Health emergencies, and Better health and well-being, which align with WHOвҖҷs Triple Billion Targets. Sharon Stone, Golden Globe and Emmy Award-winning actress from the United States of America, producer and activist for health and humanitarian causes said: "I am delighted to be part of the Health for All Film Festival. This is about creating better awareness on crucial actions needed for reaching healthier living conditions around the world. The stories selected talk to us about the intrinsic value of good health and its access, and they advocate for universal health coverage.
translations.reference: Daga zaЙ“in alЖҷalan gasar , Й—ayan 'yan gasar ana danganta shi ga Й—aya daga cikin ukun Й“angarorin gasar: Masu gamayyar kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya, Masu Lura da sashen tallafin gaggawa, masu Lura da Ingancin kiwon lafiya da walwala, waЙ—anda suka sanarwa da WHO biliyan uku wanda ake nema. Sharon Stone, Golden Globe da Emmy masu lashe lambar yabo ta 'yan gasa daga Amurka, furodusa kuma mai fafutukar kiwon lafiya da harkokin jin Жҷai ya ce: "Na yi farin cikin kasancewa cikin bikin ingancin Fina-finai. Wannan ya kasance ne don samar da wayewa me kyau ,a Mahimman ЖҷoЖҷarin da ake buЖҷata don samun ingantaccen yanayi Na lafiya a duniya,. labarun da aka zaЙ“a suna magana da mu game da ainihin Жҷimar lafiya da samun damarta, kuma suna ba da shawarar samar da gamayyar lafiya ta Duniya.
translations.hypothesis: Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ШұШіЩ…ЩҠШҢ "GRAND PRIX" Й—aya yana ЖҷoЖҷarin ga kowane daga cikin Жҙan hakan: "Rayuwa da lafiya," "Matsaloli na lafiya," da "lafiya da rayuwa mai kyau," wanda ya Жҷarfafa da "Kyasan da ya ЖҷoЖҷarin Жҙan biliyan 3" na WHO. Sharon Stone, 'Golden Globe' da Emmy Award-Жҷaneman daga Amurika, kuma mai samar da kuma kuma mai rikodawa a kan harkin lafiya da al'ada, ya ce: "Na yi farin cikin a fushi a Film Festival na "Rayuwa da lafiya don duk." wannan yana kan Жҷarfafa fahimtar game da ayyuka masu muhimmanci da ya kamata a yi don cimma rayuwa mai lafiya a duniya. Lababun da an zaЙ“a suna Й—aukar mu cikin muhimmanci na lafiya mai kyau da yadda a samu, kuma suna Жҷarfafa "Rayuwa da lafiya don duk."

translations.source: Universal Health Coverage is a very important right, itвҖҷs a human right for everyone around the world. "Four special prizes were also given for a Student-produced film, a film on Climate Change and Health, a film on Sexual and Reproductive Health and Rights and a Very Short Film. The theme of mental health featured heavily in this yearвҖҷs winning entries, including a powerful and moving short film from Sweden about anxiety and depression. The film, set to a stirring soundtrack, featured a series of actors expressing different stages of anxiety and how it can manifest itself. The overall message was that you are not alone in experiencing negative thoughts and that it is okay to acknowledge such feelings.Another winning film, from Bangladesh, features a young boy who was exposed to lead from a local factory.
translations.reference: Gamayyar kiwon lafiya ta duniya hakki ne mai matuЖҷar mahimmanci, haЖҷЖҷin Й—an adam ne ga kowa da kowa a duniya. An kuma bayar da kyautuka na musamman guda hudu na fim din da dalibai suka shirya a kan sauyin yanayi da lafiya, da fim kan lafiyar jima'i da haifuwa da hakkoki da kuma gajeren fim. Taken lafiyar kwakwalwa ya fito sosai a cikin shigarwar nasara ta wannan shekara, gami da gajerun fim mai Жҷarfi da motsi daga mutanen Жҷasar Sweden game da damuwa da baЖҷin ciki. Fim Й—in, wanda aka tsara da sauti mai ban sha'awa, ya Жҷunshi jerin 'yan wasan kwaikwayo da ke bayyana matakan damuwa daban-daban da kuma yadda zai iya bayyana kansa. GabaЙ—ayan saЖҷon shi ne cewa ba kai kaЙ—ai bane ke fuskantar munanan tunani kuma yana da kyau a gane irin wannan tunanin. Wani fim Й—in da aka yi nasara, daga Жҷasar Bangladash, ya nuna wani yaro matashi da aka bayyana da jagoran wata masana'anta.
