translations.source: Basic energy access lags amid renewable opportunities, new report shows Global energy access gap persists: 675 million people without electricity, 2.3 billion people reliant on harmful cooking fuels A new report by the International Energy Agency (IEA), the International Renewable Energy Agency (IRENA), the United Nations Statistics Division (UNSD), the World Bank, and the World Health Organization (WHO), released today, finds that the world is not on track to achieve the Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) 7 for energy by 2030. This year marks the halfway point for achieving SDGs by 2030. SDG 7 is to ensure access to affordable, reliable, sustainable and modern energy.
translations.reference: Samun makamashi na asali yana da alaЖҷa a tsakanin damar sabuntawa, sabon rahoton ya nuna An ci gaba da samun gibin samun wutar lantarki a duniya: Mutane miliyan 675 ba su da wutar lantarki, mutane biliyan 2.3 sun dogara da abubuwan girki masu Й—umama. Wani sabon rahoton da hukumar kula da ikon Жҷasa da Жҷasa (IEA), da hukumar sabunta ikon Жҷasa da Жҷasa (IRENA), da hukumar kididdiga ta majalisar dinkin duniya (UNSD) da bankin duniya, da hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO), suka fitar a yau, ya nuna cewa duniya bata kan hanyar cimma burin ci gaba mai dorewa (SDG) 7 don samun iko nan da 2030. A wannan shekara ta nuna rabin lokaci don cimma SDGs nan da 2030. SDG 7 shi ne tabbatar da samun dama Kai tsaye,, abin dogaro, da dorewa da iko na zamani.
translations.hypothesis: ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү ШіЩҲШЎ Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© ЩҠШёЩ„ Щ…ШҙЩғЩ„Ш©, ШЁЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ ШӘШӘЩҲЩҒШұ ЩҒШұШө Щ„Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ¬ШҜШҜШ©, ШЈШёЩҮШұ ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ: Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ¬ЩҲШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Щ„Ш§ ШӘШІШ§Щ„ ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш©: 675 Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ Шұ person Щ„Ш§ ЩҠЩ…ШӘЩ„ЩғЩҲЩҶ ЩғЩҮШұШЁШ§ШЎ, 2.3 Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ§Шұ Шұ person ЩҠШұШӘЩғШІЩҲЩҶ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩӮЩҲШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш¶Ш§Шұ Щ„Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…. ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩғШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© (IEA), Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩғШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ¬ШҜШҜШ© (IRENA), ЩӮШіЩ… Ш§Щ„ШҘШӯШөШ§ШЎШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§ШЁШ№ Щ„Щ„ШЈЩ…Щ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШӯШҜШ© (UNSD), Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶЩғ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ, ЩҲ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© (WHO), Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ШӘЩ… ЩҶШҙШұЩҮ Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ…, ЩҠШёЩҮШұ ШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… Щ„Щ… ЩҠШЁШҜШЈ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШҜЩҒ 7 Щ„Щ„ШӘЩҶЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ…Ш© (SDG) ШЁШӯЩ„ЩҲЩ„ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2030. ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ… ЩҠЩ…Ш«Щ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩӮШ·Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШӘШөЩҒ Щ„ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҮШҜШ§ЩҒ 7 Щ„Щ„ШӘЩҶЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ…Ш© ШЁШӯЩ„ЩҲЩ„ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2030. Ш§Щ„ЩҮШҜЩҒ 7 ЩҮЩҲ Ш¶Щ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© ШұШ®ЩҠШөШ©, Щ…ЩҲШ«ЩҲЩӮШ©, Щ…ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ…Ш©, ЩҲ ШӯШҜЩҠШ«Ш©.

translations.source: The goal includes reaching universal access to electricity and clean cooking, doubling historic levels of efficiency improvements, and substantially increasing the share of renewables in the global energy mix. Attaining this goal will have a deep impact on peopleвҖҷs health and well-being, helping to protect them from environmental and social risks such as air pollution, and expanding access to primary health care and services. The 2023 edition of Tracking SDG 7: The Energy Progress Report warns that current efforts are not enough to achieve the SDG 7 on time. There has been some progress on specific elements of the SDG 7 agenda вҖ“ for example, the increased rate of using renewables in the power sector вҖ“ but progress is insufficient to reach the targets set forth in the SDGs. The global energy crisis is expected to stimulate the deployment of renewables and improve energy efficiency with several government policies pointing to increasing investment.
translations.reference: Makasudin ya hada da isar da damar samun wutar lantarki da dafa abinci mai tsafta, ninka matakan inganta ingantaccen aiki na tarihi, da kara yawan kason abubuwan da za a iya sabuntawa a cikin hadakar samun iko na duniya. Cimma wannan buri zai yi tasiri mai zurfi ga lafiyar mutane da walwala, yana taimakawa wajen kare su daga hatsarori na muhalli da zamantakewa kamar gurЙ“ataccen iska, da faЙ—aЙ—a hanyoyin samun kulawa da kiwon lafiya na farko da ayyuka. Bibiyar gyaran 2023 SDG 7: bunЖҷasar samun iko ya bayyana rahoton kashedin cewa ЖҷoЖҷarin da ake yi yanzu bai isa ba don cimma SDG 7 akan lokaci. An sami Й—an ci gaba kan taЖҷamaiman abubuwa na ajandar SDG 7 - alal misali, Жҷaruwar yawan amfani da abubuwan sabuntawa a fannin wutar lantarki - amma ci gaban bai isa ba don cimma manufofin da aka tsara a cikin SDGs. Ana sa ran rikicin samun makamashi na duniya zai haifar da tura abubuwan sabuntawa da ingantaccen iko tare da manufofin gwamnati da yawa da ke nuna karuwar saka hannun jari.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„ЩҮШҜЩҒ ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„ ШҘШӘШ§ШӯШ© ШҘЩ…ЩғШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҮШұШЁШ§ШЎ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш·Ш№Ш§Щ… Ш§Щ„ЩҶШёЩҠЩҒ Щ„Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№, ШІЩҠШ§ШҜШ© Щ…Ш№ШҜЩ„Ш§ШӘ ШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҒШ§ШЎШ©, ЩҲ ШІЩҠШ§ШҜШ© ЩҶШіШЁШ© Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ¬ШҜШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ШІЩҠШ¬ Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ. ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШҜЩҒ ШіЩҠЩ…Ш«Щ„ ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ ЩғШЁЩҠШұ Ш№Щ„Щү ШөШӯШ© ЩҲШұЩҒШ§ЩҮЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ші, ЩҲЩҠШіШ§Ш№ШҜ ЩҒЩҠ ШӯЩ…Ш§ЩҠШӘЩҮЩ… Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®Ш§Ш·Шұ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШҰЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ЩҠШ©, Щ…Ш«Щ„ ШӘЩ„ЩҲШ« Ш§Щ„ЩҮЩҲШ§ШЎ, ЩҲ ШӘЩҲШіЩҠШ№ ШҘЩ…ЩғШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© ЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш®ШҜЩ…Ш§ШӘ. Ш§Щ„ЩҶШіШ®Ш© 2023 Щ…ЩҶ ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұ "ШӘШӘШЁШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШҜЩҒ 7: ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұ ШӘЩӮШҜЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ©" ШӘЩҶШЁЩҮ ШҘЩ„Щү ШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҮЩҲШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„ЩҠШ© Щ„ЩҠШіШӘ ЩғШ§ЩҒЩҠШ© Щ„ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШҜЩҒ 7 ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩӮШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШҜШҜ. ЩӮШҜ ШӘЩ… ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ ШЁШ№Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШҜЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Щ…ШӯШҜШҜШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш¬ШҜЩҲЩ„ ШЈШ№Щ…Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШҜЩҒ 7 вҖ“ Ш№Щ„Щү ШіШЁЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„, ШІЩҠШ§ШҜШ© Щ…Ш№ШҜЩ„ Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ¬ШҜШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ ЩӮШ·Ш§Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© вҖ“ ЩҲЩ„ЩғЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШҜЩ… Щ„ЩҠШі ЩғШ§ЩҒЩҠЩӢШ§ Щ„ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҮШҜШ§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩ… ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜЩҮШ§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҮШҜШ§ЩҒ. ЩҠЩҸШӘЩҲЩӮШ№ ШЈЩҶ ШЈШІЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ШіШӘШҙШ¬Ш№ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ¬ШҜШҜШ© ЩҲШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ ЩғЩҒШ§ШЎШ© Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ШіЩҠШ§ШіШ§ШӘ ШӯЩғЩҲЩ…ЩҠШ© Щ…ШӘШ№ШҜШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШҙЩҠШұ ШҘЩ„Щү ШІЩҠШ§ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ«Щ…Ш§Шұ.

translations.source: However, IRENA estimates show that international public financial flows in support of clean energy in low- and middle-income countries have been decreasing since before the COVID-19 pandemic and funding is limited to a small number of countries. To meet SDG 7 targets and to ensure that people fully benefit from the socio-economic gains of the shift to sustainable energy, it is necessary to structurally reform international public finance and define new opportunities to unlock investments. The report also finds that mounting debt and rising energy prices are worsening the outlook for reaching universal access to clean cooking and electricity. Current projections estimate that 1.9 billion people will be without clean cooking and 660 million without electricity access in 2030 if we do not take further action and continue with current efforts. These gaps will negatively impact the health of our most vulnerable populations and accelerate climate change.
translations.reference: Ko yaya, Жҷididdigar IRENA ta nuna cewa kwararar kudaden jama'a na Жҷasa da Жҷasa don tallafawa na samar da cikakken makamash, a cikin Жҷasashe masu karamin karfi da matsakaita, suna na raguwa tun kafin barkewar cutar ta COVID-19 kuma an taЖҷaita kudade ga kananan Жҷasashe. Don cimma burin SDG ta 7 da kuma tabbatar da cewa mutane sun ci gajiyar ci gaban zamantakewa da tattalin arziЖҷin na canjin makamashi mai dorewa, ya zama dole a sake fasalin tsarin kuЙ—in jama'a na duniya da ayyana sabbin damammaki don buЙ—e hannun jari. Rahoton ya kuma nuna cewa karuwar basussuka da hauhawar farashin na kara tabarbare hasashe na ganin an kai ga samun tsaftataccen makamashin dafa abinci da wutar lantarki. Hasashen da aka yi a halin yanzu ya nuna cewa mutane biliyan 1.9 ba za su rasa girki mai tsafta ba sannan miliyan 660 ba za su samu wutar lantarki ba a shekarar 2030 idan ba mu dauki wani mataki ba kuma a ci gaba da kokarin da ake yi a yanzu. wadannan giЙ“inan za su yi mummunan tasiri ga lafiyar al'ummar mu masu rauni da kuma hanzarta canjin yanayi.
translations.hypothesis: Щ„ЩғЩҶШҢ ШҘШӯШөШ§ШЎШ§ШӘ IRENA ШӘШёЩҮШұ ШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜЩҒЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠШ© Щ„ШҜШ№Щ… Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҶШёЩҠЩҒШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш°ЩҲЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ®Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ®ЩҒШ¶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ·ШҢ ЩӮШҜ ШӘШұШ§Ш¬Ш№ШӘ Щ…ЩҶШ° ЩӮШЁЩ„ ШӘЩҒШҙЩҠ Ш¬Ш§ШҰШӯШ© COVID-19ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ШұШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© Щ…ШӯШҜЩҲШҜШ© Щ„Ш№ШҜШҜ ЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ. Щ„ЩғЩҠ ЩҶЩ„ШЁЩҠ ШЈЩҮШҜШ§ЩҒ SDG 7 ЩҲЩҶШ¶Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ші ЩҠШіШӘЩҒЩҠШҜЩҲЩҶ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ЩғШ§Щ…Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩғШ§ШіШЁ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ЩӮШӘШөШ§ШҜЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Щ…ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ…Ш©ШҢ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш¶ШұЩҲШұЩҠ ШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎ ШҘШөЩ„Ш§Шӯ ЩҮЩҠЩғЩ„ЩҠ Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ШұШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠШ© ЩҲШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜ ЩҒШұШө Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜШ© Щ„ЩҒШӘШӯ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ«Щ…Ш§ШұШ§ШӘ. Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұ ЩҠШёЩҮШұ ШЈЩҠШ¶ЩӢШ§ ШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШІШ§ЩҠШҜШ© ЩҲШЈШіШ№Ш§Шұ Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШІШ§ЩҠШҜШ©ШҢ ШӘШ¬Ш№Щ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш·Ш№Ш§Щ… ЩҶШёЩҠЩҒ ЩҲЩғЩҮШұШЁШ§ШЎ ШЈЩғШ«Шұ ШөШ№ЩҲШЁШ©. Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲЩӮШ№Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„ЩҠШ© ШӘШҙЩҠШұ ШҘЩ„Щү ШЈЩҶ 1.9 Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ§Шұ ШҙШ®Шө Щ„ЩҶ ЩҠШӘЩ…ЩғЩҶЩҲШ§ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш·Ш№Ш§Щ… ЩҶШёЩҠЩҒШҢ ЩҲ 660 Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ ШҙШ®Шө Щ„ЩҶ ЩҠШӘЩ…ЩғЩҶЩҲШ§ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩғЩҮШұШЁШ§ШЎ ЩҒЩҠ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2030ШҢ ШҘШ°Ш§ Щ„Щ… ЩҶШӘШ®Ш° ШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎШ§ШӘ ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒЩҠШ© ЩҲЩҶШіШӘЩ…Шұ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҮЩҲШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„ЩҠШ©. ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ¬ЩҲШ§ШӘ ШіШӘШӨШ«Шұ ШіЩ„ШЁЩӢШ§ Ш№Щ„Щү ШөШӯШ© Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш§ШӘЩҶШ§ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Ш¶Ш№ЩҒЩӢШ§ШҢ ЩҲШіШӘШіШ§ШұШ№ Ш§Щ„ШӘШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш®ЩҠ.

translations.source: According to WHO, 3.2 million people die each year from illness caused by the use of polluting fuels and technologies, which increase exposure to toxic levels of household air pollution. Key findings of the report In 2010, 84% of the worldвҖҷs population had access to electricity. This increased to 91% in 2021, meaning more than a billion people gained access over that period. However, the growth pace of access slowed in 2019вҖ“2021 compared to previous years.
translations.reference: A cewar WHO, mutane miliyan 3.2 ne ke mutuwa a kowace shekara sakamakon rashin lafiya da amfani da gurbataccen mai da fasahohin kirki ke haifarwa, wanda ke kara yawan kamuwa da gurЙ“acewar iska na gida. Mahimmin sakamakon rahoton A cikin 2010, kashi 84% na al'ummar duniya sun sami wutar lantarki a wancan lokacin. wannan ya karu zuwa 91% a cikin 2021, ma'ana fiye da mutane biliyan sun sami damar shiga cikin wannan lokacin. Ko yaya, saurin haЙ“akar damar shiga ya ragu a cikin 2019 - 2021 idan aka kwatanta da shekarun da suka gabata.

translations.source: Rural electrification efforts contributed to this progress, but a large gap within urban areas remains. In 2021, 567 million people in sub-Saharan Africa did not have access to electricity, accounting for more than 80% of the global population without access. The access deficit in the region stayed almost the same as in 2010. The world remains off track to achieve universal access to clean cooking by 2030. Up to 2.3 billion people still use polluting fuels and technologies for cooking, largely in sub-Saharan Africa and Asia.
translations.reference: YunЖҳurin samar da wutar lantarki a yankunan karkara ya taimaka wajen wannan ci gaba, amma akwai babban giЙ“i a cikin birane. A cikin shekarar 2021, mutane miliyan 567 a yankin Sahara ba su da wutar lantarki, wanda ya kai sama da kashi 80% na al'ummar duniya ba tare da samun wutar lantarki ba. Rashin isa ga yankin ya Жҷasance kusan daidai da na shekarar 2010. Duniya ta Жҷasance a kan hanya don samun damar dafa abinci mai tsafta nan da 2030. Kimanin mutane biliyan 2.3 har yanzu suna amfani da gurbataccen mai da fasahohin dafa abinci, galibi a yankin Sahara da Asiya.

Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩӮШө ЩҒЩҠ ШҘЩ…ЩғШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ЩҒЩҠ wannan yankin ya kasance kamar yadda ya kasance a 2010. Duniya ba ta samu damar samun kayan zaki mai kyau ta 2030. Har zuwa 2.3 Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ§Шұ r person, yana amfani da kayan zaki da na Жҷungiyar da ke Жҷarfasa, wanda ya kasance da kwaya, kamar shama afrika da Asiya.

translations.source: The use of traditional biomass also means households spend up to 40 hours a week gathering firewood and cooking, which prohibits women from pursuing employment or participating in local decision-making bodies and children from going to school. According to the 2019 WHO estimates, 3.2 million premature deaths each year were attributable to household air pollution created by using polluting fuels and technologies for cooking. Renewable electricity use in global consumption has grown from 26.3% in 2019 to 28.2% in 2020, the largest single-year increase since the start of tracking progress for the SDGs. Efforts to increase renewablesвҖҷ share in heating and transport, which represent more than three quarters of global energy consumption, remain off target to achieve 1.5oC climate objectives. Energy intensity вҖ“ the measure of how much energy the global economy uses per dollar of GDP вҖ“ improved from 2010вҖ“2020 by 1.8% annually.
translations.reference: Amfani da biomas na gargajiya yana nufin gidaje suna kwashe sama da sa'o'i 40 a mako suna tattara itace da dafa abinci, wanda ke hana mata neman aikin yi ko shiga cikin Жҷungiyoyin yanke shawara na gida da yara zuwa makaranta. Bisa kididdigar da WHO ta yi a shekarar 2019, mutane miliyan 3.2 ne ke mutuwa da wuri a kowace shekara sakamakon gurЙ“acewar iska da aka haifar ta hanyar amfani da gurbataccen mai da fasahohin dafa abinci. Amfani da wutar lantarki mai sabuntawa a cikin amfani da duniya ya karu daga 26.3% a cikin 2019 zuwa 28.2% a cikin 2020, haЙ“aka mafi girma na shekara guda tun farkon sa ido kan ci gaban SDGs. ЖҳoЖҷarin haЙ“aka rabo mai sabuntawa a cikin dumama da sufuri, wanda ke wakiltar sama da kashi uku cikin huЙ—u na amfani da makamashi na duniya, ya ci gaba da Жҷasancewa a kan manufa don cimma manufofin yanayi na 1.5o C. Жҳarfin makamashi - ma'aunin makamashi na yawan makamashin da tattalin arzikin duniya ke amfani da shi kowace dala na GDP" ya inganta daga 2010 "2020 da 1.8% a kowace shekara.

translations.source: This is higher than the 1.2% improvement from the previous decades. However, the rate of energy intensity improvement has slowed in recent years and dropped to 0.6% in 2020. This makes it the worst year for energy intensity improvement since the global financial crisis, albeit largely due to pandemic-related restrictions, which may indicate only a temporary setback. Annual improvements through 2030 must now average 3.4% to meet the SDG target 7.3. International public financial flows in support of clean energy in developing countries stand at US$ 10.8 billion in 2021, 35% less than the 2010вҖ“2019 average and only about 40% of the 2017 peak of US$ 26.4 billion. In 2021, 19 countries received 80% of the commitments.The report will be presented to top decision-makers at a special launch event on 11 July 2023 at the High-Level Political Forum (HLPF) on Sustainable Development, ahead of the second SDG Summit in September 2023 in New York.
translations.reference: Wannan ya fi na kashi 1.2% inganta daga shekarun da suka gabata. Koyaya, Жҷimar haЙ“akar Жҷarfin makamashi ya ragu a cikin 'yan shekarun nan kuma ya ragu zuwa 0.6% a cikin 2020. Wannan ya sanya ta zama mafi munin shekara don haЙ“aka Жҷarfin makamashi tun bayan rikicin kuЙ—in duniya, kodayake galibi saboda Жҷuntatawa masu alaЖҷa da cutar, wanda na iya nuna koma baya na Й—an lokaci kawai. Ci gaban shekara-shekara ta 2030 dole ne yanzu matsakaita 3.4% don cimma burin SDG ta 7.3. Adadin kudaden jama'a na Жҷasa da Жҷasa don tallafawa tsaftataccen makamashi a cikin Жҳasashe masu tasowa ya tsaya a dalar Amurka biliyan 10.8 a cikin 2021, 35% Жҳasa da na 2010 вҖңmatsakaici na 2019 kuma kusan kashi 40% na kololuwar 2017 na dala biliyan 26.4. A cikin 2021, Жҷasashe 19 sun sami kashi 80% na alkawuran. Za a gabatar da rahoton ga manyan masu yanke shawara a wani taron Жҷaddamarwa na musamman a ranar 11 ga Yuli 2023 a Babban Taron Siyasa (HLPF) kan Ci Gaba mai Й—orewa, gabanin SDG na biyu Taron koli a watan Satumba na 2023 a New York.
translations.hypothesis: wannan ya Жҷasa fiye da 1.2% Жҳara da ya samu daga shekarun baya. Dukansu, tasirin Жҷara da Жҷarfin wutar ya Жҷara, amma ya Жҷara a shekaru masu Й—an, kuma ya kai 0.6% a 2020. wannan yana Й“angarar shekara don Жҷara da Жҷarfin wutar tun daga zaman gudanar da kwararar, duk da cewa ya kasance sabbin Жҷatagor, wanda ya chб»ү cewa wannan yana Й“angarar. Ya kamata a samu Жҷara da 3.4% a shekaru har zuwa 2030 don cimma burin SDG 7.3. Da'awa ta al'umma a duniya wajen tallafawa wutar mai zaman gwiya a kasashe masu haЖҷЖҷin, ta kasance $10.8 biliyan a 2021, wanda ya Жҷara 35% daga matsakaicin 2010-2019, kuma ya kasance karfin 40% na matsakaicin $26.4 biliyan a 2017. A 2021, 19 kasashe sun karЙ“a 80% na ayyukan. Bayanan za a gabatar da masu yanke hukuma a babban taron, a ranar 11 ga Yuli 2023, a Forum na Gudanarwa, a gaba da taron SDG na biyu a New York a watan Septemba 2023.

translations.source: The authors urge the international community and policymakers to safeguard the gains made toward achieving SDG 7, to advance structural reforms, and to maintain a strategic focus on the vulnerable countries needing the most support. Quotes: вҖңThe energy crisis sparked by RussiaвҖҷs invasion of Ukraine continues to have a profound impact on people all around the world. High energy prices have hit the most vulnerable hard, particularly those in developing economies. While the clean energy transition is moving faster than many think, there is still a great deal of work needed to deliver sustainable, secure and affordable access to modern energy services for the billions of people who live without it. Successful energy transitions rely on effective policies and technological innovation combined with large-scale mobilisation of investment capital.
translations.reference: Marubutan sun tursasa al'ummomin Жҷasa da Жҷasa da masu tsara manufofi da su kiyaye nasarorin da aka samu wajen cimma burin SDG ta 7, don samar da sauye-sauyen tsarin, da kuma mai da hankali kan dabarun yaЖҷi da Жҷasashe masu rauni da ke buЖҷatar tallafi mafi girma. Sharhi: Rikicin makamashi da mamayar Rasha ta yi wa Ukraine na ci gaba da yin tasiri sosai ga mutane a duk duniya. HaЙ“aka farashin makamashi ya yi fama da mafi rauni, musamman waЙ—anda ke cikin Жҷasashe masu tasowar tattalin arziki. Yayin da tsaftataccen makamashi ke tafiya da sauri fiye da yadda mutane da yawa ke tunani, har yanzu akwai babban aiki da ake buЖҷata don isar da Й—orewa, mai aminci da kuma mai araha ga sabis na makamashi na zamani ga biliyoyin mutanen da ke rayuwa ba tare da shi ba. Nasarar canjin makamashi ta dogara ne akan ingantattun manufofi da sabbin fasahohi haЙ—e tare da tattara manyan jari.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӨЩ„ЩҒЩҲЩҶ ЩҠШ·Щ„ШЁЩҲЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠ ЩҲЩ…ШіШӨЩҲЩ„ЩҠЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШӯШ§ЩҒШёЩҲШ§ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШҜЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШұШІ ЩҶШӯЩҲ ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШҜЩҒ 7ШҢ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠЩҲШ§ШөЩ„ЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„ШҘШөЩ„Ш§ШӯШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҮЩҠЩғЩ„ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШЈЩҶ ЩҠШұЩғШІЩҲШ§ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш¶Ш№ЩҠЩҒШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ ШҘЩ„Щү ШҜШ№Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШЁШұ. Ш§ЩӮШӘШЁШ§Ші: "Ш§Щ„ШЈШІЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШЁШҜШЈШӘ ШЁШіШЁШЁ ШәШІЩҲ ШЈЩҲЩғШұШ§ЩҶЩҠШ§ Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШЁЩ„ ШұЩҲШіЩҠШ§ Щ„Ш§ ШӘШІШ§Щ„ Щ„ЩҮШ§ ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ ЩғШЁЩҠШұ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ші ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ШЈЩҶШӯШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…. Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ№Ш§Шұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШӘЩҒШ№Ш© Щ„Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© ЩӮШҜ ШЈШ«ШұШӘ ШЁШҙШҜШ© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ЩҒШҰШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Ш¶Ш№ЩҒЩӢШ§ШҢ ЩҲШ®Ш§ШөШ© ШӘЩ„Щғ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩӮШӘШөШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠШ©. ШЁЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© ЩҶШёЩҠЩҒШ© ЩҠШӘЩ… ШЁЩҲШӘЩҠШұШ© ШЈШіШұШ№ Щ…Щ…Ш§ ЩҠШ№ШӘЩӮШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩғШ«ЩҠШұЩҲЩҶШҢ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШІШ§Щ„ ЩҮЩҶШ§Щғ Ш§Щ„ЩғШ«ЩҠШұ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш·Щ„ЩҲШЁ Щ„Ш¶Щ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШўЩ…ЩҶ ЩҲЩ…ЩҠШіЩҲШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩғЩ„ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү Ш®ШҜЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШҜЩҠШ«Ш© Щ„Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ§ШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠЩ…ШӘЩ„ЩғЩҲЩҶЩҮШ§. Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩҲЩ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Ш¬ШӯШ© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© ШӘШ№ШӘЩ…ШҜ Ш№Щ„Щү ШіЩҠШ§ШіШ§ШӘ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„Ш© ЩҲШ§ШЁШӘЩғШ§Шұ ШӘЩғЩҶЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҠШҢ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү ШӘШ¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ЩғШЁЩҠШұ Щ„ШұШЈШі Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§Щ„ Щ„Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ«Щ…Ш§Шұ.

translations.source: The international community must leverage all these tools to meet the Sustainable Development Goals by the end of this decade.вҖқ Fatih Birol, Executive Director, International Energy Agency вҖңCost-competitive renewable energy has yet again demonstrated remarkable resilience, but the poorest in the world are still largely unable to fully benefit from it. To realise SDG7 without compromising climate goals, we must bring about systemic change in the way international cooperation works. It is crucial that multilateral financial institutions direct financial flows more equitably around the world to support renewables deployment and related physical infrastructure development.вҖқ Francesco La Camera, Director-General, International Renewable Energy Agency вҖңDespite advances towards sustainable energy targets at the mid-point of Agenda 2030, Goal 7 seems harder to reach than it was in 2015 and scaled-up action is necessary if we are to ensure access to affordable, reliable, sustainable and modern energy for all by 2030.
translations.reference: Dole ne Жҷasashen duniya su yi amfani da dukkan wadannan kayayyakin aikin don cimma burin ci gaba mai dorewa nan da karshen wannan shekaru goma. Fatih Birol, Babban Daraktan Hukumar Makamashi ta Duniya. Sabuwar makamashi mai tsada ya sake nuna juriya na ban mamaki, amma mafi talauci a duniya har yanzu ba su iya amfana daga gare ta. Don gano SDG ta 7 ba tare da Й“ata manufofin sauyin yanayi ba, dole ne mu kawo sauyi na tsarin yadda haЙ—in gwiwar duniya ke aiki. Yana da mahimmanci cewa cibiyoyin hada-hadar kuЙ—i da yawa suna jagorantar tafiyar da harkokin kuЙ—i cikin adalci a duk faЙ—in duniya don tallafawa tura abubuwan sabuntawa da haЙ“aka abubuwan more rayuwa na zahiri. Francesco La Kamara, Darakta-Janar, Hukumar Sabunta Makamashi ta Duniya. Duk da ci gaban da aka samu kan maЖҷasudan makamashi masu Й—orewa a tsakiyar ajandar 2030, Manufar ta 7 tana da wahala a cimma fiye da yadda yake a cikin 2015 kuma matakan haЙ“aka ya zama dole idan muna son tabbatar da samun damar samun araha, abin dogaro, Й—orewa da makamashi na zamani ga kowa da kowa. zuwa 2030.
translations.hypothesis: "Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠШ© ЩҠШ¬ШЁ ШЈЩҶ ШӘШіШӘШәЩ„ ЩғЩ„ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲШ§ШӘ Щ„ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ ШЈЩҮШҜШ§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ…Ш© ШЁШӯЩ„ЩҲЩ„ ЩҶЩҮШ§ЩҠШ© ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩӮШҜ." ЩҒatih BirolШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ°ЩҠШҢ ЩҲЩғШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠШ© "Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ¬ШҜШҜШ© Ш°Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩғЩ„ЩҒШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ®ЩҒШ¶Ш© ЩӮШҜ ШЈШёЩҮШұШӘ Щ…ШұШ© ШЈШ®ШұЩү Щ…ШұЩҲЩҶШ© ЩғШЁЩҠШұШ©ШҢ Щ„ЩғЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩӮШұШ§ШЎ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШІШ§Щ„ЩҲЩҶ ШәЩҠШұ ЩӮШ§ШҜШұЩҠЩҶ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜШ© Щ…ЩҶЩҮШ§ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩғШ§Щ…Щ„. Щ„ЩғЩҠ ЩҶШӯЩӮЩӮ ЩҮШҜЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩ…ЩҠШ© ШұЩӮЩ… 7 ШҜЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§Ші ШЁШ§Щ„ШЈЩҮШҜШ§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш®ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҠШ¬ШЁ Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҶШ§ ШҘШӯШҜШ§Ш« ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ ЩҶШёШ§Щ…ЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№Ш§ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠ ЩҠШ№Щ…Щ„. Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш¶ШұЩҲШұЩҠ ШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӨШіШіШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© Щ…ШӘШ№ШҜШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈШ·ШұШ§ЩҒ ШӘЩҲШ¬ЩҮ ШӘШҜЩҒЩӮШ§ШӘ Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Ш№ШҜШ§Щ„Ш© ШӯЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… Щ„ШҜШ№Щ… ЩҶШҙШұ Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ¬ШҜШҜШ© ЩҲШӘШ·ЩҲЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯШӘЩҠШ© Ш°Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөЩ„Ш©." ЩҒШұШ§ЩҶШіЩҠШіЩғЩҲ La CameraШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…ШҢ ЩҲЩғШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ¬ШҜШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠШ© "Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШұШәЩ… Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШҜЩ… ЩҶШӯЩҲ ШЈЩҮШҜШ§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ…Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШӘШөЩҒ Ш®Ш·Ш© 2030ШҢ ЩҠШЁШҜЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШҜЩҒ ШұЩӮЩ… 7 ШЈШөШ№ШЁ Щ…ЩҶ ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮЩҮШ§ Щ…ЩӮШ§ШұЩҶШ© ШЁШ№Ш§Щ… 2015ШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШіШЁШЁШҢ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш¶ШұЩҲШұЩҠ Ш§ШӘШ®Ш§Ш° ШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎШ§ШӘ Щ…ЩғШ«ЩҒШ© ШҘШ°Ш§ ЩғЩҶШ§ ЩҶШұЩҠШҜ Ш¶Щ…Ш§ЩҶ ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Щ…ЩҠШіЩҲШұШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩғЩ„ЩҒШ©ШҢ Щ…ЩҲШ«ЩҲЩӮШ©ШҢ Щ…ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ…Ш©ШҢ ЩҲШӯШҜЩҠШ«Ш© ШЁШӯЩ„ЩҲЩ„ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2030.

translations.source: Access to electricity and clean cooking still display great regional disparities and should be the focus of action to ensure that no one is left behind. Investment needs to reach the least-developed countries and sub-Saharan Africa to ensure more equitable progress toward Goal 7.вҖқ Stefan Schweinfest, United Nations Statistics Division вҖңDespite a recent slowdown in the global pace of electrification, the number of people without electricity almost halved over the past decade, from 1.1 billion in 2010 down to 675 million in 2021. Nonetheless, additional efforts and measures must urgently be put in place to ensure that the poorest and hardest-to-reach people are not left behind. To reach universal access by 2030, the development community must scale up clean energy investments and policy support.вҖқ Guangzhe Chen, Vice President for Infrastructure, World Bank
translations.reference: Samun wutar lantarki da dafa abinci mai tsafta har yanzu suna nuna babban bambance-bambancen yanki kuma yakamata a mai da hankali kan aikin don tabbatar da cewa ba a bar kowa a baya ba. Saka hannun jari na buЖҷatar ya isa Жҷasashe masu Жҷaramin Жҷarfi da kuma hamadar sahara domin tabbatar da samun ci gaba cikin adalci wajen cimma burin na 7. Stefan Schweinfest, Sashen Жҷididdiga na Majalisar ЖҠinkin Duniya. Duk da koma bayan da aka samu a harkar samar da wutar lantarki a duniya, adadin mutanen da ba su da wutar lantarki kusan ya ragu a cikin shekaru goma da suka gabata, daga biliyan 1.1 a shekarar 2010 zuwa miliyan 675 a shekarar 2021. Duk da haka, dole ne a Жҷara yin ЖҷoЖҷari da matakai na gaggawa don tabbatar da cewa ba a bar masu fama da talauci da wahala a baya ba. Don samun isa ga duniya nan da shekarar 2030, dole ne al'ummar ci gaba su haЙ“aka hannun jarin makamashi mai tsafta da tallafin manufofi. Guangzhe Chen, mataimakin shugaban Жҷasa kan samar da ababen more rayuwa, bankin duniya

Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ«Щ…Ш§Шұ ЩҠШ¬ШЁ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠЩҲШ¬ЩҮ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШЈШ¬ШІШ§ШЎ Щ…ЩҶ ШҙШ§Щ…Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Ш§ШӯШӘЩҠШ§Ш¬ЩӢШ§ШҢ ЩҲШ°Щ„Щғ Щ„Ш¶Щ…Ш§ЩҶ ШӘЩӮШҜЩ… ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Ш№ШҜЩ„Ш§ЩӢ ЩҶШӯЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШҜЩҒ ШұЩӮЩ… 7. - ШіШӘЩҠЩҒШ§ЩҶ ШҙЩҒЩҠЩҶЩҒШіШӘШҢ ЩӮШіЩ… Ш§Щ„ШҘШӯШөШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§ШЁШ№ Щ„Щ„ШЈЩ…Щ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШӯШҜШ© "Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШұШәЩ… Щ…ЩҶ ШӘШЁШ§Ш·ШӨ ЩҒЩҠ ЩҲШӘЩҠШұШ© ШӘЩҲШөЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҮШұШЁШ§ШЎ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҢ Ш№ШҜШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠЩ…Щ„ЩғЩҲЩҶ ЩғЩҮШұШЁШ§ШЎ ЩӮШҜ Ш§ЩҶШ®ЩҒШ¶ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ЩҶШөЩҒ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩӮШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§Ш¶ЩҠШҢ Щ…ЩҶ 1.1 Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ§Шұ ЩҒЩҠ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2010 ШҘЩ„Щү 675 Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2021. ЩҲЩ…Ш№ Ш°Щ„ЩғШҢ ЩҠШ¬ШЁ Ш§ШӘШ®Ш§Ш° Ш¬ЩҮЩҲШҜ ЩҲЩ…ШЁШ§ШҜШұШ§ШӘ ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒЩҠШ© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҲШұ Щ„Ш¶Щ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш№ШҜЩ… ШӘШұЩғ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩӮШұШ§ШЎ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Ш§ШӯШӘЩҠШ§Ш¬ЩӢШ§ ЩҲШұШ§ШЎ. Щ„Ш¶Щ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„ ШЁШӯЩ„ЩҲЩ„ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2030ШҢ Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩ…ЩҠШ© ЩҠШ¬ШЁ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШІЩҠШҜ Ш§ШіШӘШ«Щ…Ш§ШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҶШёЩҠЩҒШ© ЩҲШҜШ№Щ… Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠШ§ШіШ§ШӘ. - Ш¬ЩҲШ§ЩҶШІЩҠЩҮ ШӘШҙЩҠЩҶШҢ ЩҶШ§ШҰШЁ ШұШҰЩҠШі Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶЩғ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШҢ ЩӮШіЩ… Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯШӘЩҠШ©

translations.source: вҖңWe must protect the next generation by acting now. Investing in clean and renewable solutions to support universal energy access is how we can make real change. Clean cooking technologies in homes and reliable electricity in health-care facilities can play a crucial role in protecting the health of our most vulnerable populations.вҖқ Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General, World Health Organization About the report This report is published by the SDG 7 custodian agencies, the International Energy Agency (IEA), the International Renewable Energy Agency (IRENA), the United Nations Statistics Division (UNSD), the World Bank, and the World Health Organization (WHO) and aims to provide the international community with a global dashboard to register progress on energy access, energy efficiency, renewable energy and international cooperation to advance SDG 7.
translations.reference: Dole ne mu kare alвҖҷumma masu ya sowa ta haryar yin aiki a yanzu. Zuba hannun jari a cikin mafita mai tsabta da sabuntawa don tallafawa samun damar makamashi ta duniya shi ne yadda za mu iya samar da canji na gaske. Tsaftace fasahohin dafa abinci a gidaje da ingantaccen wutar lantarki a wuraren kiwon lafiya na iya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kare lafiyar alвҖҷummarmu masu rauni. Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Darakta Janar na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya WHO. Ga me da rahoton Hukumomin kulawa na SDG 7 ne suka wallafa wannan rahoto, Hukumar Kula da Makamashi ta Duniya ta (IEA) da Hukumar Kula da Makamashi ta Duniya (IRENA), Sashen Kididdiga na Majalisar Dinkin Duniya (UNSD), Bankin Duniya, da Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) kuma yana da nufin samarwa al'ummomin kasa da kasa wata dama ta duniya don yin rijistar cigaba da samun makamashi da ingancin makamashi da sabunta makamashi da hadin gwiwar Жҷasa da Жҷasa don ciyar da SDG 7 gaba.

translations.source: This is the ninth edition of this report, formerly known as the Global Tracking Framework (GTF). This yearвҖҷs edition was chaired by the World Health Organization (WHO). The report can be downloaded here Funding for the report was provided by the World BankвҖҷs Energy Sector Management Assistance Program (ESMAP).
translations.reference: Wannan shi ne bugu na tara na wannan rahoto, wanda a da ake kira Global Tracking Framework (GTF). Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) ce ta jagoranci bugun na wannan shekaran. Ana iya sauke rahoton a nan. Shirin Taimakawa Sashen Kula da Makamashi na Bankin Duniya (ESMAP) ne ya bayar da tallafin rahoton.

Ш§Щ„ЩҶШіШ®Ш© ШҜШ§uniya ta wannan shekara, ta Жҷayyashi ta Жҷungiyar Afiya na Duniya (WHO). Za a iya Р¶ТҜРәСӮУ©У© wannan ШұШҜ, ШӨШҜШ§. translations.source: The European Commission and WHO launch landmark digital health initiative to strengthen global health security The World Health Organization (WHO) and European Commission have announced today the launch of a landmark digital health partnership. In June 2023, WHO will take up the European Union (EU) system of digital COVID-19 certification to establish a global system that will help facilitate global mobility and protect citizens across the world from on-going and future health threats, including pandemics. This is the first building block of the WHO Global Digital Health Certification Network (GDHCN) that will develop a wide range of digital products to deliver better health for all. вҖңBuilding on the EUвҖҷs highly successful digital certification network, WHO aims to offer all WHO Member States access to an open-source digital health tool, which is based on the principles of equity, innovation, transparency and data protection and privacy,вҖқ said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General.
translations.reference: Hukumar Tarayyar Turai da WHO sun kaddamar da wani muhimmin shiri na kiwon lafiya na dijital don karfafa tsaron lafiyar duniya. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) da Hukumar Tarayyar Turai sun ba da sanarwar Жҷaddamar da wani muhimmin haЙ—in gwiwa na kiwon lafiya na dijital. A watan Yuni 2023, WHO za ta Й—auki tsarin Tarayyar Turai (EU) na takardun shaida na dijital na COVID-19 don kafa tsarin duniya wanda zai taimaka wa sauЖҷaЖҷe zirga-zirgar duniya tare da kare 'yan Жҷasa a duk faЙ—in duniya daga ci gaba da barazanar lafiya na gaba, game da annoba. Wannan shi ne tubalin farko na cibiyar sadarwa ta WHO Global Digital Health Certification Network (GDHCN) wacce za ta samar da nau'uka samfuran dijital da yawa don isar da ingantacciyar lafiya ga kowa. "Gina kan hanyar sadarwar satifiket Й—in dijital ta EU mai nasara sosai, WHO na da niyyar bai wa duk Жҷasashe, membobin WHO damar samun buЙ—aЙ—Й—en kayan aikin kiwon lafiya na dijital, wanda ya dogara da Жҷa'idojin daidaito, ЖҷirЖҷira, bayyana gaskiya da kariyar bayanai da kuma keЙ“ancewa. Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Darakta Janar na WHO.

translations.source: вҖңNew digital health products in development aim to help people everywhere receive quality health services quickly and more effectivelyвҖқ. Based on the EU Global Health Strategy and WHO Global strategy on digital health, the initiative follows the 30 November 2022 agreement between Commissioner Kyriakides and Dr Tedros to enhance strategic cooperation on global health issues. This further bolsters a robust multilateral system with WHO at its core, powered by a strong EU.вҖңThis partnership is an important step for the digital action plan of the EU Global Health Strategy. By using European best practices we contribute to digital health standards and interoperability globallyвҖ”to the benefit of those most in need. It is also a powerful example of how alignment between the EU and the WHO can deliver better health for all, in the EU and across the world.
translations.reference: Dangane da dabarun kiwon lafiya na duniya na EU da dabarun WHO na duniya kan lafiyar dijital, yunЖҷurin ya biyo bayan yarjejeniyar 30 ga Nuwamba 2022 tsakanin Kwamishinan Kyriakides da Dr Tedros don haЙ“aka dabarun haЙ—in Guiwa kan lamuran kiwon lafiya na duniya. Dangane da dabarun kiwon lafiya na duniya na EU da dabarun WHO na duniya kan lafiyar dijital, yunЖҷurin ya biyo bayan yarjejeniyar 30 ga Nuwamba 2022 tsakanin Kwamishinan Kyriakides da Dr Tedros don haЙ“aka dabarun haЙ—in gwiwa kan lamuran kiwon lafiya na duniya. Wannan yana Жҷara Жҷarfafa tsare-tsaren Жҷungiyoyi da yawa tare da WHO a ainihinsa, wanda ЖҷaЖҷЖҷarfan EU ke Жҷarfafa shi. Wannan haЙ—in gwiwar wani muhimmin mataki ne ga shirin aiwatar da dijital na dabarun lafiya na duniya na EU. Ta amfani da mafi kyawun ayyuka na Turai muna ba da gudummawa ga Жҷa'idodin kiwon lafiya na dijital da haЙ—in kai a duniya ''don fa'idar waЙ—anda suka fi buЖҷata. Hakanan misali ne mai Жҷarfi na yadda daidaitawa tsakanin EU da WHO na iya isar da ingantacciyar lafiya ga kowa, a cikin EU da duk duniya.

ЩҮШ°Ш§ ЩҠШ№ШІШІ ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Щ…ШӘШ№ШҜШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ·ШұШ§ЩҒ ЩӮЩҲЩҠШҢ Щ…Ш№ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩғШ¬ЩҲЩҮШұШҢ Щ…ШҜШ№ЩҲЩ…ЩӢШ§ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШӯШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠ. "ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№Ш§ЩҲЩҶ ЩҮЩҲ Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ© Щ…ЩҮЩ…Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Ш®Ш·Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШұЩӮЩ…ЩҠШ© Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШұШ§ШӘЩҠШ¬ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘШӯШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠ. Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ШЈЩҒШ¶Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ…Ш§ШұШіШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҶШӯЩҶ ЩҠШіШ§ЩҮЩ…ЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш№Ш§ЩҠЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„ШұЩӮЩ…ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩғШ§Щ…Щ„ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… - Щ„ШөШ§Щ„Шӯ ШЈЩҲЩ„ШҰЩғ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ЩҮЩ… ЩҒЩҠ ШЈЩ…Ші Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Ш¬Ш©. ЩғЩ…Ш§ ШЈЩҶЩҮ Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ ЩӮЩҲЩҠ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩғЩҠЩҒ ШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШӯШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠ ЩҲЩ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠЩҲЩҒШұ ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© ШөШӯЩҠШ© ШЈЩҒШ¶Щ„ Щ„Щ„Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ШҢ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШӯШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠ ЩҲЩҒЩҠ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ШЈЩҶШӯШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ….

translations.source: As the directing and coordinating authority on international health work, there is no better partner than the WHO to advance the work we started at the EU and further develop global digital health solutions,вҖқ said Stella Kyriakides, Commissioner for Health and Food Safety. This partnership will include close collaboration in the development, management and implementation of the WHO GDHCN system, benefitting from the European CommissionвҖҷs ample technical expertise in the field. A first step is to ensure that the current EU digital certificates continue to function effectively.вҖң With 80 countries and territories connected to the EU Digital COVID-19 Certificate, the EU has set a global standard. The EU certificate has not only been an important tool in our fight against the pandemic, but has also facilitated international travel and tourism.
translations.reference: A matsayin hukumar gudanarwa da daidaitawa kan ayyukan kiwon lafiya na kasa da kasa, babu wani abokin tarayya mafi kyau fiye da WHO don ci gaba da aikin da muka fara a EU da kuma ci gaba da samar da hanyoyin magance lafiyar dijital ta duniya, "in ji Stella Kyriakides, Kwamishinan Lafiya da Tsaron Abinci. Wannan haЙ—in gwiwar zai haЙ—a da haЙ—in gwiwa ta kut-da-kut a cikin haЙ“akawa, gudanarwa da aiwatar da tsarin GDHCN na WHO, tare da cin gajiyar Жҷwararrun Hukumar Turai a fagen. Mataki na farko shi ne tabbatar da cewa takaddun shaida na dijital na EU na yanzu sun ci gaba da aiki yadda ya kamata." Tare da Жҷasashe da yankuna 80 da ke da alaЖҷa da EU Digital CVID-19 Certificate, EU ta saita daidaitattun duniya. Takardun shaida na EU ba kawai ya zama muhimmin kayan aiki a yaЖҷinmu da cutar ba, har ma ya sauЖҷaЖҷe balaguron balaguron Жҷasa da yawon buЙ—e ido.
translations.hypothesis: ШЁШ§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§ШұЩҮШ§ ЩҮЩҠШҰШ© ШұШ§ШҰШҜШ© ЩҲЩ…ШіШӨЩҲЩ„Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠЩҲШ¬ШҜ ШҙШұЩҠЩғ ШЈЩҒШ¶Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© (WHO) Щ„ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ШЁШҜШЈЩҶШ§ЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШӯШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠШҢ ЩҲШӘЩӮШҜЩҠЩ… ШӯЩ„ЩҲЩ„ ШөШӯЩҠШ© ШұЩӮЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ" ЩҮЩғШ°Ш§ ЩӮШ§Щ„ ШіШӘЩҠЩ„Ш§ ЩғЩҠШұЩҠШ§ЩғЩҠШҜЩҠШіШҢ ЩҲШІЩҠШұШ© Щ„Щ„ШөШӯШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЈЩ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШәШ°Ш§ШҰЩҠ. ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№Ш§ЩҲЩҶ ШіЩҠШӘШ¶Щ…ЩҶ ШӘШ№Ш§ЩҲЩҶ ШҜЩӮЩҠЩӮ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШ·ЩҲЩҠШұШҢ ЩҲШҘШҜШ§ШұШ©ШҢ ЩҲШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ° ЩҶШёШ§Щ… WHO GDHCNШҢ ЩҲШ§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш®ШЁШұШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ§ШіШ№Ш© Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘШӯШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„. Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„Щү ЩҮЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШЈЩғШҜ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШұЩӮЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘШӯШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠ Щ„Ш§ ШӘШІШ§Щ„ ШӘШ№Щ…Щ„ ШЁЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ©. Щ…Ш№ 80 ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш© ЩҲШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ШӘ Щ…ШӘШөЩ„Ш© ШЁШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ© COVID-19 Ш§Щ„ШұЩӮЩ…ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘШӯШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШӯШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠ ЩӮШҜ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Щ…Ш№ЩҠШ§Шұ Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ. Ш§Щ„ШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠШ© Щ„Щ… ШӘЩғЩҶ Щ…Ш¬ШұШҜ ШЈШҜШ§Ш© Щ…ЩҮЩ…Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш№ШұЩғШӘЩҶШ§ Ш¶ШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШЁШ§ШЎШҢ ШЁЩ„ ШіЩҮЩ„ШӘ ШЈЩҠШ¶ЩӢШ§ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҒШұ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩҠШ§ШӯШ© Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠШ©.

translations.source: I am pleased that the WHO will build on the privacy-preserving principles and cutting-edge technology of the EU certificate to create a global tool against future pandemics,вҖқ added Thierry Breton, Commissioner for Internal Market. A global WHO system building on EU legacy One of the key elements in the European UnionвҖҷs work against the COVID-19 pandemic has been digital COVID-19 certificates. To facilitate free movement within its borders, the EU swiftly established interoperable COVID-19 certificates (entitled вҖҳEU Digital COVID-19 CertificateвҖҷ or вҖҳEU DCCвҖҷ). Based on open-source technologies and standards it allowed also for the connection of non-EU countries that issue certificates according to EU DCC specifications, becoming the most widely used solution around the world.
translations.reference: Na yi farin ciki da cewa WHO za ta gina Жҷa'idodin kiyaye sirri da fasaha mai mahimmanci na takardar shaidar EU don ЖҷirЖҷirar kayan aiki na duniya game da annoba ta gaba, in ji Thierry Breton, Kwamishinan Kasuwar Cikin Gida. Tsarin WHO na duniya yana ginuwa a kan gadon tsarin na EU ЖҠaya daga cikin mahimman abubuwa a cikin aikin Tarayyar Turai game da cutar ta COVID-19 shi ne takardun shaida na COVID-19 na zamani. Don sauЖҷaЖҷe motsi kyauta a cikin iyakokinta, EU ta hanzarta kafa takardun shaida na COVID-19 masu aiki (mai suna 'EU Digital COVID-19 Certificate' ko 'EU DCC'). Dangane da fasahohin bude-bude da ka'idoji ya ba da izinin haЙ—in kai na Жҷasashen da ba na EU ba waЙ—anda ke ba da takaddun shaida daidai da Жҷayyadaddun EU DCC, zama mafita mafi amfani da ita a duniya.
translations.hypothesis: "ШЈЩҶШ§ Щ…Щ…ШӘЩҶ Щ„ЩҖ WHOШҢ Щ„ЩҶЩҮ ШіЩҠШіШӘЩҒЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ШЁШ§ШҜШҰ ШӯЩ…Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш®ШөЩҲШөЩҠШ© ЩҲШӘЩӮЩҶЩҠШ§ШӘ ШӯШҜЩҠШ«Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠШ©ШҢ Щ„ШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ ШЈШҜШ§Ш© Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҒШӯШ© ШӘЩҒШҙЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩӮШЁЩ„"ШҢ ЩҲШӘШ§ШЁШ№ Thierry BretonШҢ ЩҶШ§ЩҠШЁ ШұШ§Ш№ЩҠ ШіЩҲЩӮ ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ЩҠ. ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ Щ„ЩҖ WHOШҢ ЩҠШұШӘЩғШІ Ш№Щ„Щү ШҘШұШ« Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШӯШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠ. ШЈШӯШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш№Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШӯШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠ Щ„Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҒШӯШ© ШӘЩҒШҙЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ ШЁШіШЁШЁ COVID-19ШҢ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШұЩӮЩ…ЩҠШ© Щ„ЩҖ COVID-19. Щ„ШӘЩ…ЩғЩҠЩҶ ШӯШұЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШұЩғШ© ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ ШӯШҜЩҲШҜЩҮШ§ШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШӯШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠ ЩӮШҜ ШЈШұШіЩ„ ШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ COVID-19 Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„Ш© Щ„Щ„ШӘЩғШ§Щ…Щ„ ШЁШіШұШ№Ш© (Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӯЩ…Щ„ Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ 'ШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ© COVID-19 Ш§Щ„ШұЩӮЩ…ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘШӯШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠ' ШЈЩҲ 'ШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ© COVID-19 Ш§Щ„ШұЩӮЩ…ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘШӯШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠ'). ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎЩӢ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘЩӮЩҶЩҠШ§ШӘ ЩҲЩ…Ш№Ш§ЩҠЩҠШұ Щ…ЩҒШӘЩҲШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөШҜШұШҢ ЩҮШ°Ш§ ШіЩ…Шӯ ШЈЩҠШ¶ЩӢШ§ ШЁШұШЁШ· ШҜЩҲЩ„ ШәЩҠШұ ШЈЩҲШұЩҲШЁЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШөШҜШұ ШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ ЩҲЩҒЩӮЩӢШ§ Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ШөЩҒШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§ШөШ© ШЁЩҖ EU DCCШҢ Щ…Щ…Ш§ Ш¬Ш№Щ„ЩҮШ§ ШӯЩ„Ш§ЩӢ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…ЩӢШ§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ШЈЩҶШӯШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ….

translations.source: From the onset of the pandemic, WHO engaged with all WHO Regions to define overall guidelines for such certificates. To help strengthen global health preparedness in the face of growing health threats, WHO is establishing a global digital health certification network which builds upon the solid foundations of the EU DCC framework, principles and open technologies. With this collaboration, WHO will facilitate this process globally under its own structure with the aim to allow the world to benefit from convergence of digital certificates. This includes standard-setting and validation of digital signatures to prevent fraud. In doing so, WHO will not have access to any underlying personal data, which would continue to be the exclusive domain of governments.
translations.reference: Tun daga farkon barkewar cutar, WHO ta yi hulЙ—a tare da duk yankuna na WHO don ayyana gama - garin Жҷa'idodin a irin waЙ—annan takardun. Don taimakawa Жҷarfafa shirye-shiryen kiwon lafiya na duniya ta fuskar ci gaban barazanar kiwon lafiya, WHO tana kafa cibiyar sadarwar ba da takardar shaida ta dijital ta duniya wacce ke gina tushen tushen tsarin EU DCC, ka'idoji da fasahohi masu buЙ—ewa. Tare da wannan haЙ—in gwiwar, WHO za ta sauЖҷaЖҷe wannan tsari a duniya a ЖҷarЖҷashin tsarinta tare da manufar ba da damar duniya ta ci gajiyar haЙ—uwa da takaddun shaida na dijital. Wannan ya haЙ—a da daidaitaccen saiti da tabbatar da sa hannun na zamani don hana zamba. Ta yin hakan, WHO ba za ta sami damar yin amfani da kowane bayanan sirri ba, wanda zai ci gaba da zama keЙ“aЙ“Й“en yanki na gwamnatoci.

translations.source: The first building block of the global WHO system becomes operational in June 2023 and aims to be progressively developed in the coming months. A long-term digital partnership to deliver better health for all To facilitate the uptake of the EU DCC by WHO and contribute to its operation and further development, WHO and the European Commission have agreed to partner in digital health. This partnership will work to technically develop the WHO system with a staged approach to cover additional use cases, which may include, for example, the digitisation of the International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis. Expanding such digital solutions will be essential to deliver better health for citizens across the globe.
translations.reference: Tushe na farko na tsarin WHO na duniya zai fara aiki a watan Yuni 2023 kuma yana da niyyar haЙ“aka ci gaba a cikin watanni masu zuwa. HaЙ—in kai na dijital na dogon lokaci don isar da ingantacciyar lafiya ga kowa Don sauЖҷaЖҷe haЙ“akar EU DCC ta WHO da kuma ba da gudummawa ga ayyukanta da ci gaba, WHO da Hukumar Turai sun amince da haЙ—in gwiwa a cikin lafiyar dijital. Wannan haЙ—in gwiwar za ta yi aiki don haЙ“aka tsarin WHO ta hanyar fasaha tare da tsarin da aka tsara don rufe Жҷarin shari'o'in amfani, wanda zai iya haЙ—awa, misali, digitization na Takaddun shaida na Alurar riga kafi ko Prophylaxis. Fadada irin waЙ—annan hanyoyin dijital na dijital zai zama mahimmanci don isar da ingantacciyar lafiya ga 'yan Жҷasa a duk faЙ—in duniya.

translations.source: This cooperation is based on the shared values and principles of transparency and openness, inclusiveness, accountability, data protection and privacy, security, scalability at a global level, and equity. The WHO and the European Commission will work together to encourage maximum global uptake and participation. Particular attention will be paid to equitable opportunities for the participation by those most in need: low and middle-income countries.
translations.reference: Wannan haЙ—in gwiwar ya dogara ne a kan Й—abi'u da Жҷa'idoji na gaskiya da budewa, haЙ—a kai, lissafin kuЙ—i, kariya da bayanan sirri, tsaro, haЙ“akawa a matakin duniya, da daidaito. Wannan haЙ—in gwiwar ya dogara ne akan dabi'u da ka'idoji na gaskiya da budewa, haЙ—a kai, lissafin kuЙ—i, kariya da bayanan sirri, tsaro, haЙ“akawa a matakin duniya, da daidaito. Za a ba da kulawa ta musamman ga damammaki masu adalci don shiga ta waЙ—anda suka fi bukata: Жҷasashe masu ЖҷanЖҷanta da matsakaita.

translations.reference: Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya ta saba'in da shida - Sabuntawar yau da kullun: 30 ga Mayu 2023 Taron shekara-shekara na WHO ya Жҷare da yarjejeniya kan kudade, da kuma batutuwan kiwon lafiya da yawa Dabarar ta mayar da hankali ne kan duk wani wuri da ake ba da kiwon lafiya, a cikin tsarin kiwon lafiya; ya dogara ne a kan ka'idar kulawa mai tsabta da aminci a matsayin muhimmin sashe na haЖҷЖҷin lafiya, wanda ke tafiyar da daidaito, wanda ya kamata ya tabbatar da lissafi da Й—orewa. mafi kyawun sayayya don magance cututtuka marasa yaЙ—uwa; bincike; nakasa; rigakafin nutsewa; gaggawa, kulawa mai mahimmanci da aiki; abinci micronutrients; lafiyar 'yan asali; rigakafin kamuwa da cuta; lafiyar mata da yara; oxygen na likita; kiwon lafiya na farko; lafiyar 'yan gudun hijira da bakin haure

translations.source: rehabilitation; traditional medicine, and WHOвҖҷs work in responding to dozens of emergencies while working with Member States to be better prepared to face new ones. Earlier in the day, delegates in Committee A agreed to note the roadmap towards the Global Health and Peace Initiative (along with a slight change in name from вҖңGlobal Health for Peace InitiativeвҖқ), and requested that the Director-General report on progress in strengthening the roadmap. In plenary, as the final approval step of the assembly, delegates adopted the resolutions and decisions of the two committees, and adopted their reports. This included approval of the budget for 2024-25, and a 20% increase in assessed contributions. The committee chairs and representatives from two regions spoke to recognize the work and progress of this Assembly.
translations.reference: gyarawa; magungunan gargajiya, da kuma aikin WHO na amsa da yawa na gaggawa yayin aiki tare da Membobin Kasashe don kasancewa cikin shiri don fuskantar sababbi. Tun da farko a wannan rana, wakilai a cikin Kwamitin A sun amince su lura da taswirar hanyar da za a bi don Kiwon Lafiyar Duniya da Aminci (tare da wani Й—an canji a suna daga Kiwon Lafiyar Duniya don Amincewar Zaman Lafiya ci gaba wajen karfafa taswirar hanya. A zaman majalissar, a matsayin matakin amincewa na karshe na majalisar, wakilai sun amince da kudurori da hukunce-hukuncen kwamitocin biyu, tare da amincewa da rahotonsu. Wannan ya haЙ—a da amincewa da kasafin kuЙ—i na 2024-25, da haЙ“aka 20% na gudunmawar da aka tantance. Shuwagabannin kwamitoci da wakilai daga yankuna biyu sun yi jawabi domin sanin aiki da ci gaban wannan Majalisar.

ЩҲЩҺ ШіЩҸЩҶЩҮЩҲШ§ Щ„ЩҗЩҠЩҸШ·Щ„ШЁ Щ…ЩҗЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ… Щ„ЩҗЩҠЩҸШЁЩ„Шә Ш№ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШҜЩ… ЩҒЩҗЩҠ ШӘЩӮЩҲЩҠШ© Ш®ШұЩҠШ·Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮ. translations.source: In his closing remarks, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHOвҖҷs Director-General, noted that вҖңthe increase in assessed contributions and the investment round are historic and a huge milestone.вҖқ He spoke about the year ahead, with high-level meetings on universal health coverage, tuberculosis and pandemic preparedness and response at this yearвҖҷs UN General Assembly. He pointed to the continuing negotiations on the pandemic accord and amendments to the International Health Regulations as unprecedentedвҖ”вҖңgenerationalвҖқвҖ”opportunities to learn from the mistakes of the COVID-19 pandemic and ensure they are not repeated. Delegates also had the chance to hear from former WHO staff Gwen Carnelley, who turned 100 this year, who began working with WHO in 1949, just a year after WHO was founded 75 years ago. Video of Closing of the 76th World Health Assembly.
translations.reference: A yayin jawabansa na rufe taron, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Wanda shi ne babban daraktan hukumar ta WHO, ya bayyana cewa Жҳaruwar gudunmawar da aka tantance da kuma zagayen saka hannun jari na da tarihi da kuma wani gagarumin ci gaba. Ya yi magana a kan shekara mai zuwa, tare da muhimman zama da manyan tarurrukan da zasu shafi kiwon lafiya na duniya; tarin fuka da shirye-shiryen annoba da mayar da martani a babban taron Majalisar Dinkin Duniya na bana. Ya karfafa akan ci gaba da tattaunawa kan batun yarjejeniyar barkewar cutar da kuma gyare-gyaren da za a inganta dokokin kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya zuwa matakin da ba a taЙ“a ganin irinsa ba. ba dama na tsararraki don koyo daga kura-kuran cutar ta COVID-19 da kuma tabbatar da cewa ba a maimaita su ba. Wakilan kuma sun sami damar jin ta bakin tsohon ma'aikacin WHO Gwen Carnelley, wanda ya cika shekaru 100 a wannan shekara, wanda ya fara aiki tare da WHO a cikin 1949, shekara guda bayan wanda aka kafa shekaru 75 da suka gabata. Bidiyon rufe taron kiwon lafiya na duniya karo na saba'in da shida (76).
translations.hypothesis: ЩҒЩҠ Ш®ШӘШ§Щ… ШӘШөШұЩҠШӯШ§ШӘ, ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШӘЩҠШҜШұЩҲШі ШЈШҜШ§ЩҶЩҲЩ… ШәЩҠШЁШұЩҠШіЩҲШіШҢ ШұШҰЩҠШіШ§ЩӢ ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ°ЩҠЩӢШ§ Щ„ЩҖ WHOШҢ ШЈШҙШ§Шұ ШҘЩ„Щү ШЈЩҶ "ШІЩҠШ§ШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ШіШ§ЩҮЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩӮШҜШұШ© ЩҲ ШҜЩҲШұ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ«Щ…Ш§Шұ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ ШЈШӯШҜШ§Ш« ШӘШ§ШұЩҠШ®ЩҠШ© ЩҲ ШҘЩҶШ¬Ш§ШІ ЩғШЁЩҠШұ". translations.source: Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly вҖ“ Daily update: 29 May 2023 Landmark resolution for strengthening Indigenous PeoplesвҖҷ health globally The World Health Assembly today approved an unprecedented resolution on the health of Indigenous Peoples, which requests the Director-General to develop a global action plan for the health of indigenous peoples and to present it to the Seventy-ninth World Health Assembly in 2026. Indigenous Peoples, although representing diverse population groups and communities, in general have considerably lower life expectancy than non-indigenous populations. They also have a higher prevalence of many diseases and adverse health conditions, including diabetes, maternal and infant mortality and malnutrition.
translations.reference: Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya ta saba'in da shida - Sabuntawar yau da kullum: 29 ga Mayu 2023 Жҷudiri mai mahimmanci don Жҷarfafa lafiyar Жҙan asalin Жҷasar a duniya Majalisar kiwon lafiya ta duniya, a yau, ta amince da wani Жҷuduri da ba a taЙ“a ganin irinsa ba kan lafiyar 'yan asalin kasar, wanda ya bukaci babban daraktan da ya samar da wani shiri na duniya na kiwon lafiyar 'yan asalin kasar da kuma gabatar da shi ga taron kiwon lafiya na duniya karo na saba'in da tara a shekarar 2026. Yan asalin Жҷasar, ko da yake suna wakiltar Жҷungiyoyin jama'a da al'ummomi daban-daban, gabaЙ—aya suna da Жҷarancin tsawon rayuwa fiye da waЙ—anda ba 'yan asalin Жҷasar ba. Har ila yau, suna da yawaitar cututtuka da yawa da kuma yanayin rashin lafiya, ciki har da ciwon sukari, mace-mace da jarirai da rashin abinci mai gina jiki.

translations.source: The Assembly requested the action plan be developed in consultation with Indigenous Peoples; that WHO provide support to Member States, upon request, for improving indigenous health; and that the improvement of Indigenous PeoplesвҖҷ health be included in the development of the Fourteenth WHO General Programme of Work. In the same resolution, the Health Assembly urged Member States to, among other tasks, develop knowledge about the health situation of Indigenous Peoples, with their free, prior and informed consent; develop, fund and implement national health plans, strategies or other measures for Indigenous Peoples;

translations.source: encourage the attraction, training, recruitment and retention of Indigenous Peoples as health workers taking into account the traditional knowledge and practices. Related document: A76/A/CONF./1 - Health of Indigenous Peoples First-ever resolution to accelerate action on drowning preventionThe delegates at the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly agreed a resolution to accelerate action on global drowning prevention. The resolution requests Member States to assess their national drowning situation and to develop and implement multisectoral drowning prevention programmes. Drowning causes 236 000 deaths every year.
translations.reference: Жҳarfafa sha'awa, da horarwa, da Й—aukar ma'aikata da kuma riЖҷe Жҙan asalin Жҷasar a matsayin ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya su riЖҷa la'akari da ilimin gargajiya da ayyuka. Takardun da ke da alaЖҷa: A76/a/conf./1 - Lafiyar Жҙan asalin Жҷasar Жҳuduri na farko don hanzarta aiwatar da rigakafi na batun nutsewar. Wakilan a taron kiwon lafiya na duniya na saba'in da shida sun amince da wani Жҷuduri na hanzarta Й—aukar matakin rigakafin nutsewar duniya. Kudirin ya bukaci kasashe mambobin kungiyar da su tantance halin da suke ciki na nutsewa da kuma bunkasa da aiwatar da shirye-shiryen rigakafin nutsewa da yawa. Hatsarin Nutsun Ruwa yakan haddasa mutuwar mutum dubu Dari biyu da talatin da shida 236000 a kowace shekara.

translations.source: It is a leading global cause of injury-related child deaths. Over the past decade, 2.5 million people died from drowning, and over 90% of those occurred in low- and middle-income countries. At the invitation of the United Nations (UN) General Assembly, WHO will coordinate actions within the UN system on drowning prevention and facilitate the observance of World Drowning Prevention Day on 25 July each year. WHO will also set up a Global Alliance for Drowning Prevention with organizations of the UN system, international development partners and nongovernmental organizations. To better understand the true burden and impact of drowning, the resolution further requests WHO to prepare a global status report on drowning prevention.
translations.reference: Ita ce lamba ta Й—aya a duniya gun sanadin mutuwar yara masu nasaba da rauni. A sama da shekara goma da suka wuce, mutane miliyan biyu da rabi ne suka mutu sakamakon nutsewa, kuma sama da kashi casai'n 90% na waЙ—anda suka mutun sun mutu ne a kasashe masu Жҷaramin karfi da matsakaicin kuЙ—in shiga. Bisa gayyatar da Majalisar Dinkin Duniya ta yi wa hukumar WHO, za ta tsara ayyuka a cikin tsarin Majalisar Dinkin Duniya kan yadda za ta aiwatar da rigakafin nutsewa tare da sauЖҷaЖҷa bikin ranar rigakafin nutsewa ruwa ta duniya; a ranar 25 ga Yulin kowace shekara. Hukumar WHO za ta Жҷara Жҷulla wata kawance ta duniya a kan rigakafin nutsewa wanda za ta haЙ—a da Жҷungiyoyin tsaro na MDD, da abokan kawo ci gaba na Жҷasa da Жҷasa, da kuma Жҷungiyoyi masu zaman kansu. Domin samun Жҷarin gamsashiyar fahimtar nauyi na gaske akan tbatun nutsewa, Жҷudurin ya Жҷara buЖҷatar WHO ta shirya rahoton matsayin duniya kan rigakafin nutsewa.

translations.source: Related document: EB152/CONF./2 - Accelerating action on global drowning prevention Read more about the resolution World Drowning Prevention Day 2023 Member States mobilize behind resolution to tackle chemicals, waste and pollution Member States welcomed the resolution addressing environmental determinants, including management of chemicals and waste. The efforts can help prevent up to one fifth of all suicide-related deaths from highly hazardous pesticides.
translations.reference: AlaЖҷantartun Takardun da ke da : EB152/CONF./2 - HaЙ“aka hanyoyin Й—aukar mataki kan rigakafin nutsewar ruwa a duniya Ci gaba da karatu game da sakamakon zaman. Ranar Й—aukar matakan kiyaye gaba kan nutsewa, ta duniya na dubu biyu da ashirin da uku 2023 Жҳasashe (mambobi) sun ЖҷirЖҷiri Жҷungiya ta haЙ—in kai bayan Жҷuduri su ta magance sinadarai, sharar gida da gurЙ“atar yanayin. Жҳasashe (mambobi) sun yi maraba da Жҷudirin da ke magance matsalolin muhalli, gami da sarrafa sinadarai da sharar gida. Jajircewa a kan hakan na iya taimakawa wajen daЖҷile kusan kashi Й—aya bisa biyar na duk wani mace-macen da ke da alaЖҷa da kisan kai daga magungunan kashe qwari masu haЙ—ari.

Щ…Ш§ЩғаӨІаӨ¬ ШіЩҠШ§ШӯЩҠ: EB152/CONF./2 - ЩҠШіШұШ№ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„ Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ№ ШәШұЩӮ Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ.

Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Ш¶Ш§ШЎ ЩҠШ¬Щ…Ш№ЩҲЩҶ Ш¬ЩҮЩҲШҜЩҮЩ… Щ„ШҜШ№Щ… Ш§Щ„ЩӮШұШ§Шұ Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҠЩ…ЩҠШ§ШҰЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҒШ§ЩҠШ§ШӘШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩ„ЩҲШ«.

Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Ш¶Ш§ШЎ ЩӮШҜШ§Щ„ЩҲШ§ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШұШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШӘЩҶШ§ЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҲШ§Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШҰЩҠШ©ШҢ ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ ШҘШҜШ§ШұШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҠЩ…ЩҠШ§ШҰЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҶЩҒШ§ЩҠШ§ШӘ.

ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҮЩҲШҜ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ШӘШіШ§Ш№ШҜ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШ№ Щ…Ш§ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠЩӮЩ„ Ш№ЩҶ ШұШЁШ№ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ЩҲЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ№Щ„ЩӮШ© ШЁШ§Щ„Ш¬ШұЩҠЩ…Ш©ШҢ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Щ…ШЁЩҠШҜШ§ШӘ ШӯШҙШұЩҠШ© ШҙШҜЩҠШҜШ© Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШұШ©.

translations.source: Member States were urged to bolster the implementation of existing WHO strategies including implementation of the WHO Chemicals Roadmap which outlines key roles of the health sector in implementing the Strategic Approach to International Chemicals Management. The resolution also encourages the Ministries of Health to engage in efforts to prepare proposals for an intergovernmental science policy panel and negotiations for a treaty to end plastic pollution. The resolution called upon the Director-General to undertake several actions, including: publishing a report on the health implications of chemicals, waste and pollution from a "One Health" perspective; updating the 2012 document on the State of the Science of Endocrine Disrupting Chemicals jointly with the United Nations Environment Programme; and
translations.reference: An buЖҷaci kasashe (mambobin kungiyar) su karfafa aiwatar da dabarun WHO da suka haЙ—a da aiwatar da taswirar sinadarai na WHO wanda ya zayyana muhimman rawar da Й“angaren kiwon lafiya ke takawa wajen aiwatar da dabarun kula da sinadarai na Жҷasa da Жҷasa. Sakamakon zaman ya kuma karfafa wa ma'aikatun kiwon lafiya kwarin gwiwar yin yunЖҷurin, da kawo tsarin shirya shawarwari ga kwamitin tsare-tsare na kimiyya na gwamnatoci da kuma yin shawarwarin yarjejeniya don kawo Жҷarshen gurЙ“acewar filastik. Sakamakon ya buЖҷaci Darakta-Janar ya aiwatar da ayyuka da dama, waЙ—anda suka hada da Samar da bayanai da rahoto kan illolin kiwon lafiya na sinadarai, da sharar gida da gurЙ“acewar yanayi ta fuskar вҖңLafiya DayaвҖқ Sabuntawa da inganta kundin aiki na shekarar 2012 kan Halin Kimiyyar Magungunan Cutar Endocrine tare da kaddamar da Shirin Muhalli na Majalisar Dinkin Duniya; kuma
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Ш¶Ш§ШЎ ЩҠЩҸШӯШ«ЩҲЩҶ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ° Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШұШ§ШӘЩҠШ¬ЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ WHOШҢ ШЁШ¶Щ…ЩҶ Ш°Щ„Щғ ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ° Ш®ШұЩҠШ·Ш© Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ WHOШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӯШҜШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„ЩӮШ·Ш§Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ° Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҮШ¬ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШұШ§ШӘЩҠШ¬ЩҠ Щ„ШҘШҜШ§ШұШ© Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠШ©. Ш§Щ„ЩӮШұШ§Шұ ЩҠЩҲШөЩҠ ШЈЩҠШ¶ЩӢШ§ Щ„ЩҲШІШ§ШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬ЩҮЩҲШҜ Щ„ШҘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ Щ…ЩӮШӘШұШӯШ§ШӘ Щ„Щ…Ш¬Щ„Ші ШіЩҠШ§ШіШ§ШӘ Ш№Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ШЁЩҠЩҶ ШӯЩғЩҲЩ…Ш§ШӘШҢ ЩҲЩғШ°Щ„Щғ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§ЩҲШ¶ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…Ш№Ш§ЩҮШҜШ© Щ„ШҘЩҶЩҮШ§ШЎ ШӘЩ„ЩҲШ« Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„Ш§ШіШӘЩҠЩғ. Ш§Щ„ЩӮШұШ§Шұ ЩҠШ·Щ„ШЁ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ… Ш§ШӘШ®Ш§Ш° Ш§Щ„Ш№ШҜЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎШ§ШӘШҢ ШЁШ¶Щ…ЩҶ Ш°Щ„Щғ: ЩҶШҙШұ ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұ Ш№ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШўШ«Ш§Шұ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„ЩғЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҒШ§ЩҠШ§ШӘШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩ„ЩҲШ« Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ЩҶШёЩҲШұ "ШөШӯШ© ЩҲШ§ШӯШҜШ©"; ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШ« Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ«ЩҠЩӮШ© Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ… 2012 Ш№ЩҶ ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ№Щ„ЩӮШ© ШЁШ§Щ„ЩғЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩҒШіШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШұЩ…ЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘШҢ ШЁШ§Щ„ШӘШ№Ш§ЩҲЩҶ Щ…Ш№ ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШҰШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§ШЁШ№ Щ„Щ„ШЈЩ…Щ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШӯШҜШ©;

translations.source: supporting countries in developing national or regional human biomonitoring programmes for chemicals of concern. Related document: A76/A/CONF./2 - The impact of chemicals, waste and pollution on human health WHOвҖҷs work on chemical safety and health Achieving well-being: a global frameworkMember States agreed to adopt the "Global framework for integrating well-being into public health utilizing a health promotion approach", which strives to enable all people to flourish and achieve their full physical and mental health potential throughout their lives and across generations. The Global framework recommends six key strategic directions that focus on: universal health coverage, equitable economies, protecting the planet, social protection systems, digital systems to enable health, and measuring and monitoring well-being.
translations.reference: Karfafa wa Жҷasashe domin haЙ“aka shirye-shiryen su na kula da lafiyar Й—an adam na Жҷasa da yankunansu don sinadarai masu damuwa. AlaЖҷantartun takardun da ke da : A76/A/CONF./2 - Tasirin sinadarai akan sharar gida da Жҷazanta a kan lafiyar Й—an adam Ayyukan WHO a kan aminci da lafiyar sinadarai a kan Samun lafiya: Wata tsarin duniya na Membobin kasashe sun amince da daukar "tsarin haЙ—ewar duniya don hada jin dadin jama'a a cikin lafiyar jama'a ta hanyar amfani da tsarin inganta kiwon lafiya", wanda ke ЖҷoЖҷarin bai wa dukkan mutane damar bunЖҷasa tare da cimma cikakkiyar damar lafiyar jiki da ta kwakwalwa a tsawon rayuwarsu da kuma na tsararraki. Tsarin duniya na mai ba da shawara bisa ga mahimman jagororin hanyoyi shida waЙ—anda ke mai da hankali kan: Й—aukar hoto na kiwon lafiya na duniya, daidaiton tattalin arziЖҷi, kare duniya, tsarin kariyar zamantakewa, tsarin dijital don ba da damar lafiya, da aunawa da sa ido kan jin daЙ—in rayuwa.

translations.source: The framework proposes close collaboration with sectors outside the health sector to promote and protect health. It serves as a guide for all stakeholders to engage in a coherent and coordinated manner around a common purpose: promoting the health of people and planet in a sustainable and equitable manner. promoting the health of people and planet in a sustainable and equitable manner. The Assembly requests the Director-General to report on implementation of the global framework in 2024, 2026 and 2031. Related document: A76/7 Add.2 - Well-being and health promotion

Hakan zai zama haske ga duk masu ruwa da tsaki domin yin aiki tare da haЙ—in kai a kan manufa guda Й—aya Wanda ita ce inganta lafiyar mutane da kuma na duniya cikin tsari mai dorewa da daidaito. inganta lafiyar mutane da duniya cikin Й—orewa da adalci. Majalisar ta buЖҷaci Darakta-Janar ya kawo rahoto a kan aiwatar da tsarin duniya a 2024, da 2026 da 2031. Takardu masu alaЖҷa da : A76/7 Жҳara.2 - Lafiya da haЙ“aka lafiya

translations.source: New resolution to accelerate efforts on food micronutrient fortification The delegates approved a resolution on accelerating efforts to prevent micronutrient deficiencies through safe and effective food fortification. Deficiencies in vitamin and mineral status, particularly of folate, iron, vitamin A, and zinc, affect 50% of all preschool aged children and 67% of all women of reproductive age worldwide. Micronutrient deficiencies can have serious consequences, including spina bifida and other neural tube defects.Large scale food fortification is part of the solution. By adding essential vitamins and minerals to staple foods and condiments, such as wheat and maize flours, rice, cooking oil and salt in accordance with national consumption patterns and deficiencies, countries can correct and further prevent a demonstrated micronutrient deficiency.
translations.reference: Samar da Sabon Жҷudiri don haЙ“aka ЖҷoЖҷarce-ЖҷoЖҷarce a kan ЖҷaЖҷЖҷarfan Жҷarancin abinci Wakilan sun amince bisa kudiri kan hanzarta ЖҷoЖҷarin hana karancin abinci mai gina jiki ta hanyar ingantaccen abinci mai inganci. NaЖҷasu da ake samu na rashin bitamin, da ma'adanai, musamman na folate, baЖҷin Жҷarfe, bitamin A, da zinc, yana shafar kashi 50% na dukan yara masu shekaru kafin makaranta da kashi 67% na dukan matan da suka kai shekarun haihuwa a Duniya. Жҷarancin rashin abincin da ke gina jiki na iya haifar da mummunan sakamako, gami da spina bifida da sauran lahani na bututun jijiyoyi. Babban sikelin abinci mai Жҷarfi yana cikin mafita. Ta hanyar Жҷara muhimman bitamin da ma'adanai dan inganta cikin abinci da kayan abinci masu mahimmanci, irin su alkama da garin masara, shinkafa, mai dafa abinci da gishiri daidai da tsarin amfani da Жҷasa da Жҷarancin abinci, Жҷasashe na iya Kara gyare gyare tare da Жҷara hana bayyanar Жҷarancin Жҷarancin abinci.

translations.source: The resolution urges Member States to develop policies on food fortification with micronutrients and/or supplementation, and to consider ways of strengthening financing and monitoring mechanisms. The resolution was agreed under the umbrella of the United Nations Decade of Action on Nutrition (2016-2025) report. Related document: EB152/CONF./5 Accelerating efforts for preventing micronutrient deficiencies and their consequences, including spina bifida and other neural tube defects, through safe and effective food fortification Related links
translations.reference: Жҳudurin ya bukaci Жҷasashe (membobin) su Жҷara haЙ“aka manufofi kan samar da abinci tare da wasu Жҷananan abubuwan gina jiki da/ko kari, da kuma yin la'akari da hanyoyin Жҷarfafa shigowar kuЙ—i da hanyoyin sa ido. An amince da Жҷudirin a karkashin yardar rahoton shekaru goma na Majalisar Dinkin Duniya kan abinci mai gina jiki (2016-2025). AlaЖҷantacciyar takardar da ke da lambar: EB152/CONF./5 HaЙ“aka ЖҷoЖҷarce-ЖҷoЖҷarce don kauda Жҷarancin abinci mai gina jiki da sakamakonsu, da kuma spina bifida da sauran illolin bututun jijiya, ta hanyar ingantaccen abinci mai inganci. Links masu alaЖҷa
translations.hypothesis: wannan Жҷidaya yana bukatar kwamitin za su kirkira kaidai game da Жҷarfawa abinci da abubuwa masu ЖҷwaЖҷwawa, kuma/ko da kuma samar da abinci, kuma za su yi la'aku game da hanyoyin Жҷarfawa kuma nazarin. wannan Жҷidaya an yardaЙ—a ne a ЖҷarЖҷashin rahoto na "Decade of Action on Nutrition" na Жҳungiyar Mutanen Duniya (2016-2025). Dokumen da ke da alaЖҷa: EB152/CONF./5: Жҷarfawa yadda za a ganowa da abubuwa masu ЖҷwaЖҷwawa, gami da "spina bifida" da sauran lalata na neural tube, ta hanyar Жҷarfawa abinci da Жҷarfawa.

translations.source: Read more about the resolution WHO's work on food fortification Member States approve actions to counter substandard and falsified medicines On 27 May, the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly approved a resolution to conduct an independent review of the Member State Mechanism (MSM) for incidents, substandard and falsified medicines, reinforcing the Director-GeneralвҖҷs January 2023 call for increased vigilance and action in this important area. The review will be initiated at the next MSM steering committee meeting later in 2023.
translations.reference: Жҳarin karatu da fahimta game da Жҷudurin Ayyukan WHO domin inganta abinci Kasashe (mambobi) sun amince kan ayyukan faЙ—a da yaЖҷar magunguna marasa inganci A ranar 27 ga Mayu, Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya ta saba'in da shida ta yarda kan wani Жҷuduri na aiwatar da nazari mai zaman kansa na Mechanism (MSM) don abubuwan da suka faru, marasa inganci da magungunan jabu, wanda ke Жҷarfafa kiran da Babban Darakta Janar na Janairu 2023 ya yi na a kara sa ido aiki a wannan yanki mai mahimmanci. Za a Жҷaddamar da bitar a taron kwamitin gudanarwa na MSM na gaba daga baya a cikin 2023.

ЩҒЩҠ 27 Щ…Ш§ЩҠЩҲШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӨШӘЩ…Шұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШіШ§ШЁШ№ ЩҲШіШӘЩҠЩҶ Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ш№Щ„Щү "ШӯЩ„" Щ„ШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎ Щ…ШұШ§Ш¬Ш№Ш© Щ…ШіШӘЩӮЩ„Ш© Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩғШ§ЩҶЩҠЩғЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Ш¶Ш§ШЎ (MSM) ЩҒЩҠЩ…Ш§ ЩҠШӘШ№Щ„ЩӮ ШЁШ§Щ„ШЈШӯШҜШ§Ш«ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© Ш°Ш§ШӘ Ш¬ЩҲШҜШ© ШұШҜЩҠШҰШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШІЩҠЩҒШ©ШҢ Щ…Щ…Ш§ ЩҠШӨЩғШҜ ШҜШ№ЩҲШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ… Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ ЩғШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠ 2023 Щ„ШІЩҠШ§ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШ°Шұ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„ ЩҒЩҠ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҮЩ…. translations.source: The Assembly established the MSM in 2012 to tackle substandard and falsified medical products from a public health perspective and in a transparent and inclusive way. The goal of the MSM is to protect public health and promote access to affordable, safe, efficacious and quality medical products. Noting recent events of contaminated medicines found on various markets and related preventable deaths, Member States emphasized the support needed to improve their capacity to prevent, detect and respond to substandard and falsified medical products through access to appropriate technologies, including laboratory testing facilities, along with improved oversight on informal markets and advertising, and the online sale of medical products. Member States called for embracing and implementing track and trace technologies for market control and surveillance, as well as the need for formal collaboration by relevant local and global partners such as law enforcement and customs administrations. Member States were encouraged to align with conventions aimed at improvement of legislation and imposition of prohibitive sanctions for wrongful dealing in substandard and falsified medical products.
translations.reference: Majalisar ta kafa MSM a shekara ta 2012 don kawar da magunguna marasa inganci da jabun samfuran likitanci ta mahangar lafiyar jama'a kuma ta hanyar gaskiya da haЙ—a kai. Manufar MSM ita ce ta kare lafiyar jama'a da haЙ“aka damar samun arha Mai aminci, inganci da samfuran ingatattun magungunan likitoci. Da yake lura da abubuwan da suka faru na baya-bayan nan, na gurЙ“atattun magunguna da aka samu a kasuwanni daban-daban, da kuma mace-macen da za a iya hana su, Жҷasashe (mambobin) sun jaddada goyon bayan da ake bukata don inganta karfinsu na daЖҷile hakan, da kuma ganowa da kuma ba da amsa ga marasa inganci da gurbataccen kayayyakin kiwon lafiya; ta hanyar samun fasahohin da suka dace, gami da wuraren gwajin Й—akin gwaje-gwaje, tare da inganta sa-ido kan kasuwanni na yau da kullum da talla, da siyar da samfuran likitanci a kan layi. Kasashen (membobi) sun yi kira da a riЖҷa aiwatar da fasahohin bin diddigi don sarrafawa da yin kasuwa da sa ido, sannan akwai kuma buЖҷatar samar da haЙ—in gwiwa ta yau da kullun Kama daga abokan huldar gida da na duniya kamar hukumomin tilasta bin doka da kwastam. An Жҷarfafa (membobin) Жҷasashen su daidaita da Жҷa'idojin da za su inganta doka da sanya takunkumin hana yin mu'amalan da ba su kamata ba a samfuran likitanci marasa inganci.
translations.hypothesis: Majlis ya kafa MSM a cikin 2012, don yaЖҷe da samfuran Й—anЙ—ano kuma mai lalata daga Й“angaren lafiyayyar jama'a, cikin hanya wacce ta kasance mai fahimta kuma ta shiri. Tujuan MSM shine, yaЖҷe da lafiyayyar jama'a, kuma ya ba da damar samfuran Й—anЙ—ano, lafiya, da amfani, da samfuran lafiyayyar jama'a. Ta hanyar yin karatun abubuwa da suka kaura, kamar samfuran Й—anЙ—ano da suka kasance a kasuwannin Й—abi'i, da mutane da suka kashe, membobin Majlis sun Жҷaddamar da buЖҷatun don inganta Жҷimar su, don yaЖҷe, gano, kuma auna samfuran Й—anЙ—ano kuma mai lalata, ta hanyar samun hanyoyin da ya dace, kamar da kuma daidai, da kuma inganta nazarin kasuwannin Й—abi'i da kuma da kuma daidai, da kuma sayan samfuran lafiyayyar jama'a a intanet. Membin Majlis sun bukaci su yi amfani da hanyoyin nazari da gano, don inganta nazarin kasuwanni, da kuma buЖҷatun shauwwa daga masu lafiya da masu jiran hukumata, kamar hukuma da hukumar Жҷasa. Membin Majlis sun Жҷaddamar da su, su yi amfani da doka da Жҷidaya, don inganta doka, da kuma Жҷidaya, don ayarin samfuran Й—anЙ—ano kuma mai lalata.

translations.source: The Secretariat is requested to report on progress in this area to the Executive Board in 2025. translations.source: First ever resolution on behavioural sciences for better health is adopted Today Member States adopted the behavioural sciences for better health resolution with Member States showing broad consensus towards the need for integrating systematically behavioural science theory, methods and approaches across health topics and public health functions. The resolution urges Member States to acknowledge the role of behavioural science in achieving better health outcomes, to identify opportunities for increased use and, to establish functions and units for generating and translating evidence to inform policies and programmes. It also requests the Director-General to mainstream the use of behavioural science within the organization and to provide support to Member States through the development of guidance and the provision of technical assistance. Member States recognized the achievement of the Behavioural Sciences for Better Health Initiative led by the secretariat, congratulated Malaysia, sponsor of the resolution, as well as the other 19 countries that joined as co-sponsors, and thanked the Director-General for the report.
translations.reference: Жҷuduri na farko da aka kaddamar kan kimiyyar Й—abi'a don samar da ingantacciyar lafiya. A yau Membobin Жҷasashe sun karЙ“i ilimin kimiyyar Й—abi'a don inganta Жҷudurin lafiya tare da sauran membobin Жҷasa. Sun kuma nuna cikakkiyar yarjejeniya game da buЖҷatar haЙ—a ka'idar kimiyyar Й—abi'a ta tsari, hanyoyi da hanyoyin kan batutuwan kiwon lafiya da ayyukan lafiyar jama'a. Жҳudurin ya bukaci Жҷasashe (membobin) su amince da rawar kimiyyar Й—abi'a, don samun ingantacciyar sakamako na kiwon lafiya, da gano dama don Жҷarin amfani da ita, da kafa ayyukan fassara shaidu don sanar da manufofi da shirye-shirye. Har ila yau, an kara buЖҷatar Darakta-Janar ya Жҷaddamar da amfani da kimiyyar Й—abi'a a cikin Жҷungiyar da kuma ba da tallafi ga Жҷasashe (membobin) ta hanyar haЙ“aka jagora da samar da taimakon fasaha. Mambobin (kasashe) sun amince da nasarar da aka samu a fannin kimiyyar dabi'a don ingantacciyar kiwon lafiya ЖҷarЖҷashin jagorancin sakatariyar, sun taya Malaysia mai daukar nauyin Жҷudirin, da kuma sauran kasashe 19 da suka haЙ—e a matsayin masu daukar nauyin, kuma sun gode wa babban daraktan da ya bayar da rahoton.

Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Ш¶Ш§ШЎ ЩӮШҜ ЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮЩҲШ§ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩӮШұШ§Шұ "Ш№Щ„Щ… Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„ЩҲЩғ" Щ„ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ©ШҢ ШӯЩҠШ« ШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Ш¶Ш§ШЎ ЩӮШҜ ШЈШёЩҮШұЩҲШ§ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ЩғШЁЩҠШұ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Ш¬Ш© ШҘЩ„Щү ШҜЩ…Ш¬ ЩҶШёШұЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ·ШұЩӮШҢ ЩҲШЈШіШ§Щ„ЩҠШЁ Ш№Щ„Щ… Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„ЩҲЩғ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ Щ…ЩҶЩҮШ¬ЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© ЩҲЩҲШёШ§ШҰЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш©. Ш§Щ„ЩӮШұШ§Шұ ЩҠШ·Щ„ШЁ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Ш¶Ш§ШЎ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШҜШұЩғЩҲШ§ ШҜЩҲШұ Ш№Щ„Щ… Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„ЩҲЩғ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ ЩҶШӘШ§ШҰШ¬ ШөШӯЩҠШ© ШЈЩҒШ¶Щ„ШҢ ЩҲШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜ ЩҒШұШө Щ„Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШІШ§ЩҠШҜШҢ ЩҲШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ ЩҲШёШ§ШҰЩҒ ЩҲЩҲШӯШҜШ§ШӘ Щ„ШҘЩҶШӘШ§Ш¬ ЩҲШӘЩӮШҜЩҠЩ… Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩ„Ш© Щ„ШӘЩҲШ¬ЩҠЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠШ§ШіШ§ШӘ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЁШұШ§Щ…Ш¬. ЩғЩ…Ш§ ЩҠШ·Щ„ШЁ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ… ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШҜЩ…Ш¬ Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш№Щ„Щ… Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„ЩҲЩғ ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӨШіШіШ©ШҢ ЩҲШЈЩҶ ЩҠЩӮШҜЩ… ШҜШ№Щ… Щ„Щ„ШЈШ№Ш¶Ш§ШЎ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ШӘШ·ЩҲЩҠШұ ШҘШұШҙШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ ЩҲШӘЩӮШҜЩҠЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§Ш№ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҠШ©. Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Ш¶Ш§ШЎ ЩӮШҜ Ш§Ш№ШӘШұЩҒЩҲШ§ ШЁШҘЩҶШ¬Ш§ШІ Щ…ШЁШ§ШҜШұШ© "Ш№Щ„Щ… Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„ЩҲЩғ" Щ„ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҠЩӮЩҲШҜЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩғШ§ШӘШЁШҢ ЩҲШӘЩҮЩҶШҰЩҲШ§ Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠШІЩҠШ§ШҢ ЩҲЩҮЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҮШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШ§Ш№ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„ЩӮШұШ§ШұШҢ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү 19 ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш© ШЈШ®ШұЩү Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ Ш§ЩҶШ¶Щ…ШӘ ЩғШ¬ЩҮШ§ШӘ ШұШ§Ш№ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШҙЩғШұЩҲШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ… Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұ.

translations.source: They stressed the importance of building capacity in this area, particularly in regional offices, and of creating a repository of evidence and synergies between sectors, including with academia and the private sector.
