Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© (WHO) ШӘШ·Щ„ШЁ Щ…ЩҶ ШөЩҶШ§Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠШ§ШіШ§ШӘШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҶЩҠШҢ ЩҲЩ…ЩғЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘ Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ЩӮШӘШөШ§ШҜШҢ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠЩҲЩ„ЩҠ Ш§ЩҮШӘЩ…Ш§Щ…ЩӢШ§ ЩғШ§Щ…Щ„Ш§ЩӢ Щ„Щ„ШӘЩҲШөЩҠШ§ШӘ ЩҲШЈЩҶ ЩҠШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…ЩҲЩҮШ§ ЩғШЁЩҲШөЩ„Ш© Щ„ШӘШ·ЩҲЩҠШұ ШіЩҠШ§ШіШ§ШӘ ЩҲШ§ЩӮШӘШөШ§ШҜЩҠШ© Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ШӘШіШ§Ш№ШҜЩҶШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ ЩҮШҜЩҒ Ш¬Ш№Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Щ…ШӘШ§ШӯШ© Щ„Щ„Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№.

translations.source: Renowned artists RenГ©e Fleming and Pretty Yende appointed as WHO Goodwill Ambassadors for Arts and Health WHO is delighted to announce the appointment of internationally acclaimed artists RenГ©e Fleming and Pretty Yende as Goodwill Ambassadors for Arts and Health. This prestigious announcement was made as part of WHO's 75th Anniversary commemoration during the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly on 22 May 2023. RenГ©e Fleming, one of the most celebrated singers of our time, and Pretty Yende, an extraordinary soprano known for her dazzling performances, have been selected for their artistic achievement and advocacy for improved health outcomes through creative means. On 8 April 2023, Fleming and Yende performed for a special concert titled Healing Arts, dedicated to WHO's 75th anniversary in Geneva, Switzerland.
translations.reference: Shahararrun jaruman ,wato Rena Fleming da Pretty Yende an naЙ—a su a matsayin jakadun hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) Й“angaren al'adu da lafiya. Hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO)na farin cikin sanar da naЙ—in jaruman mawaЖҷan Жҷasa da Жҷasa wato RenA Fleming da Pretty Yende a matsayin Jakadunta kan Al'adu da Lafiya. Wannan muhimmiyar sanarwa an yi ta ne a matsayin wani Й“angare na bikin cikar hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) shekaru saba'in da biyar 75 a yayin taron kiwon lafiya na duniya karo na saba'in da shida, ranar 22 ga Mayu 2023. Rena Fleming Й—aya ce daga mawaЖҷa mafiya yawan magoya baya a wannan zamanin, da kuma Pretty Yande, fasihiyar mawaЖҷiya wadda aka sani da Жҷayatattun waЖҷoЖҷi, an zaЙ“e su ne saboda nasarorin su a fannin waЖҷa domin su yi kiraye-kirayen da zai bunЖҷasa kiwon lafiya ta hanyar ЖҷirЖҷira. A ranar 8 ga Afrilu 2023, Fleming da Yende sun gabatar da waЖҷa ta musamman mai suna Waraka, wanda aka sadaukar da ita ga taron cikar hukumar lafiya ta duniya shekaru saba'in da biyar 75 a Geneva, Switzerland.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„Щ…ШЁШҜШ№ЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙЩҮЩҲШұЩҠЩҶШҢ ШұЩҠЩҶЩҠЩҮ ЩҒЩ„ЩҠЩ…ЩҠЩҶШә ЩҲ ШЁШұЩҠШӘЩҠ ЩҠЩҠЩҶШҜЩҠШҢ ШіЩҸЩ…ЩҠЩҲШ§ ШіЩҒШұШ§ШЎ ШӯШіЩҶ ЩҶЩҠШ© Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ©. Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ШӘШҙШ№Шұ ШЁШіШ№Ш§ШҜШ© Щ„Ш§ ШӘЩҲШөЩҒ Щ„Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶШ§ЩҶЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙЩҮЩҲШұЩҠЩҶ Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩӢШ§ШҢ ШұЩҠЩҶЩҠЩҮ ЩҒЩ„ЩҠЩ…ЩҠЩҶШә ЩҲ ШЁШұЩҠШӘЩҠ ЩҠЩҠЩҶШҜЩҠШҢ ЩғЩҖ ШіЩҒШұШ§ШЎ ШӯШіЩҶ ЩҶЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ©. ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ№Щ„Ш§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұЩ…ЩҲЩӮ ШіЩҸЩ…ЩҠ ЩғШ¬ШІШЎ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩғШұЩү Ш§Щ„ШіШЁШ№ЩҠЩҶ ЩҲ Ш®Щ…ШіЩҠЩҶ Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӨШӘЩ…Шұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШіШ§ШҜШі ЩҲ ШіШӘЩҠЩҶ Щ„Щ„ШөШӯШ© ЩҒЩҠ 22 Щ…Ш§ЩҠЩҲ 2023. ШұЩҠЩҶЩҠЩҮ ЩҒЩ„ЩҠЩ…ЩҠЩҶШәШҢ ЩҲЩҲШ§ШӯШҜШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШәЩҶЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ ШҙЩҮШұШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш№ШөШұЩҶШ§ШҢ ЩҲ ШЁШұЩҠШӘЩҠ ЩҠЩҠЩҶШҜЩҠШҢ ЩҲЩҮЩҠ Щ…ШәЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§ШіШӘШ«ЩҶШ§ШҰЩҠШ© Щ…Ш№ШұЩҲЩҒШ© ШЁШЈШҜШ§ШҰЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш°ЩҮЩ„ШҢ ЩӮШҜ Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШұЩҲШ§ ШЁШіШЁШЁ ШҘЩҶШ¬Ш§ШІШ§ШӘЩҮЩ… Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҠШ© ЩҲШҜШ№Щ…ЩҮЩ… Щ„ШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШӘШ§ШҰШ¬ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ЩҲШіШ§ШҰЩ„ ШҘШЁШҜШ§Ш№ЩҠШ©. ЩҒЩҠ 8 ШЈШЁШұЩҠЩ„ 2023ШҢ ЩҒЩ„ЩҠЩ…ЩҠЩҶШә ЩҲ ЩҠЩҠЩҶШҜЩҠ ЩӮШҜ ШЈШҜШ§ШЎЩҲШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ШӯЩҒЩ„ Щ…ЩҲШіЩҠЩӮЩҠ Ш®Ш§ШөШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШұЩҲЩҒ ШЁШ§ШіЩ… "Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ЩҠШ©"ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ Щ…Ш®ШөШө Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӯШӘЩҒШ§Щ„ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш°ЩғШұЩү Ш§Щ„ШіШЁШ№ЩҠЩҶ ЩҲ Ш®Щ…ШіЩҠЩҶ Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬ЩҶЩҠЩҒШҢ ШіЩҲЩҠШіШұШ§.

translations.source: Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General, said, "WHO is honoured to have RenГ©e Fleming and Pretty Yende join as Goodwill Ambassadors for Arts and Health. Their unparalleled talent, dedication to the arts, and commitment to advancing health and well-being make them ideal ambassadors for this important cause. Their involvement will inspire individuals, communities and policy-makers to recognize and harness the transformative power of the arts in the pursuit of better health for all. "Fleming brings a wealth of expertise to her new role. She has captivated audiences worldwide with her luminous soprano voice and compelling artistry.
translations.reference: Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Darakta Janar na hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) ya ce, hukumar lafiya ta duniya ta samu karamci da kasancewar Rena Fleming da Pretty Yende a matsayin Jakadun faran alkairi a fanninta na ЖҳirЖҷira da Lafiya. Tsantsar fasahar su, sadaukarwar su a fannin ЖҷirЖҷira, da jajircewar su don ci gaban kiwon lafiya da zaman lafiya ya sa su zama jakadun da suka dace na wannan muhimmin aiki. Shigowar su zai zaburar da Й—aiЙ—aikun mutane, al'ummomi da masu tsara manufofi su gane tare da amfani da tasirin ЖҷirЖҷira wajen samun ingantaccen kiwon lafiya ga kowa. "Fleming tana nuna Жҷwarewa a sabon matsayin da aka ba ta. Tana jan hankalin masu sauraro a faЙ—in duniya da tattausar muryar ta da salo mai Й—aukar hankali.
translations.hypothesis: ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШӘЩҠШҜШұЩҲШі ШЈШҜШӯШ§ЩҶЩҲЩ… Ш¬ЩҠШЁШұЩҠЩҠШіЩҲШіШҢ ШұШҰЩҠШіШ§ Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠ Щ„ЩҖ WHOШҢ ЩӮШ§Щ„: "WHO ШӘШҙШ№Шұ ШЁШ§Щ„ШіШ№Ш§ШҜШ© Щ„Ш§ЩӮШӘШЁШ§Ші ШұЩҠЩҶЩҠЩҮ ЩҒЩ„ЩҠЩ…ЩҠЩҶШә ЩҲЩҠШ§ЩҠЩҶШҜ ЩғШӯЩ…Щ„Ш© ЩҶШөШұШ© Щ„ЩҖ "Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ©". Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҮШ§ШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§ШҜШұШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш§Щ„ШӘШІШ§Щ… Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҲЩҶШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§Щ„ШӘШІШ§Щ… Щ…Ш№ ШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШұЩҒШ§ЩҮЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҠШ¬Ш№Щ„ЩҮЩ…Ш§ ШіЩҒШұШ§ШЎ Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҠЩҶ Щ„ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШіШЁШЁ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҮЩ…. Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғШӘЩҮЩ… ШіШӘЩ„ЩҮЩ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№Ш§ШӘШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШөЩ…Щ…ЩҠЩҶ Щ„ШӘШ№ШұЩҒ ЩҲ Ш§ШіШӘШәЩ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҲШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩҲЩҠЩ„ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШіШ№ЩҠ Щ„ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ ШөШӯШ© ШЈЩҒШ¶Щ„ Щ„Щ„Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№. "ЩҒЩ„ЩҠЩ…ЩҠЩҶШә Ш¬Щ„ШЁШӘ Ш®ШЁШұШ© ЩғШЁЩҠШұШ© ШҘЩ„Щү ШҜЩҲШұЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ. Щ„ЩӮШҜ ШЈШіШұШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш¬Щ…ЩҮЩҲШұ ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ШЈЩҶШӯШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… ШЁШөЩҲШӘЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„ШұШ§ШҰШ№ ЩҲЩ…ЩҮШ§ШұШӘЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ…ЩҠШІШ©.

translations.source: Beyond her remarkable vocal talent, Fleming has been a fervent advocate for research at the intersection of the arts and health. Her presentations worldwide with scientists and practitioners, her leading role in major initiatives, and her association with WHO demonstrate her commitment to harnessing the transformative power of the arts to better society. "I am elated that the preeminent global health agency is recognizing the powerful impact of the arts in health, and I am deeply honoured to be entrusted to share this message," said Fleming. вҖңEvery day, advances in neuroscience and clinical research reveal more about the benefits of arts therapies, experiences, and education, with implications for well-being throughout the human life span. However, we have only just begun to realize the amazing potential of this work, and I look forward to expanding awareness and access as a WHO Goodwill Ambassador.
translations.reference: Bayan gwanintarta ta murya mai ban mamaki, Fleming ta kasance jajirtacciyar mai kiraye-kiraye don binciken alaЖҷar fasaha da kiwon lafiya. Abubuwan da ta gabatar a duk faЙ—in duniya tare da masana kimiyya da ma'aikata, babban rawar da ta taka a cikin manyan shirye-shirye, da kuma haЙ—in gwiwarta da hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) sun nuna jajircewarta wajen amfani tasirin ЖҷirЖҷira don ingantacciyar al'umma. Fleming ta ce, "Na ji matuЖҷar daЙ—i bisa yadda babbar hukumar lafiya ta duniya ta gano tasirin aikin ЖҷirЖҷira wajen bunЖҷasa kiwin lafiya, an kuma matuЖҷar karramani da aka ba ni amanar isar da wannan saЖҷo. Kowacce rana, ci gaba a fannin kimiyyar hanyoyin sadarwar jiki da harkokin binkice suna Жҷara bayyana amfanin harkokin ЖҷirЖҷira da gogewa da ta ilimi da kuma himmancin kiwon lafiya a gabakiЙ—ayan rayuwa Й—an'adam. Kodayake, yanzu ne muka fara gano gawutacciyar nasarar da wannan aikin zai cimma a nan gaba, zan ci gaba da faЙ—aЙ—a wayar da kai da buЙ—e Жҷofa a matsayin jakadan fatan alkairi ga hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO).
translations.hypothesis: ШәЩҲШ§ШұЩӢШ§ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ЩҮШ§ШұШӘЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ«ЩҶШ§ШҰЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ ШәЩҶШ§ШЎШҢ ЩҒЩ„ЩҠЩ…ЩҠЩҶШә ЩҮЩҲ Щ…ШҜШ§ЩҒШ№ ЩӮЩҲЩҠ Ш№ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁШӯШ« ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ©. Ш№ШұШ¶ЩҲЩҮ Щ„Ш№Щ„Щ…Ш§ШЎ ЩҲЩ…ЩҮЩҶЩҠЩҠЩҶ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҢ ШҜЩҲШұЩҮ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҠШ§ШҜЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ШЁШ§ШҜШұШ§ШӘ ЩғШЁШұЩүШҢ ЩҲ Ш№Щ„Ш§ЩӮШӘЩҮ Щ…Ш№ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҠШёЩҮШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘШІШ§Щ…ЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ЩӮЩҲШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҲЩҶ Щ„ШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№. "ШЈЩҶШ§ Щ…Щ…ШӘЩҶ Щ„ШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩғШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШ§ШҰШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ©ШҢ ШӘШҜШұЩғ Ш§Щ„ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҲЩҠ Щ„Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ©ШҢ ЩҲ ШЈЩҶШ§ Щ…Щ…ШӘЩҶ Ш¬ШҜЩӢШ§ Щ„ЩғЩҲЩҶЩҠ Щ…ЩғЩ„ЩҒ ШЁШӘЩҲШөЩҠЩ„ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШұШіШ§Щ„Ш©"ШҢ ЩӮШ§Щ„ ЩҒЩ„ЩҠЩ…ЩҠЩҶШә. "ЩғЩ„ ЩҠЩҲЩ…ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ЩҲШұШ§ШӘ ЩҒЩҠ Ш№Щ„Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШөШ§ШЁ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЁШӯШ« Ш§Щ„ШіШұЩҠШұЩҠШҢ ШӘЩҸШёЩҮШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШІЩҠШҜ Ш№ЩҶ ЩҒЩҲШ§ШҰШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ ШЁШ§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҲЩҶШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ¬Ш§ШұШЁШҢ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№Щ„ЩҠЩ…ШҢ Щ…Ш№ ШўШ«Ш§Шұ Ш№Щ„Щү ШұЩҒШ§ЩҮЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Щ…ШұШ§ШӯЩ„ ШӯЩҠШ§Ш© Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҶШіШ§ЩҶ. ЩҲЩ…Ш№ Ш°Щ„ЩғШҢ Щ„Ш§ ШІЩ„ЩҶШ§ ЩҒЩӮШ· ЩҶШЁШҜШЈ ЩҒЩҠ ШҘШҜШұШ§Щғ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩ…ЩғШ§ЩҶШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШұШ§ШҰШ№Ш© Щ„ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„ШҢ ЩҲ ШЈЩҶШ§ ШЈШӘШ·Щ„Ш№ ШҘЩ„Щү ШӘЩҲШіЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ№ЩҠ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ШҢ ШЁШөЩҒШӘЩҠ ШіЩҒЩҠШұ Ш®ЩҠШұЩҠШ© Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©.

translations.source: "Pretty Yende has mesmerized audiences with her exquisite voice and stunning performances. As a soprano with a deep understanding of the power of music, she has demonstrated her commitment to using her talent to improve society. Yende's passion for sharing the healing aspects of music and her dedication to social causes align perfectly with WHOвҖҷs Arts and Health agenda. Yende said, "I am delighted to be appointed a WHO Goodwill Ambassador for Arts and Health. I hope to help establish a foundation for continued investigation into the arts being a fundamental ingredient in improving our physical, mental, and social well-being.
translations.reference: Pretty Yende ta nishaЙ—antar da sauraro da tattausar muryarta da Жҷayatacciyar gabatarwa. A matsayin maЖҷiya mace wacce ta naЖҷalci tasirin kiЙ—a, ta nuna jajircewar ta wajen amfani da fasahar ta don inganta al'umma. Sha'awar Yende na isar isar da saЖҷon inganta kiwon lafiya ta hanyar waЖҷa, da sadaukarwarta wajen bunЖҷasa cigaban al'umma ya yi daidai manufofin hukumar lafiya ta duniya na ЖҷirЖҷira da kiwo lafiya. Yende ta ce, "Ina matuЖҷar farin ciki bisa naЙ—a ni a matsayin jakadiyar hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) fannin ЖҷirЖҷira da Lafiya. Ina fatan in taimaka wajen kafa tushe don ci gaba da bincike game da zane-zane shi ne muhimmin abu don inganta lafiyar jiki, tunani, da zamantakewarmu.
translations.hypothesis: "Pretty Yende ЩӮШҜ Ш¬Щ„ШЁЩҺШӘ Ш№Ш§Щ…Щ„Ш§ Щ„Ш¬Щ…ЩҮЩҲШұ ШЁЩҒШ¶Щ„ ШөЩҲШӘШ§ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩӮЩҠ ЩҲ ШЈШҜШ§ШҰЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„ШұШ§ШҰШ№. Щ„Ш§ШЎШ°Ш§ШҢ ШЁЩҒШ¶Щ„ ЩҒЩҮЩ…ЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…ЩҠЩӮ Щ„ЩӮЩҲШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШіЫҢЩӮЫҢШҢ ЩҮЩҠ ЩӮШҜ ШЈШёЩҮШұШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘШІШ§Щ…ЩҮШ§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Щ…ЩҲЩҮШЁШӘЩҮШ§ Щ„ШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№. ШҙШәЩҒ Pretty Yende ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҲШ§ЩҶШЁ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҲШіЫҢЩӮЫҢШҢ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШӘШІШ§Щ…ЩҮШ§ ШЁЩӮШ¶Ш§ЩҠШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№ШҢ ЩҠШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ШӘЩ…Ш§Щ…ЩӢШ§ Щ…Ш№ ШЈШ¬ЩҶШҜШ© WHO ШЁШ®ШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ©. Pretty Yende ЩӮШ§Щ„: "ШЈЩҶШ§ Щ…Щ…ШӘЩҶ Щ„ЩғЩҲЩҶЩҠ Щ…Ш№ЩҠЩҶ ШіЩҒЩҠШұ ШӯШіЩҶ ЩҶЩҠШ© Щ„ЩҖ WHO ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ©. ЩҶШ§ ЩҠЩҲЩӮЩӮ ШЈЩҶ ШЈШіШ§Ш№ШҜ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШЈШіЩҠШі Щ…ШӨШіШіШ© Щ„ШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШІЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁШӯЩҲШ« ШӯЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҲЩҶШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮЩҠ Ш№ЩҶШөШұ ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ ШөШӯШӘЩҶШ§ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШіШҜЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩӮЩ„ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ЩҠШ©.

translations.source: I am grateful to WHO for paving the way for new research and providing their global platform to spread the word and generate research on the connection of arts and health. "I look forward to all the possibilities to do essential work in my native South Africa and globally for a better and healthier tomorrow," added Yende. The appointments of Fleming and Yende underscore the profound link between arts and health. Engagement in creative activities, such as music, art, and dance, positively impacts physical, mental health, social well-being, and overall quality of life. Through their roles as Goodwill Ambassadors, Fleming and Yende will promote the integration of arts into health-care systems, advocate for access to creative arts therapies, and champion the importance of artistic expression in improving health outcomes globally.
translations.reference: Ina godiya ga wanda ya ba da hanya don sabon bincike da kuma samar da dandalin su na duniya don yada kalmar da kuma samar da bincike game da haЙ—in fasaha da kiwon lafiya. "Ina fatan duk damar yin aiki mai muhimmanci a Afirka ta Kudu da kuma duniya don gobe mafi kyau da lafiya," in ji Yende. Nadin Fleming da Yende sun nuna zurfin dangantaka tsakanin zane-zane da kiwon lafiya. Shiga cikin ayyukan kirkire-kirkire, kamar kiЙ—a, zane-zane, da rawa, yana rinjayar jiki, lafiyar hankali, jin dadin zamantakewa, da kuma ingancin rayuwa gaba Й—aya. Ta hanyar rawar da suke takawa a matsayin jakadun farar aniya, Fleming da Yende za su tallata shigar da ЖҷirЖҷira a cikin tsarin kula da kiwon lafiya, da kiraye-kiraye kan don buЙ—e Жҷofa ga harkokin ЖҷirЖҷira, da kuma fito da muhimmancin muryar mawaЖҷa wajen bunЖҷasa harkokin kiwon lafiya a duniya bakiЙ—aya.
translations.hypothesis: "ШЈЩҶШ§ Щ…Щ…ШӘЩҶ Щ„ЩҖ WHO Щ„ЩғЩҲЩҶЩҮ ЩӮШҜ Щ…ЩҮШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮ Щ„Щ„ШЁШӯШ« Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ ЩҲШӘЩӮШҜЩҠЩ… Щ…ЩҶШөШ© Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Щ„ЩҠЩҲШІШ№ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩ…Ш§ШӘ ЩҲШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ ШЁШӯШ« ШӯЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§ЩӮШ© ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ©. "ШЈЩҶШ§ ШЁШ§ЩҶШӘШёШ§Шұ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұШө Щ„ШҘЩҶШ¬Ш§ШІ Ш№Щ…Щ„ Щ…ЩҮЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬ЩҶЩҲШЁ ШҘЩҒШұЩҠЩӮЩҠШ§ ЩҲШ¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ШЈЩҶШӯШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… Щ„ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ Щ…ШіШӘЩӮШЁЩ„ ШЈЩҒШ¶Щ„ ЩҲШөШӯШ© ШЈЩҒШ¶Щ„"ШҢ ЩҲШӘШ§ШЁШ№ ЩҠЩҠЩҶШҜЩҠ. ШӘШ№ЩҠЩҠЩҶ ЩҒЩ„ЩҠЩ…ЩҠЩҶШ¬ ЩҲЩҠШ§ЩҠЩҶШҜЩҠ ЩҠЩҲШ¶Шӯ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…ЩҠЩӮШ© ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ©. Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶШҙШ·Ш© Ш§Щ„ШҘШЁШҜШ§Ш№ЩҠШ©ШҢ Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШіЩҠЩӮЩүШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШұЩӮШөШҢ Щ„ЩҮШ§ ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ ШҘЩҠШ¬Ш§ШЁЩҠ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШіШҜЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩӮЩ„ЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШұЩҒШ§ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ЩҠШҢ ЩҲ Ш¬ЩҲШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҠШ§Ш© ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ Ш№Ш§Щ…. Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ШЈШҜЩҲШ§ШұЩҮЩ… ЩғЩ…ШұШіЩҲЩ„ЩҠЩҶ Щ„Щ„Ш®ЩҠШұШҢ ЩҒЩ„ЩҠЩ…ЩҠЩҶШ¬ ЩҲЩҠШ§ЩҠЩҶШҜЩҠ ШіЩҠШ№ШІШІЩҲЩҶ ШҜЩ…Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШЈЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШіЩҠШҜШ§ЩҒШ№ЩҲЩҶ Ш№ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШҘШЁШҜШ§Ш№ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШіЩҠШҜШ§ЩҒШ№ЩҲЩҶ Ш№ЩҶ ШЈЩҮЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№ШЁЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ ЩҶШӘШ§ШҰШ¬ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ….

translations.source: WHO launches global network to detect and prevent infectious disease threats WHO and partners are launching a global network to help protect people from infectious disease threats through the power of pathogen genomics. The International Pathogen Surveillance Network (IPSN) will provide a platform to connect countries and regions, improving systems for collecting and analyzing samples, using these data to drive public health decision-making, and sharing that information more broadly. Pathogen genomics analyzes the genetic code of viruses, bacteria and other disease-causing organisms to understand how infectious they are, how deadly they are, and how they spread.
translations.reference: WHO ta kaddamar da cibiyar sadarwa ta duniya zuwa gano da kuma hana barazanar cututtuka masu yaduwa WHO da abokan haЙ—in gwiwa suna Жҷaddamar da hanyar sadarwa ta duniya don taimakawa kare mutane daga barazanar cututtuka ta hanyar ikon Жҷwayoyin cuta. Жҷasashe da yankuna, na inganta tsarin tattarawa da nazarin samfurori, ta yin amfani da waЙ—annan bayanan don fitar da yanke shawara kan lafiyar jama'a, da kuma raba wannan bayanin a sarari. Magungunan kwayoyin halitta suna nazarin ka'idojin kwayoyin halitta na Жҷwayoyin cuta, kwayoyin cuta da sauran kwayoyin da ke haifar da cututtuka don fahimtar yadda suke kamuwa da su, yadda suke da mutuwa, da kuma yadda suke yaduwa.
translations.hypothesis: ШіЩҸЩ„Ш·Ш§ЩҶ Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ Щ„ШӘШ№ШұЩҒ ЩҲ ЩҠЩ…ЩҶШ№ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШЁШҰШ©: Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© (WHO) ЩҲ ШҙШұЩғШ§ШӨЩҮШ§ ЩҠШ·Щ„ЩӮЩҲЩҶ ШҙШЁЩғШ© Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ…ШіШ§Ш№ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜ ЩҒЩҠ ШӯЩ…Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш°ЩҲШ§ШӘЩҮЩ… Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШЁШҰШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ЩӮЩҲШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩ„ЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҠЩҶЩҠ Щ„Щ„Щ…ШіШЁШЁШ§ШӘ. ШҙШЁЩғШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ§ЩӮШЁШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…ШіШЁШЁШ§ШӘ (IPSN) ШіШӘЩҲЩҒШұ Щ…ЩҶШөШ© Щ„ШұШЁШ· ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш·ЩӮШҢ ЩҲШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Щ„Ш¬Щ…Ш№ ЩҲШӘШӯЩ„ЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҠЩҶШ§ШӘШҢ ЩҲШ§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШ§ЩҶШ§ШӘ Щ„Ш§ШӘШ®Ш§Ш° ЩӮШұШ§ШұШ§ШӘ ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш©ШҢ ЩҲЩ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғШ© ШӘЩ„Щғ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩҶШ·Ш§ЩӮ ШЈЩҲШіШ№. translations.source: With this information, scientists and public health officials can identify and track diseases to prevent and respond to outbreaks as part of a broader disease surveillance system, and to develop treatments and vaccines. The IPSN, with a Secretariat hosted by the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence, brings together experts worldwide at the cutting-edge of genomics and data analytics, from governments, philanthropic foundations, multilateral organizations, civil society, academia and the private sector. All share a common goal: to detect and respond to disease threats before they become epidemics and pandemics, and to optimize routine disease surveillance. The goal of this new network is ambitious, but it can also play a vital role in health security: to give every country access to pathogen genomic sequencing and analytics as part of its public health system,вҖқ said WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. вҖңAs was so clearly demonstrated to us during the COVID-19 pandemic, the world is stronger when it stands together to fight shared health threats.вҖқ

translations.source: COVID-19 highlighted the critical role pathogen genomics plays in responding to pandemic threats. Without the rapid sequencing of the SARS-COV-2 genome, vaccines would not have been as effective, or have been made available so quickly. New, more transmissible variants of the virus would not have been as quickly identified. Genomics lies at the heart of effective epidemic and pandemic preparedness and response, as well as part of the ongoing surveillance of a vast range of diseases, from foodborne diseases and influenza to tuberculosis and HIV. Its use in monitoring the spread of HIV drug resistance, for example, has led to antiretroviral regimes that have saved countless lives.
translations.reference: COVID-19 ta nuna mahimmancin rawar da Жҷwayoyin cuta ke takawa wajen mayar da martani ga barazanar cutar. Idan ba tare da saurin jerin kwayoyin halittar SARS-COV-2 ba, da alluran rigakafin ba su yi tasiri ba, ko kuma an samar da su cikin sauri. Sabbin wasu da yawa daga kwayoyin cutar da ba za a iya gano su da sauri ba. Genomics ya ta'allaka ne a tsakiyar ingantaccen annoba da shirye-shirye na annoba da kuma mayar da martani, da kuma wani Й“angare na ci gaba da sa ido kan Й—imbin cututtuka, daga cututtukan da ke haifar da abinci da mura zuwa tarin fuka da cutar kanjamau HIV. Ana amfani da shi wajen sa ido kan yaduwar juriyar magungunan cutar HIV, alal misali, ya haifar da tsarin kula da cutar kanjamau wanda ya ceci rayuka marasa adadi.

translations.source: вҖңGlobal collaboration in pathogen genomic surveillance has been critical as the world fights COVID-19 together,вҖқ said Dr Rajiv J. Shah, President of The Rockefeller Foundation. вҖңIPSN builds upon this experience by creating a strong platform for partners across sectors and borders to share knowledge, tools, and practices to ensure that pandemic prevention and response is innovative and robust in the future.вҖқ Despite recent scale-up in genomics capacity in countries as a result of the COVID-19 pandemic, many still lack effective systems for collecting and analyzing samples or using those data to drive public health decision-making. There is not enough sharing of data, practices, and innovations to build a robust global health surveillance architecture. Budgets that soared during the pandemic, allowing a rapid build-up of capabilities, are now being slashed, even in the wealthiest countries.
translations.reference: "HaЙ—in gwiwar duniya na sa ido kan Жҷwayoyin cuta ya taka rawa mai mahimmanci yayin da duniya ke yaЖҷar COVID-19 tare," in ji Dr Rajiv J. Shah, Shugaban Gidauniyar Rockefeller. IPSN tana karfafawa akan wannan ilimi ta hanyar ЖҷirЖҷirar ЖҷaЖҷЖҷarfan wani dandamali ga abokan haЙ—in gwiwa a duk faЙ—in sassa da iyakoki don raba ilimi, kayan aiki, da ayyuka don tabbatar da cewa rigakafin kawarda da cutar ya zama sabon salo kuma mai Жҷarfi a nan gaba Duk da haЙ“aka iyawar kwayoyin halitta na kwanan nan a cikin Жҷasashe sakamakon cutar ta COVID-19, da yawa har yanzu ba su da ingantattun tsarin tattarawa da nazarin samfuran ko amfani da waЙ—annan bayanan don fitar da yanke shawara kan lafiyar jama'a. Babu isassun musayar bayanai, koyo, da sabbin abubuwa don gina ingantaccen gine-ginen sa ido kan lafiyar duniya. Kasafin kudin da suka yi tashin gwauron zabi yayin barkewar cutar, wanda ke ba da damar haЙ“aka cikin sauri, yanzu yana raguwa, har ma a Жҷasashe masu arziki.
translations.hypothesis: "ЩҮЩ…Ъ©Ш§ШұЫҢ Ч’Р»РҫРұР°Р»СҢРҪСӢР№ cikin nazarin Ш¬ЩҠЩҶЩҲЩ… РҝР°СӮРҫШ¬ЩҶШҢ ШІШ§ЩҠШҢ " ЩӮШ§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШұШ§Ш¬ЩҠЩҒ Ш¬. ШҙШ§ЩҮШҢ ШұШҰЩҠШі Щ…ШӨШіШіШ© ШұЩҲЩғЩҒЩҠЩ„. "IPSN ЩҠШұШӘЩғШІ Ш№Щ„Щү wannan, ШЁШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ Щ…ЩҶШөШ© ЩӮЩҲЩҠШ© Щ„ШҙШұЩғШ§ШЎ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ·Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘ ЩҲ ШӯШҜЩҲШҜ, Щ„ЩҠЩӮЩҲЩ…ЩҲШ§ ШЁЩ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒШ©, Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲШ§ШӘ, ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§Щ„ЩҠШЁ, Щ„Ш¶Щ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЈЩҶ Щ…ЩҶШ№ ЩҲ Ш§ШіШӘШ¬Ш§ШЁШ© Щ„ЩҲШЁШ§ШЎ, ШіШӘЩғЩҲЩҶ Щ…ШЁШӘЩғШұШ© ЩҲ ЩӮЩҲЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩӮШЁЩ„. Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШұШәЩ… Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШІЩҠШ§ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ЩҠШұШ© ЩҒЩҠ ЩӮШҜШұШ§ШӘ Ш¬ЩҠЩҶЩҲЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ ЩҶШӘЩҠШ¬Ш© Щ„ЩҲШЁШ§ШЎ COVID-19, Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШІШ§Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШҜЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶЩҮЩ… ЩҠЩҒШӘЩӮШұ ШҘЩ„Щү ШЈЩҶШёЩ…Ш© ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„Ш© Щ„Ш¬Щ…Ш№ ЩҲ ШӘШӯЩ„ЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҠЩҶШ§ШӘ, ШЈЩҲ Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ШӘЩ„Щғ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШ§ЩҶШ§ШӘ Щ„ШҘШӯШҜШ§Ш« ЩӮШұШ§Шұ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш©. Щ„Ш§ ЩҠЩҲШ¬ШҜ Щ…Ш§ ЩҠЩғЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғШ© Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШ§ЩҶШ§ШӘ, Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§Щ„ЩҠШЁ, ЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШЁШӘЩғШ§ШұШ§ШӘ, Щ„ШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ ШЁЩҶЩҠШ© ЩӮЩҲЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ. Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШІШ§ЩҶЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШІШ§ШҜШӘ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Щ„ЩҲШЁШ§ШЎ, ЩҲ ШіЩ…ШӯШӘ ШЁШЁЩҶШ§ШЎ ЩӮШҜШұШ§ШӘ ШЁШіШұШ№Ш©, Ш§Щ„ШўЩҶ ЩҠШӘЩ… ШӘШ®ЩҒЩҠШ¶ЩҮШ§, ШӯШӘЩү ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Ш«ШұШ§ШЎ.

translations.source: вҖңArgentina is deeply invested in building our own country capacity in pathogen genomics and the capacity of other countries,вҖқ said Josefina Campos, Director of the National Genomics and Bioinformatics Center at ANLIS MalbrГЎn, Argentina. вҖңDiseases do not respect borders: a disease threat in one country is also a threat to others. We look forward to collaborating with IPSN members to achieve our common goal of preventing illness and saving lives.вҖқ The IPSN will tackle these challenges through a global network, connecting geographies and disease-specific networks, to build a collaborative system to better detect, prevent and respond to disease threats. Members will work together in dedicated groups focusing on specific challenges, supported by funding through the IPSN to scale-up ideas and projects in pathogen genomics.
translations.reference: Kasar Argentina ta zuba jari sosai wajen gina kasarmu a fannin kwayoyin halittar kwayoyin cuta da karfin sauran kasashe,inji Josefina Campos, Daraktan Cibiyar Nazarin Halittu ta Kasa da Cibiyar Nazarin Halittu ta ANLIS MalbrГғВЎn, dake Argentina. Cututtuka ba sa mutunta iyakoki: barazanar cuta a cikin Жҷasa Й—aya kazalika kuma barazana ce ga wasu. Muna fatan hada kai da membobin IPSN don cimma burinmu na hana yaduwar cututtuka da ceton rayuka. IPSN za ta magance waЙ—annan Жҷalubalen ta hanyar hanyar sadarwa ta duniya, haЙ—a labaran cibiyoyin sadarwa, don gina tsarin haЙ—in gwiwa don ganowa, da hana barazanar cututtuka. Membobi za su yi aiki tare da Жҷungiyoyi masu sadaukarwa tare da mai da hankali kan Жҷayyadaddun Жҷalubale, ta hanyar tallafin kudi daga IPSN don haЙ“aka ra'ayoyi da ayyuka a pathogen genomics.
translations.hypothesis: "Argentina yana da shauqi da kasancewa, ЩҲШӘШ·ЩҲЩҠШұ ШӨЩҶШ§ШұШӘЩҠ, ЩҲ ШӨЩҶШ§ШұШӘЩҠ, " ЩӮШ§Щ„ Ш¬ЩҲШІЩҠЩҶШ§ ЩғШ§Щ…ШЁЩҲШіШҢ ШҜЩғШӘЩҲressa, ЩҲ ЩҠШ§ЩҲШ§ШұЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұЩғШІ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠ Щ„Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩ… ЩҲ Ш№ЩҲЩ…Щ„, ANLIS MalbrГЎn, Argentina. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ. "Щ…ЩҲ ЩҶШ§ cikin, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ, ЩҲЩҲЩҮЩҠ

translations.source: By connecting countries, regions, and wider stakeholders, the IPSN will help to increase critical capacity, amplify regional and country-level voices, and strengthen their priorities. About the IPSN launch The IPSN will be formally launched on the sidelines of the World Health Assembly in Geneva. The launch event takes place on 20 May 2023, 17:00 вҖ“ 19:30h (CET) in the InterContinental Geneva, and is open to media. It includes keynote speeches from:
translations.reference: Ta hanyar haЙ—a Жҷasashe, yankuna, da sauran masu ruwa da tsaki, IPSN za ta taimaka wajen haЙ“aka muhimmin, haЙ“aka muryoyin yanki da kuma matakin Жҷasa, da Жҷarfafa abubuwan da suka sa gaba. Game da Жҷaddamar da IPSN Za a kaddamar da IPSN a hukumance a gefen taron Majalisar Lafiya ta Duniya a Geneva. Taron Жҷaddamarwar zai kasance a ranar 20 ga Mayu 2023, da misalin karfe biyar-bakwai da rabi n adre 17:00 - 19:30h (CET) a InterContinental Geneva, kuma a bude take ga kafafen yada labarai. Ya Жҷunshi manyan jawabai daga:

Ш№ЩҶ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮ ШұШЁШ· ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁ nations, ЩҲЩ„Ш§ЩҠШ§ШӘ, ЩҲ ШЈШөШӯШ§ШЁ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөЩ„ШӯШ©, IPSN ШіШӘШіШ§Ш№ШҜ Ш№Щ„Щү ШІЩҠШ§ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ЩӮШҜШұШ©, ШӘШ¶Ш®ЩҠЩ… Ш§Щ„ШЈШөЩҲШ§ШӘ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„ШҘЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ… ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜ, ЩҲ ШӘЩӮЩҲЩҠШ© ШЈЩҲЩ„ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ.

Ш№ЩҶ ШҘШ·Щ„Ш§ЩӮ IPSN: IPSN ШіШӘШӯШөЩ„ Ш№Щ„Щү ШҘШ·Щ„Ш§ЩӮ ШұШіЩ…ЩҠ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬ЩҶЩҠЩҒ. Ш§Щ„ШӯШҜШ« ШіЩҠЩ…Шұ Ш№Щ„Щү 20 Щ…Ш§ЩҠ 2023, 17:00 вҖ“ 19:30 (CET) ЩҒЩҠ ЩҒЩҶШҜЩӮ InterContinental Geneva, ЩҲ ЩҮЩҲ Щ…ШӘШ§Шӯ Щ„ЩҲШіШ§ШҰЩ„ ШҘШ№Щ„Ш§Щ…. ЩҲ ЩҠШӘШ¶Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Ш·Ш§ШЁШ§ШӘ ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ:

translations.hypothesis: ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШӘЩҠШҜШұЩҲШі ШЈШҜШ§ЩҶЩҲЩ… Ш¬ЩҠЩҮШЁШұЩҠШіЩҲШіШҢ ШұШҰЩҠШіШ§, "Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ Щ„ШөШӯШӘЩҮ"; ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ Щ…Ш§ЩҠЩғ ШұШ§ЩҠШ§ЩҶ, ШіЩғШұШӘШ§Шұ, "ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШЈШІЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Щ„ЩҖ WHO"; ЩҲ ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШӘШҙЩҠЩғЩҲ ШҘЩҠЩҮЩҠЩғЩҲШ§ШІЩҲ, ШіЩғШұШӘШ§Шұ, "Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ Щ„ШөШӯШӘЩҮ, Щ…ШұЩғШІ Щ„ШӘШҜШұЩҠШЁ ЩҲ ШұШөШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШЁШҰШ©";.  ШіЩҠЩғЩҲЩҶ ЩҮЩҶШ§Щғ ШЈЩҠШ¶ЩӢШ§ Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Ш®ШЁЩҠШұЩҠЩҶ Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҠЩҶ, ШҙЩ…Щ„: ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұШ© Ш¬ЩҠЩҶЩҠ ЩҮШ§ШұЩҠШі, ШұШҰЩҠШіШ©, "ЩҲЩғШ§Щ„Ш© ШЈЩ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…Щ…Щ„ЩғШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШӯШҜШ©";

translations.source: Professor Leo Yee Sin, Executive Director of the National Centre for Infectious Diseases; Singapore; Dr Mario Moreira, President, Fiocruz, Brazil; and Dr Josefina Campos, Director of the National Genomics and Bioinformatics Center at ANLIS MalbrГЎn, Argentina. The event will take place in a hybrid format, providing an opportunity for IPSN members and broader audiences to engage with the IPSN and its activities. About the IPSNThe IPSN is a new global network of pathogen genomic actors, hosted by the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence, to accelerate progress on the deployment of pathogen genomics and improve public health decision-making.

translations.source: The IPSN envisions a world where every country has equitable access to sustained capacity for genomic sequencing and analytics as part of its public health surveillance system. It sets out to create a mutually supportive global network of genomic surveillance actors that amplifies and accelerates the work of its members to improve access and equity. The IPSN consists of three main operational bodies that bring together different sets of stakeholders, supported by a Secretariat at the WHO Pandemic Hub. Partners collaborate in Communities of Practice (COPs) to solve common challenges, aiming to increase harmonization and innovation in pathogen genomics. In the Country Scale-Up Accelerator (CSUA), stakeholders work together to align efforts and enable South-South exchange to scale-up country capacity building.
translations.reference: IPSN ta yi hasashen duniya inda kowace Жҷasa ke da damar yin adalci don dorewar iya aiki da bin diddigin kwayoyin halitta da nazari a wani Й“angare na tsarin sa ido kan lafiyar jama'a. Ya tsara ЖҷirЖҷirar hanyar tallafawa duniya ta hanyar masu sa ido kan Жҷwayoyin cuta waЙ—anda ke haЙ“aka ayyukan membobinta don kara samun daidaito. IPSN ta Жҷunshi manyan fannonin gudanarwar aiki guda uku waЙ—anda ke haЙ—a Жҷungiyoyi daban-daban na masu ruwa da tsaki, waЙ—anda Sakatariya a Cibiyar Cutar Cutar ta WHO ke tallafawa. Abokan hulЙ—a suna haЙ—in gwiwa da Жҳungiyoyin Al'umma (COPs) don magance Жҷalubale, da nufin haЙ“aka daidaituwa da haЙ“aka pathogen genomics. A ЖҳarЖҷashin shirin (CSUA), masu ruwa da tsaki suna aiki tare don daidaita yunЖҷurin da ba da damar musayar Kudu-maso-Kudu don haЙ“aka bayarda horo ga kasa.
translations.hypothesis: IPSN yana so dunia wanda duk Жҷasa da ke Й—aukar Й—auki da Жҷwazo na Жҷirar jiki da ana amfani da shi, kamar wani Й“angiyar shirin kula da lafiyar jama'a. IPNS yana nufin ЖҷirЖҷirar shiri na duniya wanda ya ba da daidai da duk wanda ke a cikin shirin, wanda zai iya Жҷarfafa aikin membina don inganta Й—auki da daidai. IPNS yana da wasu Жҷungiyar da ke da aikin, wanda ke haЙ—a masu shiri, kuma ana ba su da Жҷungiyar da ke aikin WHO Pandemic Hub. HaЙ—in yana a cikin "Communities of Practice" (COPs) don yasa masu shiri su yi aikin tare, tare da kiyaye da Жҷarfafa Жҷirar jiki. A "Country Scale-Up Accelerator" (CSUA), masu shiri sun yi aikin tare don inganta aikin, kuma don inganta Жҷimar Жҷasa.

translations.source: The COP and CSUA bring together organizations from across sectors, income levels, and geographies, with a commitment to international cooperation and equity, and deep expertise in either genomics or country scale-up of surveillance systems. The third body is the Funders Forum to coordinate philanthropic, multi-lateral and governmental donors around increased political attention and financing efficiency of pathogen genomic surveillance. The Funders Forum also catalyses additional grant funding for projects of IPSN members. The establishment of the IPSN has been supported by German government funding to the WHO Pandemic Hub. About the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence
translations.reference: COP da CSUA suna haЙ—a Жҷungiyoyi daga sassa daban-daban, matakan samun kudin shiga, da yanayin Жҷasa, tare da sadaukar da kai ga haЙ—in gwiwar kasa da kasa da daidaito, da kuma Жҷwarewa mai zurfi a cikin ko dai ilimin genomics ko haЙ“aka tsarin sa ido na Жҷasa. Kaso na uku shi ne taron masu ba da tallafi don shirya masu ba da agaji, Жҷungiyoyin jama'a da masu ba da gudummawa na gwamnati a da Жҷarin kulawar siyasa da ingantaccen kuЙ—aЙ—en sa ido kan Жҷwayoyin cuta. Жҳungiyar Masu Ba da tallafin KuЙ—i kuma tana ba da Жҷarin tallafi don ayyukan membobin IPSN. Kafa IPSN yana samun tallafi daga gwamnatin Jamus zuwa ga cibiyar annoba ta WHO. Ш№ЩҶ Щ…ШұЩғШІ WHO Щ„ШҘЩҶШ°Ш§Шұ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШЁШҰШ© ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШЁШҰШ©

translations.source: Forming part of the WHO Health Emergencies Programme, the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence (the WHO Pandemic Hub), facilitates a global collaboration of partners from multiple sectors that supports countries and stakeholders to address future pandemic and epidemic risks with better access to data, better analytical capacities, and better tools and insights for decision-making. With support from the Government of the Federal Republic of Germany, the WHO Pandemic Hub was established in September 2021 in Berlin, in response to the COVID-19 pandemic, which demonstrated weaknesses around the world in how countries detect, monitor and manage public health threats. The WHO Pandemic Hub works closely with Member States and WHO regional and country offices to strengthen their data-sharing capacities and enable partners from around the world to collaborate and co-create tools to gather and analyse data for early warning surveillance. With a presence in more than 150 countries, six regional offices, and its Geneva headquarters, WHOвҖҷs reach gives us the ability to treat pandemic, epidemic and public health risks with equal urgency and diligence around the globe. By linking local, regional, and global initiatives, the WHO Pandemic Hub fosters a collaborative environment for innovators, scientists and experts from across a wide spectrum of disciplines, allowing us to leverage and share cutting-edge technology and anchoring our work in the needs of stakeholders around the world.
translations.reference: Samar da wani sashe a Й“angaren gaggawa na hukumar lafiya ta duniya , mai taken kawarda yaduwar cuttuka da annoba ,shirin wanda ya hadar bangarorin daban-daban da masu shiga tsakani tare da hadari da kuma samar da alkaluma masu inganci , da mafi kyawun kayan aiki da hangen nesa don yanke hukunci. Tare da goyon baya daga Gwamnatin Tarayyar Jamus, an kafa Cibiyar Cutar ta WHO a cikin watan Satumba 2021 a Berlin, don mayar da martani ga cutar ta COVID-19, wacce ta nuna rauni a duniya a yadda Жҷasashe ke gano, sa ido da sarrafa barazanar lafiyar jama'a. . Cibiyar Cutar Kwayar cuta ta WHO tana aiki kafada da kafada tare da kasashe membobin kungiyar da ofisoshin shiyya-shiyya da na WHO don karfafa iyawarsu na musayar bayanai da baiwa abokan hadin gwiwa daga ko'ina cikin duniya damar hada kai da hada kayan aiki don tattarawa da tantance bayanai don sa ido kan gargadin wuri. Tare da kasancewa a cikin Жҷasashe sama da 150, ofisoshin yanki shida, da hedkwatarta na Geneva, isar da WHO ta ba mu ikon magance cutar, annoba da haЙ—arin lafiyar jama'a tare da gaggawa daidai da himma a duk faЙ—in duniya. Ta hanyar haЙ—a shirye-shiryen gida, yanki, da na duniya, Cibiyar Cutar Cutar ta WHO tana haЙ“aka yanayin haЙ—in gwiwa don masu ЖҷirЖҷira, masana kimiyya da masana daga ko'ina a fannoni daban-daban, suna ba mu damar yin amfani da fasahohi masu sauki da daidaita aikinmu cikin buЖҷatun masu ruwa da tsaki a duniya.

translations.source: Building on expertise across disciplines, sectors, and regions, it will leverage WHOвҖҷs convening power to foster global solutions built on an architecture of global collaboration and trust.

translations.source: Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly to focus on вҖңsaving lives, driving health for allвҖқ as WHO turns 75 As the world faces ongoing health and humanitarian emergencies, the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly will focus on driving forward health for all. This yearвҖҷs session of the World Health Assembly will determine the immediate and longer-term future of WHO, starting with the program budget for the next two years, key decisions about the sustainable financing of the Organization and changes put in place to improve WHOвҖҷs processes and accountability. Delegates will also deliberate about the critical role that WHO has in the Global Health Emergency Architecture. The backdrop to these issues is the organizationвҖҷs 75th anniversary, with the highlights of its collective global health achievements since WHOвҖҷs creation in 1948.
translations.reference: Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya ta 76 za ta mayar da hankali kan rayuka, da tsarin tafiyar da lafiya ga kowa a yayin da WHO ke cika shekaru 75 Yayin da duniya ke fuskantar matsalolin lafiya da na jin kai da ake ci gaba da yi, Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya ta saba'in da shida za ta mai da hankali kan ciyar da lafiya gaba ga kowa. Taron Majalisar Lafiya ta Duniya na wannan shekara zai Жҷayyade makomar hukumar ta WHO nan da nan, wanda zai fara da kasafin kuЙ—in shirin na shekaru biyu masu zuwa, da mahimman shawarwari game da samar da kuЙ—aЙ—e mai dorewa na Hukumar da canje-canjen da aka yi don ingantawa. Tsari da kuma alhaki na WHO. Wakilai kuma za su yi shawara game da muhimmiyar rawar da WHO ke takawa a cikin Tsarin Gina aikin Gaggawa na hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya. Tushen waЙ—annan batutuwan shi ne bikin cika shekaru 75 na Жҷungiyar, tare da manyan nasarorin da ta samu a fannin kiwon lafiya a duniya tun bayan ЖҷirЖҷirar WHO a 1948.

Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ… Щ„Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶЩҠШіЩғЩҲШҢ ШіЩҠШӘШӯШҜШҜ Щ…ШөЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶЩҠШіЩғЩҲ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩӮШЁЩ„ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШұЩҠШЁ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЁШ№ЩҠШҜШҢ ШЁШҜШЎЩӢШ§ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ЩҠШІШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ Щ„ШіЩҶЩҲШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ 2 Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ШҜЩ…Ш©ШҢ ЩҲШ§ШӘШ®Ш§Ш° ЩӮШұШ§ШұШ§ШӘ Щ…ЩҮЩ…Ш© ШЁШҙШЈЩҶ ШӘЩ…ЩҲЩҠЩ„ Щ…ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ… Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩ… ШҘШҜШ®Ш§Щ„ЩҮШ§ Щ„ШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ§ШӘ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§ШЎЩ„Ш© Щ„Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶЩҠШіЩғЩҲ. Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғЩҠЩҶ ШіЩҠШӘЩҶШ§ЩӮШҙЩҲЩҶ ШЈЩҠШ¶ЩӢШ§ Ш№ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲШұ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ШіЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ШӘЩ„Ш№ШЁЩҮ Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶЩҠШіЩғЩҲ ЩҒЩҠ ШЁЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШҘШ·Ш§Шұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ Щ„Щ„ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©. Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ© ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ¶Ш§ЩҠШ§ ЩҮЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩғШұЩү Ш§Щ„ЩҖ 75 Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш©ШҢ Щ…Ш№ ШӘШіЩ„ЩҠШ· Ш§Щ„Ш¶ЩҲШЎ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҶШ¬Ш§ШІШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШӘШұЩғШ© Щ„Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶЩҠШіЩғЩҲ Щ…ЩҶШ° ШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШҰЩҮШ§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш№Ш§Щ… 1948.

translations.source: It will review last yearвҖҷs progress, accomplishments and challenges along with future priorities across the key pillars of WHOвҖҷs work: Universal Health Coverage, Emergencies, Promoting Health and Well-being. WHA76 will convene 21-30 May at the Palais des Nations in Geneva. вҖңAs we mark WHOвҖҷs 75th anniversary, we can be proud of our past achievements, but we must be mindful of lessons learned, as we transition from the emergency phase of COVID-19, and create a future where every person has access to the health services they need,вҖқ said Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. вҖңThis means strengthening the global architecture for health emergency preparedness, response and resilience, supporting countries on the road to universal health coverage, and building a stronger, sustainably-funded and accountable WHO. "To kickstart WHA76 on Sunday 21 May, the fourth edition of Walk the Talk: Health for All challenge will start at Place des Nations at 8:30 am CEST (warm-up starts at 7:30 am CEST), to promote physical and mental health and celebrate the importance of partnership during the WHOвҖҷs 75th anniversary.
translations.reference: Za ta sake nazarin ci gaban da aka samu a bara, nasarori da Жҷalubale tare da abubuwan da za a baiwa fifiko a nan gaba a cikin manyan ginshiЖҷan aikin WHO: Bayar da Lafiya a daukacin Duniya, da Gaggawa, da kuma Inganta Lafiya. Жҳungiyar WHA76 za ta yi taro a 21-30 ga Mayu a Palais de Nations a Geneva. Yayin da muke bikin cika shekaru 75 na WHO, za mu iya yin alfahari da nasarorin da muka samu a baya, amma dole ne mu yi la'akari da darussan da muka koya, yayin da muke sauyin yanayi daga yanayin gaggawa na COVID-19, tare da samar da makoma inda kowane mutum zai sami damar yin amfani da shi. ayyukan kiwon lafiya da suke bukata, in ji Darakta Janar Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Wannan yana nufin Жҷarfafa ginshikan duniya don shirye-shiryen gaggawa na kiwon lafiya, amsawa da juriya, tallafawa Жҷasashe kan hanyar da za ta iya kaiwa ga samar da kiwon lafiya na duniya, da gina ЖҷwaЖҷЖҷwaran, ci gaba mai Й—orewa da asusun WHO. Don fara WHA76 a ranar Lahadi 21 ga Mayu, kashi na huЙ—u na Walk the Talk: Health for All challenge zai fara a Place des Nations da karfe 8:30 na safe CEST farawa a 7:30 na safe CEST), don haЙ“aka jiki da tunani. kiwon lafiya da kuma murna da mahimmancin haЙ—in gwiwa yayin bikin cika shekaru 75 na WHO.

translations.source: At about 2:00 pm CEST, following a family photo with Heads of Delegations, the Assembly high-level welcome at Palais des Nations will feature speeches from the WHO Director-General, Heads of State and special guests. List of speakers below). During this session, the DG will present life-time achievement awards to two global health leaders. On Monday 22 May, the Director-General will give his main address at approximately 10:00 am. On Friday, 26 May, the WHO Director-General will be joined by representatives of five global foundations, to present five public health awards and prizes to the seven laureates for 2023. They come from Bahrain, China, Guatemala, Lebanon, Nepal, Thailand and the Philippines.
translations.reference: Da misalin karfe 2:00 na rana CEST, biyo bayan hoton iyali tare da Shugabannin Tawagogi, babban taron Majalisar a Palais des Nations zai gabatar da jawabai daga Babban Daraktan WHO, Shugabannin Kasashe da kuma baki na musamman. Jerin masu magana da ke Жҷasa). A yayin wannan zaman, DG za ta ba da lambobin yabo ga shugabannin kiwon lafiya biyu na duniya. A ranar Litinin 22 ga watan Mayu, Darakta-Janar zai gabatar da babban jawabinsa da misalin karfe 10:00 na safe. A ranar Juma'a, 26 ga Mayu, Darakta-Janar na WHO zai kasance tare da wakilan gidauniyoyi biyar na duniya, don ba da kyaututtukan kiwon lafiyar jama'a guda biyar da kyaututtuka ga waЙ—anda suka lashe lambar yabo bakwai na 2023. Sun fito ne daga Bahrain, China, Guatemala, Lebanon, Nepal, Thailand da Philippines.

translations.source: Key issues Key discussions and decisions are expected on: A review of WHOs work in health emergencies, including the International Health Regulations and strengthening WHO preparedness for and response to health emergencies; Strategies and global action on areas such as womenвҖҷs, childrenвҖҷs and adolescentsвҖҷ health, rehabilitation, universal health coverage and primary health care, traditional medicine, infection prevention and control, substandard and falsified medicines, health of refugees and migrants, non-communicable diseases, mental health, social determinants, nutrition and disabilities; Approval of the WHO Programme Budget for 2024-2025, including the decision to increase assessed contributions and other matters emanating from the Working Group on Sustainable Financing.
translations.reference: Mahimman batutuwa Ana sa ran tattaunawa da yanke shawara akan: Bita na WHO na aiki a cikin gaggawa na kiwon lafiya, ciki har da Dokokin Kiwon Lafiya na Duniya da Жҷarfafa shirye-shiryen WHO don magance matsalolin kiwon lafiya; Dabaru da ayyukan duniya a kan fannoni kamar kiwon lafiya na mata, yara da matasa, gyarawa, tsarin kiwon lafiya na duniya da kula da lafiya na farko, magungunan gargajiya, rigakafin kamuwa da cuta, magunguna marasa inganci da gurbatattun magunguna, lafiyar 'yan gudun hijira da kiwon lafiya. bakin haure, cututtuka marasa yaduwa, lafiyar kwakwalwa, abubuwan da suka shafi zamantakewa, abinci mai gina jiki da nakasa; Amincewa da Kasafin Kudi na Shirin WHO na 2024-2025, gami da yanke shawarar haЙ“aka gudummawar da aka tantance da sauran batutuwan da ke fitowa daga Жҳungiyar Aiki kan Tallafin Dorewa.

translations.source: Daily Strategic roundtables will take place at lunch time from Monday to Saturday in Room XVIII. These events will host discussions among assembly delegates, partner agencies, representatives of civil society and WHO experts on public health priorities. Sessions run from 22-27 May, from 13:00 to 14:15 CEST and can be followed online. As WHOвҖҷs highest decision-making body, the Health Assembly sets out the OrganizationвҖҷs policy and approves its budget. WHA is attended by delegations from all WHO 194 Member States.
translations.reference: Za a yi zagayen tebur na bayanai lokacin cin abincin rana daga Litinin zuwa Asabar a cikin daki na XVIII. WaЙ—annan abubuwan da suka faru za su dauki bakuncin tattaunawa tsakanin wakilan majalisa, hukumomin abokan tarayya, wakilan kungiyoyin farar hula da kwararrun WHO kan abubuwan da suka shafi lafiyar jama'a. Zama yana gudana daga 22-27 Mayu, daga 13:00 zuwa 14:15 CEST kuma ana iya bibiya akan layi. A matsayinta na babbar hukumar yanke shawara ta WHO , Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta tsara manufofin Kungiyar tare da amincewa da kasafin kudinta. WHA tana samun halartar tawagogi daga dukkan Жҷasashe membobin WHO 194.

translations.source: The Health AssemblyвҖҷs agenda is preceded by the 30th meeting of the Programme, Budget and Administration Committee of the Executive Board, which will meet on 17-19 May, 2023. After the Assembly, the 153th meeting of the Executive Board will take place from 31 May to 1 June. The Health Assembly is open to registered and accredited Member States, Associate Members, Observers, invited representatives of the UN and other participating inter-governmental organizations and non-State actors. WHA76 will be webcast live from the WHO website. The provisional agenda, preliminary timetable, Assembly documents and daily journal can be accessed here.Media accreditation and updates for the World Health Assembly
translations.reference: Ajandar Majalisar Lafiya ta kasance gabanin taron na 30 na Kwamitin Shirye-shirye, Kasafin Kudi da Gudanarwa na Hukumar Zartarwa, wanda zai hadu a ranakun 17-19 ga Mayu, 2023. Bayan Majalisar, taron na 153 na Hukumar Zartarwa zai gudana ne daga ranar 31 ga Mayu zuwa 1 ga watan Yuni. Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta bada dama ga Жҷasashe masu rijista da masu ba da izini, Abokan hulЙ—a, Masu sa ido, wakilan Majalisar Dinkin Duniya da aka gayyata da sauran Жҷungiyoyin gwamnatoci masu shiga da masu zaman kansu. WHA76 za a watsa shi kai tsaye daga sahfin yanar gizon WHO. Ajandar da aka bayar , jadawali na farko, takaddun majalisa da mujallu na yau da kullun duk za'a iya samunsu a nan. Amincewar kafafen yada labarai da sabuntawa ga Majalisar Lafiya ta Duniya
translations.hypothesis: Ш¬ШҜЩҲЩ„ ШЈШ№Щ…Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬Щ„Ші Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠ ЩҠШӘШЁШ№ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ ШұЩӮЩ… 30 Щ„ЩҖ "Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩғЩ„ЩҒШ© ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШҜШ§ШұШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШІШ§ЩҶЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЁШұШ§Щ…Ш¬" Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§ШЁШ№Ш© Щ„Щ„Щ…Ш¬Щ„Ші Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ°ЩҠШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ШіЩҠШ№ЩӮШҜ ЩҒЩҠ 17-19 Щ…Ш§ЩҠЩҲШҢ 2023. translations.source: Media accreditation for WHA76 will be handled by the United Nations of Geneva. Register via Indico. To collect your badge: On Friday 19 May (working hours: 9:00 am to 16:30 pm CEST) at Villa Feuillantines, Place des Nations . Details and address : https://unece.org/important-information-how-obtain-your-badge On Saturday 20 May: UN Palais des Nations at Pregny Gate (opposite ICRC Building) from 13:00 to 17:00 CEST. On Sunday 21 May, you shall collect your media badge at the UN Palais des Nations at Pregny Gate (opposite ICRC Building) from 9:00am to 16:00 pm CEST

For any questions related to live video transmission please email [email protected]. translations.source: Urgent action needed to tackle stalled progress on health-related Sustainable Development Goals WHO is releasing the 2023 edition of its annual World Health Statistics report with new figures on the impact of COVID-19 pandemic and the latest statistics on progress towards the health-related Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). The report with data up to 2022 underscores a stagnation of health progress on key health indicators in recent years compared with trends seen during 2000-2015. It also alerts us to the growing threat of noncommunicable diseases (NCDs) and climate change, and calls for a coordinated and strengthened response. COVID-19 cost in lost lives and health progress The report documents updated statistics on the toll of the pandemic on global health, contributing to the ongoing decline in progress towards the SDGs.
translations.reference: Ana buЖҷatar Й—aukar matakan gaggawa don magance ci gaban da aka samu kan ci gaba mai dorewa da ya shafi kiwon lafiya WHO tana fitar da kashi na 2023 na rahotonta na Kididdigar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya na shekara tare da sabbin alkaluma kan tasirin cutar ta COVID-19 da sabbin kididdiga kan ci gaban da ake samu na ci gaba mai dorewa mai nasaba da lafiya (SDGs). Rahoton tare da bayanai har zuwa shekarar 2022 ya nuna tabarbarewar ci gaban lafiya kan muhimman alamomin kiwon lafiya a cikin 'yan shekarun nan idan aka kwatanta da yanayin da aka gani a lokacin 2000-2015. Har ila yau, yana faЙ—akar da mu game da karuwar barazanar cututtuka marasa yaduwa (NCDs) da sauyin yanayi, da kuma yin kira ga haЙ—in kai da Жҷarfafa amsa. adadin COVID-19 a asarar rayuka da ci gaban kiwon lafiya Rahoton ya sabunta Жҷididdiga kan adadin cutar kan lafiyar duniya, yana ba da gudummawa ga ci gaba da raguwar ci gaba ga SDGs.

translations.source: During 2020-2021, COVID-19 resulted in a staggering 336.8 million years of life lost globally. This equates to an average of 22 years of life lost for every excess death, abruptly and tragically cutting short the lives of millions of people. Since 2000, we saw significant improvements in maternal and child health with deaths falling by one-third and one-half, respectively. The incidence of infectious diseases such as HIV, tuberculosis (TB) and malaria also declined, along with a lowered risk of premature deaths from NCDs and injuries. Together, these contributed to an increase in global life expectancy from 67 years in 2000 to 73 years in 2019.
translations.reference: A lokacin 2020-2021, COVID-19 ta haifar da asarar rayuka miliyan 336.8 a duniya. Wannan ya yi daidai da matsakaicin shekaru 22 na rayuwa da aka yi hasarar rayuka da suka wuce gona da iri, tare da yanke rayuwar miliyoyin mutane ba zato ba tsammani. Tun daga shekara ta 2000, mun ga gagarumin ci gaba a lafiyar mata da yara tare da faЙ—uwar mutuwar da kashi Й—aya bisa uku da rabi, bi da bi. Yawan cututtuka kamar HIV, tarin fuka (TB) da zazzabin cizon sauro kuma ya ragu, tare da rage haЙ—arin mutuwa da wuri daga NCDs da raunuka. Tare, waЙ—annan sun ba da gudummawa ga haЙ“aka tsawon rayuwar duniya daga shekaru 67 a cikin 2000 zuwa shekaru 73 a cikin 2019.
translations.hypothesis: Р”СғРҪ ЩҠЩҲШ§, 2020-2021, COVID-19 ЩҠ cause 336.8 Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ Ш№Ш§Щ… ЩҠ zarar globally. wannan yana da matsakaicin 22 Ш№Ш§Щ… ЩҠ zarar don kowane mutum, wanda ya kai zuwa mutuwan Жҙan yawan mutane cikin rashin zaman. Tun daga 2000, muka ga tasiri a kan lafiyar mahaida da yara, inda mutuwan ya karu da 1/3 da 1/2, babban tasiri. Hakanan, mutuwa daga kasala, kwarale (TB) da lalasa ta karu, tare da Жҷara yawan mutuwa daga kasala da lalasa. Duk wannan ya kaidai da Жҷara yawan rayuwa a duniya, daga 67 Ш№Ш§Щ… a 2000 zuwa 73 Ш№Ш§Щ… a 2019.

translations.source: However, the pandemic has put many health-related indicators further off-track and contributed to inequalities in access to high-quality health care, routine immunizations and financial protection. As a result, improving trends in malaria and TB have been reversed, and fewer people were treated for neglected tropical diseases (NTDs). вҖңThe World Health Statistics is WHOвҖҷs annual check-up on the state of the worldвҖҷs health. The report sends a stark message on the threat of noncommunicable diseases, which take an immense and increasing toll on lives, livelihoods, health systems, communities, economies and societies,вҖқ said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. вҖңThe report calls for a substantial increase in investments in health and health systems to get back on track towards the Sustainable Development Goals.вҖқ
translations.reference: Haka kuma barkewar cutar ta sanya alamun da ke da alaЖҷa da lafiya da kuma sun ba da gudummawa ga rashin daidaito wajen samun ingantaccen tsarin kiwon lafiya, rigakafi na yau da kullun da kariyar kuЙ—i. Sakamakon haka, an sami sauye-sauyen yanayin cizon sauro da tarin fuka, kuma mutane kaЙ—an ne aka yi wa jinyar cututtuka na wurare masu zafi (NTDs). Kididdigar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya ita ce binciken da WHO ke yi kowace shekara kan yanayin lafiyar duniya. Rahoton ya aike da sako mai tsauri kan barazanar cututtukan da ba za a iya kamuwa da su ba, waЙ—anda ke yin illa ga rayuka, rayuwa, tsarin kiwon lafiya, al'ummomi, tattalin arziki da kuma al'umma, in ji Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Darakta Janar na WHO. Rahoton ya yi kira da a kara yawan saka hannun jari a tsarin kiwon lafiya don komawa kan turbar ci gaba mai Й—orewa.

"Ш§Щ„ШҘШӯШөШ§ШҰЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩҮЩҠ ЩҒШӯШө ШіЩҶЩҲЩҠ Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШЁЩ„ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ШӯЩҲЩ„ ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©. translations.source: NCDs М¶ an ever-increasing health threat for future generationsDespite overall health progress, the share of deaths caused annually by NCDs has grown consistently and is now claiming nearly three quarters of all lives lost each year. If this trend continues, NCDs are projected to account for about 86% of the 90 million annual deaths by mid-century; consequently, 77 million of these will be due to NCDs вҖ“ a nearly 90% increase in absolute numbers since 2019. Stagnating progress calls for acceleration More recent trends show signs of slowdown in the annual rate of reduction (ARR) for many indicators. For example, the global maternal mortality ratio needs to decline by 11.6% per year between 2021 and 2030 to meet the SDG target. Similarly, the net reduction in TB incidence from 2015 to 2021 was only one-fifth of the way to the 2025 milestone of WHOвҖҷs End TB Strategy.
translations.reference: NCDs wata barazana ce ta kiwon lafiya da ke ci gaba da karuwa ga al'ummomi masu zuwa duk da ci gaban kiwon lafiya, kason mace-macen da NCDs ke haifarwa a kowace shekara ya karu akai-akai kuma yanzu yana la'akari da kusan kashi uku cikin hudu na rayukan da ake rasawa kowace shekara. Idan wannan yanayin ya ci gaba, ana hasashen NCDs za su kai kusan kashi 86% na mutuwar miliyan 90 a shekara a tsakiyar Жҷarni; Saboda haka, miliyan 77 daga cikin waЙ—annan za su kasance ne saboda NCDs - kusan kashi 90% na karuwa tun 2019. Cigaban yana buЖҷatar haЙ“aka Жҷarin abubuwan da suka faru na baya-bayan nan suna nuna alamun raguwa a cikin adadin raguwa na shekara-shekara (ARR) don alamomi da yawa. Misali, adadin mace-macen mata masu juna biyu na duniya yana bukatar raguwa da kashi 11.6% a kowace shekara tsakanin 2021 da 2030 don cimma burin SDG. Hakazalika, raguwar bullar cutar tarin fuka daga shekarar 2015 zuwa 2021 ya kasance kashi Й—aya cikin biyar ne kawai na hanyar da aka cimma a shekarar 2025 na Dabarun Жҳarshen tarin fuka na WHO.

translations.source: Despite a reduction in exposure to many health risks вҖ“ such as tobacco use, alcohol consumption, violence, unsafe water and sanitation, and child stunting вҖ“ progress was inadequate and exposure to some risks such as air pollution remains high. Alarmingly, the prevalence of obesity is rising with no immediate sign of reversal. Furthermore, expanded access to essential health services has slowed compared to pre-2015 gains, coupled with no significant progress in reducing financial hardship due to health-care costs. This drastically limits our ability to achieve Universal Health Coverage by 2030. вҖңThe COVID-19 pandemic is an important reminder that progress is neither linear nor guaranteed,вҖқ warns Dr Samira Asma, WHO Assistant Director-General for Data, Analytics and Delivery for Impact.
translations.reference: Duk da raguwar kamuwa da haЙ—arin kiwon lafiya da yawa kamar shan taba, shan barasa, tashin hankali, rashin tsaftataccen ruwa da tsaftar muhalli, da tsaftar yara ci gaban bai wadatar ba kuma fuskantar wasu haЙ—ari kamar gurЙ“ataccen iska ya kasance mai girma. Abin mamaki shi ne, yawan Жҷiba yana Жҷaruwa ba tare da wata alama ta koma baya ba. Bugu da Жҷari kuma, faЙ—aЙ—a damar samun muhimman ayyukan kiwon lafiya ya ragu idan aka kwatanta da ribar da aka samu kafin shekarar 2015, ba tare da wani gagarumin ci gaba ba wajen rage wahalhalun kuЙ—i saboda farashin kula da lafiya ba. Wannan yana matuЖҷar iyakance ikonmu don cimma Taimakon Kiwon Lafiya na Duniya nan da 2030. Annobar Covid-19 muhimmiyar tunatarwa ce ga Cigaban da aka samu ba na layi ba ne kuma ba tabbas ba ne, in ji Dr Samira Asma, Mataimakiyar Darakta-Janar ta WHO kan Bayanai, Bincike da Isar da Taimako don samun tasiri.
translations.hypothesis: ШЁШ§ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ ЩҠШ§ЩҶ Жҷara da Жҷarin Ч‘Ч—ЧҷЧҷЧқ вҖ“ kamar amfani da ЧЎЧҷЧ’Ш§ШұЩҠ, Й—aukar Жҷwai, Жҷaura, mai Й—aukan kuma Й—aukan, da Жҷaura вҖ“ Жҳara Й—auЙ—Й—a, amma Жҷarin Ч‘Ч—ЧҷЧҷЧқ kamar Жҷaura na Й—auЙ—Й—a. cikin Жҷarin, Жҷarin Ч‘Ч—ЧҷЧҷЧқ na Жҷara, kuma ba da shigar da Й—auЙ—Й—a. ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү Ш°Щ„Щғ, Жҳarin Ч‘Ч—ЧҷЧҷЧқ na Й—auЙ—Й—a, kuma ba da shigar da Й—auЙ—Й—a. "Cutar COVID-19, wannan yana Жҷara Жҷara, kuma ba da shigar da Й—auЙ—Й—a," ЩҠЩҲШөЩҠ ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұШ© ШіЩҠЩ…ЩҠШұШ§ ШЈШіЩ…Ш§ШҢ ШіЩҠШ§Ш№ ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠ Щ„ШЁЩҠШ§ЩҶШ§ШӘШҢ ШӘШӯЩ„ЩҠЩ„ШҢ ЩҲШӘЩӮШҜЩҠЩ… Щ„ЩҖ WHO.

translations.source: вҖңTo stay on track towards the 2030 SDG agenda, we must act decisively and collectively to deliver a measurable impact in all countries.вҖқ This yearвҖҷs report includes for the first time a dedicated section on climate change and health, and we anticipate that this will be of more relevance in the report going forward. For this issue and all other areas timely, reliable and disaggregated data are critical to track progress and improve national and global health policies. EditorвҖҷs note: The World Health Statistics report is the World Health OrganizationвҖҷs (WHO) annual compilation of the most recent available data on health and health-related indicators. For inquiries, contact [email protected]
translations.reference: Don tsayawa kan hanya zuwa ajandar SDG ta 2030, dole ne mu yi aiki da gaske kuma tare don isar da tasiri a duk Жҷasashe. Rahoton wannan shekara a karon farko ya kunshi wani sashe na musamman kan sauyin yanayi da lafiya, kuma muna sa ran cewa wannan zai fi dacewa a cikin rahoton da ke gaba. Don wannan batu da duk sauran fannonin lokaci, amintattun bayanai da aka rarraba suna da mahimmanci don bin diddigin ci gaba da inganta manufofin kiwon lafiya na Жҷasa da na duniya. Bayanan Edita: Rahoton Kididdigar Kiwon Lafiyar Duniya shi ne Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) ta tattara bayanai na baya-bayan nan kan abubuwan da suka shafi lafiya da makamantansu. Don tambayoyi, tuntuЙ“i [email protected]

translations.source: WHO Director-General announces Global Health Leaders Awards Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum and Peter Piot awarded for lifelong commitment to health WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus will present two lifetime achievement awards to recognize outstanding contributions to advancing global health during the high-level opening session of the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly. The Director-GeneralвҖҷs Global Leaders Awards, which were established in 2019, will go to Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum and Peter Piot. Both recipients are distinguished scientists and public health leaders who were closely involved in the discovery of Ebola virus disease before advancing to leadership positions in global health.
translations.reference: Darakta-Janar na WHO ya sanar da lambar yabo ta Shugabannin Lafiya ta Duniya Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum da Peter Piot sun samu lambar yabo don sadaukar da kai ga harkokin lafiya Darakta-Janar na WHO Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus zai ba da lambobin yabon na don yaba wa gudummawar da aka bayar don ciyar da lafiyar duniya gaba na tsawon rayuwa a lokacin babban taron buЙ—e taron Majalisar Lafiya ta Duniya karo na saba'in da shida. Za a ba da lambar Yabon ta Darakta-Janar ta Shugabannin Duniya, wacce aka kafa a cikin 2019 ga Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum da Peter Piot. Mutanen biyu da za a ba wa lambar yabon dai fitattun masana kimiyya ne da kuma shugabannin kiwon lafiyar jama'a waЙ—anda ke da hannu wajen gano cutar Ebola kafin su kai ga matsayin jagoranci a fannin kiwon lafiyar duniya.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШі Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ°ЩҠ Щ„ЩҖ WHO ЩҠШ№Щ„ЩҶ Ш№ЩҶ "Ш¬ЩҲШ§ШҰШІ ЩӮШ§ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©" - Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum ЩҲ Peter Piot Щ„ЩғЩҲЩҶЩҮЩҸЩ… Щ…Щ„ШӘШІЩ…ЩҠЩҶ Ш·ЩҲШ§Щ„ ШӯЩҠШ§ШӘЩҮЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©. Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШі Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ°ЩҠ Щ„ЩҖ WHOШҢ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ Tedros Adhanom GhebreyesusШҢ ШіЩҠШіЩ„Щ… Ш¬ЩҲШ§ШҰШІ Ш®Ш§ШөШӘЩҠЩҶ Щ„ЩҖ Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum ЩҲ Peter PiotШҢ ЩҲШ°Щ„Щғ Щ„ШӘЩӮШҜЩҠШұ Щ…ШіШ§ЩҮЩ…Ш§ШӘЩҮЩ… Ш§Щ„ШұШ§ШҰШ№Ш© ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШ·ЩҲЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш¬Щ„ШіШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Ш¬Щ…Ш№ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„ШөШӯШ© ШұЩӮЩ… 76. "Ш¬ЩҲШ§ШҰШІ ЩӮШ§ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©" Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШЈШіШіШӘ ЩҒЩҠ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2019ШҢ ШіШӘЩ…ЩҶШӯ Щ„ЩҖ Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum ЩҲ Peter Piot. ЩғЩ„Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҸШӘЩ„ЩӮЩҠЩҶ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ Ш№Щ„Щ…Ш§ШЎ Щ…ШұЩ…ЩҲЩӮЩҠЩҶ ЩҲЩӮШ§ШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ЩғШ§ЩҶЩҲШ§ Ш¬ШІШЎЩӢШ§ Щ…ЩҮЩ…ЩӢШ§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§ЩғШӘШҙШ§ЩҒ Щ…ШұШ¶ ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі ШҘЩҠШЁЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҢ ЩӮШЁЩ„ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШөЩ„ЩҲШ§ ШҘЩ„Щү Щ…ЩҶШ§ШөШЁ ЩӮЩҠШ§ШҜЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©.

translations.source: The award honours their lifetime achievements in public health. Professor Muyembe-Tamfum from the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) is being recognized for his innovation, leadership and ground-breaking contributions to the management and treatment of diseases such as Ebola virus disease. He has played a critical role in improving health outcomes in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, the African region, and the global community. Professor Muyembe-Tamfum is the Director General of the DRCвҖҷs National Institute of Biomedical Research in Kinshasa, full Professor of Microbiology at the University of Kinshasa Medical School and the inaugural president of the Congolese Academy of Science. Professor Muyembe-Tamfum was part of the team that discovered the ZaГҜre ebolavirus during the first recorded outbreak in 1976, in Equateur Province, Central DRC.
translations.reference: Lambar yabon wata alamar gimamawa ce ga nasarorin da suka samu a rayuwarsu a fannin lafiyar jama'a. Za a karrama Farfesa Muyembe-Tamfum daga Jamhuriyar DimokraЙ—iyyar Kwango (DRC) ne saboda ЖҷirЖҷire-ЖҷirЖҷire da jagoranci da kuma bayar da gudunmawar da ta dace wajen kula da kuma magance cututtuka kamar cutar Ebola. Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen inganta sakamakon kiwon lafiya a Jamhuriyar Demokradiyyar Kongo, yankin Afirka, da kuma duniya bakiЙ—aya. Farfesa Muyembe-Tamfum shi ne Darakta Janar na Cibiyar Nazarin Halittar ta DRC a Kinshasa, cikakken Farfesa a fannin nazarin halittu a Jami'ar Lafiya ta Kinshasa wato Kinshasa Medical School kuma shugaban farko na Kwalejin Kimiyya ta Kongo wato Congolese Academy of Science. Farfesa Muyembe-Tamfum yana cikin tawagar da ta gano cutar na ta ZaГўre ebola a lokacin bullar cutar na farko a shekarar 1976, a Lardin Equateur, da ke Tsakiyar DRC.
translations.hypothesis: wannan honor na Жҷunsa ga abubuwan da suka samu na rayuwansu a fannin lafiyar jama'a. Professor Muyembe-Tamfum daga Jamhuriya ta Democratic na Kongo (DRC) ke samun kiyaye ne saboda sabon hanyar, kakauran, kuma kontribuwonsu na yuwuwa a cikin nazarin da ginawa za'atar kamar Ebola virus. Ya kuma yana da muhimmi a haЙ—a hanyar lafiyar a Jamhuriya ta Democratic na Kongo, yankin Afirka, da jama'a. Professor Muyembe-Tamfum shine Mai jagowa da Masu nazarin Biomedikal na DRC a Kinshasa, Professor na Microbiology a Makabbin Ilimi na Kinshasa, kuma shugaban farko na Kongolese Academy of Science. Professor Muyembe-Tamfum yana cikin Жҷungiyar da ta gano ZaГҜre ebolavirus a lokacin farkon gasar da ta faru a 1976, a Jihar Equateur, a yankin Keskta na DRC.

translations.source: He later helped design one of the first effective treatments against the virus and the deployment of experimental Ebola virus disease vaccines. He has worked tirelessly to build the Democratic Republic of the CongoвҖҷs scientific capacity, establishing multiple research facilities in the country, and has played key roles with WHO in fighting infectious diseases. Professor Piot from Belgium is being recognized for his extraordinary leadership in the response to the HIV/AIDS epidemic and other significant global health challenges. He has played a vital role in launching major global health initiatives such as UNAIDS, the Global Fund, and others that have improved health outcomes around the world. Under his leadership, UNAIDS became the chief advocate for worldwide action against AIDS, also spearheading UN reform by bringing together 10 different UN organizations.
translations.reference: Daga baya ya taimaka wajen tsara Й—aya daga cikin magunguna masu inganci na farko a kan cutar da tura magungunan rigakafin cutar Ebola na gwaji. Ya yi aiki tuЖҷuru wajen Жҷarfafar Jamhuriyar Dimokaradiyyar Kwango a fannin kimiyya, da kafa cibiyoyin bincike da dama a Жҷasar, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa tare da WHO wajen yaЖҷi da cututtuka masu yaЙ—uwa. Za a karrama Farfesa Piot daga Beljiyam ne saboda irin jagoranci na musamman da ya yi wajen yaЖҷar cuta mai karya garkuwar jiki da sauran manyan Жҷalubale ga kiwon lafiya a duniya. Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen Жҷaddamar da manyan tsare-tsare na kiwon lafiya a duniya kamar UNAIDS, Asusun Duniya, da sauran su waЙ—anda suka inganta sakamako a fannin kiwon lafiya a duniya. A ЖҷarkЖҷashin jagorancinsa, UNAIDS ta zama babbar mai bayar da shawara wajen Й—aukar matakan yaЖҷi da cuta mai karya garkuwar jiki a duniya, wadda kuma ke jagorantar kawo sauyi a Majalisar ЖҠinkin Duniya ta hanyar haЙ—a kan Жҷungiyoyin Majalisar ЖҠinkin Duniya daban-daban guda 10.
translations.hypothesis: Щ„Ш§ШӯЩӮШ§, ЩҮЩҲ ШіШ§ЩҮЩ… ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШөЩ…ЩҠЩ… ШҘШӯШҜЩү ШЈШіШ§Щ„ЩҠШЁ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© Ш¶ШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШіШҢ ЩҲЩғШ°Щ„Щғ ШӘЩҲШІЩҠШ№ Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ ШӘШ¬ШұЩҠШЁЩҠ Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶ ШҘЩҠШЁЩҲЩ„Ш§. ЩҮЩҲ ЩӮШҜ Ш№Щ…Щ„ ШЁШ¬ШҜ Щ„ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ ЩӮШҜШұШ§ШӘ Ш№Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Щ„Ш¬Щ…ЩҮЩҲШұЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩ…ЩӮШұШ§Ш·ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩғongoШҢ ЩҲШӘШЈШіЩҠШі Щ…ШұШ§ЩҒЩӮ ШЁШӯШ«ЩҠШ© Щ…ШӘШ№ШҜШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩӮШҜ Щ„Ш№ШЁ ШҜЩҲШұ Щ…ЩҮЩ… Щ…Ш№ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҒШӯШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШҜЩҠШ©. Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШӘШ§Ш° ШЁЩҠЩҲШӘШҢ Щ…ЩҶ ШЁЩ„Ш¬ЩҠЩғШ§ШҢ ЩҠЩҲЩҮ ЩҠЩҸЩғШұЩ… Щ„ЩӮЩҠШ§ШҜЧӘЧ• Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ«ЩҶШ§ШҰЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ¬Ш§ШЁШ© Щ„ЩҲШЁШ§ШЎ ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі ЩҶЩӮШө Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш№Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЁШҙШұЩҠШ©/Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҠШҜШІШҢ ЩҲЩғШ°Щ„Щғ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҮЩ…Ш©. translations.source: Professor Piot also played a part in the earlier discovery of the Ebola virus, and the containment of the first known outbreak, participating in field epidemiological investigations. He has chaired a number of high-level initiatives, served in numerous high-level advisory roles, including on COVID-19, and has received multiple awards. Professor Piot is the Special Advisor to the EC President, a Professor of Global Health and former Director of the London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine. вҖңThese outstanding individuals embody lifelong dedication, relentless advocacy, a commitment to equity, and selfless service of humanity and peopleвҖҷs health,вҖқ said WHO Director-General, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. вҖңIn a time of multiple emergencies, health crises, and conflict, we recognize that leadership in public health and science are more important than ever to advance global health.
translations.reference: Farfesa Piot ya kuma taka rawa wajen gano Жҷwayar cutar Ebola a farko-farko, da kuma daЖҷile Й“arkewar cutar ta farko da aka sani, yana shiga cikin binciken cututtuka a zahiri. Ya shugabanci wasu manyan Жҷungiyoyi, ya kuma yi aiki a matsayin babban mai ba da shawara, wanda ya haЙ—a da mai ba da shawara can Covid-19, ya kuma karЙ“i lambobin yabo da dama. Farfesa Piot shi ne mai ba da shawara na musamman ga Shugaban EC, Farfesa a fannin Lafiyar Duniya, kuma tsohon Darakta a makarantar London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine. Darakta Janar na WHO, Dakta Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus ya bayyana cewa waЙ—annan mutane masu Жҷwazo sun nuna jajircewa ta tsawon rayuwa, da wayar da kai babu gajiyawa, jajircewa kan samun daidaito, da kuma sadaukar da kai ga don lafiyar al'umma. "A lokacin da ake fama da matsaloli masu buЖҷatar kula ta gaggawa da dama, da rikice-rikicen kiwon lafiya, da tashin-tashina, mun fahimci cewa jagoranci a fannin kiwon lafiyar jama'a da kimiyya sun fi kowane lokaci muhimmanci don ciyar da harkar lafiya gaba a faЙ—in duniya.
