"ЩҒЩҠ ЩҲЩӮШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШІЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ№ШҜШҜШ©, Ш§Щ„ШЈШІЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©, ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШөШұШ§Ш№Ш§ШӘ, ЩҶШҜШұЩғ ШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҠШ§ШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш© ЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩ… ЩҮЩҠ ШЈЩғШ«Шұ ШЈЩҮЩ…ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҠ ЩҲЩӮШӘ Щ…Ш¶Щү Щ„ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©.

translations.source: Our awardees today personify that passion.вҖқ вҖңTheir combined stories and successes show how much the world has progressed in terms of collaboration at the global, regional and country levels to strengthen health emergency preparedness, response and resilience. These outstanding scientists will continue to inspire us every day,вҖқ he added The ceremony for the awards form part of the high-level opening session of the 76th World Health Assembly being held on Sunday 21 May 2023 in Geneva.
translations.reference: WaЙ—anda muke karramawa a yau sun nuna wannan jajircewar. "Labaransu da nasarorin da suka samu sun nuna yadda duniya ta samu ci gaba ta fuskar haЙ—in gwiwa a matakan duniya, yanki da Жҷasa don Жҷarfafa shirye-shiryen samar da kulawar gaggawa na lafiya da kuma juriya. WaЙ—annan masana kimiyya za su ci gaba da jan hankalinmu a kowace rana, ya kuma Жҷara da cewa Bikin bayar da lambar yabon ya kasance wani Й“angare na buЙ—e babban taron World Health Assembly karo na 76 da za a gabatar ranar Lahadi 21 ga watan Mayun 2023 a Geneva.
translations.hypothesis: "Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘЩ„ЩӮЩҠ ЩҠШ¬ЩҲШ§ШҰШІ РҙР°РҪР°ШҢ ЩҠЩҸЩ…Ш«Щ„ЩҲЩҶ ШӘЩ„Щғ Ш§Щ„ШҙШәЩҒ." "Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯШҜШ§Ш« ЩҲЩҶШ¬Ш§ШӯШ§ШӘ ШӨЩҮЩ…ШҢ ЩҠЩҲШ¶ШӯЩҲЩҶ Щ…ШҜЩү Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШҜЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ШӯЩӮЩӮШӘЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№Ш§ЩҲЩҶ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ…ЩҠШҢ ЩҲШЁЩ„ШҜШҢ Щ„ШӘЩӮЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ¬Ш§ШЁШ©ШҢ ЩҲЩ…ШұЩҲЩҶШ© ЩҒЩҠ ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҲШ§ШұШҰ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©. ЩҮШӨЩ„Ш§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Щ…Ш§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘЩ…ЩҠШІЩҲЩҶШҢ ШіЩҠШіШӘЩ…ШұЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШҘЩ„ЩҮШ§Щ…ЩҶШ§ ЩғЩ„ ЩҠЩҲЩ…"ШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩҮШ°Ш§ШҢ ЩӮШ§Щ„. "Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӯШӘЩҒШ§Щ„ ШЁЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҲШ§ШҰШІШҢ ЩҮЩҲ Ш¬ШІШЎ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш¬Щ„ШіШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…ШӨШӘЩ…Шұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШіШ§ШЁШ№ ЩҲШіШӘЩҠЩҶШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ШіЩҠЩ…Шұ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩҠЩҲЩ… Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯШҜШҢ 21 Щ…Ш§ЩҠ 2023ШҢ ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬ЩҠЩҶЩҠЩҒ.

translations.source: WHO congratulates Benin and Mali for eliminating trachoma as a public health problem WHO has validated Benin and Mali as having eliminated trachoma as a public health problem, making them the fifth and sixth countries in WHOвҖҷs African Region to achieve this significant milestone. Countries that previously received WHO validation for trachoma elimination are Ghana (June 2018), Gambia (April 2021), Togo (May 2022) and Malawi (September 2022). вҖңWHO congratulates the health authorities of Benin and Mali and their network of global and local partners for these milestonesвҖқ, said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. вҖңFollowing BeninвҖҷs and MaliвҖҷs success, trachoma remains endemic in 23 countries in WHOвҖҷs African Region, bringing us a step closer towards the elimination target for trachoma set in the road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021вҖ“2030.вҖқ
translations.reference: WHO ta taya Benin da Mali murnar kawar da cutar trachoma a matsayin cuta mai addabar al'umma WHO ta tabbatar da cewa Benin da Mali sun yi nasarar kawar da trachoma a matsayin cuta mai addabar al'umma, wanda ya sa suka zama Жҷasashe na biyar da na shida a yankin da WHO ke kula da shi a Afirka da suka kai wannan matakin. Жҳasashen da a baya suka samu wannan tantancewar ta kawar da cutar trachoma su ne Ghana(Yuni 2018), Gambia (Afrilu 2021), Togo (Mayu 2022) da Malawi (Satumba 2022). Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Darakta Janar na ya ce hukumar lafiya ta duniyar tana kuma jinjinawa hukumomin lafiya na Benin da Mali, da kuma Жҷungiyoyin haЙ—in guiwa na Жҷasashen waje da na gida bisa wannan nasara da aka samu. Biyo bayan nasarar Benin da Mali, har yanzu trachoma cuta ce mai yaЙ—uwa a Жҷasashen 23 a yankin Afirka da WHO ke lura da shi, wanda hakan ya Жҷara kusanta mu muradin da kawar da cutar trachoma da aka tsara don lura da cutatuttukan da ake samu a yankuna masu zafi a shekarar 2021 zuwa 2030.
translations.hypothesis: ШіЩҸЩ„ЪҢ WHO ЩҠЩҲШ§ ШіЪөШ§ ЩҲ Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠ ШЁЩҖШ§ Щ„ЩҖШҘШІШ§Щ„Ш© ШҜШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШӘШұШ§Ш®ЩҲЩ…Ш§ ЩғЩҖШЁЩҖШ§ Щ…ШҙЩғЩ„Ш© Щ„Ш§ЩҮЩҖШ§Щ„. ШіЩҸЩ„ЪҢ WHO ЩҠЩҲШ§ ШіЪөШ§ ЩҲ Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠ ЩғЩҖШЁЩҖШ§ Щ„ЩҖШҘШІШ§Щ„Ш© ШҜШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШӘШұШ§Ш®ЩҲЩ…Ш§ ЩғЩҖШЁЩҖШ§ Щ…ШҙЩғЩ„Ш© Щ„Ш§ЩҮЩҖШ§Щ„ШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮЩҖШ°Ш§ ЩҠЩҖШ¬Ш№Щ„ ЩҮЩҖЩ… ШҜШ§ШЎ Ш®Ш§Щ…Ші ЩҲ ШіШ§ШЁШ№ ШҜЩҲЩ„ ЩғЩҖШЁЩҖШ§ ЩҠЩҖШӯЩӮЩӮЩҲЩҶ ЩҮЩҖШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶШ¬Ш§ШІ. ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҖШ°ЩҠ ЩҠЩҖЩӮШЁЩ„ ШіЩҸЩ„ЪҢ WHO ЩҠЩҲШ§ ШіЪөШ§ ЩҲ Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠ ЩғЩҖШЁЩҖШ§ Щ„ЩҖШҘШІШ§Щ„Ш© ШҜШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШӘШұШ§Ш®ЩҲЩ…Ш§ ЩҮЩҖЩҠ: ШәШ§ЩҶШ§ (ЩҠЩҖЩҲЩҶЩҠЩҲ 2018)ШҢ Ш¬Ш§Щ…ШЁЩҠШ§ (ШЈШЁШұЩҠЩ„ 2021)ШҢ ШӘЩҲШ¬ЩҲ (Щ…Ш§ЩҠЩҲ 2022) ЩҲ Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠ (ШіШЁШӘЩ…ШЁШұ 2022). "ШіЩҸЩ„ЪҢ WHO ЩҠЩҲШ§ ШіЪөШ§ ЩҲ Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠШҢ ЩҲ ШҙШЁЩғШ© ЩҮЩҖЩ… ШҜЩҖШ§ Ш§Щ„ЩҖШ°ЩҠ ЩҠЩҖШҙЩ…Щ„ ШҙЩҖШұЩғШ§ШӘ ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠШ© ЩҲ Щ…ШӯЩ„ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҠЩҖЩҲШ§ ШіЪөШ§ ШЁЩҖШ§ ЩҮЩҖШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶШ¬Ш§ШІ"ШҢ ЩҠЩҖЩӮЩҖЩҲЩ„ ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШӘЩҠШҜШұЩҲШі ШЈШҜШ§ЩҶЩҲЩ… Ш¬ЩҠШЁШұЩҠЩҠШіЩҲШіШҢ ШұШҰЩҠЩҖШі ШіЩҸЩ„ЪҢ WHO. "ШЁЩҖШ§ ЩҶШ¬Ш§Шӯ ШіЪөШ§ ЩҲ Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠШҢ ШҜШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШӘШұШ§Ш®ЩҲЩ…Ш§ ЩҠЩҖШЁЩӮЩү ШҙШ§ШҰШ№ ЩғЩҖШЁЩҖШ§ 23 ШҜЩҲЩ„ ЩғЩҖШЁЩҖШ§ ЩҠЩҖЩӮШ№ ЩҮЩҖШ§ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШ·ЩӮШ© ШЈЩҒШұЩҠЩӮЩҠШ§ Щ„ЩҖШіЩҸЩ„ЪҢ WHOШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮЩҖШ°Ш§ ЩҠЩҖШ¬Ш№Щ„ЩҶШ§ ШЈЩӮШұШЁ Щ„ЩҖШҘШӯШұШ§ШІ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШҜЩҒ Ш§Щ„ЩҖШ°ЩҠ ЩҠЩҖШӘЩ… ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ Ш®ШұЩҠШ·Ш© Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮ Щ„ЩҖШҘШІШ§Щ„Ш© ШҜШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШӘШұШ§Ш®ЩҲЩ…Ш§ШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩҖШ°ЩҠ ЩҠЩҖШӘЩ… ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜЩҮ Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ… 2021-2030.

translations.source: Globally, Benin and Mali join 15 other countries that have been validated by WHO for having eliminated trachoma as a public health problem. These are Cambodia, China, the Gambia, Ghana, Islamic Republic of Iran, Lao PeopleвҖҷs Democratic Republic, Malawi, Mexico, Morocco, Myanmar, Nepal, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Togo and Vanuatu. Trachoma elimination using WHOвҖҷs SAFE strategy Both Benin and Mali implemented the WHO-recommended SAFE strategy to eliminate trachoma with the support of WHO and partners. The SAFE strategy consists of surgery to treat late trachoma complications; antibiotics to clear infection; facial cleanliness; and environmental improvement, particularly improving access to water and sanitation, to reduce transmission.
translations.reference: A duniya bakiЙ—aya, Benin da Mali sun bi sahun wasu Жҷasashe 15 da WHO ta tabbatar da cewa sun kawar da cutar ta trachoma a matsayin matsalar lafiyar jama'a. WaЙ—annan Жҷasashen su ne Cambodia, China, Gambia, Ghana, Jamhuriyar Musulunci ta Iran, Jamhuriyar Dimokuradiyyar Jama'ar Lao, Malawi, Mexico, Morocco, Myanmar, Nepal, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Togo da Vanuatu. Kawar da cutar Trachoma ta amfani da dabarun kariya na hukumar lafiya ta duniya wato WHO SAFE strategy. Dukkan Жҷasashen na Benin da Mali sun aiwatar da dabarun SAFE da WHO ta ba da shawarar amfani da su don kawar da cutar ta trachoma tare da tallafin WHO da Жҷungiyoyin haЙ—in guiwa. Dabarar SAFE ta Жҷunshi tiyata don magance matsalolin trachoma a matakin Жҷarshe; maganin rigakafi don warkar da infekshan; tsabtar fuska; da inganta muhalli, musamman inganta samun ruwa da tsaftar muhalli, don rage yaЙ—uwa.
translations.hypothesis: globally, Benin ЩҲ Mali, ШіШ§ЩҲЩҲЩҶ 15 Жҷasa da WHO ta tabbatar da cewa sun Й“ata matsalar trachoma. Жҳasashe waЙ—anda ke cikin wannan haЙ—in sun haЙ—a: Cambodia, China, Gambia, Ghana, Islamic Republic of Iran, Lao PeopleвҖҷs Democratic Republic, Malawi, Mexico, Morocco, Myanmar, Nepal, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Togo, ЩҲ Vanuatu. Й“atar da trachoma ta amfani da hanyar SAFE na WHO. Benin ЩҲ Mali sun wulge hanyar SAFE wanda WHO ke ba da umarni, tare da go bayanansu. Hanyar SAFE tana da: aikin kirja don Й“atar da matsalolin trachoma; Жҷimiya don Й“atar da lalata; Жҷiyaye hanyar, da kuma inganta muhalli, kamar inganta aikin ruwa da Жҷiyaye, don rage yin ta.

translations.source: Through the International Trachoma Initiative, the antibiotic azithromycin is donated by Pfizer to elimination programmes implementing the SAFE strategy. Benin has integrated trachoma elimination interventions with those implemented against other neglected tropical diseases (NTDs), under the umbrella of the National Programme for Communicable Diseases. Trachoma is the third NTD to be eliminated in Benin, after dracunculiasis (in 2009) and gambiense human African trypanosomiasis (in 2021). Mali has conducted trachoma impact and surveillance surveys and rolled out interventions to achieve elimination targets, despite security challenges in the northern regions of the country and sociopolitical upheavals in recent years. Trachoma is the first NTD to be eliminated in Mali, which therefore now joins a global group of 47 countries that have eliminated at least one NTD.
translations.reference: Ta hanyar International Trachoma Initiative ta Жҷasa da Жҷasa, kamfanin Pfizer ya ba da gudummuwar maganin azithromycin don aiwatar da tsarin na SAFE. Жҳasar Benin ta haЙ—a dabarun kawar da cutar ta trachoma tare da waЙ—anda aka aiwatar kan wasu cututtuka na wurare masu zafi da ba a kula da su (NTDs), a ЖҷarЖҷashin inuwar Hukumar Kula da Cututtuka masu YaЙ—uwa ta Жҳasa. Trachoma ita ce cutar wurare masu zafi da ba kula da su (NTD) ta uku da aka kawar da ita a Benin, bayancutar dracunculiasis (a shekarar 2009) da cutar gambiense human African trypanosomiasis (a shekarar 2021). Жҳasar Mali ta gudanar da binciken kwakwaf game da tasiru da sa ido tare da Жҷaddamar da matakan shawo kan matsalar, duk da Жҷalubalen tsaro a yankunan arewacin Жҷasar da kuma tashe-tashen hankula a tsakanin al'umma a 'yan shekarun nan. Cutar ta Trachoma ita ce ta cutar wurare masu zafi da ba kula da su (NTD) ta farko da aka kawar a Жҷasar Mali, don haka yanzu ta shiga cikin rukunin Жҷasashe 47 na duniya waЙ—anda suka kawar da aЖҷalla cutar wurare masu zafi da ba kula da su (NTD) guda Й—aya.
translations.hypothesis: Р§РөСҖРөР· "International Trachoma Initiative", ШҜЩҲШ§ШЎ azithromycin ЩҠЩҸаҰҰаҰҫаҰЁ Щ„ШЁШұШ§Щ…Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ¶Ш§ШЎШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ ЩҠШ·ШЁЩӮЩҲЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘШұШ§ШӘЩҠШ¬ЩҠШ© "SAFE". ШЁЩҶЩҠЩҶ ЩӮШҜ Ш¶Щ…ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШ®Щ„Ш§ШӘ Щ„ШҘЩҶЩҮШ§ШЎ Щ…ШұШ¶ "trachoma" Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШ®Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ ЩҠЩҸШ·ШЁЩӮЩҲЩҶ Ш¶ШҜЩү ШіШ§ШҰШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘЩҲШ§ШҰЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ Щ„Ш§ ШӘШӯШёЩү ШЁШ§ЩҮШӘЩ…Ш§Щ…ШҢ ШӘШӯШӘ Щ…ШёЩ„Ш© "National Programme for Communicable Diseases". "Trachoma" ЩҮЩҲ Ш«Ш§Щ„Ш« Щ…ШұШ¶ Ш§ШіШӘЩҲШ§ШҰЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠЩҸЩӮШөШҜ ШҘЩҶЩҮШ§ШЎЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ ШЁЩҶЩҠЩҶШҢ ШЁШ№ШҜ "dracunculiasis" (ЩҒЩҠ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2009) ЩҲ "gambiense human African trypanosomiasis" (ЩҒЩҠ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2021). Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠ ЩӮШҜ ШЈШ¬ШұШӘ ШҜШұШ§ШіШ§ШӘ Щ„ШӘЩӮЩҠЩҠЩ… ЩҲШӘШӘШЁШ№ "trachoma" ЩҲ ЩӮШҜ ШЁШҜШЈШӘ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШ®Щ„Ш§ШӘ Щ„ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ ШЈЩҮШҜШ§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ¶Ш§ШЎШҢ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШұШәЩ… Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ЩҶЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш·ЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШҙЩ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„Ш§ШҜ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¶Ш·ШұШ§ШЁШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩҠШ§ШіЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҶЩҲШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ЩҠШұШ©. "Trachoma" ЩҮЩҲ ШЈЩҲЩ„ Щ…ШұШ¶ Ш§ШіШӘЩҲШ§ШҰЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠЩҸЩӮШөШҜ ШҘЩҶЩҮШ§ШЎЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠШҢ ЩҲ ШЁШ§Щ„ШӘШ§Щ„ЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШўЩҶ ЩҠЩҶШ¶Щ… ШҘЩ„Щү Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ 47 ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩӮШҜ ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ…ШӘ ШҘЩҶЩҮШ§ШЎ ЩҲШ§ШӯШҜ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈЩӮЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘЩҲШ§ШҰЩҠШ©.

translations.source: вҖңThese are impressive public health achievements,вҖқ said Dr Ibrahima SocГ© Fall, Director of the WHO Global NTD Programme. вҖңBenin and Mali demonstrate how strong political will, cross-sector integration, surveillance and community engagement can work in concert to achieve disease elimination.вҖқ Significant progress has been made in the fight against trachoma over the past few years. The number of people requiring antibiotic treatment for trachoma in the WHO African Region fell by 84 million, from 189 million in 2014 to 105 million as of June 2022. Note to the editor: Trachoma remains a public health problem in 41 countries (as of June 2022) with an estimated 125 million people living in areas requiring interventions against the disease.
translations.reference: "WaЙ—annan nasarori ne masu ban sha'awa a fannin kiwon lafiyar jama'a, in ji Dr Ibrahima Soce Fall, Daraktan shirin na WHO Global NTD. "Benin da Mali sun nuna yadda jajircewa a gwamnatance, haЙ—in kan Й“angarori daban-daban, sa ido da kuma haЙ—a kan al'umma ke aiki tare don cimma nasarar kawar da cututtuka." An samu gagarumin ci gaba a yaЖҷi da cutar ta trachoma a cikin 'yan shekarun da suka gabata. Adadin mutanen da ke buЖҷatar maganin cutar ta trachoma a yankin da WHO ke kula da shi a Afirka ya ragu da miliyan 84, daga miliyan 189 a shekarar 2014 zuwa miliyan 105 a watan Yunin 2022. Tsokaci ga Edita: Trachoma har yanzu matsalar lafiyar jama'a a cikin Жҷasashe 41 (a watan Yuni 2022) inda kimanin mutane miliyan 125 da ke zaune a yankunan ke buЖҷatar yin rigakafin cutar.
translations.hypothesis: "ЩҮШ°ЩҮ ШҘЩҶШ¬Ш§ШІШ§ШӘ Щ„Ш§ЩҒШӘШ© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш©," ЩҠаёҒаёҘа№ҲаёІаё§ ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШҘШЁШұШ§ЩҠЩ…Ш§ ШіЩҲЩғЩҠ ЩҒШ§Щ„ШҢ ШұШҰЩҠШіШ§ Щ„ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠ Щ„ЩҖ WHO Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§Шө ШЁШ§Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶Ш§ШӘ ШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҸШ№ШҜЩҠШ©. "ШЁЩҶЩҠЩҶ ЩҲЩ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠ ЩҠЩҲШ¶ШӯЩҲЩҶ ЩғЩҠЩҒ ШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘШұШ§ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠШ§ШіЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҲЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩғШ§Щ…Щ„ ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ·Ш§Ш№Ш§ШӘШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ§ЩӮШЁШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ШӘШ№Щ…Щ„ Щ…Ш№ЩӢШ§ Щ„ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ¶Ш§ШЎ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶." ЩӮШҜ ШӘЩ… ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ ШӘЩӮШҜЩ… ЩғШЁЩҠШұ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҒШӯШ© Щ…ШұШ¶ "Ш§Щ„ШӘШұШ§Ш®ЩҲЩ…Ш§" ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҶЩҲШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ЩҠШұШ©. Ш№ШҜШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙШ®Ш§Шө Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ЩҠШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ЩҲЩҶ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ ШЁШ§Щ„Щ…Ш¶Ш§ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҠЩҲЩҠШ© Щ„ЩҖ "Ш§Щ„ШӘШұШ§Ш®ЩҲЩ…Ш§" ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШ·ЩӮШ© ШЈЩҒШұЩҠЩӮЩҠШ§ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§ШЁШ№Ш© Щ„ЩҖ WHO ЩӮШҜ Ш§ЩҶШ®ЩҒШ¶ ШЁЩ…ЩӮШҜШ§Шұ 84 Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶШҢ Щ…ЩҶ 189 Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2014 ШҘЩ„Щү 105 Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§ШұЩӢШ§ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҠЩҲЩҶЩҠЩҲ 2022. Щ…Щ„Ш§ШӯШёШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…ШӯШұШұ: "Ш§Щ„ШӘШұШ§Ш®ЩҲЩ…Ш§" Щ„Ш§ ШӘШІШ§Щ„ Щ…ШҙЩғЩ„Ш© ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш© ЩҒЩҠ 41 ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш© (Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§ШұЩӢШ§ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҠЩҲЩҶЩҠЩҲ 2022)ШҢ Щ…Ш№ ШӘЩӮШҜЩҠШұ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ 125 Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ ШҙШ®Шө Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ЩҠШ№ЩҠШҙЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш·ЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ ШҘЩ„Щү ШӘШҜШ®Щ„Ш§ШӘ Щ„Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҒШӯШ© ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶.

translations.source: Trachoma is found mainly in the poorest and most rural areas of Africa, Central and South America, Asia, the Western Pacific and the Middle East. The WHO African Region is disproportionately affected by trachoma with 105 million people living in at-risk areas, which represents 84% of the global trachoma burden. Trachoma is the leading infectious cause of blindness worldwide. The disease is caused by infection with the bacterium Chlamydia trachomatis. Infection is transmitted from person to person through contaminated fingers, fomites and flies that have come into contact with discharge from the eyes or nose of an infected person.
translations.reference: Ana samun cutar ta Trachoma ne musamman a yankunan karkara mafi talauci a Afirka, Tsakiya da Kudancin Amurka, Asiya, Yammacin Pacific da Gabas ta Tsakiya. Yankin Afirka da WHO ke lura da shi yana fama da cutar ta trachoma, inda mutane miliyan 105 ke zaune a yankunan da ke fuskantar haЙ—arin, wanda ke wakiltar kashi 84% adadin masu cutar ta trachoma a duniya. Trachoma ita ce cutar da ke kan gaba wajen haifar da makanta a duniya. Cutar na samuwa ne sakamakon kamuwa da Жҷwayar cutar Chlamydia trachomatis. Cutar tana yaЙ—uwa tsakanin mutane ne ta hanyar ta gurЙ“atattun hannaye, kayan sawa da na amfani da Жҷudaje waЙ—anda suka yi mu'amala ruwan da ke fita daga idanu ko hancin mai cutar.
translations.hypothesis: Trachoma ana samu a cikin Жҷananan Жҷungiyar da Жҷasa, kamar Afrika, Жҳasar Yammacin РҗРјРөСҖРёРәР°, Asia, Жҳasar Pacific Жҳasa, da Жҳasar Gabas. Жҳungiyar Afrika ta WHO ta shafai sosai daga trachoma, inda 105 рқ‘ҡрқ‘–Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ mutum ke zaune a cikin Жҷungiyar da ta sha fama, wanda ya kai 84% na yawan trachoma a duniya. Trachoma shine sababinsa na kwarai a duniya. Samin wannan kasarra ne ne daga Жҷarfawa da Жҷwamari na *Chlamydia trachomatis*. Жҳarfawa na dogara daga mutum zuwa mutum ta hanyar jari, Жҷasa, da Жҷwarar da suka shafi Жҷwarar da ke na Жҷwamari ko Жҷasa na mutum da ya shafa.

translations.source: Environmental risk factors for trachoma transmission include poor hygiene, overcrowded households, inadequate access to water or use of proper sanitation facilities. In 1996, WHO launched the WHO Alliance for the Global Elimination of Trachoma by the year 2020 (GET2020). With other partners in the Alliance, WHO supports country implementation of the SAFE strategy and strengthening of national capacity through epidemiological assessment, monitoring, surveillance, project evaluation and resource mobilization contributing towards elimination of trachoma as a public health problem. The road map, endorsed by the World Health Assembly in 2020 through its decision 73(33), sets 2030 as the new target date for global elimination.
translations.reference: Ababen hatsari da ke tattare da muhalli da ke haddasa yaЙ—uwar cutar ta trachoma sun haЙ—a da rashin tsafta, cunkoso a gidaje, rashin isasshen ruwa ko wuraren amfani masu tsafta. A shekara 1996, WHO ta Жҷaddamar da Gidauniyar HaЙ—aka don kawar da Trachoma ta Duniya nan da shekara ta 2020 (GET2020). Tare da sauran abokan tarayya a cikin Gidauniyar ta haЙ—aka, WHO ba da goyon baya wajen aiwatar da dabarun SAFE da kuma Жҷarfafa yunЖҷurin Жҷasa ta hanyar tantance cututtuka, lura da sa ido, tantance ayyuka da tattara kayan aiki da ke taimakawa wajen kawar da cutar ta trachoma a matsayin matsalar lafiyar jama'a. Tsarin gudanarwar, wanda Majalisar Lafiya ta Duniya ta amince da shi a shekarar 2020 ta hanyar shawara mai lamba 73 (33) da ka yanke, ta sanya 2030 a matsayin sabon lokacin da ake nufin kawar da cutar a faЙ—in duniya.

translations.source: 152 million babies born preterm in the last decade Of every 10 babies born, 1 is preterm вҖ“ and every 40 seconds, 1 of those babies dies Preterm birth rates have not changed in the past decade in any region of the world The impacts of conflict, climate change, COVID-19 are increasing risks for women and babies everywhere Action is needed urgently to improve the prevention of preterm birth, alongside better care for affected babies and their families
translations.reference: Jarirai miliyan 152 ne aka haifa kafin lokacin haihuwarsu ya yi. 1. A cikin kowane jarirai 10 da ake haifa, 1 bakwaini ne - kuma kowane sakan 40, 1 na waЙ—annan jariran yana mutuwa. Yawan jariran da ake haifa kafin lokacin haihuwarsu ya yi bai sauya ba a cikin shekaru goma da suka wuce a duk sassa na duniya. Tasirin rikice-rikice da na sauyin yanayi da ma na cutar Covid-19 duk Жҷarin Жҷalubale ne ga mata da jarirai a ko'ina. Akwai buЖҷatar Й—aukar matakan gaggawa domin dakatar da haihuwar jarirai kafin lokaci ya yi tare da samar da cikakkiyar kulawa ga jariran tare da iyalan da hakan ya auku gare su.

translations.source: An estimated 13.4 million babies were born pre-term in 2020, with nearly 1 million dying from preterm complications, according to a new report released by United Nations agencies and partners today. This is equivalent to around 1 in 10 babies born early (before 37 weeks of pregnancy) worldwide. Born too soon: decade of action on preterm birth, produced by the World Health Organization (WHO) and the United Nations ChildrenвҖҷs Fund (UNICEF) together with PMNCH -- the worldвҖҷs largest alliance for women, children, and adolescents, sounds the alarm on a вҖңsilent emergencyвҖқ of preterm birth, long under-recognized in its scale and severity, which is impeding progress in improving childrenвҖҷs health and survival. The report includes updated estimates from WHO and UNICEF, prepared with the London School of Hygiene and Tropical Medicine, on the prevalence of preterm births. Overall, it finds that preterm birth rates have not changed in any region in the world in the past decade, with 152 million vulnerable babies born too soon from 2010 to 2020.
translations.reference: Bisa Жҷiyasi, jarirai miliyan 13.4 aka haifa kafin lokacin da ya kamata a shekarar 2020 kuma kusan su miliyan 1 daga cikinsu suka rasu a saboda hakan, a cewar wani rahoton da ma'aikatun Majalisar ЖҠinkin Duniya suka fitar a kwanan nan. Wannan adadi daidai yake da 1 cikin jararai 10 da aka haifa da wuri (kafin mako 37 da Й—aukar ciki) a duniya baki Й—aya. Daftarin Born too soon: decade of action on preterm birth wanda Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya ta samar da haЙ—in guiwar Hukumar Kula da Жҳananan Yara ta Majalisar ЖҠinkin Duniya wato UNICEF tare da PMNCH wadda ita ce haЙ—aka mafi girma tsakanin mata da yara da kuma matasa a duk faЙ—in duniya ya abin da ke buЖҷatar Й—aukin gaggawa da ba san da shi ba na haihuwar jarirai kafin lokacin da ya kamata, wanda ba a fahimci yawansa da tsananinsa ba, wanda kuma yana dakushe cigaba da ma rayuwar jarirai. Rahoton ya Жҷunshi bayanai da aka samo daga Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) da ta UNICEF wanda makarantar kula da tsafta da cutuka a yankuna masu zafi ta Landan ta tsara a kan yawaitar jariran da ake haihuwa kafin lokacin da ya kamata. A gaba Й—aya, ta gano cewa yawan jariran da ake haifa kafin lokaci bai sauya ba a kowane yanki na duniya a cikin shekaru goma da suka wuce, inda aka samu jarirai miliyan 152 da aka haifa kafin lokacin da ya kamata tsakanin shekarar 2010 zuwa ta 2020.

translations.source: Preterm birth is now the leading cause of child deaths, accounting for more than 1 in 5 of all deaths of children occurring before their 5th birthday. Preterm survivors can face lifelong health consequences, with an increased likelihood of disability and developmental delays. Survival gaps by region, income, race Building from a landmark report on the topic in 2012, this new Born too soon вҖңdecadeвҖқ report provides a comprehensive overview of the prevalence of preterm birth and its profound impact on women, families, societies and economies. Too often, where babies are born determines if they survive.
translations.reference: Haihuwar jarirai kafin lokacin da ya kamata shi ne yanzu ya fi haddasa mace-macen yara, inda yake haddasa mutuwar yaro guda duk cikin su 5 da suke rasu kafin su shekara 5. Jariran da aka haifa kafin lokacin da ya kamata sukan fuskanci Жҷalubale na tsawon rayuwa, inda sukan iya samun wata naЖҷasa ko kuma rashin girma yadda ya kamata. Bambancin rayuwa dangane da yanki ko matsayin tattalin arziЖҷi ko kuma launin fata. La'akari da wani shahararren rahoto game da lamarin a shekara ta 2012, wannan daftarin na Born too soon ya fayyace yadda ake samuwar jarirai bakwani (waЙ—anda aka haifa kafin lokacin da ya kamata) dalla-dalla tare da tasirin da hakan yake da shi a kan mata da iyalai da al'umma da kuma tattalin arziЖҷi. A yawancin lokuta, inda aka haifi jarirai shi yake tasiri wajen rayuwarsu ko rashinta.

translations.source: The report notes that only 1 in 10 extremely preterm babies (<28 weeks) survive in low-income countries, compared to more than 9 in 10 in high-income countries. Gaping inequalities related to race, ethnicity, income, and access to quality care determine the likelihood of preterm birth, death, and disability, even in high-income countries. Southern Asia and sub-Saharan Africa have the highest rates of preterm birth, and preterm babies in these regions face the highest mortality risk. Together, these two regions account for more than 65% of preterm births globally. The report also highlights that the impacts of conflict, climate change and environmental damage, COVID-19, and rising living costs are increasing risks for women and babies everywhere.
translations.reference: Rahoton ya yi nuni da cewa, jariri 1 ne kawai a cikin 10 ke rayuwa idan an haife shi a lokacin da ko kusa lokacin haihuwarsa bai yi ba (Жҷasa da mako 28 da Й—aukar ciki) a Жҷasashe masu Жҷaramin Жҷarfi, saЙ“anin a Жҷasashe masu arziЖҷi inda adadin ya kai jararai 9 a cikin 10. Cike giЙ“in rashin daidaiton da ake samu ta fuskar launin fata da Жҷabila da tattalin arziЖҷi da ma samun hanyoyin kiwon lafiya nagartattu shi zai taimaka a rage samun jarirai bakwaini da rage mace-macensu da kuma samun naЖҷasarsu hatta a Жҷasashe masu yalwar arziЖҷi. Kudancin nahiyar Asiya da yankin Afirka kudu da Sahara su suka fi yawan jarirai bakwaini sannan kuma a nan ne aka fi samun mutuwarsu. WaЙ—annan yankuna guda biyu idan aka tara su sun kwashe kashi 65 a cikin Й—ari na yawan jarirai bakwaini na duk faЙ—in duniya. Har'ilayau, rahoton ya bayyana cewa tasirin rikice-rikice da na sauyin yanayi da gurЙ“acewar muhalli da na cutar Covid-19 dakuma tsadar rayuwar barazan ce ga mata da jarirai a ko'ina.

translations.source: For example, air pollution is estimated to contribute to 6 million preterm births each year. Nearly 1 in 10 preterm babies are born in the 10 most fragile countries affected by humanitarian crises, according to a new analysis in the report. Maternal health risks, such as adolescent pregnancy and pre-eclampsia, are closely linked to preterm births. This underlines the need to ensure access to sexual and reproductive health services, including effective family planning, with high-quality care in pregnancy and around the time of birth. Agenda for action: more country investment and parent-led activism
translations.reference: Misali, an Жҷiyasta cewa gurЙ“atacciyar iska kawai tana haddasa haihuwar jarirai bakaini miliyan 6 a duk shekara. A wani sabon nazari na rahoton an fahimci cewa, kusan bakaini 1 a duk su 10 da aka haifa za a iske yana a cikin Жҷasashen da yawan rikice-rikice ya fi addabar su ne. Matsalolin laulayin ciki da suke samuwa sakamakon Й—aukar ciki da wuri ga budurwa ko hawan jinin da ya samu sanadiyar juna-biyu suna da dangantaka sosai da haihuwar bakwaini. Wannan ya sa akwai buЖҷatar a inganta kula da lafiya ta fuskar zamantakewar aure da samun haihuwa, ciki har da tazarar haihuwa da samar da cikakkiyar kulawa ga mata masu ciki da kuma lokacin haihuwarsu. Matakan da za a Й—auka:Жҷasashe su Жҷara zuba jari sannan iyaye su kuma su fito domin yin gwagwarmaya a kan lamarin.

translations.source: The past decade has also seen a growth of community activism on preterm birth and stillbirth prevention, driven by networks of parents, health professionals, academia, civil society, and others. Throughout the world, groups for affected families of preterm birth have been at the forefront of advocating for access to better care and policy change and supporting other families. Leading up to the International Maternal Newborn Health Conference, in Cape Town, South Africa from 8-11 May, WHO, UNICEF, UNFPA and PMNCH are calling for the following actions to improve care for women and newborns and mitigate risks from preterm births: Increased investments: Mobilizing international and domestic resources to optimize maternal and newborn health, ensuring high quality care is provided when and where it is needed. Accelerated implementation: Meeting country targets for progress through implementing established national policies for maternal and newborn care.
translations.reference: A shekaru goma da suka gabata, an kuma samu cigaba ta fuskar gwagwarmayar al'umma kan rage haihuwar bakwaini da yin Й“arin ciki, inda iyaye da ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya da manyan makarantu da Жҷungiyoyi masu fafutuka da sauransu suka shiga tsundum aka dama da su. A duk faЙ—in duniya, Жҷungiyoyin iyalai na waЙ—anda suka haifi bakwaini a baya su ne a kan gaba wajen yin kira da a inganta kula tare da sanya tsare-tsare sannan kuma da taimaka wa wasu iyalan da hakan ya auku gare su. Har zuwa lokacin da aka gudanar d Taron Жҳara wa Juna Ilimi a Kan Kula da Jarirai da aka yi a Cape Town ta Afirka ta Kudu tsakanin 8-11 ga watan Mayu, Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) da ta UNICEF da ta UNFPA da ku ta PMNCH duk sun yi ta kiraye-kiraye kan inganta lafiyar mata da ta jarirai da kuma lalubo hanyoyin daЖҷile haihuwar bakwaini kamar haka: Жҳara zuba jari: Samar da kuЙ—aЙ—e daga ciki da wajen Жҷasa domin inganta lafiyar mata masu ciki da jarirai ta hanyar tabbatar da an bayar da kulawar da ta dace a wurare mabuЖҷata kuma a lokacin da ya dace. Gaggauta aiwatarwa: Cimma burin Жҷasa na cigaba ta hanyar aiwatar da tsare-tsaren da aka yi na inganta lafiyar mata masu ciki da jarirai.

translations.source: Integration across sectors: Promoting education through the life cycle; supporting smarter economic investments, with co-financing across sectors; strengthening climate adaptation responses across the life-course; and advancing the coordination and resilience of emergency systems. Locally driven innovation: Investing in locally led innovation and research to support improvements in quality of care and equity in access. Quotes: Prof. Joy Lawn, London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine Co-lead, Born too soon: decade of action on preterm birth (2023) and Born too soon (2012) "This new report shows that the cost of inaction over the last decade was 152 million babies born too soon.
translations.reference: Жҳarfafa dukkan Й“angarori: Tallafa wa ilimi a dukkan matakan rayuwa, samar da tallafi ta fuskar tattalin arziЖҷi a dukkan fannoni, Жҷarfafa wa jama'a fuskantar sauyin yanayi sannan kuma da Жҷarfafa tare-tsaren taimakon gaggawa. Samar da ЖҷirЖҷire-ЖҷirЖҷiren cikin gida: Zuba jari a ЖҷirЖҷire-ЖҷirЖҷire da bincike na cikin gida domin taimaka wa cigaba ta fuskar inganta tare da daidaita samar da kulawa gare su. Tsakure: Farfesa Joy Lawn, Makarantar Kula da Tsafta da Samar da Magunguna ga Жҳasashe masu Yanayin Zafi ta Landan. Jagorantar Daftarin Born too soon: decade of action on preterm birth (2023)da na Born too soon (2012). "Wannan sabon rahoton ya nuna cewa rashin Й—aukar matakan da suka dace ya haddasa haiuwar jarirai bakwaini har miliyan 152.
translations.hypothesis: ШӘЩғШ§Щ…Щ„ ШҙЩҲЩҶ-ШҙЩҲЩҶ: ШәЩҲЩҠШ§Ш№а®•аҜҚ СӮР°СҠаӨІаҘҖаӨ® cikin ciklin rayuwa; tallafawa Жҷarin ЖҷoЖҷarin ЖҷirЖҷirar, tare da tallafin shiri shon-shon; Жҷarfawa jikewa da kuma Й—aukar matakan da ke cikin ciklin rayuwa; kuma inganta kuma Жҷarfawa na hanyoyin da ke da matasa. Жҳirar da ta Жҷasar: ЖҳoЖҷarin ЖҷirЖҷirar kuma bincike da ta Жҷasar, don tallafawa inganta kalubale da kuma dawo. Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҲЩ„: Ш§Щ„ШЁШұЩҲЩҒЩҠШіЩҲШұ Ш¬ЩҲЩҠ Щ„ЩҲЩҶШҢ Щ…ШҜШұШіШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш·ШЁ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘЩҲШ§ШҰЩҠШҢ Щ„ЩҶШҜЩҶ - "ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ ЩҠЩҲШ¶Шӯ ШЈЩҶ ШӘЩғЩ„ЩҒШ© Ш№ШҜЩ… Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШ®Щ„ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩӮШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ЩҠШұ ЩҮЩҲ ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜШ© 152 Ш·ЩҒЩ„ЩӢШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ЩҲЩӮШӘ Щ…ШЁЩғШұ.

translations.source: While some regions are more affected, preterm birth threatens health progress in every country. Greater investment in the care of vulnerable newborns can save millions of families from heartbreak. More work is also needed to prevent preterm birth, which will also improve progress in reducing stillbirths and maternal deaths. Together these twin tracks of preterm prevention and care will produce healthier individuals and societies to deliver on economic and social development. Our next generation depends on us all acting now -- the investment may not be small but the returns on this investment will be major for every country"
translations.reference: Duk da yake wasu yankuna sun fi fuskantar matsalar, amma haihuwar yara bakwaini Жҷalubale ne ga kiwon lafiya a kowace Жҷasa. Жҳarin zuba jari a kan kula da jarirai zai taimaka wajen tsare iyalai da dama daga damuwa. Akwai kuma buЖҷatar yin aiki tuЖҷuru domin hana haihuwar jarirai bakwaini wanda hakan kuma zai taimaka wajen rage yin Й“ari da mutuwar mata masu ciki. WaЙ—annan tagwayen hanyoyi na hana haihuwar jarirai bakwaini idan suka haЙ—u, za su taimaka wajen samar da lafiyayyun mutane da al'ummomi waЙ—anda za su kawo wa Жҷasa cigaba ta fuskar tattalin arziЖҷi da zamantakewa. Ya'ya da jikokinmu sun dogara da abin da muka yi a yau --- jarin da za mu saka ko da ba mai yawa ba ne zai iya zama mai yawa ga kowace Жҷasa.
translations.hypothesis: "ШЁЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ Щ„Ш§ Gwarar, ana fama da matasa, ana samu matsala a kowace Жҷasa. ЖҷoЖҷarin da ake yi don kula da ana samu, zai iya canja lafiyar Жҳungiyar. kuma, ЖҷoЖҷarin da ake yi don ganowa da matasa, zai iya canja lafiyar kuma canja lafiyar mata. Don haka, wannan hanyoyin da za mu yi, za su iya canja lafiyar jama'a kuma Жҷungiyar, don canja lafiyar Жҷasa. Mun bi, kuma mun yi aiki, wannan ЖҷoЖҷarin ba Жҷasa ba, amma sakamakannya za su kasance muhimmi don kowace Жҷasa.

translations.source: Dr Nahya Salim, Tanzania: Born Too Soon co-author and national lead of Newborn Essential Solutions and Technologies 360 (NEST360) вҖңThere is now no excuse for silence. We now have in our hands the devices and the knowledge to change outcomes for our most vulnerable newborns. I am proud to see my government now investing and committed to implementation across even rural areas. The next decade can and must be different for those facing preterm birth here and everywhere.вҖқ
translations.reference: Dr Nahya Salim, Tanzania: ЖҠaya daga cikin marubuta na Born Too Soon sannan kuma jagora na Newborn Essential Solutions and Technologies 360 (NEST360) na Жҷasa. A yanzu kenan babu dalili na yin shiru. Yanzu muna da wuЖҷa da nama da ilimi na sauya makomar jariranmu da wannan abin zai iya shafa. Ina mai alfahari da ganin a yanzu gwamnatin Жҷasata ta mayar da hankali a kan aiwatarwa hatta a yankunan karkara. Shekaru goma masu zuwa suna iya zama, kai dole ne ma su zama daban dangane da masu fuskantar haihuwar bakwaini.

translations.source: Dr Anshu Banerjee, Director for Maternal, Newborn, Child and Adolescent Health and Ageing at WHO вҖңEnsuring quality care for these tiniest, most vulnerable babies and their families is absolutely imperative for improving child health and survival. Progress is also needed to help prevent preterm births -- this means every woman must be able to access quality health services before and during pregnancy to identify and manage risks.вҖқ Steven Lauwerier, Director of Health (a.i.), UNICEF вҖңAfter every preterm death is a trail of loss and heartbreak.
translations.reference: Dr Anshu Banerjee, Darektan kula da lafiyar mata masu ciki da jarirai da yara da matasa da harkar da ta shafi tsufa na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO). Tabbatar da an samar da ingantacciyar kulawa ga waЙ—annan mitsitsan jarirai da iyalansu ya zama wajibi domin inganta kula da yara da rage mace-macensu. Akwai buЖҷatar samun cigaba ta fuskar kula da jarirai bakwaini --- wannan na nufin cewa dole kowace mace mai ciki ta iya samun damar halartar asibiti kafin da kuma yayin da take Й—auke da juna biyu domin gano tare da fuskantar Жҷalubale. Steven Lauwerier, Darektan Kiwon Lafiya (a.i.), UNICEF Babban rashi da damuwa ne ke biyo bayan dukkan mutuwar jariri bakwaini.
translations.hypothesis: ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШЈЩҶШҙЩҲ ШЁШ§ЩҶШұШ¬ЩҠШҢ ШҜШ§ЩҠrektor Щ„ШұЩҒШ§ЩҮЩҠ ШЈЩ…ШҢ Ш·ЩҒЩ„ШҢ ЩҲЩҶШ§ШҙШҰШҢ ЩҲШҙЩҠШ® Ш№Щ…Шұ ШЁЩҖ WHO "Ш¶Щ…Ш§ЩҶ ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© ЩҶЩҲШ№ЩҠШ© Щ„ШәЩ„Ш§Щ…ЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШөШәШ§ШұШҢ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Ш¶Ш№ЩҒШҢ ЩҲЩҶШ¬Ш§Щ…ШҢ ЩҲЩғШ°Щ„Щғ ШЈШіШұЩҮЩ…ШҢ ЩҮЩҲ ШЈЩ…Шұ Ш¶ШұЩҲШұЩҠ Щ„Щ„ШәШ§ЩҠШ© Щ„ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҒЩ„ ЩҲЩҶШ¬Ш§ШӯЩҮ. ШЈЩҠШ¶Ш§ЩӢШҢ Щ„Ш§ ШЁШҜ Щ…ЩҶ ШҘЩҠШ¬Ш§ШҜ Ш·ШұЩӮ Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ№ ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜШ© Щ…ШЁЩғШұШ© - wannan yana nufin cewa duk mata dole ne su iya Й—aukar ayyuka na lafiyar da kyalli kafin da kuma zaman shiga, domin gano da nazarin matsalolin." ШіШӘЩҠЩҒЩҶ Щ„Ш§ЩҲЩҠШұЩҠШҢ ШҜШ§ЩҠrektor na Lafiya (a.i.), UNICEF "Bayan kowace mutuwa ta cikin ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШҜШ© Щ…ШЁЩғШұШ©, akwai wani abu na sakaci da wani abu na gajiya.

translations.source: Despite the many advances the world has made in the past decade, we have made no progress in reducing the number of small babies born too soon or averting the risk of their death. The toll is devasting. ItвҖҷs time we improve access to care for pregnant mothers and preterm infants and ensure every child gets a healthy start and thrives in life.вҖқ Helga Fogstad, Executive Director, PMNCH вҖңBorn too soon underlines why we must increase investment and accountability for preterm birth вҖ“ the worldвҖҷs largest cause of death of children under the age of five.
translations.reference: Duk da cigaba da aka samu a duniya ta fuskoki da dama, babu wata cigaba ta a-zo-a-gani da aka samu dangane da yawan jarirai bakwaini da kuma rage mace-macensu. Yawan yana razanarawa. Lokaci ya yi na inganta lafiyar mata masu ciki da kuma jarirai bakwaini domin tabbatar da samun ingantacciyar lafiya da kyakkyawar rayuwa gare su. Helga Fogstad, Babban Darekta na PMNCH Daftarin Born too soon ya nuna wajibcin Жҷara zuba jari da sa-ido yadda ya kamata a kan haihuwar jarirai bakwaini wanda shi ne babban dalilin mutuwar yara 'yan Жҷasa da shekara biyar.
translations.hypothesis: ШЁШ§ Щ…ЩҮШ§Шұ da kaso da duniya ta samu a cikin wannan shekara, ba mu da wani sabon abu a kan mabuЙ—in mutane da ke wucewa ko da kuma ganowa. wannan abu yana da lalaci. Za mu iya inganta damar samar da addini da kuma ba mutane da ke wucewa, kuma za mu guza da duk mutum yana fara rayuwa da kuma samun nasara. - Helga Fogstad, Mai jagoranci, PMNCH "Mutane da ke wucewa yana nuna mana yadda za mu karanta kuma guza da mutane da ke wucewa - wannan abu ne na kusa da mutuwa ga mutane da ba su wuce shekara shida.

translations.source: Progress is flatlining for maternal and newborn health, as well as the prevention of stillbirths, and is now pushed back further through the devastating combination of COVID-19, climate change, expanding conflicts and rising living costs. вҖңBy working together in partnership вҖ“ governments, donors, the private sector, civil society, parents, and health professionals вҖ“ we can sound the alarm about this вҖңsilent emergencyвҖқ, and bring preterm prevention and care efforts to the forefront of national health and development efforts, building human capital by supporting families, societies and economies everywhere. вҖқGabriela and Jerome Foster, Las Vegas, United States: parents of Jalen Foster, and founders of JalenвҖҷs Gift Foundation вҖңOur foundation was founded after the loss of our son, Jalen Foster, who was a preterm stillbirth at 27 weeks due to prenatal onset of a bacteria known as group B streptococcus. Losing our son was devastating, and there was no support in the community and thatвҖҷs when we decided to provide a place of comfort and hope for families who have lost a baby.
translations.reference: Cigaban da ake samu dangane da kiwon lafiyar mata masu ciki da na jarirai da ma samuwar Й“arin ciki na mai haЖҷin rijiya ne, ga shi kuma ya Жҷara samun koma-baya sakamakon cutar Covid-19 da sauyin yanayi da Жҷaruwar rikice-rikice da kuma tsadar rayuwa. Idan muka haЙ—a kai, gwamnatocinmu da masu hannu da shuni da ma'aikatu masu zaman kansu da Жҷungiyoyi masu fafutuka da iyaye da kuma ma'aikatan lafiya, za mu iya fito da wannan abin da ke buЖҷatar gaggawa har ya zama cikin muhimman abin da Й“angaren kiwon lafiya na Жҷasa ya sa a gaba ta yadda za a gina al'umma ta hanyar tallafa wa iyalai da Жҷungiyoyi da ma Й“angarori na tattalin arziЖҷi a ko'ina. "Gabriela and Jerome Foster, Las Vegas, United States: iyaye ga Jalen Foster, kuma waЙ—anda suka kafa Jalen's Gift Foundation An kafa gidauniyarmu ne bayan an da muka rasa Й—anmu mai suna Jalen Foster wanda bakwaini ne da aka haifa tun cikinsa yana mako 27 sakamakon harbuwar da ya yi da Жҷwayar cuta mai suna streptococous nau'I na B. Rashin Й—an namu ya kasance babban tashin hankali a gare mu kuma babu wanda a tallafa mana daga cikin al'umma, don haka muka ga zai dace a faranta wa iyalan da suka rasa Й—a.

translations.source: UAE and WHO deliver air lift of critical medical supplies to Sudan The United Arab Emirates (UAE) and the World Health Organization have delivered 30 tons of urgent medical supplies to Sudan today. A plane carrying supplies for injury treatment, emergency surgeries, and essential drugs arrived in Port Sudan Airport early this morning. The shipment, valued at US$ 444 000, is the first that WHO has been able to deliver by air to Sudan since the outbreak of the conflict. WHO distributed supplies to heath facilities prior to the escalation of conflict.
translations.reference: Hadaddiyar Daular Larabawa da Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya sun kai wani jirgin sama mai dauke da muhimman kayayyakin kiwon lafiya zuwa Sudan HaЙ—aЙ—Й—iyar daular larabawa da hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) sun kai wani jirgin sama mai Й—auke da muhimman kayayyakin kiwon lafiya zuwa Жҷasar Sudan. wani jirgi Й—auke da kayayyakin jinya da tiyatar gaggawa da muhimman magunguna sun isa filin jirgin saman port Sudan da safiyar yau. kayan waЙ—anda darajar su ta kai dalar Amurka 444 000, shine na farko da hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) ta iya kaiwa ta jirgin sama zuwa Sudan tun bayan Й“arkewar rikicin. Hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) ta rarraba kayayyakin kowon lafiya kafin Жҷaruwar rikicin.

translations.source: These were exhausted after a few days given the number of injured. The dispatch of the aircraft comes as part of the UAE's continuous relief efforts in support of the Sudanese people and reflects its deep relations with Sudan, particularly in light of the current situation the country is facing. The relief is also an extension of the UAEвҖҷs humanitarian vision and underscores its relations with other countries based on human fraternity and its commitment to assisting others during crises and emergency situations. Dr Reem bint Ebrahim Al Hashimy, Minister of State for International Cooperation, said that the UAE "continues to work closely alongside the World Health Organization to ensure the successful deployment of the critical logistics operations to send urgent medical and food aid to help address the current crisis in Sudan. In parallel with calls for all sides of the current conflict to immediately cease hostilities and de-escalate a situation that is causing untold suffering for the Sudanese people, the UAE is steadfast in its commitment to providing aid and assistance to countries in times of need.

Har ila yau faЙ—aЙ—a ayyukan jinЖҷai na haЙ—aЙ—diyar daular larabawa tare da jadadda alaЖҷar ta da sauran Жҷasashe dangane da Жҙan uwantaka da jajircewarta na taimakon wasu a lokutan rikici da halin gaggawa. Жҳaramar ministar haЙ—in gwiwar Жҷasa da Жҷasa Dakta Reem bint Ebrahim Al Hashimy tace haЙ—aЙ—diyar daular larabawa (UAE) na cigaba da yin aiki kafaЙ—a da kafaЙ—a da hukumar lafiya ta duniya domin tabbatar da nasarar tura muhimman ayyuka da dabarun ayyukan agajin gaggawa da magunguna da abinci don taimakawa wajen magance halin da ake ciki a yanzu na rikicin Sudan. translations.source: The UAE is particularly focused on providing for the most vulnerable groups affected by the situation in Sudan, especially the sick, children, the elderly, and women who are most at risk from the ongoing concerning conflict вҖ“ and these relief flights will directly address the most pressing gaps in medical and food provision. The UAE's deeply held humanitarian values have meant that it has ensured it has continued to communicate to the world its robust and unrelenting dedication to strengthening peace, security and stability, not just regionally, but also worldwide, whilst alongside its partners and the international community, the country continues to assist the Sudanese people in times of crisis.вҖқ The health supplies include enough trauma, emergency surgical supplies, and essential medicines to immediately reach 165 000 people who are in desperate need of humanitarian aid. Health facilities across the country report they have run out of basic health supplies and that national medical stores are no longer accessible due to the security situation. Among other support, WHO is deploying two emergency logisticians travelling with the cargo to ensure that these supplies are immediately distributed to 13 major health facilities to support healthcare workers and extend care to those in need.
translations.reference: Hadaddiyar Daular Larabawa ta mayar da hankali ne musamman wajen samar wa kungiyoyin da suka fi fama da matsalar halin da ake ciki a Sudan, musamman ma marasa lafiya, da yara, da tsoffi, da mata wadanda suka fi fuskantar hadarin daga rikice-rikicen da ke ci gaba da faruwa. mafi matsananciyar gibi a cikin samar da magunguna da abinci. Жҳididdigar jin Жҷai na Hadaddiyar Daular Larabawa tana nufin cewa ta tabbatar da cewa ta ci gaba da isar da saЖҷo ga duniya ЖҷaЖҷЖҷarfan sadaukarwarta ga Жҷarfafa zaman lafiya, tsaro da kwanciyar hankali, ba kawai a wani yanki ba, har ma a duk faЙ—in duniya, tare da abokan hulЙ—arta da al'ummomin duniya. kasar na ci gaba da taimakawa al'ummar Sudan a lokutan rikici. Kayayyakin kiwon lafiyar sun haЙ—a da isassun raunuka, kayan aikin tiyata na gaggawa, da magunguna masu mahimmanci don kai ga mutane 165,000 da ke cikin matsananciyar buЖҷatar agajin jin kai. Cibiyoyin kiwon lafiya a faЙ—in Жҷasar sun ba da rahoton cewa, kayayyakin kiwon lafiya na yau da kullum sun Жҷare kuma basa samun damar shiga shaguna saida magunguna a Жҷasar. Daga cikin tallafin hukumar lafiya ta duniya(WHO) ta tura Жҷwararrun likitocin gaggawa guda biyu da ke tafiya tare da tabbatar da cewa an rarraba waЙ—annan kayayyaki nan take zuwa manyan cibiyoyin kiwon lafiya goma sha uku don tallafawa wa maвҖҷaikatan kiwon lafiya da kuma bada kulawa ga masu buЖҷatar agaji.

ЩӮЩҠЩ… Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҶШіШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…ЩҠЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ Щ„ШҜЩү UAEШҢ ЩӮШҜ Ш¬Ш№Щ„ШӘ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш¶ШұЩҲШұЩҠ ШЈЩҶ ШӘЩҲШ§ШөЩ„ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… Ш§Щ„ШӘШІШ§Щ…ЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҲЩҠ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩ…Шұ Щ„ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„Ш§Щ… ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЈЩ…ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘЩӮШұШ§ШұШҢ Щ„ЩҠШі ЩҒЩӮШ· Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„ШҘЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ…ЩҠШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҠШ¶ЩӢШ§ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҢ ШЁЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ ШӘЩҲШ§ШөЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„Ш§ШҜ Щ…ШіШ§Ш№ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШҙШ№ШЁ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҲШҜШ§ЩҶЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ ШЈЩҲЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШІЩ…Ш§ШӘШҢ Ш¬ЩҶШЁЩӢШ§ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш¬ЩҶШЁ Щ…Ш№ ШҙШұЩғШ§ШҰЩҮШ§ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠ.

Щ…ШіШӘЩ„ШІЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© ШӘШҙЩ…Щ„ ЩғЩ…ЩҠШ© ЩғШ§ЩҒЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩ…ШҜШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·ШЁЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ШұШҰШ©ШҢ ЩҲЩҲШіШ§ШҰЩ„ Ш¬ШұШ§ШӯШ© Ш№Ш§Ш¬Щ„Ш©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ°Щ„Щғ Щ„ШӘЩӮШҜЩҠЩ…ЩҮШ§ ШҘЩ„Щү 165,000 ШҙШ®Шө Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ЩҠШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ЩҲЩҶ ШЁШҙШҜШ© ШҘЩ„Щү Щ…ШіШ§Ш№ШҜШ© ШҘЩҶШіШ§ЩҶЩҠШ©. Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШҙЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ШЈЩҶШӯШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„Ш§ШҜ ШЈШЁЩ„ШәШӘ ШЁШЈЩҶЩҮЩ… ЩҶЩҒШҜЩҲШ§ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩ…ШҜШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩҲШҜШ№Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·ШЁЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ·ЩҶЩҠШ© Щ„Щ… ШӘШ№ШҜ Щ…ШӘШ§ШӯШ© ШЁШіШЁШЁ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ЩҶЩҠ. ЩҲЩ…ЩҶ ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ№Щ… Ш§Щ„ШўШ®ШұШҢ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© (WHO) ШӘЩӮЩҲЩ… ШЁШӘЩҲШІЩҠШ№ Ш§Ш«ЩҶЩҠЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®ШЁШұШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш®ШҜЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¬ШіШӘЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш§ШұШҰШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ШіЩҠШұШ§ЩҒЩӮЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ¶Ш§ШҰШ№ШҢ ЩҲШ°Щ„Щғ Щ„Ш¶Щ…Ш§ЩҶ ШӘЩҲШІЩҠШ№ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩ…ШҜШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҲШұ ШҘЩ„Щү 13 Щ…ШіШӘШҙЩҒЩү ШөШӯЩҠ ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШҢ ЩҲШ°Щ„Щғ Щ„ШҜШ№Щ… Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© ЩҲШӘЩҲЩҒЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ЩҠЩҶ.

translations.source: WHO has another 30 metric tons of supplies for malaria and noncommunicable diseases like diabetes and hypertension, conditions that can become deadly if left untreated. These and about 23 000 blood bags are being readied within the WHO global logistics hub in the International Humanitarian City, and WHO is currently exploring all possibilities for delivering these supplies to Sudan as quickly as possible in collaboration with the Sudanese Ministry of Health. Dr Michael Ryan, Executive Director, of the WHO Health Emergencies Programme, said, вҖңThe WHO Global Logistics Hub in the UAE has become a centerpiece of rapid supply response to acute events globally. Supporting over 140 countries across all 6 WHO geographic regions, the hub provides a lifeline to Member States experiencing health emergencies arising from outbreaks of diseases, disasters such as floods and earthquakes, and the impact of conflict on health systems. The support provided by the UAE enables WHO to be at the forefront of these health emergency responses вҖ“ delivering specialist medical aid to those in need wherever and whenever it is needed.
translations.reference: Hukumar lafiya ta duniya(WHO) tana da tan talatin na kayan agaji na zazzaЙ“in cizon sauro da cututtuka marasa yaЙ—uwa kamar ciwon suga hawan jini da kuma yanayin da ka iya haifar da asarar rai matuЖҷar baвҖҷa Й—auki mataki ba. An gama shirya waЙ—annan haЙ—e da wajen ledar jini 23,000 a kamfanin jigila na duniya na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya a International Humanitarian City, sannan Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya tana ta neman hanyoyin da za ta kai waЙ—annan kaya zuwa Sudan da gaggawa, tare da haЙ—in guiwar Ma'aikatar Lafiya ta Sudan. Babban daraktan shirin agajin gaggawa ta hukumar lafiya ta duniya Dakta Micheal Ryan yace shirin agajin gaggawa na kamafani na jigila na duniya na hukumar lafiya ta duniya da haЙ—aЙ—Й—iyar daular larabawa ta zama cibiyar samar da taimakon gaggawa a faЙ—in duniya. Taimakawa wa Жҷasashe sama da Й—ari da arbaвҖҷin na a yankuna shida na hukumar lafiya ta duniya kamfanin na samar da hanyar rayuwa ga mambobin jihohin da ke fuskantar matsalolin kiwon lafiya da suka taso sanadiyyar Й“arkewar cututtuka balaвҖҷoвҖҷi kamar ambaliyar ruwa girgizar Жҷasa da kuma tasirin rikicin akan tsarin kiwon lafiya. Tallafin da haЙ—aЙ—diyar daular larabawa ke bayarwa ya baiwa hukumar lafiya ta duniya(WHO) kasancewa a sahun gaba a matakin gaggawa na kiwon lafiya da kuma isar da Жҷwararrun likitoci ga masu buЖҷata a koвҖҷina a kuma duk lokacin da ake buЖҷata.

translations.source: As part of efforts to strengthen the global architecture for health emergency preparedness, response, and resilience the UAE, WHO, and partners are working hand-in-hand to deliver supplies to reach the worldвҖҷs most vulnerable in their time of greatest need.вҖқ For his part, Dr Ahmed Al-Mandhari, WHO Regional Director for the Eastern Mediterranean, said, вҖңThe World Health Organization continues to coordinate with the Sudanese health authorities to deliver essential health supplies through all available pathways. Due to the conflict, hospitals, pharmacies and primary health care facilities have stocked out of essential, life-saving medicines. The arrival of an additional 30 metric tons of trauma and emergency surgery supplies as well as essential medicines will enable WHO to support 13 major health facilities and re-establish health care services for those in need. Our global logistics hub in Dubai plays a vital role in ensuring an uninterrupted supply of health commodities and we are grateful for the support provided by the United Arab Emirates to facilitate our first charter flight of these desperately needed supplies.
translations.reference: A ЖҷoЖҷarinta na gana ЖҷaЖҷЖҷarfan tsarin agajin gaggawa a faЙ—in duniya kulawa da kuma jajircewa haЙ—aЙ—diyar daular larabawa (UAE) da kuma hukumar lafiya ta duniya(WHO) da abokan haЙ—in gwiwar suna aiki don isar da kayayyakin don isa ga mutane masu rauni a duniya a lokacin da suke kan buЖҷata A nasa Й“angaren Daktan hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) na yankin gabashin bahar rum Dakta Ahmed Al-Mandhari yace hukumar lafiya na cigaba da haЙ—a kai da hukumomin kiwon lafiya na Sudan domin isar da muhimman kayayyakin kiwon lafiya daga dukkan hanyoyin da ake da su. Sakamakon rikicin asibitoci kantinan magani da cibiyoyin kula da lafiya a matakin farko sun tanadi muhimman maguguna don ceton rai. Zuwan Жҷarin tan talatin na kayyakin agaji da tiyatar gaggawa da kuma muhimman magunguna zasu ba hukumar lafiya ta duniya damar tallafawa hukumomin lafiya goma sha uku da sake kafa ayyukan kula da lafiyar masu buЖҷatar hakan. Kamfanin mu na jigila na duniya a Dubai yana taka muhimmiyar rawa wurin tabbatar kayayyakin kiwon lafiya ba tare da katsewa ba kuma muna godiya da tallafin da haЙ—aЙ—diyar daular larabawa ta bamu don sauЖҷaЖҷe mana na farko.

translations.source: It is support such as this that shows in action our Regional vision of health for all, by all.вҖқ The medical aid provided by the World Health Organization through the UAE accounted for approximately 55% of the total medical supplies provided to Sudan from abroad in 2022, reflecting the UAE's position as a major hub for international humanitarian assistance.
translations.reference: Irin wannan taimakon kamar wannan shi ne yake nuna ЖҷoЖҷari a aikacenmu na yanki na samar da lafiya ba kowa. Tallafin lafiya da hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO) ta bayar ta hannun haЙ—aЙ—Й—iyar fdaular larabawa ya kai kusan kashi hamsin da biyar na jimilla kayayyakin jinya da aka baiwa Sudan daga Жҷetare a shekarar 2022 wanda ke nuni da matsayin haЙ—aЙ—Й—iyar daular larabawa a matsayin babbar cibiyar taimakon jinЖҷai ta Жҷasa da Жҷasa.
translations.hypothesis: ЩҮШ°Ш§ ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§Ш№ШҜШ©, ШіЩҲЩҠya, ЩҠЩҲШ¶Шӯ Щ„ЩҶШ§ ШұШӨЩҠШӘЩҶШ§ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ…ЩҠШ© Щ„ШӘЩӮШҜЩҠЩ… Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Щ„Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№, Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШЁЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№. Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§Ш№ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·ШЁЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩӮШҜЩ…ШӘЩҮШ§ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШҘЩ…Ш§ШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұШЁЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШӯШҜШ©, ШӘЩ…Ш«Щ„ ШӯЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҠ 55% Щ…ЩҶ ШҘШ¬Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§Ш№ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·ШЁЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩ… ШӘЩҲЩҒЩҠШұЩҮШ§ Щ„ШөШӯШұШ§ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҲШҜШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§ШұШ¬ ЩҒЩҠ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2022, ЩҲЩҮШ°Ш§ ЩҠШёЩҮШұ Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҶШ© ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШҘЩ…Ш§ШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұШЁЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШӯШҜШ© ЩғЩ…ШұЩғШІ ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠ Щ„Щ„Щ…ШіШ§Ш№ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҶШіШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠШ©.

translations.source: Collaborating locally is key for progress globally towards health-related SDGs A new progress report is being jointly released today by the 13 signatory agencies of the Global Action Plan for Healthy Lives and Well-being for All (SDG3 GAP). The report entitled вҖңWhat worked? What didnвҖҷt? WhatвҖҷs next?вҖқ reflects four years of joint work by major multilateral agencies outlining what has and has not worked in strengthening collaboration and support to accelerate country progress towards health-related Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). This year marks the halfway point toward the SDGs, but the world is lagging behind to reach the global goals. Since its launch in 2019, the SDG3 GAP enabled creation of new collaboration structures between the signatory agencies in key areas such as sustainable financing and primary health care among others.
translations.reference: HaЙ—in kai a cikin gida shine mabuЙ—in don ci gaba a duniya game da kiwon lafiya na muradan Жҷarni SDGs Hukumomin 13 da suka sanya hannu kan Tsarin Ayyukan Duniya don Rayuwar Lafiya da Jin Dadin Kowa (SDG3 GAP) ne ke fitar da wani sabon rahoton ci gaba tare a haЙ—in gwiwa a yau. Rahoton mai taken me ya faru? mene bai yi ba? menen na gaba yana nuna shekaru huЙ—u na ayyukan haЙ—in gwiwa da manyan hukumomin Жҷungiyoyi suka yi tare da bayyana abinda yayi aiki da wanda bai yi aiki ba domin Жҷarfafa haЙ—in gwiwa da tallafi domin cigaban Жҷasa a Й“angaren harkokin lafiya da kuma cigaban muradan Жҷarni. A wannan shekarar ce aka kai rabin cimma cigaban muradan Жҷarni amma kuma duniya tana baya wurin cimma muradan Жҷarnin. Tun lokacin da aka Жҷaddamar da shi a cikin 2019, SDG3 GAP ya ba da damar ЖҷirЖҷirar sabbin tsarin haЙ—in gwiwa tsakanin hukumomin da suka sanya hannu a cikin mahimman fannoni kamar dorewar kuЙ—i da kula da lafiya na farko da sauransu.

translations.source: At least 67 countries engaged in on one or more of the SDG3 GAP accelerator themes. "We have made important progress, but we still have a long path to travel to improve the way that multilateral organizations work together to support countries. We must listen to what countries tell us and act upon their guidance,вҖқ said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General and Chair of the SDG3 GAP Principals Group. вҖңI thank the partners for their collaboration and for the honest self-assessments contained in this report. "The report provides six key recommendations to ensure that countries benefit from a more streamlined support and to realize the commitments made in the SDG3 GAP.
translations.reference: Mafi Жҷaranci Жҷasashe 67 ne suka shiga Й—aya ko fiye da Й—aya daga cikin shirye-shiryen ingantata fasali na SDG3 GAP. Mun samu cigaba mai muhimmanci amma akwai amma har yanzu akwai doguwar tafiya domin inganta yadda Жҷungiyoyi daban daban ke aiki tare domin tallafa wa Жҷasashe. Dole ne mu saurari abinda Жҷasashe ke gaya mana kuma muyi aiki bisa jagorancin su inji Dakta Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus darakta janar na hukumar lafiya ta duniya WHO kuma shugaban Жҷungiyar shugabannin SDG3 GAP. Ina godiya ga abokan hulЙ—a bisa hadin kaida suka yi da kuma yadda suka nuna gaskiya cikin wannan rahoto. Rahoton ya bada shawarwari guda shida masu muhimmanci don tabbaatar da cewa Жҷasashe sun ci gajiyar tallafin da ya dace da kuma tabbatar da alЖҷawuran da aka yi a SDG3 GAP.

translations.source: These include: continue the SDG3 GAP improvement cycle for health by seeking the views of Member States on how we collaborate at country-level and responding to related recommendations; maintain GAP as a platform for collaboration; foster stronger collaboration at the country level on primary health care and explore new thematic topics such as climate resilient health systems; jointly apply new approaches at country level such as the delivery for impact approach;
translations.reference: Sun haЙ—a da: Cigaba da inganta cigaban muradan Жҷarni SDG3 GAP na lafiya ta hanyar neman raвҖҷayoyin mambobin Жҷasashe kan yadda muke haЙ—a kai a matakin Жҷasa da kuma amsa shawarwarin da suka danganci; Kula da GAP a matsayin dandamali da haЙ—in gwiwa; HaЙ“aka haЙ—in gwiwa mai Жҷarfi a matakin Жҷasa kan kula da hukumar kiwon lafiya a matakin farko da kuma bincika sabbin batutuwa kamar tsarin kiwon lafiya mai jure yanayi Tare da yin amfani da sabbin hanyoyin a matakin Жҷasa domin isar da tsari mai tasiri;

translations.source: engage more with civil society; and work with Member States to strengthen incentives for collaboration through political leadership, governance direction and funding to support collaboration. Key findings of the report will feed into discussions of the next United Nations General Assembly SDG Summit and the High-level Meeting on Universal Health Coverage in September 2023. The months leading up to these key events provide an opportunity for a joint push by Member States and multilateral agencies to identify ways on how to implement the recommendations and to prepare the ground to fully leverage stronger collaboration and accelerate progress towards the health-related SDGs in the second half of the SDG timeframe. translations.reference: Asusun Yara na Majalisar Dinkin Duniya (UNICEF); Unitaid; Aiki tare da mambobin Жҷasashe don Жҷarfafa gwiwa ta hanyar jagoranci a siyasance da kuma jagoranci na shugabanci da kudi domin tallafawa da haЙ—in gwiwa. Mihimman binciken da aka samu na rahoton da aka samu na rahoton zai bada labari game da tattaunawar babban taron majalisar dinkin duniya na cigaban muradan Жҷarni SDG da kuma taron duniya na akan kiwon lafiya a watan Satumbar 2023. Watanni kafin waЙ—annan muhimman abubuwan da suka faru sun bada dama ga haЙ—in gwiwar Жҷasashe membobi da hukumomi da Жҷungiyoyi daban daban don gano hanyoyin da zaвҖҷa aiwatar da shawarwarin da shiryawa don yin Жҷarfaffan haЙ—in gwiwa tare da haЙ“aka cigaba ga cigaban muradan Жҷarni masu alaЖҷa da kiwon lafiya na rabin lokacin da SDG ta dauka. Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙЩҮШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШіШЁЩӮ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯШҜШ§Ш« Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© ШӘЩҲЩҒШұ ЩҒШұШөШ© Щ„Ш¬ЩҮШҜ Щ…ШҙШӘШұЩғ Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШЁЩ„ ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Ш¶Ш§ШЎ ЩҲЩҲЩғШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Щ…ШӘШ№ШҜШҜШ© Щ„ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ Ш·ШұЩӮ Щ„ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ° Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲШөЩҠШ§ШӘШҢ ЩҲШҘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§Ші Щ„Щ„Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ЩғШ§Щ…Щ„Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№Ш§ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҲЩҠ ЩҲШӘШіШұЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШҜЩ… ЩҶШӯЩҲ ШЈЩҮШҜШ§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ№Щ„ЩӮШ© ШЁШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШөЩҒ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠ Щ…ЩҶ ШҘШ·Ш§Шұ ШІЩ…ЩҶЩҠ Щ„ШЈЩҮШҜШ§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ…Ш©. translations.source: The SDG3 GAP describes how the 13 signatory agencies will adopt new ways of working, building on existing successful collaborations, and jointly align their support around national plans and strategies that are country-owned and -led. The signatories to the SDG3 GAP are Gavi, the Vaccine Alliance; Global Financing Facility for Women, Children and Adolescents (GFF); Global Fund to Fight AIDS, Tuberculosis and Malaria (Global Fund); International Labour Organization (ILO);
translations.reference: SDG GAP ya bayyana yadda hukumomi goma sha da suka sahannu zasu yi amfani da sabbin hanyoyin aiki, tare. Masu rattaba hannu ga ciga cigaban muradan Жҷarni SDG3 GAP sune Gavi, da kuma Жҷungiyar allurar rigakafi Kayan Tallafi na Duniya don Mata, Yara da Matasa (GFF); Asusun duniya don yaЖҷi da cutar AIDS,tarin fuka da zazzaЙ“in cizon sauro(Asusun duniya) Жҳungiyar Жҷwadago ta duniya (ILO);
translations.hypothesis: SDG3 GAP, yana bayyana yadda 13 Жҷungiyar da ke shiga, za su yi amfani da hanyoyin shiga Й“are, kuma za su yi amfani da ayyuka da suka shiga, kuma za su yi aiki tare don inganta go bayan su, wanda ya kasance da karkuta kuma ya Жҷayyashi. Masu shiga cikin SDG3 GAP sun haЙ—a da: Gavi, Жҷungiyar da ke tallafawa, Global Financing Facility for Women, Children and Adolescents (GFF); Global Fund don lalata AIDS, Tuberculosis da Malaria (Global Fund); International Labour Organization (ILO);

translations.source: Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS (UNAIDS); United Nations Development Programme (UNDP); United Nations Population Fund (UNFPA); United Nations ChildrenвҖҷs Fund (UNICEF); Unitaid; United Nations Entity for Gender Equality and the Empowerment of Women (UN Women);
translations.reference: Shirin haЙ—in gwiwa na majalisar Й—inkin duniya kan HIV/AIDS (UNAIDS); Shirin cigaban majalisar Й—inkin duniya (UNDP) Asusun majalisar Й—inkin duniya na yawan jamaвҖҷa (UNFPA); Asusun Yara na Majalisar Dinkin Duniya (UNICEF); Unitaid; Жҳungiyar majalisar Й—inkin duniya don daidaita jinsi da Жҷarfafa mata (matan majalisar Й—inkin duniya)
translations.hypothesis: ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШӯШҜШ© Щ„ЩҖ HIV/AIDS (UNAIDS); ШЁШұШ§Щ…Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩ…ЩҠШ© Щ„ЩҖ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…Щ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШӯШҜШ© (UNDP); ШөЩҶШҜЩҲЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШіЩғШ§ЩҶ Щ„ЩҖ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…Щ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШӯШҜШ© (UNFPA); ШөЩҶШҜЩҲЩӮ ШЈШ·ЩҒШ§Щ„ Щ„ЩҖ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…Щ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШӯШҜШ© (UNICEF); Unitaid; ЩҮЩҠШҰШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…Щ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШӯШҜШ© Щ„ЩҖ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§ЩҲШ§Ш© ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШіЩҠЩҶ ЩҲШӘЩ…ЩғЩҠЩҶ ЩҶШіШ§ШЎ (UN Women);
