translations.source: mRNA Technology Transfer Programme moves to the next phase of its development Inauguration of the mRNA technology Hub facility at Afrigen, South Africa. Partners gather in Cape Town to discuss the next phase of the mRNA vaccine development and knowledge sharing. Over 200 international participants working with the mRNA Technology Transfer Programme met in Cape Town this week for their first face-to-face meeting. Joined by World Health Organization (WHO) Director General, Dr. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus and Dr. Joe Phaahla, Minister of Health and Minister of Trade and Industry, Mr. Ebrahim Patel of South Africa together with high-level officials from funding countries, this unique meeting reviewed the progress since WHO and Medicines Patent Pool (MPP) launched it in June 2021.
translations.reference: Shirin Kamfanin Musayar Fasaha ta mRNA ya shiga mataki na biyu a cigaban da yake samu. za a Жҷaddamar da Kamfanin Fasaha na mRNA a Afrigen, a Afrika ta Kudu. abokan haЙ—in guiwar za su haЙ—u ne a garin Cape Town domin tattauna mataki na gaba na cigaba da musayar ilimi game da rigakafin mRNA. sama da mutane 200 masu ba da gudumuwa daga faЙ—in duniya da ke aiki da Kamfanin Musayar Fasaha ta mRNA ne za su haЙ—u a wannan sati a Cape Town domin ganawa kai tsaye da juna. darakta-janar na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO), Dr. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus da Ministan Lafiya, Dr. Joe Phaahla, da Ministan Kasuwanci da Masana'antu, Mr. Ebrahim Patel na Afirka ta Kudu tare da manyan jami'ai daga Жҷasashen da ke ba da tallafi; duk sun haЙ—u a wurin taron domin sake duba irin cigaban da aka samu tun bayan da Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya da Kanfanin HaЙ—a Magungunan suka Жҷaddamar da ita a 2021.
translations.hypothesis: "ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩӮЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩғЩҶЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҠ Щ„ЩҖ mRNA ЩҠШӘЩӮШҜЩ… ШҘЩ„Щү Щ…ШұШӯЩ„Ш© ШӘШ§Щ„ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ЩҲШұ. Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҒШӘШӘШ§Шӯ Щ„Щ…ШЁЩҶЩү Щ…ШұЩғШІ ШӘЩғЩҶЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҠШ§ mRNA ЩҒЩҠ ШҙШұЩғШ© Afrigen, Ш¬ЩҶЩҲШЁ ШҘЩҒШұЩҠЩӮЩҠШ§. Ш§Щ„ШҙШұЩғШ§ШЎ ЩҠШ¬Щ…Щ‘Ш№ЩҲШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ЩғЩҠШЁ ШӘШ§ЩҲЩҶ Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§ЩӮШҙШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШӯЩ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§Щ„ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШӘШ·ЩҲЩҠШұ Щ„ЩӮШ§Шӯ mRNA ЩҲШӘШЁШ§ШҜЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒШ©. Щ…Ш§ ЩҠШІЩҠШҜ Ш№ЩҶ 200 Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠЩҠЩҶШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ЩҠШ№Щ…Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Щ…Ш№ ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩӮЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩғЩҶЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҠ Щ„ЩҖ mRNAШҢ Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№ЩҲШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ЩғЩҠШЁ ШӘШ§ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШЁЩҲШ№ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§Ш¶ЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Щ„ЩӮШ§ШҰЩҮЩ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„ ЩҲШ¬ЩҮЩӢШ§ Щ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҮ. Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШӘЩҠШҜШұЩҲШі ШЈШҜШ§ЩҶЩҲЩ… ШәЩҠШЁШұЩҠШіЩҲШіШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ… Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© (WHO)ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ Ш¬ЩҲ ЩҒШ§ЩҮЩ„Ш§ШҢ ЩҲШІЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© ЩҲЩҲШІЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ¬Ш§ШұШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШөЩҶШ§Ш№Ш©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠШҜ ШҘШЁШұШ§ЩҮЩ… ШЁШ§ШӘЩҠЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ Ш¬ЩҶЩҲШЁ ШҘЩҒШұЩҠЩӮЩҠШ§ШҢ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү Щ…ШіШӨЩҲЩ„ЩҠЩҶ Ш°ЩҲЩҠ Щ…ШұШӘШЁШ© Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ…ЩҲЩ„ШҢ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұЩҠШҜ ЩӮШҜ Щ…ШұШ§Ш¬Ш№Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШҜЩ… Щ…ЩҶШ° ШЈЩҶ ШӘЩ… ШҘШ·Щ„Ш§ЩӮЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШЁЩ„ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© (WHO) ЩҲЩ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© ШЁШұШ§ШЎШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш®ШӘШұШ§Ш№ Щ„Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© (MPP) ЩҒЩҠ ЩҠЩҲЩҶЩҠЩҲ 2021.

translations.source: вҖңI am delighted to be here in Cape Town with our partners to support a sustainable model for mRNA technology transfer to give low- and middle-income countries equitable access to vaccines and other lifesaving health products,вҖқ said WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. вҖңI am immensely proud of the achievement of all those involved in this project; in less than two years we have shown that when we work collaboratively, we succeed collectively.вҖқ The meeting participants include biomanufacturing partners from 15 countries in the Programme, leading experts, industry, civil society representatives, and funders. During the five-day meeting, participants will share progress and discuss critical enablers for the sustainability of the Programme such as intellectual property issues and regulatory aspects, as well as the science of mRNA technologies and key applications relevant to LMICs in other disease areas such as HIV and tuberculosis. The COVID-19 pandemic has underscored that gross inequity exists in access to health products, especially vaccines.
translations.reference: Na yi farin cikin kasancewa a nan Cape Town tare da abokan haЙ—in guiwa na samar da shiri mai Й—orewa na Kamfanin Musayar Fasaha ta mRNA domin tallafawa Жҷasashe masu Жҷaramin Жҷarfi wajen samun rigafi da sauran magunguna inganta lafiya kamar kowa; a cewar darakta-janar na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Ina alfahari da duk waЙ—anda suka ba da gudunmuwa a wannan aiki wajen samun nasara cikin abin da bai wuce shekara biyu ba wanda hakan ke tabbatar da cewa idan aka yi aiki bakiЙ—aya, za mu samu nasara tare. taron ya haЙ—a da masu haЙ—in guiwa daga kamfanin kimiyya daga Жҷasashe 15 da ke cikin shirin, da Жҷwararru da masana'antu da wakilan al'umma da masu zuba hannun jari. Ana sa ran a yayin wannan taro na kwanaki biyar, mahalarta taron za su yi musayar hanyoyin samar da cigaba Й—orawar shirin kamar batu na haЖҷЖҷin mallaka da dokokin gudanarwa da fasahar mRNA da muhimman hanyoyin LMICs da suka shafi wasu cututtuka kamar cuta mai karya garkuwar jiki da kuma tarin fuka. Annobar Kwabid-19 ta yi matuЖҷar fallasa mummunan rashin daidaito na neman lafiya, musamman game da rigakafi.
translations.hypothesis: "Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҺЩ‘ЩҮ ЩҠШЁШ§ШұЩғШҢ ШЈЩҶШ§ Щ…Щ…ШӘЩҶ Щ„ЩғЩҲЩҶЩҠ ЩҮЩҶШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ЩғЩҠШЁ ШӘШ§ЩҲЩҶ Щ…Ш№ ШҙШұЩғШ§ШЎ, Щ„ШӘЩӮШҜЩҠЩ… ШҜШ№Щ… Щ„ЩҶЩ…ЩҲШ°Ш¬ Щ…ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ… Щ„ЩҶЩӮЩ„ ШӘЩғЩҶЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҠШ§ mRNA, ЩҲШ°Щ„Щғ Щ„Ш¶Щ…Ш§ЩҶ ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш°ЩҲШ§ШӘ ШҜШ®Щ„ Щ…ЩҶШ®ЩҒШ¶ ЩҲ Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ· Ш№Щ„Щү Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ ЩҲЩ…ЩҶШӘШ¬Ш§ШӘ ШөШӯЩҠШ© ШӯЩҠЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ШұЩү," ЩӮШ§Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ… Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШӘЩҠШҜШұЩҲШі ШЈШҜШ§ЩҶЩҲЩ… ШәЩҠШЁШұЩҠШіЩҲШі. "ШЈЩҶШ§ ЩҒШ®ЩҲШұ Ш¬ШҜЩӢШ§ ШЁШҘЩҶШ¬Ш§ШІШ§ШӘ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Щ…ЩҶ ШҙШ§ШұЩғЩҲШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШұЩҲШ№Шӣ ЩҒЩҠ ШЈЩӮЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ Ш№Ш§Щ…ЩҠЩҶШҢ Щ„ЩӮШҜ ШЈШёЩҮШұЩҶШ§ ШЈЩҶ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§ ЩҶШ№Щ…Щ„ Щ…Ш№ЩӢШ§ШҢ ЩҒШҘЩҶЩҶШ§ ЩҶШӯЩӮЩӮ ЩҶШ¬Ш§Шӯ Ш¬Щ…Ш§Ш№ЩҠ." Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғЩҠЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ ЩҠШҙЩ…Щ„ЩҲЩҶ ШҙШұЩғШ§ШЎ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШөЩҶЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҠЩҲЩҠ Щ…ЩҶ 15 ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш©, Ш®ШЁШұШ§ШЎ ШұШ§ШҰШҜЩҠЩҶ, Щ…Щ…Ш«Щ„ЩҠЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ·Ш§Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§Шө, Щ…Щ…Ш«Щ„ЩҠЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҶЩҠ, ЩҲЩ…Щ…ЩҲЩ„ЩҠЩҶ. Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠЩ…ШӘШҜ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш®Щ…ШіШ© ШЈЩҠШ§Щ…, Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғЩҠЩҶ ШіЩҠШӘШҙШ§ШұЩғЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШҜЩ… ЩҲ ЩҠЩҶШ§ЩӮШҙЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҲШ§Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ШіЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШҜШ№Щ… Ш§ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬, Щ…Ш«Щ„ ЩӮШ¶Ш§ЩҠШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„ЩғЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩғШұЩҠШ© ЩҲ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҲШ§ЩҶШЁ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶШёЩҠЩ…ЩҠШ©, ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Щ… ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ№Щ„ЩӮШ© ШЁШӘЩӮЩҶЩҠШ© mRNA ЩҲ ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ ШЈШ®ШұЩү Щ…Ш«Щ„ ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі ЩҶЩӮШө Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш№Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЁШҙШұЩҠШ© ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„. Ш¬Ш§ШҰШӯШ© ЩғЩҲЩҒЩҠШҜ-19 ЩӮШҜ ШЈЩғШҜШӘ ШЈЩҶ ЩҮЩҶШ§Щғ Ш№ШҜЩ… Щ…ШіШ§ЩҲШ§Ш© ЩғШЁЩҠШұ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШӘШ¬Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©, ЩҲШ®Ш§ШөШ© Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ.

translations.source: As of March 2023, more than three years after WHO declared COVID-19 a Public Health Emergency of International Concern (PHEIC), 69.7% of the global population had received at least one dose of a COVID-19 vaccine. Notably, this proportion still remains below 30% in low-income countries (LICs) . This Programme aims to contribute to equitable access to mRNA vaccines by increasing the distribution of sustainable manufacturing capacity across LMICs, enhancing regional and inter-regional collaborations, and developing and empowering a local workforce through tailored and inclusive training and expert support. What is unique in the mRNA Technology Transfer model is the multilateral process that allows sharing of technologies to multiple recipients so that through local and regional production those in need can be reached rapidly. Dr Phaahla, Minister of Health South Africa, said: вҖңWhat we see here today, is a moment in history, a Programme that is aimed at empowering LMICs through a global collaborative network.
translations.reference: Tun bayan ayyana Kwabid-19 a matsayin lamarin da ya shafi lafiya da ke buЖҷata kulawar gaggawa a duniya a watan Maris Й—in 2023, kawo 69.7 cikin Й—ari na al'umma ne a faЙ—in duniya suka kai ga samun aЖҷalla Жҷunshi Й—aya na rigakafin Kwabid-19. Abin lura shi ne kaso 30% na wancan adadi sun fito ne daga Жҷasashe masu Жҷaramin Жҷarfi (LICs). Manufar wannan shiri shi ne ba da gudunmawa ta baiЙ—aya wajen samun rigakafin nRNA ta hanyar ninЖҷa samar da rigakafin a tsakankanin LMICs da Жҷarfafa haЙ—in guiwa a tsakanin yanki da sauran yankuna da bunЖҷasawa da Жҷarfafa wa masu aiki na Жҷasa ta hanyar ba su horo da tallafi. Abin burgewa game da Tsarin Musayar Fasaha shi ne tsarin sanya kowa cikin samun damar musayar fasaha ga mutane daban-daban wajen iya samar da rigakafin domin isa ga masu buЖҷata cikin sauri. A cewar dakta Phaahla, ministan Lafiya na Afirka ta Kudu; abin da muke gani a yau abu ne na tarihi, shiri ne da manufarsa karfafa wa LMICs da ke faЙ—in Duniya ta hanyar haЙ—in guiwa.
translations.hypothesis: ШӯШ§Щ„ЩҠЩӢШ§, 2023, 3 shehu bayan WHO bayar COVID-19 kamar "Щ…ЩҲЩӮЩҒ Щ„Ш§ЩҮЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠ", 69.7% na jama'a duniyar sun samu karkara na wani vaksin COVID-19. Ba zato ba, wannan shakka yanzu yana Жҷasa da 30% a kasashe masu Жҷasa (LMICs). Wannan shirin yana nufin ka taimakawa don samun vaksin mRNA ta hanyar Жҷarfawa samar da vaksin a duk kasashe, Жҷarfawa zamanaki da zamanaki, da kuma Жҷarfawa masu aiki a cikin gida ta hanyar horo da tallafin da ya dace. Wani abu na musamman a cikin hanyar shafawa na vaksin mRNA shine tsarin multilateral wanda ya sa a iya raba sababbin hanyoyin daidai da masu sha, domin da haka, ta hanyar samar da vaksin a cikin gida da a cikin kasashe, za a iya cim ma masu sha da sauri. Dr Phaahla, Ministan Lishin, South Africa, ya ce: "Wannan wani lokaci a tarihi ne, wanda yana nufin ka Жҷarfawa kasashe masu Жҷasa ta hanyar shirin da ya kasance a duniya.

translations.source: I am thrilled to see the progress made in such a relatively short time and welcome the support from so many different countries - countries like South Africa that have a strong vibrant biomanufacturing capacity and that are willing to work together, learn from and share with each other.вҖқ Minister Blade Nzimande of Higher Education and Science, said: вҖңOurs is the vision of the mRNA Technology Transfer Hub beyond just COVID-19. The capabilities we are building are looking to empower us to deal with other future pandemics whose vaccines could use the same mRNA technology platform. It is a vision that has set its eyes on diseases that are prevalent in our environments such as Malaria, Tuberculosis and HIV and AIDS.вҖқ This occasion also marks an important milestone for the Programme with the inauguration of the mRNA technology Hub facility at Afrigen in Cape Town in the presence of Dr. Tedros and Dr. Matshidiso Moeti WHO Regional Director for Africa, Charles Gore Executive Director of MPP and the Honorable Ministers who took part in a ribbon cutting ceremony at Afrigen.
translations.reference: Na yi matuЖҷar farin cikin ganin cigaban da aka samu a Жҷankanin lokaci tare da yin maraba da tallafi da aka samu daga Жҷasashe da dama kamar Afirka ta Kudu da ke da Kanfanin Kimiyyar Halittu da kuma ЖҷoЖҷarinta na ganin ta koya tare da musayar ilimi a kowa. a cewar ministan Ilimi Mai Zurfi da Kimiyya, Blade Nzimande, mafarkinmu game da Shirin Musayar Fasaha ta mRNA shi ne ta zarce batun Kwabid-19 kaЙ—ai. Muna ЖҷoЖҷarin samar da yanayi ne da zai ba mu dama a nan gaba mu iya fuskantar kowacce annoba ta hanyar samar da rigakafinta daga fasahar mRNA. Wannan hangen nesa ne da aka yi kan cututtukan da suka zama gama-gari ga al'ummarmu kamar maleriya da tarin fuka da cuta mai karya garkuwar jiki (HIV da AIDS). Haka kuma wannan taro ya fito da muhimmancin shirin da aka Жҷaddamar na Fasahar mRNA da aka yi a Afrigen da ke Cape Town a idon Dakta Tedros da Dakta Matshidiso Moeti wanda darakta ne na Yankin Afirka a Majalisar ЖҠinkin Duniya da Charles Gore, babban darkta na MPP da kuma ministoci waЙ—anda suka sa hannu wajen yanka ribon na bikin kaddamarwar.
translations.hypothesis: "ШЈЩҶШ§ Щ…Щ…ШӘЩҶ Щ„ШӘЩӮШҜЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ШӘЩ… ЩҒЩҠ ЩҒШӘШұШ© ЩӮШөЩҠШұШ©ШҢ ЩҲЩҶЩҠШ№ЩҶЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ№Щ… Щ…ЩҶ ШҜЩҲЩ„ ШҙШӘЩү - ШҜЩҲЩ„ ШіЩҲЩҠШіШұШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҮЩҶ ЩӮШҜШұШ© ЩӮЩҲЩҠШ© ЩҲЩҶШ§ШҙШ·Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШөЩҶЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҠЩҲЩҠШҢ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ Щ…ШіШӘШ№ШҜЩҠЩҶ Щ„Щ„ШӘШ№Ш§ЩҲЩҶШҢ ЩҲШӘШ№Щ„Щ… Щ…ЩҶ ШЁШ№Ш¶ЩҮЩ… Ш§Щ„ШЁШ№Ш¶ШҢ ЩҲЩ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒШ© Щ…Ш№ ШЁШ№Ш¶ЩҮЩ… Ш§Щ„ШЁШ№Ш¶."ШҢ ЩӮШ§Щ„ ЩҲШІЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№Щ„ЩҠЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠ ЩҲШ№Щ„ЩҲЩ…ШҢ "Ш§Щ„ШұШӨЩҠШӘЩҶШ§ ЩҮЩҠ Щ…ШұЩғШІ ЩҶЩӮЩ„ ШӘЩғЩҶЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҠШ§ mRNAШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЩҠШі ЩҒЩӮШ· Щ„Щ…ШұШ¶ ЩғЩҲЩҒЩҠШҜ-19. Ш§Щ„ЩӮШҜШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ ЩҶЩҶШҙШҰЩҮШ§ШҢ ШӘЩҮШҜЩҒ ШҘЩ„Щү ШӘЩ…ЩғЩҠЩҶЩҶШ§ Щ„Щ„ШӘШ№Ш§Щ…Щ„ Щ…Ш№ ЩҲШЁШ§ШЎШ§ШӘ Щ…ШіШӘЩӮШЁЩ„ЩҠШ© ШЈШ®ШұЩүШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠ Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘЩҮЩ… ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ШӘШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩҶЩҒШі Щ…ЩҶШөШ© ШӘЩғЩҶЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҠШ§ mRNA. ЩҮШ°ЩҮ ШұШӨЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҶЩҮШҜЩҒ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш№Щ„Ш§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ШҰШ№Ш© ЩҒЩҠ ШЁЩҠШҰШӘЩҶШ§ШҢ Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„Ш§ШұЩҠШ§ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩ„ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҘЩҠШҜШІ."ШҢ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШӯШҜШ« ШЈЩҠШ¶ЩӢШ§ ЩҠЩ…Ш«Щ„ Ш№Щ„Ш§Щ…Ш© ЩҒШ§ШұЩӮШ© Щ…ЩҮЩ…Ш© Щ„ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ШҢ Щ…Ш№ Ш§ЩҒШӘШӘШ§Шӯ Щ…ШұЩҒЩӮ ШӘЩғЩҶЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҠШ§ mRNA ЩҒЩҠ Afrigen ЩҒЩҠ ЩғЩҠШЁ ШӘШ§ЩҲЩҶШҢ ШЁШӯШ¶ЩҲШұ ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ Tedros ЩҲ ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ Matshidiso MoetiШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ…ЩҠ Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ ШЈЩҒШұЩҠЩӮЩҠШ§ШҢ ШӘШҙШ§ШұЩ„ШІ Ш¬ЩҲШұШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ°ЩҠ Щ„ЩҖ MPPШҢ ЩҲЩҲШІШұШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШўШ®ШұЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ШҙШ§ШұЩғЩҲШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ШӯЩҒЩ„ ЩӮШө Ш§Щ„ШҙШұЩҠШ· ЩҒЩҠ Afrigen.

translations.source: Professor Petro Terblanche, Executive Director of Afrigen said: вҖңThe entire Afrigen team are thrilled to reach this important milestone with the completion of the mRNA technology platform. This platform is housed within the end-to-end mRNA vaccine development and production facility where the mRNA Hub Covid 19 vaccine candidate AfriVac 2121 is currently in scale-up phase. Over the last 18 months, Afrigen has undergone an incredible transformation with the support of a network of partners and mentors enabled by this Programme. We have grown our capability and capacity to meet the highest quality standards of mRNA vaccine development, serving the objective to build sustainable capacity in LMICs to produce mRNA vaccinesвҖқ. Afrigen has successfully established a COVID-19 vaccine manufacturing process at a laboratory scale and is currently scaling up that process to a level suitable for manufacturing vaccine batches to be used in Phase I/ II clinical trials to GMP standards.
translations.reference: Babban Darkta na Afrigen, farfesa Petro Terblanche cewa ya yi, Й—aukacin ma'aikatan Afrigen sun yi farin ciki na cimma wannan gagarumin mataki na kammala tsarin shirin Fasahar mRNA. wannan wuri yana Й—auke da kayayyakin samar da rigakafin mRNA na Kwabid-19 samfurin AfriVac 2121 wanda ake matakin dab da kammala haЙ—a shi. Sama da watanni 18 Afrigen ke samun cigaba ta hanyar tallafi daga masu haЙ—in guiwa da mashawarta na wannan shiri. ЖҳoЖҷarinmu na Жҷaruwa domin kai wa ga Жҷolokuwar mataki na inganci na rigakafin mRNA wanda ginshiЖҷi ga LMICs mai Й—orewa wajen samar da rigakafin mRNA. Afrigen ta samu nasarar samar da Й—akin gwajin rigakafin Kwabid-19 kuma a yanzu tare da samar da ingantattun Жҷananan cibiyoyin samar da rigakafin da za a yi amfani da su a mataki na I da na II na gwaji domin kai wa ga ingancin GMP.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„ШЁШұЩҲЩҒЩҠШіЩҲШұ ШЁЩҠШӘШұЩҲ ШӘЩҠШұШЁЩ„Ш§ЩҶШҢ ШіЩғШұШӘЩҠШұ ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ°ЩҠ Щ„ШҙШұЩғШ© Afrigen, ЩӮШ§Щ„: "ЩҒШұЩҠЩӮ Afrigen ШЁШ°ЩҮЩҲЩ„ Щ„Ш§ШӯЩӮЩӢШ§ ШҘЩ„Щү ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҶШ¬Ш§ШІ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҮЩ… Щ…Ш№ ШҘЩғЩ…Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶШөШ© ШӘЩғЩҶЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҠШ§ mRNA. ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШөШ© ШӘЩӮШ№ ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ Щ…ЩҶШҙШЈШ© ШӘШөЩҶЩҠШ№ ЩҲШӘШ·ЩҲЩҠШұ Щ„ЩӮШ§Шӯ mRNAШҢ ШӯЩҠШ« Щ…ШұШҙШӯ Щ„ЩӮШ§Шӯ COVID-19 AfriVac 2121ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠЩӮШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ШұЩғШІ mRNAШҢ ЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮ Щ…ШұШӯЩ„Ш© ШӘЩҲШіЩҠШ№ ЩҶШ·Ш§ЩӮ. Щ…аӨ—аҘҖаӨІ 18 ШҙЩҮШұШҢ ШҙШұЩғШ© Afrigen ЩӮШҜ Ш®Ш¶Ш№ШӘ Щ„ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ ЩғШЁЩҠШұ Щ…Ш№ ШҜШ№Щ… ШҙШЁЩғШ© ШҙШұЩғШ§ШЎ ЩҲЩ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҮЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ…ЩғЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬. Щ„ЩӮШҜ ЩӮЩ…ЩҶШ§ ШЁШӘШ·ЩҲЩҠШұ ЩӮШҜШұШ§ШӘЩҶШ§ ЩҲЩӮШҜШұШӘЩҶШ§ Щ„ШӘЩ„ШЁЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№Ш§ЩҠЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© Щ„ШӘШ·ЩҲЩҠШұ Щ„ЩӮШ§Шӯ mRNAШҢ ШЁЩҮШҜЩҒ ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎ ЩӮШҜШұШ© Щ…ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ…Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠШ© Щ„ШҘЩҶШӘШ§Ш¬ Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ mRNA". ШҙШұЩғШ© Afrigen ЩӮШҜ ЩҶШ¬ШӯШӘ ЩҒЩҠ ШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ© ШӘШөЩҶЩҠШ№ Щ„ЩӮШ§Шӯ COVID-19 Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШӘШЁШұШҢ ЩҲ ШӯШ§Щ„ЩҠЩӢШ§ ШӘЩӮЩҲЩ… ШЁШӘЩҲШіЩҠШ№ ЩҶШ·Ш§ЩӮ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ© ШҘЩ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁ Щ„ШҘЩҶШӘШ§Ш¬ ШҜЩҒШ№Ш§ШӘ Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ Щ„Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ¬Ш§ШұШЁ Ш§Щ„ШіШұЩҠШұЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШӯЩ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„Щү/Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠШ© ЩҲЩҒЩӮЩӢШ§ Щ„Щ…Ш№Ш§ЩҠЩҠШұ GMP.

translations.source: In a parallel process, Afrigen will continue to carry out training and technology transfer to the network partners. The funders play a crucial role in supporting the Programme with total funding to date at US$ 117 million and France being the first to fund the mRNA technology transfer work. Present at the meeting were representatives from the European Commission, Belgium, Germany, as well as Norway, Canada, African Union, South Africa, and the ELMA Foundation. Caroline Delany, GlobalAffairs CanadaвҖҷs Director General for Southern and Eastern Africa said: вҖңCanada reaffirms its continued support of the mRNA Technology Transfer Programme and we are delighted to announce a further contribution of 15 million Canadian dollars at the meeting today. This brings CanadaвҖҷs total contribution to the Programme up to 45 million Canadian dollars.
translations.reference: Ban da wannan, Afrigen za ta cigaba da ba da horaswa da musayar fasaha ga 'yan abokan haЙ—in guiwarsu. Msu ba da tallafi sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen taimaka wa shirin da tallafin da ya kai Dala 117 zuwa yanzu kuma Faransa ce ta farko wajen fara ba da tallafin ga shirin musayar na mRNA. A wajen taron akwai wakilan Жҳungiyar Tarayyar Turai da suka haЙ—a da Belgium da Germany da Norway da Canada da Kungiyar Tarayyar Afirka da Afirka ta Kudu da Gidauniyar ELMA. Darakta-janar ta Al'amuran Yau da Kullum ta Жҷasa Kanada a Kudanci da Gabashin Afirka, Caroline Delany ta ce; Kanada na ba da tabbacin cigaba da tallafawa shirin Musayar Fasaha ta mRNA, kuma a yau muna farin cikin sanar da Жҷarin gudunmowa ta miliyan 15 na kuЙ—in Жҷasar. Da haka jumular gudunmowar da Canada ta ba wa shirin ya kai Dalar Canada miliyan 45.
translations.hypothesis: Ш№ЩҶ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮ ЩҶСҲР°, Afrigen za iya ci gaba da yin karatun kuma shiri bayanai ga shauyen. masu finansin yana da muhimmi tare da ba da kudaden, wanda ya kai $117 million har zuwa yanzu, kuma Faransa shine farkon da ya financi aikin shiri bayanai na mRNA. A taron, akwai kwamari daga European Commission, Belgium, Germany, kamar su Norway, Canada, African Union, South Africa, da ELMA Foundation. Caroline Delany, Mai kwamantan GlobalAffairs Canada na Arewa da Kudu, ta ce: "Canada ta sake tabbatar da goyan bayaninta na shiri bayanai na mRNA, kuma muna gamsu da sanar da cewa za mu ba da kudaden 15 million Canadian dollar a wannan taron. wannan yana haifar da kudaden Canada na ganowa na shiri bayanai zuwa 45 million Canadian dollar.

translations.source: These funds support the running of the Hub in South Africa as well as network partners around the world. We firmly believe in the importance of building capacity at local and regional levelвҖқ. Mr Martin Seychell, Deputy Executive Director European Commission, said. вҖңThe EC has already contributed вӮ¬40 million to the establishment of the mRNA technology transfer Hub and has recently signed another grant with the EIB for вӮ¬15,5 million to facilitate the expansion of vaccines manufacturing capacity. This is part of the overall investment under the EU Global Gateway strategy, where more than вӮ¬1 Billion have been mobilised under the Team Europe Initiative on Manufacturing health products. It is now particularly important to also address possible regulatory and demand bottlenecks, to ensure not only production of vaccines of the highest standard in all regions of the world, but also rapid and equitable access to those vaccines.вҖқ
translations.reference: WaЙ—annan kuЙ—aЙ—e ana amfani da su ne wajen kula da cibiyar a Жҷasar Afirka Kudu da kuma sauran masu haЙ—in guiwa a faЙ—in duniya. a cewar mataimakin babban darkta na Жҳungiyar Tarayyar Turai, Mr. Martin Seychell, mun yarda da muhimmancin nuna ЖҷoЖҷarinmu a matakin gida zuwa sauran yankuna. EC ta riga ta bayar da gudunmawar miliyan 40 domin samar da Cibiyar Musayar Fasaha ta mRNA kuma ta sanya hannun ba da wani tallafin tare da EIB na miliyan 155 domin taimaka wa yunЖҷurin faЙ—aЙ—a Жҷarfin samar da rigakafin. Wannan na daga cikin jumular hannun jari a ЖҷarЖҷashin Shirin ba da Tallafin Samar da Abubuwan More Rayuwa na Kungiyar Tarayya Turai, inda aka tattara biliyan 1 bisa jagorancin Shirin Samar da Kayayyakin Lafiya. A yanzu, ba kawai iya buЖҷatar Й—aukar mataki na kula da samar da mafi ingancin rigakafi ga kowanne yanki na duniya ne kaЙ—ai abin damuwa ba, face ЖҷoЖҷarin tabbatar da cewa kowa na iya samun rigakafin daidai-wa-daida.

translations.source: Key leadership appointments made to drive WHO strategic direction and initiatives The World Health Organization (WHO) has appointed five new senior figures to its headquarters leadership team in Geneva. The new appointments follow the reappointment of Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus to his second five-year term as Director-General. The overall leadership team has been consolidated to align with the OrganizationвҖҷs priorities for the next five years and will work closely with the Director-General to drive forward these priorities and WHOвҖҷs ambitious transformation agenda. To accelerate progress on implementation of WHOвҖҷs 13th General Programme of Work (GPW13), and achievement of its вҖңtriple billionвҖқ targets and the health-related Sustainable Development Goals, WHOвҖҷs work for the coming five years is focused on five priorities:
translations.reference: an naЙ—a muЖҷamai 143 domin jan ragamar ayyukan Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya. Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) ta naЙ—a sabbin manyan jami'an biyar zuwa shalkwatarta da ke Geneva. Sabbin naЙ—e-naЙ—en sun biyo bayan sake naЙ—a Dakta Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus a matsayin darakta-janar, inda zai yi shekaru 5 Жҷari kan wa'adinsa na farko. An buЖҷaci Й—aukacin shuwagabannin da aka naЙ—a da su sanya muradun hukumar a gaba a cikin shekaru biyar da za su yi masu zuwa da kuma yin aiki tare da darakta-janar wajen cimma waЙ—annan muradu da burin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya na kawo sauye-sauye. Domin tabbatar da cimma aiwatar da Tsararrun Manufofin Ayyukanta Karo na 13(GPW13) da ta ware wa biliyoyin kuЙ—i da cimma Muradun Raya Жҳasa Mai ЖҠorewa da suka shafi lafiya, Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya za ta kula da wasu muhimman abubuwan guda biyar:
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШ§Шұ ЩӮШ§ШҜШ© Ш¬ШҜШҜ Щ„ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШұШ§ШӘЩҠШ¬ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш®Ш·Ш· Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© (WHO) ЩӮШҜ Ш§Ш®ШӘШ§Шұ Ш®Щ…ШіШ© ЩӮШ§ШҜШ© Ш¬ШҜШҜ Щ„ЩҒШұЩҠЩӮ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҠШ§ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠ Ч©ЧңЧ” ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬ЩҶЩҠЩҒ. ЩҮШӨЩ„Ш§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№ЩҠЩҠЩҶШ§ШӘ ЩҠШӘШЁШ№ЩҲЩҶ ШҘШ№Ш§ШҜШ© ШӘШ№ЩҠЩҠЩҶ ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШӘЩҠШҜШұЩҲШі ШЈШҜШ§ЩҶЩҲЩ… ШәЩҠШЁШұЩҠШіЩҲШі Щ„ЩҲЩ„Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠШ© Щ„Щ…ШҜШ© Ш®Щ…Ші ШіЩҶЩҲШ§ШӘ ЩғШұШҰЩҠШі ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ°ЩҠ. Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұЩҠЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠ ЩӮШҜ ШӘЩ… ШӘЩҲШӯЩҠШҜЩҮШ§ Щ„ШӘШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ШҜЩ…Ш© Щ„ЩҖ Ш®Щ…Ші ШіЩҶЩҲШ§ШӘШҢ ЩҲШіШӘШ№Щ…Щ„ Ш№ЩҶ ЩғШ«ШЁ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШі Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ°ЩҠ Щ„ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ ЩҲШ®Ш·Ш· Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш·Щ…ЩҲШӯШ© Щ„ЩҖ WHO. Щ„ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШҜЩ… ЩҒЩҠ ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ° Ш§Щ„ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ… ШұЩӮЩ… 13 Щ„ЩҖ WHOШҢ ЩҲШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ ШЈЩҮШҜШ§ЩҒ "Ш«Щ„Ш§Ш«Ш© ШӘШұЩҠЩ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ" ЩҲ ШЈЩҮШҜШ§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ…Ш© Ш°Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөЩ„Ш© ШЁШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ©ШҢ Ш№Щ…Щ„ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Щ„ЩҖ Ш®Щ…Ші ШіЩҶЩҲШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ШҜЩ…Ш© ЩҠШұЩғШІ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш®Щ…Ші ШЈЩҲЩ„ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ:

translations.source: making a paradigm shift towards promoting health and preventing disease by addressing its root causes; radically reorienting health systems towards primary health care; strengthening the systems for health emergency preparedness and response; harnessing the power of science, innovation, data and technologies to advance health; and strengthening WHO as the leading authority on global health and to achieve impact in countries.
translations.reference: Sauya dabarun fuskantar abin da ya shafi haЙ“aka lafiya da kare afkuwar cututtuka ta hanyar magance musabbabansu daga tushe. sauya tsarin lafiya zuwa ba wa cibiyoyin lafiya matakin farko muhimmanci; Жҳarfafa tsarin zama ciki shirin ko-ta-kwana domin kai agajin gaggawa a fannin lafiya. Amfani da tasirin kimiyya da Жҷere-Жҷere da rahotanni da fasahohi wajen ciyar da lafiya gaba, da Жҷarfafa tasirin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO) a matsayin jagoran kan duk abin da ya shafi lafiya a duniya domin cimma muradunta a Жҷasashe.
translations.hypothesis: ШЈЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ Щ…ШәЩҠШұ ЩғШЁЩҠШұ Щ„ШӘШұЩғЩҠШІ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІШ§Щ„ШөШӯШ© ЩҲЩ…ЩҶШ№ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ„Ш¬Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШЁШ§ШЁ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ©Шӣ ШҘШ№Ш§ШҜШ© ШӘЩҲШ¬ЩҠЩҮ ШЈЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© ЩҶШӯЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„ЩҠШ©Шӣ ШӘЩӮЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Щ„ШҘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ¬Ш§ШЁШ© Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҲШ§ШұШҰ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©Шӣ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜШ© Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮЩҲШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„Щ…ШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШЁШӘЩғШ§ШұШҢ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШ§ЩҶШ§ШӘШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩғЩҶЩҲЩ„ЩҲШ¬ЩҠШ§ Щ„ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ©Шӣ ЩҲ ШӘЩӮЩҲЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© (WHO) ЩғШӯЩғЩҲЩ…Ш© ШұШ§ШҰШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲ ШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ШҜШ§ЩҶ.

translations.source: The headquarters leadership team, comprising equal numbers of women and men, will work jointly with WHO regional and country offices. New members of the headquarters leadership team: Dr Jeremy Farrar will become WHOвҖҷs Chief Scientist as of 8 May 2023. The appointment of Dr Farrar was previously announced in December 2022. In this role Dr Farrar will oversee the Science Division, bringing together the best experts and networks in science and innovation from around the world to guide, develop and deliver high quality health policies and services to the people who need them most. Prior to joining WHO Dr Farrar was Director of the Wellcome Trust.
translations.reference: shugabannin shalkwatar da suka haЙ—a adadi kai Й—aya tsakanin maza da mata, za su yi aiki tare sauran ofisoshin hukumar da ke yankuna da Жҷasashe. Cikin sabbin jagororin da ke shalkwatar, Dakta Jeremy Farrar ne zai zama babban jami'in kimiyya na Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya daga 8 ga watan Mayun 2023. A baya an sanar da naЙ—in Dakta Farrar a cikin Disamba 2022. A cikin wannan aikin, Dakta Farrar zai kula da dukkanin sashen Kimiyya tare da tattaro kan Жҷwararrun masana da hanyoyin sadarwa na kimiyya da Жҷere-Жҷere daga ko ina a faЙ—in duniya ya jagoranta, ya tabbatar da ci gaba da isar da ingantattun manufofi da ayyuka na kiwon lafiya ga mutanen da suke buЖҷatar su. Kafin Dakta Farrar ya fara aikin Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya wato WHO, ya kasance Darakta ne a Wellcome Trust.
translations.hypothesis: ЩҒШұЩҠЩӮ ШҘШҜШ§ШұЩҠ ШЁЩ…ШұЩғШІ, wanda ya Жҷunsa adadi sawa na mata da maza, zai ajiye shirin tare da ofis na WHO na yankin da kuma kasar. Жҙar da Й“angaren da Й“angaren, Dr Jeremy Farrar zai zama Mai Masaucin Ilmi na WHO, a ranar 8 ga Mayu, 2023. Bayan wannan, Dr Farrar ya sanar da wannan a Disamba, 2022. A wannan muhimmi, Dr Farrar zai jagoranci kwamitin Ilmi, kuma zai fitar da mafi kyau na masu bashi da shilingi daga kowann cikin duniyar, domin su taimakawa, ЖҷirЖҷira, kuma bayar da ka'aikan lafiyayyar da za su iya taimakawa ga waЙ—anda ke buЖҷata. Ta farka a cikin WHO, Dr Farrar ya kasance mai jagora na Trust na Wellcome.

translations.source: Before joining Wellcome in 2013 Dr Farrar spent 17 years as Director of the Clinical Research Unit at the Hospital for Tropical Diseases in Vietnam where his research interests were in global health with a focus on emerging infectious diseases. Dr Farrar is a clinician researcher with a medical degree and a PhD. Dr Ailan Li will become Assistant Director-General for Universal Health Coverage, Healthier Populations as of 8 May 2023. In this role Dr Li will oversee the OrganizationвҖҷs efforts to promote better health and well-being through interventions relating to the environmental, social, and economic determinants of health, including climate change, tobacco control, chemical safety, road safety, food systems and nutrition, physical activity, air pollution and radiation, through a One Health approach. Dr Li has been serving as the WHO Representative to the Kingdom of Cambodia since 15 July 2019.
translations.reference: Kafin shigarsa Wellcome a shekarar 2013, Dakta Farrar ya shafe shekaru 17 a matsayin Daraktan Sashin Bincike gwaje-gwaje a Asibitin cututtuka masu saurin yaЙ—uwa ta Жҷasar Vietnam inda yafi mayar da hankalin bincikensa kan kiwon lafiyar duniya tare da bincike kan sabbin cututtukan da ke tasowa. Dakta Farrar mai bincike ne wanda ke da digiri na farko har zuwa na uku wato PhD a fannin likitanci. Dakta Ailan Li zai zama Mataimakin Darakta-Janar na hukumar Universal Health Coverage Healthier Populations tun daga ranar 8 ga Mayu 2023. A cikin wannan mataki, Dakta Li zai kula da ЖҷoЖҷarin Жҷungiyar don tabbatar da ingantacciyar lafiya da walwala ta hanyar tsoma baki akan al'amuran da suka shafi muhalli, zamantakewa, da tattalin arziki na kiwon lafiya, gami da sauyin yanayi, sarrafa sigari, amincin sinadarai, kula da hanyoyi, abinci, tsarin abinci mai gina jiki, motsa jiki, gurЙ“atacciyar iska da radiation, ta hanyar One Health. Dr Li yana aiki a matsayin wakilin Hukumar WHO a Masarautar Cambodia tun daga ranar 15 ga Yuli 2019.
translations.hypothesis: ЩӮШЁЩ„ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШ¶Щ…ЩҲЩҮ ШҘЩ„Щү Wellcome Ш№Ш§Щ… 2013ШҢ ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ Farrar ЩӮШҜ ШЈЩ…Ш¶Щү 17 Ш№Ш§Щ…ЩӢШ§ ЩғЩ…ШҜЩҠШұ ЩҲШӯШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШЁШӯШ« Ш§Щ„ШіШұЩҠШұЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ШіШӘШҙЩҒЩү Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘЩҲШ§ШҰЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ ЩҒЩҠШӘЩҶШ§Щ…ШҢ ШӯЩҠШ« Ш§ЩҮШӘЩ…Ш§Щ…ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЁШӯШ«ЩҠ ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШӘШұЩғЩҠШІ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШҜЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜШ©. ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ Farrar ЩҮЩҲ ШЁШ§ШӯШ« Ш·ШЁЩҠШҢ Щ…Ш№ ШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ© ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұШ§ЩҮ. ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ Ailan Li ШіЩҠЩ…Ш«Щ„ Щ…ЩҶШөШЁ ЩҶШ§ШҰШЁ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ… Щ„Щ„ШҘШҙШұШ§ЩҒ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШұШ№Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„Ш©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш№Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©ШҢ ШЁШҜШЎЩӢШ§ Щ…ЩҶ 8 Щ…Ш§ЩҠЩҲ 2023. ЩҒЩҠ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШөШЁШҢ ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ Li ШіЩҠШӘЩҲЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШҘШҙШұШ§ЩҒ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш¬ЩҮЩҲШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӨШіШіШ© Щ„ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҠШҜШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШұЩҒШ§ЩҮЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ШӘШҜШ®Щ„Ш§ШӘ ШӘШӘШ№Щ„ЩӮ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш№ЩҲШ§Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШҰЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ЩӮШӘШөШ§ШҜЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӨШ«Шұ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ©ШҢ ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ ШӘШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш®ШҢ Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҒШӯШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШ®ЩҠЩҶШҢ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҠЩ…ЩҠШ§ШҰЩҠШ©ШҢ ШіЩ„Ш§Щ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш·ШұЩӮШҢ ШЈЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШәШ°Ш§ШЎ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШәШ°ЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШҙШ§Ш· Ш§Щ„ШЁШҜЩҶЩҠШҢ ШӘЩ„ЩҲШ« Ш§Щ„ЩҮЩҲШ§ШЎ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҘШҙШ№Ш§Ш№ШҢ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ ЩҶЩҮШ¬ "ШөШӯШ© ЩҲШ§ШӯШҜШ©". ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ Li ЩӮШҜ ЩҠШ®ШҜЩ… ЩғЩ…ЩҶШіЩӮ Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Щ…Щ„ЩғШ© ЩғШ§Щ…ШЁЩҲШҙЩҠШ§ Щ…ЩҶШ° 15 ШӘЩ…ЩҲШІ 2019.

translations.source: Prior to this role, Dr Li served as Regional Emergency Director for the WHO Health Emergencies Programme in the WHO Regional Office for the Western Pacific. Dr Li holds a medical degree and degree in health social sciences. Dr Yukiko Nakatani will become Assistant Director-General for Access to Medicines and Health Products as of 2 May 2023. In this role Dr Nakatani will oversee the development and implementation of WHOвҖҷs norms and policies to ensure equitable access to quality medicines, vaccines and diagnostics for all populations everywhere, including for preventing and responding to epidemics. Dr Nakatani has been serving as the Director of the Cancer and Disease Control Division of the Japanese Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare and as the Technical Advisor to the Minister of State for the COVID-19 Vaccination Task Force in Japan.
translations.reference: Kafin wannan rawar, Dakta Li ya kasance Daraktan Gaggawa na Shirin Agajin Lafiya na Hukumar WHO a Ofishin Yanki na WHO na Yammacin Pacific. Dakta Li yana da digiri na likitanci da digiri a fannin kimiyyar zamantakewar lafiya. Dakta Yukiko Nakatani zai zama Mataimakin Darakta-Janar na Samumar da Magunguna da Kayayyakin Lafiya tun daga ranar 2 ga watan Mayu 2023. A wannan muЖҷamin, Dakta Nakatani zai sa ido kan ci gaba da aiwatar da Жҷa'idoji da manufofin Hukumar WHO don tabbatar da samun daidaiton damar samun ingantattun magunguna, alluran rigakafi da binciken lafiya ga dukkan al'ummomi a ko'ina, gami da rigakafi annoba. Dakta Nakatani ya kasance Daraktan Sashin Kula da Cututtukan Daji na Ma'aikatar Lafiya, Жҳwadago da Jin DaЙ—in Jama'a ta Жҳasar Japan kuma a matsayin mai ba da shawara na fasaha ga Karamin Ministan Kula da Rigakafin Cutar COVID-19 a Жҳasar Japan.
translations.hypothesis: Р—РёРјРҫ, ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұЩҮ Щ„ЩҠ Ш®ШҜЩ…ШӘЩҲШ§ ЩҶШ§ШҰШЁШ© ШұШҰЩҠШіШ§ Щ„ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ Ш§Щ„ШЈШІЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠ Щ„ЩҖ WHO ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩғШӘШЁ WHO Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ·ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯЩҠШ· Ш§Щ„ЩҮШ§ШҜШҰ. ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұЩҮ Щ„ЩҠ ШӘЩ…Щ„ЩҠ ШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ© Ш·ШЁЩҠШ© ЩҲШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш¬ШӘЩ…Ш§Ш№ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠ. ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұЩҮ ЩҠЩҲЩғЩҠЩғЩҲ ЩҶШ§ЩғШ§ШӘШ§ЩҶЩҠ ШіШӘ ШӘШөШЁШӯ ЩҶШ§ШҰШЁШ© ШұШҰЩҠШіШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…ШіШ§Ш№ШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШӘШ¬Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§ШұШ§ Щ…ЩҶ 2 Щ…Ш§ЩҠ 2023. ЩҒЩҠ wannan muhimma, ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұЩҮ ЩҶШ§ЩғШ§ШӘШ§ЩҶЩҠ ШіШӘ ЩҶШ§Й—aЙ—a cikin razar ЩҲЧҷЧҷЧ©irar ka'ido da umarni na WHO don tabbatar da Й—aukan abubuwa da kyalli, vaksin da kuma hanyoyin gano sakan, don duk jama'a dukkanin wurin, gami da ganowa da kuma magance cututtuka. ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұЩҮ ЩҶШ§ЩғШ§ШӘШ§ЩҶЩҠ ta kasance ЩҶШ§ШҰШЁШ© ШұШҰЩҠШіШ§ Щ„ЩҖ "Division of Cancer and Disease Control" Щ„ЩҲШІШ§ШұШ© Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҲЩ„ЩҠШі, Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„ ЩҲШұЩҒШ§ЩҮЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ§ШЁШ§ЩҶ, kamar kuma mai taimakawa rasakawa Щ„ЩҲШІШ§ШұШ© Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҲЩ„ЩҠШі, Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„ ЩҲШұЩҒШ§ЩҮЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ§ШЁШ§ЩҶ.

translations.source: Dr Nakatani holds a medical degree and a PhD in public health. Dr Razia Pendse will become the Chef de Cabinet as of 4 May 2023. In this role Dr Pendse will head the Director-GeneralвҖҷs Office, helping to drive the OrganizationвҖҷs priorities and initiatives, and will ensure alignment within the WHO leadership team and across the three levels of WHO. Dr Pendse has been serving as the Director of Healthier Populations and Noncommunicable Diseases in the WHO Regional Office for South-East Asia and was previously the WHO Representative to Sri Lanka. Dr Pendse holds a medical degree and master's degree in public health.
translations.reference: Dakta Nakatani yana da digirin farko a Й“angaren likitanci da digirin digirgir a fannin kiwon lafiyar jama'a. Dakta Razia Pendse za ta karЙ“i matsayin Chef de Cabinet har zuwa 4 ga watan Mayu 2023. A wannan muЖҷamin, Dakta Pendse zai jagoranci ofishin Darakta-Janar, wanda zai taimaka wajen fitar da fifiko da tsare-tsare na kungiyar, kuma zai tabbatar da daidaito a cikin tawagar shugabannin Hukumar WHO da kuma a cikin matakai uku na WHO. Dakta Pendse ya kasance Daraktan Kula da Lafiyar Jama'a da Cututtukan da ba sa yaЙ—uwa a Ofishin Hukumar WHO na yankin Kudu maso Gabashin Asiya kuma a baya shi ne Wakilin Hukumar WHO a Sri Lanka. Dakta Pendse yana da digirin farko a Й“angaren likitanci da digirin digirgir a fannin kiwon lafiyar jama'a.
translations.hypothesis: ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ЩҶШ§ЩғШӘШ§ЩҶЩҠ ЩҠЩ…ШӘЩ„Щғ ШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ© Ш·ШЁЩҠШ© ЩҲ ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұШ§ЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ ШөШӯШ© Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш©. ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұШ© ШұШ§ШІЩҠЩҠШ§ ШЁЩҶШҜЩҠ ШіЩҠШөШЁШӯ ШұШҰЩҠШі Щ…ЩғШӘШЁШҢ Щ…Ш·Щ„Ш№ 4 Щ…Ш§ЩҠ 2023. ЩҒЩҠ wannan mukami, ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұШ© ШЁЩҶШҜЩҠ ШіШӘ ШҜШ§ШұЩҠ Щ…ЩғШӘШЁ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…, ШіШ§ШәШ§ЩҠ cikin hangota kuma ayikin Жҷungiyar, kuma za ta guje da samun daЙ—Й—a Й—an Жҷungiyar WHO, kuma Й—an Жҷungiyar WHO. ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұШ© ШЁЩҶШҜЩҠ ta kasance mai jagowa masu lafiyar kuma kasuwanci a ofishin WHO na Asiya ta Kudu-Kare, kuma a baya ta kasance kwamanda na WHO a Sri Lanka. ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұШ© ШЁЩҶШҜЩҠ ta kammala shahada ta farko da shahada ta bi ta cikin sana'a.

translations.source: Dr JГ©rГҙme Salomon will become Assistant Director-General for Universal Health Coverage, Communicable and Noncommunicable Diseases as of 17 April 2023. In this role Dr Salomon will oversee a broad portfolio of technical programmes covering HIV, viral hepatitis, sexually-transmitted infections, tuberculosis, malaria, neglected tropical diseases, mental health, substance use disorders, and noncommunicable diseases such as cardiovascular disease, diabetes, chronic respiratory diseases and cancer. Dr Salomon has been serving as the Director-General for Health at the Ministry of Health and Prevention of France. He was a Member of the WHO Executive Board prior to his appointment and has extensive experience in health systems management, communicable diseases and international public health. Dr Salomon holds a medical degree, a masterвҖҷs degree in public health and a PhD in epidemiology.
translations.reference: Dakta JГғВ©rГғ'me Salomon zai zama Mataimakin Darakta-Janar na Kula da Lafiya ta Duniya, Cututtuka masu YaЙ—uwa da Marasa YaЙ—uwa daga ranar 17 ga Afrilu 2023. A wannan muЖҷamin, Dakta Salomon zai kula da babban fayil na shirye-shiryen fasaha wanda ya shafi cutar Жҷanjamau, hepatitis viral, cututtukan da ake kamuwa da su ta hanyar jima'i, tarin fuka, zazzaЙ“in cizon sauro, cututtuka na wurare masu zafi da ba a kula da su, lafiyar ЖҷwaЖҷwalwa, rashin amfani da abubuwa, da cututtukan da ba a iya kamuwa da su kamar cututtukan zuciya da jijiyoyin jini, ciwon sukari, na yau da kullun, cututtuka da suka shafi numfashi da ciwon daji. Dakta Salomon ya kasance babban darakta mai kula da lafiya a maвҖҷaikatar lafiya da rigakafin Жҷasar Faransa. Ya kasance memba a hukumar ta WHO kafin naЙ—in nasa, kuma yana da gogewa a fannin kula da tsarin kiwon lafiya, cututtuka masu yaЙ—uwa da kuma lafiyar al'ummar duniya. Dokta Salomon yana da digiri na likitanci, digiri na biyu a fannin kula da lafiyar jama'a da kuma digiri na uku a fannin ilimin cututtuka.

translations.source: The portfolios of existing members of the headquarters leadership team: Dr Samira Asma will continue as the Assistant Director-General for Data, Analytics and Delivery for Impact. Dr Asma oversees a portfolio which ensures that health data are reliable and accessible, and are used to improve health outcomes worldwide, including tracking and accelerating progress towards the triple billion targets and the health-related Sustainable Development Goals. Prior to joining WHO in 2018, Dr Asma held leadership positions at the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) for over two decades. She holds a doctorate degree in dental surgery and a master's degree in public health. Dr Bruce Aylward has been appointed Assistant Director-General of the Universal Health Coverage, Life Course Division as of 4 May 2023.
translations.reference: Takaddun mambobi na Жҷungiyar jagoranci na hedkwatar sun haЙ—a da: Dr Samira Asma wacce za ta ci gaba da zama mataimakiyar Darakta-Janar kan Bayanai, Bincike da Bayarwa don Tasiri. Dokta Asma tana kula da fayil Й—in da ke tabbatar da cewa bayanan kiwon lafiya amintattu ne kuma ana iya samun su, kuma ana amfani da su don haЙ“aka sakamakon kiwon lafiya a duk duniya, gami da bin diddigin ci gaba da haЙ“aka ci gaba zuwa buЖҷatun biliyan uku da maЖҷasudin ci gaba mai dorewa masu alaЖҷa da lafiya. Kafin ta fara aikin da Hukumar WHO a shekarar 2018, Dakta Asma ta riЖҷe muЖҷaman jagoranci a Cibiyar Kula da Cututtuka ta Жҳasar Amurka (CDC) na sama da shekaru ashirin. Ta yi digirin digirgir a fannin aikin tiyatar haЖҷori da kuma digiri na biyu a fannin kiwon lafiyar jama'a. An nada Dakta Bruce Aylward a matsayin Mataimakin Darakta-Janar na Kula da Lafiya ta Duniya, Sashen Koyarwa da Rayuwar zamantakewa har zuwa 4 ga watan Mayun 2023.

translations.source: Dr Aylward has been leading WHOвҖҷs Transformation Agenda and the OrganizationвҖҷs work on the multi-agency Access to COVID-19 Tools Accelerator (ACT-A) Hub. In his new role, Dr Aylward will drive the OrganizationвҖҷs agenda to transform primary health care as central to universal health coverage, as well as overseeing WHOвҖҷs work on health systems, immunization and reproductive, maternal and child health. Dr Aylward holds a medical degree and a masterвҖҷs degree in public health.Dr Hanan Balkhy will continue as Assistant Director-General for Antimicrobial Resistance. Dr Balkhy provides technical and political leadership to curb the health and economic burdens of drug resistance, including through multi-sectoral collaboration with the Food and Agriculture Organization, the World Organization for Animal Health, and the United Nations Environment Programme. Prior to joining WHO, Dr Balkhy was Executive Director for Infection Prevention and Control at Saudi ArabiaвҖҷs Ministry of National Guard.
translations.reference: Dakta Aylward ya kasance yana jagorantar Ajandar Sauye-sauye ta Hukumar WHO da kuma ayyukan Жҳungiyar kan Samar da Ma'aikatu da yawa zuwa Cibiyar HaЙ“aka Kayan aikin cutar COVID-19 (ACT. A wannan sabon muЖҷamin, Dakta Aylward zai jagoranci ajandar Жҷungiyar don canza tsarin kiwon lafiya a matakin farko zuwa matakin gamagari, da kuma tabbatar da tsarin kiwon lafiya na duniya, da kuma kula da ayyukan WHO kan tsarin kiwon lafiya, rigakafi da haihuwa, lafiyar mata. Dakta Aylward yana da digirin likitanci da kuma digiri na biyu a fannin kiwon lafiyar jama'a. Dakta Hanan Balkhy za ta ci gaba da zama mataimakiyar Darakta-Janar ta Antimicrobial Resistance. Dakta Balkhy yana ba da jagoranci na fasaha da siyasa don magance matsalolin lafiya da kuma tsadar magungunan magance ta'ammuli da Жҷwayoyi, ciki har da ta hanyar haЙ—in gwiwar Й“angarori da yawa tare da Hukumar Abinci da Aikin Noma, Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya, da Hukumar Kula da Muhalli ta Majalisar ЖҠinkin Duniya. Kafin shigarsa Hukumar WHO, Da Balkhy ya kasance Babban Darakta na Kariya da Kula da Cututtuka a Ma'aikatar Tsaro ta Жҳasar Saudi Arabiya.

translations.source: Dr Balkhy holds a medical degree with specialization in paediatric infectious diseases. Dr Catharina Boehme will become Assistant Director-General, External Relations and Governance as of 4 May 2023. In this role Dr Boehme will lead WHOвҖҷs strategic engagement in the areas of governance, resource mobilization and partner relations. Her portfolio will include critical Member States processes, such as their negotiation of a pandemic accord, the reform of WHOвҖҷs governance and the implementation of recommendations on sustainable financing. Dr Boehme has been serving as the Director-GeneralвҖҷs Chef de Cabinet during which time she drove the leadershipвҖҷs strategic vision, ensuring alignment across the Organization and with Member States and partners.
translations.reference: Dakta Balkhy yana da digiri a Й“angaren likitanci tare da Жҷwarewa a cututtuka masu yaЙ—uwa a Жҷananan yara. Dakta Catharina Boehme za ta zama mataimakiyar Darakta-Janar, Harkokin Жҳetare da Jagoranci tun daga 4 ga watan Mayun 2023. A wannan muЖҷamin, Dakta Boehme zai jagoranci dabarun Hukumar WHO a fannonin gudanar da mulki, tattara albarkatu da dangantakar abokantaka. Shugabancin nata zai haЙ—a da kula da matakai masu mahimmanci na Жҷasashe membobin, kamar tattaunawarsu game da yarjejeniyar annoba, sake fasalin shugabancin Hukumar WHO da aiwatar da shawarwari kan samar da kuЙ—aЙ—e mai Й—orewa. Dokta Boehme ta kasance tana aiki a matsayin Babban Daraktan Chef de Cabinet a lokacin da ta jagoranci dabarun jagoranci, tare da tabbatar da daidaito a cikin Жҳungiyar da tare da Membobin Жҳasashe da abokan tarayya.
translations.hypothesis: ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩ„ЩғЩҠ ЩҠЩ…ШӘЩ„Щғ ШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ© Ш·ШЁЩҠШ©ШҢ Щ…Ш№ ШӘШ®ШөШө ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШҜЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Ш·ЩҒЩ„. ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұШ© ЩғШ§Ш«Ш§ШұЩҠЩҶШ§ ШЁЩҲЩҮЩ… ШіШӘ ШӘШөШЁШӯ ЩҶШ§ШҰШЁ ШұШҰЩҠШі ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ°ЩҠШҢ Щ„Щ„ШҙШӨЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§ШұШ¬ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҘШҜШ§ШұШ©ШҢ Ш§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§ШұЩӢШ§ Щ…ЩҶ 4 Щ…Ш§ЩҠЩҲ 2023. ЩҒЩҠ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲШұШҢ ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұШ© ШЁЩҲЩҮЩ… ШіШӘЩӮЩҲШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШ§ШұЩғШ© Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШұШ§ШӘЩҠШ¬ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҘШҜШ§ШұШ©ШҢ Ш¬Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ШұШҜШҢ ЩҲШ№Щ„Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҙШұЩғШ§ШЎ. ШҜЩҲШұЩҮШ§ ШіЩҠШӘШ¶Щ…ЩҶ Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Ш¶Ш§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҮЩ…Ш©ШҢ Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§ЩҲШ¶ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§ШӘЩҒШ§ЩӮ ШЁШҙШЈЩҶ Ш¬Ш§ШҰШӯШ©ШҢ ШҘШөЩ„Ш§Шӯ Ш§Щ„ШҘШҜШ§ШұШ© Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ° ШӘЩҲШөЩҠШ§ШӘ ШЁШҙШЈЩҶ ШӘЩ…ЩҲЩҠЩ„ Щ…ШіШӘШҜШ§Щ…. ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұШ© ШЁЩҲЩҮЩ… Ш®ШҜЩ…ШӘ ЩғЩ…ШіШӨЩҲЩ„ ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠ Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШі Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш©ШҢ ЩҲЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩӮШӘШҢ ЩӮШ§ШҜШӘ Ш§Щ„ШұШӨЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШұШ§ШӘЩҠШ¬ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„ШҘШҜШ§ШұШ©ШҢ Щ…Ш№ Ш¶Щ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш©ШҢ ЩҲЩғШ°Щ„Щғ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Ш¶Ш§ШЎ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҙШұЩғШ§ШЎ.

translations.source: She joined WHO in 2021, having been the Chief Executive Officer of FIND, the international alliance for diagnostics. Dr Boehme holds a medical degree and diplomas in public health and management. Dr Chikwe Ihekweazu will continue as Assistant Director-General for the Division of Health Emergency Intelligence and Surveillance Systems in the Emergencies Programme. As part of his portfolio, Dr Ihekweazu leads the WHO Hub for Pandemic and Epidemic Intelligence, bringing together partners to address future pandemic and epidemic risks with better access to data, analytical capacities, and tools for decision-making. Prior to joining WHO, Dr Ihekweazu was the first Director General of the Nigeria Centre for Disease Control (NCDC), from 2016 to 2021.
translations.reference: Ta fara aiki da Hukumar WHO a shekarar 2021, kasancewar ta Babban Jami'ar Gudanarwa na FIND, Жҷawancen Жҷasa da Жҷasa don binciken cututtuka. Dakta Boehme tana da digiri a likitaci da difloma a fannin kiwon lafiyar jama'a da gudanarwa. Dakta Chikwe Ihekweazu zai ci gaba da zama Mataimakin Darakta-Janar na Sashen Nazarin Gaggawa na Lafiya a cikin shirin Tsarin Sa ido na Gaggawa. A matsayin wani Й“angare na aikace-aikace n sa, Dakta Ihekweazu yana jagorantar Cibiyar Hukumar WHO don Cututtuka da haЙ—o kan masu ruwa da tsaki da abokan haЙ—in gwiwa don magance annoba da bala'in annoba a nan gaba tare da ingantacciyar damar samun bayanai, damar tantancewa, da kayan aikin da suka dace domin yanke shawarwari. Kafin ya koma Hukumar WHO, Dakta Ihekweazu ya kasance Darakta-Janar na Cibiyar Kula da Cututtuka ta Najeriya (NCDC), daga 2016 zuwa 2021.
translations.hypothesis: ШӘШ¶Щ…Щ‘РҪРёР»Р° Щ„Ш§Ш¬Ш§ШЁШ© WHO Ш№Ш§Щ… 2021ШҢ ШЁШ№ШҜ ШЈЩҶ Ш®ШҜЩ…ШӘ ЩғШұШҰЩҠШі ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ°ЩҠ Щ„ЩҖ FINDШҢ ЩҲЩҮЩҠ ШӘШӯШ§Щ„ЩҒ ШҜЩҲЩ„ЩҠ Щ„ШӘШҙШ®ЩҠШө Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶. ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШЁЩҲЩҮЩҠЩ… ЩҠЩ…ШӘЩ„Щғ ШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ© Ш·ШЁЩҠШ© ЩҲШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш© ЩҲШҘШҜШ§ШұШ©. ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШӘШҙЩҠЩғЩҲ ШҘЩҠЩҮЩҠЩғЩҲШ§ШІЩҲ ШіЩҠШіШӘЩ…Шұ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШөШЁЩҮ ЩғЩҲЩғЩҠЩ„ Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠ Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ·ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӨЩҲЩ„Ш© Ш№ЩҶ Щ…Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩ…Ш§ШӘ ЩҲШҘШӯШөШ§ШҰЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҲШ§ШұШҰ ЩҒЩҠ ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҲШ§ШұШҰ. ЩғШ¬ШІШЎ Щ…ЩҶ ШҜЩҲШұЩҮШҢ ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШҘЩҠЩҮЩҠЩғЩҲШ§ШІЩҲ ЩҠЩӮЩҲШҜ Щ…ШұЩғШІ WHO Щ„Ш¬Щ…Ш№ Щ…Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩ…Ш§ШӘ ШӯЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШЁШҰШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ШҢ ШӯЩҠШ« ЩҠШ¬ШӘЩ…Ш№ Щ…Ш№ ШҙШұЩғШ§ШЎ Щ„ШӘЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ„ Щ…Ш®Ш§Ш·Шұ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШЁШҰШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩӮШЁЩ„ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ°Щ„Щғ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒШ¶Щ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШ§ЩҶШ§ШӘШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШҜШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩ„ЩҠЩ„ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЈШҜЩҲШ§ШӘ Щ„Ш§ШӘШ®Ш§Ш° Ш§Щ„ЩӮШұШ§ШұШ§ШӘ. ЩӮШЁЩ„ Ш§ЩҶШ¶Щ…Ш§Щ…ЩҮ ШҘЩ„Щү WHOШҢ ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШҘЩҠЩҮЩҠЩғЩҲШ§ШІЩҲ ЩғШ§ЩҶ ШЈЩҲЩ„ Щ…ШҜЩҠШұ Ш№Ш§Щ… Щ„Щ„Щ…ШұЩғШІ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ·ЩҶЩҠ Щ„Щ„ШіЩҠШ·ШұШ© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ (NCDC)ШҢ Щ…ЩҶ Ш№Ш§Щ… 2016 ШҘЩ„Щү 2021.

translations.source: Dr Ihekweazu holds a medical degree, with specialization as an infectious disease epidemiologist, and a masterвҖҷs degree in public health. Dr Michael Ryan will continue as Executive Director of WHOвҖҷs Health Emergencies Programme. Dr Ryan has been managing health emergencies in WHO for the past 25 years and most recently led WHOвҖҷs emergency response to the COVID-19 pandemic. He leads WHOвҖҷs response to disease outbreaks, humanitarian crises and other public health emergencies. Dr Ryan is a founding member of the Global Outbreak Alert and Response Network (GOARN), which has aided the response to hundreds of disease outbreaks around the world.
translations.reference: Dakta Ihekweazu yana da digirin likitanci, tare da Жҷwarewa a matsayin likita mai bincike n cututtuka, da kuma digiri na biyu a fannin lafiyar jama'a. Dakta Michael Ryan zai ci gaba da zama Babban Darakta na Shirin Agajin Lafiya na Hukumar WHO. Dakta Ryan yana gudanar da ayyukan gaggawa na lafiya a Hukumar WHO na kimanin shekaru 25 da suka gabata kuma kwanan nan ya jagoranci matakin gaggawa na Hukumar WHO game da cutar mashaЖҷon numfashi wato COVID-19. Yana jagorantar martanin Hukumar WHO game da Й“arkewar cututtuka, rikice-rikicen jin Жҷai da sauran abubuwan gaggawa na lafiyar jama'a. Dakta Ryan na Й—aya daga cikin mambobin farko na Жҷungiyar da ta kafa wata Жҷungiya mai suna Global Outbreak Alert and Response Network (GOARN), wacce ta taimaka wajen mayar da martani ga Й—aruruwan Й“ullar cututtuka a duniya.
translations.hypothesis: ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШҘЩҠЩғЩҲЩҠШІЩҲ ЩҠЩ…ШӘЩ„Щғ ШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ© Ш·ШЁЩҠШ©ШҢ Щ…Ш№ ШӘШ®ШөШө ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„ ШЈШЁШӯШ§Ш« Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШҜЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ© Щ…Ш§Ш¬ШіШӘШ§Шұ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш©. ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ Щ…Ш§ЩҠЩғЩ„ ШұШ§ЩҠШ§ЩҶ ШіЩҠШіШӘЩ…Шұ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШөШЁ ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠ Щ„ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ш¬ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ¬Ш§ШЁШ© Щ„Щ„ШЈШІЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§ШЁШ№ Щ„ЩҖ WHO. ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШұШ§ЩҠШ§ЩҶ ЩӮШҜ ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҠШҜЩҠШұ ШЈШІЩ…Ш§ШӘ ШөШӯЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ WHO Ч‘ЧһЧ©Чҡ 25 Ш№Ш§Щ…ШҢ ЩҲ Щ…ШӨШ®ШұЩӢШ§ ЩӮШ§ШҜ Ш§ШіШӘШ¬Ш§ШЁШ© WHO Щ„ЩҲШЁШ§ШЎ COVID-19. ЩҮЩҲ ЩҠЩӮЩҲШҜ Ш§ШіШӘШ¬Ш§ШЁШ© WHO Щ„Ш§ЩҶШӘШҙШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШЈШІЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҶШіШ§ЩҶЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШЈШІЩ…Ш§ШӘ ШөШӯЩҠШ© Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш©. ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШұШ§ЩҠШ§ЩҶ ЩҮЩҲ ШіаёЎаёІаёҠаёҙаёҒ ШӘШЈШіЩҠШіЩҠ Щ„ШҙШЁЩғШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶШЁЩҠЩҮ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ¬Ш§ШЁШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ (GOARN)ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩӮШҜ ШіШ§Ш№ШҜШӘ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§ШіШӘШ¬Ш§ШЁШ© Щ„Ш№ШҜШ© Ш§ЩҶШӘШҙШ§Шұ ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ ШӯЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ….

translations.source: Dr Ryan holds a degree in medicine and a masterвҖҷs degree in public health. Mr Raul Thomas will continue as Assistant Director-General for Business Operations. Mr Thomas has overall responsibility for WHOвҖҷs business functions, including budget, finance, human resources, administration, audit, risk management, accountability and compliance, and general management. He is responsible for implementing many of the initiatives under the OrganizationвҖҷs transformation agenda and creating a respectful, inclusive workplace. During his 20 years of employment with WHO, Mr Thomas has served in the regions of Africa, the Americas, the Eastern Mediterranean and the Western Pacific, as well as with the International Agency for Research on Cancer (IARC).
translations.reference: Dakta Ryan yana da digirin farko a fannin likitanci da kuma digiri na biyu a fannin lafiyar jama'a. Mista Raul Thomas zai ci gaba da zama Mataimakin Darakta Janar na Ayyukan Kasuwanci. Mista Thomas yana da cikakken alhakin ayyukan kasuwanci na Hukumar WHO, gami da kasafin kuЙ—i, yawan ma'aikata, gudanarwa, binciken gujewa haЙ—ari, lissafi da bin doka, da gudanarwa gabaЙ—aya. Shi ne ke da alhakin aiwatar da yawancin tsare-tsare a ЖҷarЖҷashin ajandar canji na Жҳungiya da ЖҷirЖҷirar wurin aiki mai mutuntawa da kuma haЙ—in kan aiki. A tsawon shekaru 20 da ya yi yana aiki tare da Hukumar WHO, Mista Thomas ya yi aiki a yankunan Afirka, Amurka, Gabashin Bahar Rum da Yammacin Pacific, da kuma Hukumar Bincike kan cutar daji(IARC).
translations.hypothesis: ШҜЩғШӘЩҲШұ ШұЩҠШ§ЩҶ ЩҠЩ…ШӘЩ„Щғ ШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш·ШЁ ЩҲ ШҙЩҮШ§ШҜШ© Щ…Ш§Ш¬ШіШӘШ§Шұ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш©. Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠШҜ ШұШ§ЩҲЩ„ ШӘЩҲЩ…Ш§Ші ШіЩҠШіШӘЩ…Шұ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩҶШөШЁЩҮ ЩғЩҶШ§ШҰШЁ ШұШҰЩҠШі ШӘЩҶЩҒЩҠШ°ЩҠ Щ„Щ„ШҘШҜШ§ШұШ©. Ш§Щ„ШіЩҠШҜ ШӘЩҲЩ…Ш§Ші Щ„ЩҮ Щ…ШіШӨЩҲЩ„ЩҠШ© ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„Ш© ЩҒЩҠ ЩҲШёШ§ШҰЩҒ Щ…ЩҶШёЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШІШ§ЩҶЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩ…ЩҲЩҠЩ„ШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ШұШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЁШҙШұЩҠШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШҘШҜШ§ШұШ©ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜЩӮЩҠЩӮШҢ ШҘШҜШ§ШұШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®Ш§Ш·ШұШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§ШЎЩ„Ш© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§Щ…ШӘШ«Ш§Щ„ШҢ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШҘШҜШ§ШұШ© Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш©. translations.source: Report of the meeting of the WHO Technical Advisory Group on COVID-19 Vaccine Composition (TAG-CO-VAC) held on 16-17 March 2023 In June 2022, the TAG-CO-VAC published an interim statement highlighting that index virus-based vaccines continued to confer high levels of protection against severe disease caused by all SARS-CoV-2 Variants of Concern (VOCs), including Omicron. However, given the antigenic distance and uncertainties of further viral evolution, the TAG-CO-VAC recognized that it was likely that the effectiveness of vaccines based on the index virus would reduce over time. The TAG-CO-VAC therefore advised vaccine manufacturers and regulatory authorities to consider an update of vaccine antigen composition by including Omicron, as the most antigenically distinct SARS-CoV-2 variant thus far, for administration as a booster dose. Multiple vaccine manufacturers have developed COVID-19 vaccines with an updated antigenic composition; this includes several bivalent mRNA-based vaccines containing earlier Omicron descendent lineages, in addition to the index virus (i.e., index virus + BA.1 or BA.4/5), which have been authorized for emergency use by regulatory authorities.
translations.reference: Rahoton taron Жҳungiyar Ba da Shawarwari na Fasaha ta Hukumar WHO kan Tsarin rigakafin cutar COVID-19 (TAG-CO-VAC) wanda aka gudanar a ranakun 16-17 ga watan Maris 2023 A cikin watan Yunin 2022, TAG-CO-VAC ta buga wata sanarwa ta wucin gadi wacce ke nuna cewa allurar rigakafin Жҷwayoyin cutar sun ci gaba da ba da babban matakan kariya daga mummunan cutar da duk SARS-CoV-2 Variants of Concern (VOCs) ke haifarwa, gami da Omicron. Duk da haka, idan aka yi la'akari da sinadarin daidaita garkuwar jiki, an gano cewar akwai rashin tabbas akan cewar allurar Rigakafin TAG-CO-VAC zai cigaba da tasiri bayan wani Й—an lokaci. A don haka masu bayar da shawarwari akan TAG-CO-VAC ta shawarci masu Жҷera alluran rigakafi da hukumomin da ke kula da su, da a su yi laвҖҷakari da sabunta sinadaran da ke tattare da maganin rigakafi ta hanyar haЙ—awa da sinadarin Omicron, a matsayin sa na sinadari mafi Жҷarfi wajen yaЖҷar duk wasu nau'ukan cutar SARS-CoV-2 a matsayin maganin samar da kuzari. Masu Жҷera alluran rigakafi da yawa sun haЙ“aka rigakafin COVID-19 tare da sabunta abubuwan antigenic; wannan ya haЙ—a da alluran rigakafin mRNA da yawa waЙ—anda ke Жҷunshe da nau'ukan Omicron na farko, ban da Жҷwayar cuta mai Жҷididdigewa (watau Жҷwayar cuta + BA.1 ko BA.4/5), waЙ—anda hukumomin gudanarwa suka bayar da izini don amfanin gaggawa dasu.
translations.hypothesis:
Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұ Ш№ЩҶ Щ…Ш¬Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШҙШ§ШұЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҶЩҠ Щ„ЩҖ WHO ШЁШ®ШөЩҲШө ШӘШұЩғЩҠШЁ Щ„ЩӮШ§Шӯ COVID-19 (TAG-CO-VAC) Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ Ш№ЩҸЩӮШҜ ЩҒЩҠ 16-17 Щ…Ш§ШұШі 2023.

ЩҒЩҠ ШҙЩҮШұ ЩҠЩҲЩҶЩҠЩҲ 2022ШҢ Щ…Ш¬Щ…Ш№ TAG-CO-VAC ЩӮШҜ ЩҶШҙШұ ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұ Щ…ШӨЩӮШӘШҢ ШӯЩҠШ« ЩҠЩҲШ¶Шӯ ШЈЩҶ Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ… Ш№Щ„Щү ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі Ш§Щ„ШЈШөЩ„ЩҠШ© Щ„Ш§ ШӘШІШ§Щ„ ШӘЩҲЩҒШұ Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҚ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ…Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш¶ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШҙШҜЩҠШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§ШӘШ¬Ш© Ш№ЩҶ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Щ…ШӘШәЩҠШұШ§ШӘ SARS-CoV-2 Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҮЩ…Ш© (VOCs)ШҢ ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ ШЈЩҲЩ…ЩҠЩғШұЩҲЩҶ. ЩҲЩ…Ш№ Ш°Щ„ЩғШҢ ЩҶШёШұЩӢШ§ Щ„Щ„Щ…ШіШ§ЩҒШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¶Ш§ШҜШ© Щ„Щ„ШЈШ¬ШіШ§Щ… ЩҲШ№ШҜЩ… Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩӮЩҠЩҶ ШЁШҙШЈЩҶ ШӘШ·ЩҲШұ ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШіШ§ШӘ Щ„Ш§ШӯЩӮШҢ Щ…Ш¬Щ…Ш№ TAG-CO-VAC ЩӮШҜ Ш§Ш№ШӘШұЩҒ ШЁШЈЩҶЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩ…Щ„ ШЈЩҶ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі Ш§Щ„ШЈШөЩ„ ШіЩҠЩҶШ®ЩҒШ¶ вҖӢвҖӢЩ…Ш№ Щ…ШұЩҲШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩӮШӘ. Щ„Ш°Щ„ЩғШҢ Щ…Ш¬Щ…Ш№ TAG-CO-VAC ЩӮШҜ ШҙШ¬Ш№ Щ…ШөЩҶШ№ЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш¬ЩҮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶШёЩҠЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ЩҶШёШұ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШ« ШӘШұЩғЩҠШЁ Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШҢ ЩҲШ°Щ„Щғ Ш№ЩҶ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮ ШӘШ¶Щ…ЩҠЩҶ ШЈЩҲЩ…ЩҠЩғШұЩҲЩҶШҢ ШЁШ§Ш№ШӘШЁШ§ШұЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ ШӘЩ…ЩҠШІЩӢШ§ Щ…ЩҶ SARS-CoV-2 ШӯШӘЩү Ш§Щ„ШўЩҶШҢ Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…ЩҮ ЩғШ¬ШұШ№Ш© ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ.

Ш№ШҜШ© Щ…ШөЩҶШ№ЩҠ Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ ЩӮШҜ Ш·ЩҲЩ‘ШұЩҲШ§ Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ COVID-19 Щ…Ш№ ШӘШұЩғЩҠШЁ Щ…Ш¶Ш§ШҜ Щ„Щ„ШЈШ¬ШіШ§Щ… Щ…ШӯШҜШ«Шӣ ЩҲЩҮШ°Ш§ ЩҠШҙЩ…Щ„ Ш№ШҜШ© Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ ШӘШ№ШӘЩ…ШҜ Ш№Щ„Щү mRNAШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӯШӘЩҲЩҠ Ш№Щ„Щү ШіЩ„Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘ ШЈЩҲЩ…ЩҠЩғШұЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩӮШҜЩ…ШҢ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі Ш§Щ„ШЈШөЩ„ (ШЈЩҠ ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі Ш§Щ„ШЈШөЩ„ + BA.1 ШЈЩҲ BA.4/5)ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩӮШҜ ШӘЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮШ© Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮШ§ Щ„Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ЩҒЩҠ ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҲШ§ШұШҰ Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШЁЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶШёЩҠЩ…ЩҠШ©.

translations.source: On 16-17 March 2023, the TAG-CO-VAC reconvened in Muscat, Oman. The purpose of the meeting was two-fold: to review the evidence on the performance of updated COVID-19 vaccines that incorporate descendent lineages of Omicron as a booster dose; and to establish timelines for COVID-19 vaccine composition recommendations in 2023. The evidence reviewed by the TAG-CO-VAC to assess the performance of updated COVID-19 vaccines that incorporated descendent lineages of Omicron included:
translations.reference: A ranakun 16-17 ga watan Maris Й—in 2023, kwamitin TAG-CO-VAC ya sake zama a Muscat, wato babban birnin Жҷasar Oman. MaЖҷasudin taron ya kasu kashi biyu: Domin sake nazarin shaida kan ayyukan sabbin rigakafin cutar COVID-19 waЙ—anda suka haЙ—a nau'ukan sinadarin Omicron a matsayin sinadarin Жҷarin kuzari Domin kafa jadawalin lokaci don shawarwarin haЙ—a magungunan rigakafin COVID-19 a cikin shekarar 2023. Shaidar nazarin da kwamitin TAG-CO-VAC ta sake dubawa don tantance ayyukan sabbin rigakafin cutar COVID-19 waЙ—anda suka haЙ—a nau'ukan Omicron sun haЙ—a da:
translations.hypothesis: РқР° 16-17 РјР°Р°СҖС„Рё 2023, TAG-CO-VAC sun koma cikin Muscat, Oman. ШәШұШ¶ wannan muna ne bi: wani, ana nazarin sakamakon da ke kan amfani da vaksin COVID-19 na zamani, wanda ya kuma shafi liniji na Omicron, kamar wani mataki na karfawa; kuma bi, ana bayar da matakan zaman tare da manyan bayani kan bayar da vaksin COVID-19 a 2023. Sakamakon da TAG-CO-VAC ya nazari don gwada amfani da vaksin COVID-19 na zamani, wanda ya kuma shafi liniji na Omicron, ya kasar:

translations.source: (1) published observational epidemiological studies of estimates of absolute and relative vaccine effectiveness of BA.1- or BA.4/5-containing bivalent mRNA vaccines used as a booster dose against symptomatic and severe disease; (2) laboratory-based data on the magnitude and breadth of cross-reactive immune responses against previous and circulating SARS-CoV-2 variants induced by BA.1- or BA.4/5- containing mRNA vaccines, as compared to index virus-based vaccines, used as a booster dose; and (3) laboratory-based studies and observational data on immune memory responses to evaluate the impact of repeated antigen exposure on vaccine-induced immunity and protection. Further details on the evidence reviewed by the TAG-CO-VAC can be found in the accompanying annex. Based on the review of the data described above, the TAG-CO-VAC concludes:
translations.reference: (1) An wallafa nazarin cututtukan lura da Жҷididdiga na cikakkiyar tasirin maganin rigakafi na BA.1- ko BA.4/5 mai Й—auke da bivalent mRNA alluran rigakafin da aka yi amfani da su a matsayin masu Жҷara kuzari akan alamun bayyanar cututtuka da cuta mai tsanani; (2) Bayanan da aka samu akan Й—akin gwaje-gwaje kan girma da faЙ—in martanin rigakafin na gaba da yaЙ—uwa da cututtuka mabanbanta masu alaЖҷa da cutar SARS-CoV-2 waЙ—anda BA.1- ko BA.4/5- na Й—auke da allurar mRNA, idan aka kwatanta da Жҷwayar cuta ta index idan aka kwatanta su da maganin rigakafin da ake amfani da su a matsayin masu Жҷara kuzari (3) Nazarin Й—akin gwaje-gwaje da bayanan lura da martanin ЖҷwaЖҷwalwar ajiyar rigakafi don kimanta tasirin maimaitawar antigen akan rigakafi da kuma irin kariya da take samarwa. Ana iya samun Жҷarin cikakkun bayanai kan shaidar da kwamitin TAG-CO-VAC tayi nazari akai a cikin wasu kundi na nan daba. Dangane da bitar bayanan da aka kwatanta daga farko, kwamitin TAG-CO-VAC ya yanke shawarar:
translations.hypothesis: (1) ШҘШӯШөШ§ШЎШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„Ш§ШӯШёШ§ШӘ ЩҲШ№Щ„Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШЁЩҠШҜЩҠЩ…ЩҠШ§ ШЁШ®ШөЩҲШө ШӘЩӮШҜЩҠШұШ§ШӘ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ Ш«ЩҶШ§ШҰЩҠШ© (BA.1- ШЈЩҲ BA.4/5-Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩҠШ©) Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…Ш© ЩғШ¬ШұШ№Ш© ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ Ш¶ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөШ§ШЁШ© ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШҙШҜЩҠШҜШ©Шӣ (2) Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШ§ЩҶШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШӘШЁШұ ШЁШ®ШөЩҲШө ШӯШ¬Щ… ЩҲ ЩҶШ·Ш§ЩӮ Ш§ШіШӘШ¬Ш§ШЁШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш№Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШЁШ§ШҜЩ„Ш© Ш¶ШҜ Щ…ШӘШәЩҠШұШ§ШӘ ШіШ§ШЁЩӮШ© ЩҲ Щ…ЩҶШӘШҙШұШ© Щ…ЩҶ SARS-CoV-2 Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩ… ШҘШӯШҜШ§Ш«ЩҮШ§ ШЁЩҲШ§ШіШ·Ш© Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ mRNA Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩҠШ© Ш№Щ„Щү BA.1- ШЈЩҲ BA.4/5ШҢ Щ…ЩӮШ§ШұЩҶШ© Щ…Ш№ Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі Ш§Щ„ШЈШөЩ„ШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…Ш© ЩғШ¬ШұШ№Ш© ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІШӣ ЩҲ (3) ШҜШұШ§ШіШ§ШӘ ЩҲ ШЁЩҠШ§ЩҶШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„Ш§ШӯШёШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШӘШЁШұ ШЁШ®ШөЩҲШө Ш§ШіШӘШ¬Ш§ШЁШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш°Ш§ЩғШұШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш№ЩҠШ© Щ„ШӘЩӮЩҠЩҠЩ… ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№ШұШ¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘЩғШұШұ Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ¶ШҜ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш№Ш© ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ…Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩ… ШҘШӯШҜШ§Ш«ЩҮШ§ ШЁЩҲШ§ШіШ·Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩӮШ§Шӯ. Ш§Щ„Щ…ШІЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§ШөЩҠЩ„ ШӯЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҜЩ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩ… Щ…ШұШ§Ш¬Ш№ШӘЩҮШ§ Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШЁЩ„ TAG-CO-VACШҢ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш«ЩҲШұ Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮШ§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„ШӯЩӮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ§ЩҒЩӮ. ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎЩӢ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШұШ§Ш¬Ш№Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШ§ЩҶШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш°ЩғЩҲШұШ© ШЈШ№Щ„Ш§ЩҮШҢ TAG-CO-VAC ЩҠШ®Щ„Шө:

translations.source: Booster doses of index virus-based vaccines continue to confer high levels of protection against severe disease and death caused by all SARS-CoV-2 variants, including contemporary Omicron descendent lineages. Protection from severe disease and symptomatic infection induced by index virus-based vaccines and BA.1- or BA.4/5-containing bivalent mRNA vaccines declines over time. However, protection from severe disease is maintained longer than protection from symptomatic infection. As compared to index virus-based vaccines, booster doses of BA.1- or BA.4/5-containing bivalent mRNA vaccines may modestly increase vaccine effectiveness against symptomatic disease, while the small number of studies assessing severe outcomes show similar estimates of vaccine effectiveness. Both BA.1- and BA.4/5-containing bivalent mRNA vaccines enhance the magnitude and elicit greater breadth of cross-reactive immune responses to SARS-CoV-2 variants when used as a booster dose, as compared to the index virus-based vaccines.
translations.reference: Жҳara yawan allurai na tushen Жҷwayoyin cuta suna ci gaba da ba da manyan matakan kariya daga mummunan cutar da rasa rayuka waЙ—anda duk cututtuka mabanbanta na nau'ukan cutar SARS-CoV-2 suka haifar, gami da nau'ukan sinadarin Omicron na tsawon lokaci. Kariya daga cututtuka masu tsanani da kamuwa da cutar ke haifarwa ta hanyar alluran rigakafin Жҷwayoyin cuta da BA.1- ko BA.4/5 mai Й—auke da bivalent mRNA na raguwa akan lokaci. Duk da haka, ana samun kariya daga cututtuka mai tsanani fiye da kariyar da ake samu daga cututtuka masu saurin yaЙ—uwa. Idan aka kwatanta da alluran rigakafi na tushen Жҷwayoyin cuta, masu haЙ“aka allurai na BA.1- ko BA.4/5-mai Й—auke da bivalent mRNA alluran rigakafi na iya haЙ“aka tasirin alluran rigakafi a kan bayyanar cututtuka, yayin da Жҷaramin adadin binciken da ke tantance sakamako mai tsanani yana nuna Жҷididdiga iri Й—aya na rigakafin. Sinadaran BA.1- da BA.4/5-masu Й—auke da bivalent mRNA na alluran rigakafin suna haifar da mafi girman martanin rigakafi ga cututtuka mabambanta nau'ukan SARS-CoV-2 a lokacin da aka yi amfani da su wajen Жҷarin kuzari, idan aka kwatanta da Жҷwayar cutar tushen alluran rigakafi.
translations.hypothesis: Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШұШ№Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ¬Ш№ЩҠШҢ Щ„Ш§ ШӘШІШ§Щ„ ШӘЩҲЩҒШұ ШӯЩ…Ш§ЩҠШ© Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© Ш¶ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШҙШҜЩҠШҜШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§ШӘШ¬Ш© Ш№ЩҶ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Щ…ШӘШәЩҠШұШ§ШӘ SARS-CoV-2ШҢ ШЁЩ…Ш§ ЩҒЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶШіШ§ШЁ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№Ш§ШөШұШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҲЩ…ЩҠЩғШұЩҲЩҶ. Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ…Ш§ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШҙШҜЩҠШҜШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№ШҜЩҲЩү Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ШҢ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§ШӘШ¬Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ¬Ш№ЩҠШҢ ЩҲЩғШ°Щ„Щғ Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ mRNA Ш«ЩҶШ§ШҰЩҠШ© (Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӯШӘЩҲЩҠ Ш№Щ„Щү BA.1 ШЈЩҲ BA.4/5)ШҢ ШӘШӘШ¶Ш§ШЎЩ„ Щ…Ш№ Щ…ШұЩҲШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩӮШӘ. ЩҲЩ…Ш№ Ш°Щ„ЩғШҢ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ…Ш§ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШҙШҜЩҠШҜШ©ШҢ ШӘШЁЩӮЩү Щ„ЩҒШӘШұШ© ШЈШ·ЩҲЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ…Ш§ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШҜЩҲЩү Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶. ШЁШ§Щ„Щ…ЩӮШ§ШұЩҶШ© Щ…Ш№ Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ¬Ш№ЩҠШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШұШ№Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ mRNA Ш«ЩҶШ§ШҰЩҠШ© (Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӯШӘЩҲЩҠ Ш№Щ„Щү BA.1 ШЈЩҲ BA.4/5)ШҢ ЩӮШҜ ШӘШІЩҠШҜ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ Ш·ЩҒЩҠЩҒ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩӮШ§Шӯ Ш¶ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұШ§Ш¶ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№ШұШ§Ш¶ШҢ ШЁЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ Ш№ШҜШҜ ШөШәЩҠШұ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜШұШ§ШіШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩӮЩҠЩ…ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШӘШ§ШҰШ¬ Ш§Щ„ШҙШҜЩҠШҜШ©ШҢ ШӘЩҸШёЩҮШұ ШӘЩӮШҜЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Щ…Щ…Ш§Ш«Щ„Ш© Щ„ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩӮШ§Шӯ. Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ mRNA Ш«ЩҶШ§ШҰЩҠШ© (Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӯШӘЩҲЩҠ Ш№Щ„Щү BA.1 ШЈЩҲ BA.4/5)ШҢ ШӘШ№Щ…Щ„ Ш№Щ„Щү ШІЩҠШ§ШҜШ© ШӯШ¬Щ… ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ¬Ш§ШЁШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§Ш№ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ§ШіШ№Ш© Ш¶ШҜ Щ…ШӘШәЩҠШұШ§ШӘ SARS-CoV-2ШҢ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§ ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩғШ¬ШұШ№Ш© ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒЩҠШ©ШҢ Щ…ЩӮШ§ШұЩҶШ© Щ…Ш№ Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү ЩҒЩҠШұЩҲШі Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ¬Ш№ЩҠ.

translations.source: BA.4/5-containing bivalent mRNA vaccines induced higher neutralizing antibody titres against recent descendent lineages of Omicron (BQ.1, XBB.1) as compared to BA.1-containing bivalent mRNA vaccines, when used as a booster dose.
translations.reference: BA.4/5 mai Жҷunshe da alluran rigakafin mRNA na bivalent sun haifar da mafi girma daidaiton titres antibody a kan kwanan nan na nau'ukan Omicron (BQ.1, XBB.1) idan aka kwatanta da BA.1-Й—auke da bivalent mRNA alluran rigakafi, lokacin da aka yi amfani da matsayin mai Жҷara kuzari.
translations.hypothesis: Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ mRNA Ш«ЩҶШ§ШҰЩҠШ© (BA.4/5) ЩӮШҜ ШЈШӯШҜШ«ШӘ Ш§ШіШӘШ¬Ш§ШЁШ© ЩӮЩҲЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ¬ШіШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¶Ш§ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩ…ЩҶШ№ШҢ Ш¶ШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ· Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӯЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШҜЩҠШ«Ш© Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҲЩ…ЩҠЩғШұЩҲЩҶ (BQ.1, XBB.1)ШҢ Щ…ЩӮШ§ШұЩҶШ© Щ…Ш№ Щ„ЩӮШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ mRNA Ш«ЩҶШ§ШҰЩҠШ© (BA.1)ШҢ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§ ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩғШ¬ШұШ№Ш© ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ.
